product_name_zh: MT280 无极点环光激光设备
company_name: 中航迈特增材科技(北京)有限公司
description_zh: MT280 以双波长适配 + 无级智能调控为核心，革新激光加工模式。支持 1070nm/1080nm 双波长，精准匹配不锈钢、钛合金等材质，覆盖微纳制造、精密焊接全场景。 创新电动切换系统，毫秒级一键切换高斯 / 点环 / 环形光斑，加工不中断：高斯光斑保障高精度成形，环形光斑抑制飞溅提升厚层品质，点环光斑灵活调控能量配比，攻克高反射金属加工难题。 搭载行业领先无级调节技术，实现光斑功率密度比全范围连续调控，规避加工缺陷；光束质量 M² 接近衍射极限，支持远程控制与工艺编程，无缝集成自动化产线，赋能航空航天、汽车制造等领域柔性智造升级。
description_en: The MT280 revolutionizes laser processing with dual-wavelength adaptability (1070 nm / 1080 nm) and stepless intelligent beam control, enabling precise material matching for stainless steel, titanium alloys, and other substrates across micro/nano fabrication and precision welding applications. Its innovative motorized switching system enables millisecond-level, interruption-free toggling among Gaussian, point-ring, and ring-shaped beam profiles: Gaussian ensures high-precision part formation; ring-shaped suppresses spatter to enhance thick-layer quality; point-ring allows flexible energy distribution ratio tuning to overcome challenges in high-reflectivity metal processing. Featuring industry-leading stepless beam power density ratio adjustment across the full range—eliminating common processing defects—and near-diffraction-limited beam quality (M²), the system supports remote operation, process programming, and seamless integration into automated production lines, empowering flexible smart manufacturing in aerospace, automotive, and other advanced industries.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 苏州聚复科技股份有限公司
description_zh: Panchroma™ 三拼色PLA材料是最新推出的美学系列产品。该系列产品的每根线材在横截面上均分包含三种不同颜色，在打印时，三种颜色会随着挤出头的移动自然混合，产生独特的混色效果，每一件作品都独一无二。一卷线材，三种颜色，万千可能。告别单调，让每一次打印都充满惊喜。它是追求独特美学、热爱惊喜创意的创作者、艺术家和爱好者们非常值得探索尝试的材料。
description_en: Panchroma™ Tri-Color PLA is a newly launched aesthetic filament series. Each strand features three distinct colors evenly distributed across its cross-section. During printing, these colors naturally blend as the extruder moves, generating unique, one-of-a-kind chromatic effects in every printed object. One spool delivers three colors—and infinite creative possibilities. Move beyond monotony: every print becomes an unexpected delight. This material is ideal for creators, artists, and enthusiasts who value distinctive aesthetics and revel in serendipitous design outcomes.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 苏州聚复科技股份有限公司
description_zh: PolyDryer Box XL 是 Polymaker 推出的大容量线材防潮储存盒，专为 3D 打印线材的长期干燥保存而设计。产品采用高密封结构，有效隔绝空气中的湿气，保护线材性能稳定。XL 版本内部空间更大，可容纳3kg线材，非常适合工作室或需要使用大规格线材的用户。
description_en: The PolyDryer Box XL is Polymaker’s high-capacity, moisture-proof filament storage solution, engineered for long-term drying and preservation of 3D printing filaments. Its high-seal structural design effectively isolates ambient humidity to maintain consistent filament performance. The XL variant offers expanded internal volume, accommodating up to 3 kg of filament—making it especially suitable for professional studios and users working with large-format spools.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

company_name: 深圳市大族聚维科技有限公司
description_zh: 1.全自研一体化设计，实现设备高度集成 2.长效环保滤芯，确保安全性与可持续性 3.可选配红光/绿光，满足多样化应用需求 4.配置智能监测模块，实时监测熔池、形貌及铺粉效果 5.配置常规与高温小缸，便于新材料工艺开发 6.支持无支撑或极少支撑打印，突破设计限制
description_en: 1. Fully in-house integrated design for maximum system compactness and functional cohesion. 2. Long-life eco-friendly filter cartridges ensuring operator safety and environmental sustainability. 3. Optional red or green laser wavelength configurations to address diverse application requirements. 4. Intelligent monitoring module for real-time melt pool, part morphology, and powder spreading analysis. 5. Dual build chamber options—standard and high-temperature—facilitating rapid development of novel material processes. 6. Support-free or minimal-support printing capability, unlocking unprecedented geometric freedom in part design.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 融速科技-激光送丝增材平台Robo L1
product_name_en: Robo L1 Laser Wire Additive Manufacturing Platform
company_name: 苏州融速智造科技有限公司
description_zh: Robo L1 是融速科技研发的全新一代工业级激光送丝增材制造平台，搭载自主研发的5000W超同轴激光沉积头，将增材效率提升至全新高度。成型高度尺寸达1.5米，满足中大型金属零部件打印需求。设置智能双丝盘系统，自主换丝，结合自研全闭环精密送丝系统，保障送丝全程稳定丝滑，实现连续打印不间断。支持全局气密保护，仓内氧含量可降至100ppm，满足钛合金等易氧化金属高质量打印需求。创新外滑导轨式基板，自由运送工件出仓体，大工件吊装更加便利安全。
description_en: The Robo L1 is RongSu Technology’s next-generation industrial laser wire additive manufacturing platform, featuring an in-house developed 5 kW coaxial laser deposition head that significantly elevates additive productivity. With a maximum build height of 1.5 m, it meets demanding requirements for mid-to-large-scale metal component fabrication. Its intelligent dual-spool wire feeding system enables autonomous wire changeovers, while its proprietary fully closed-loop precision wire feeding mechanism ensures smooth, stable, and uninterrupted continuous printing. Integrated global inert gas shielding reduces oxygen content inside the build chamber to ≤100 ppm—enabling high-quality printing of oxidation-sensitive alloys such as titanium. An innovative external sliding rail baseplate facilitates safe, efficient part removal—even for oversized components—enhancing operational convenience and safety.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

description_en: The Leiming Laser LiM-X400 production line is an intelligent, fully integrated system engineered for uninterrupted manufacturing operations. It supports both standalone machine operation and scalable production-line deployment, enabling high-volume, automated serial production. Centralized control via a dedicated control room facilitates smart factory implementation and intelligent production management.

company_name: 北京易加三维科技有限公司
description_zh: EP-M300 成型室可达305mm×305mm×450mm，有单激 光、双激光、四激光三种配置可选，打印效率快，优化风场结构，可打印模具钢、铝合金、不锈钢、钛合金、高温镍基合金、钴铬钼等材料，适于航空航天、模具等领域高精度、高性能零部件的直接制造。
description_en: The EP-M300 features a build volume of 305 mm × 305 mm × 450 mm and offers configurable single-, dual-, or quad-laser systems for accelerated printing. Optimized airflow dynamics ensure uniform thermal management. Compatible with tool steels, aluminum alloys, stainless steels, titanium alloys, high-temperature nickel-based superalloys, and cobalt-chromium-molybdenum alloys, it is ideally suited for direct manufacturing of high-precision, high-performance components in aerospace, mold-making, and related advanced engineering sectors.

company_name: 宁波海天增材科技有限公司
description_zh: 海天增材C800M金属3D打印机具有800mm×800mm×900mm大成型空间，Z轴高度最高可至2m，适合大型零件一体精密成型，无需分段制造。设备支持6/8/9/10激光技术方案，单刮刀单/双向铺粉，光同步铺粉技术，打印效率行业领先。内置式粉末自动流转系统，不额外占用厂房空间，无需人工干预，功能模块化设计，可自由组合。配置三级长效循环过滤系统，过滤精度H13。同时适配行业首创的灰渣安全自动处理系统。多层风场保护，幅面风速高度一致，成型过程保护镜无污染，确保全幅面零件稳定高质量打印。基于经过市场验证的成熟平台优化，面向航空航天、发动机、大型模具、汽车等大型、高精、高质要求的制造行业。
description_en: The Haitian Additive C800M metal 3D printer delivers an expansive build envelope of 800 mm × 800 mm × 900 mm—with Z-axis height extendable up to 2 m—enabling monolithic, high-precision fabrication of large components without segmentation. It supports customizable multi-laser configurations (6/8/9/10 lasers), single-blade unidirectional or bidirectional powder recoating, and synchronized optical powder spreading for industry-leading print throughput. Its built-in automatic powder circulation system occupies zero additional floor space and requires no manual intervention. Modular functional design allows flexible configuration. A triple-stage extended-life filtration system achieves H13-grade filtration efficiency. It also integrates the industry’s first gray-residue automatic safe disposal system. Multi-layer airflow protection ensures uniform face velocity across the entire build area, preventing contamination of protective optics and guaranteeing consistently high-quality part production across the full build volume. Built upon a field-proven, mature platform, the C800M targets large-scale, high-precision, high-integrity manufacturing in aerospace, engine systems, large molds, and automotive applications.

description_zh: 1.配备高精度动态温控系统，工作腔温度波动小于±0.2℃，热场稳定均匀，保障成型过程的一致性。 2.采用紧凑型一体化设计，在同等成型尺寸下整机占地面积更小，便于产线集成与灵活部署。 3.内置清粉模块，支持工作腔内完成打印与清粉全流程，提升设备利用率与操作安全性。 4.适用于汽车、航空航天、医疗、模具、科研、家电、消费品等领域。
description_en: 1. High-precision dynamic temperature control system maintains chamber temperature stability within ±0.2 °C, ensuring uniform thermal fields and consistent part formation. 2. Compact, fully integrated mechanical design minimizes footprint for the same build volume—ideal for flexible production-line integration and space-constrained environments. 3. Integrated powder removal module enables complete post-processing—including printing and depowdering—within the build chamber, enhancing equipment utilization and operational safety. 4. Suitable for applications across automotive, aerospace, medical devices, tooling, research & development, home appliances, and consumer goods industries.

product_name_en: Selective Laser Melting (SLM) Additive Manufacturing System
company_name: 深圳市大族聚维科技有限公司
description_zh: 1、全开放工艺参数包，便于二次开发； 2、上送粉，高效双向铺粉； 3、精密可调刮刀，保证铺粉精度； 4、远程云平台及APP监控 5、六振镜布局，适用批量高效打印； 6、适用于模具、3C、汽车等行业。
description_en: 1. Fully open process parameter package enabling comprehensive secondary development. 2. Top-fed powder delivery with highly efficient bidirectional recoating. 3. Precision-adjustable blade for superior layer uniformity and powder distribution accuracy. 4. Remote cloud platform and mobile app for real-time monitoring and diagnostics. 5. Hexagonal galvanometer layout supporting high-throughput batch printing. 6. Widely deployed in tooling, consumer electronics (3C), and automotive manufacturing sectors.

product_name_en: MT-CuCrZr Copper Alloy Powder – Next-Generation Upgrade
company_name: 中航迈特增材科技(北京)有限公司
description_zh: 针对CuCrZr增材制造高反射、难成形、性能调控难等核心痛点，中航迈特全链条协同攻关，成功革新升级MT-CuCrZr铜合金粉末，实现成分、粒度、性能系统性突破，年产能达300吨，批量化生产成熟稳定。 该产品作为沉淀硬化型铜合金，兼具高导电导热、高强度、耐高温、耐磨损、抗疲劳等优异特性，可加工性突出。依托“成分设计-粉末制备-打印成形-性能验证”全流程解决方案，适配多型号打印设备，精准对接航空航天、电子信息、新能源等领域高端制造需求，可高效制造火箭发动机燃烧室、新能源汽车连接器等关键部件。 中航迈特铜合金粉末系列技术成熟，打印适应性强，为各核心领域高性能部件制造提供高品质材料支撑。
description_en: Addressing core challenges in CuCrZr additive manufacturing—including high reflectivity, poor formability, and difficult property tailoring—AVIMET has achieved a comprehensive breakthrough in its upgraded MT-CuCrZr copper alloy powder through end-to-end collaborative R&D. This upgrade delivers systematic improvements in chemical composition, particle size distribution, and mechanical performance, with an annual production capacity of 300 tons and proven batch consistency. As a precipitation-hardening copper alloy, MT-CuCrZr combines exceptional electrical and thermal conductivity, high strength, elevated-temperature resistance, wear resistance, and fatigue resistance—alongside outstanding machinability. Supported by a vertically integrated solution spanning alloy design, powder production, AM processing, and performance validation, this powder is compatible with multiple commercial AM platforms and precisely fulfills high-end manufacturing demands in aerospace, electronic information, and new-energy sectors—enabling efficient production of mission-critical components such as rocket engine combustion chambers and EV battery connectors. AVIMET’s copper alloy powder portfolio demonstrates mature technology readiness and broad process compatibility, delivering premium materials for high-performance component manufacturing across critical industries.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 中航迈特增材科技(北京)有限公司
description_zh: 中航迈特以自主激光粉末床熔融（LPBF）技术为核心，创新研发10余款金属3D打印设备，成形尺寸覆盖φ100mm至1500mm，满足从研发到批量生产的多元化需求。 产品集成光束整形等新技术，获国家专项及首台（套）装备认定，已成功应用于航空航天、生物医疗、汽车模具等领域，实现批量化装机。 公司全球销售装机量已突破150台，并具备智能产线设计与3D打印工厂解决方案交付能力，持续推动高端智造升级。
description_en: AVIMET leverages proprietary Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) technology as the foundation for its innovation, having independently developed over ten metal 3D printing systems with build volumes ranging from Ø100 mm to 1500 mm—meeting diversified needs from R&D prototyping to mass production. These systems integrate advanced technologies including beam shaping and have received national special project funding and ‘first-of-its-kind’ equipment certification. They are already deployed at scale in aerospace, biomedical, and automotive tooling applications. With over 150 installed units globally, AVIMET also delivers intelligent production-line design and turnkey 3D printing factory solutions—continuously advancing high-end intelligent manufacturing.

company_name: 中航迈特增材科技(北京)有限公司
description_zh: 中航迈特深耕金属粉末材料近20年，构建了覆盖钛、镍、钴、铝、铁等9大合金系列、超200种牌号的产品体系。 公司全面突破VIGA/EIGA/PREP等五种以上国际主流雾化制粉技术，成功开发多款高性能合金粉末，并率先实现钛合金粉末100%循环再生，年产千吨级绿色钛粉，为激光粉末床熔融（LPBF）、激光立体成形（LSF）、注射成形（MIM）等工艺提供关键材料支撑。 粉末累计生产超10万炉次，广泛应用于航空航天、生物医疗、汽车模具等高精制造领域。
description_en: With nearly two decades of expertise in metal powder development, AVIMET has established a comprehensive product portfolio covering nine major alloy families—including titanium, nickel, cobalt, aluminum, and iron—and more than 200 certified grades. The company has fully mastered five or more leading international atomization technologies (VIGA, EIGA, PREP, etc.), successfully developed multiple high-performance alloy powders, and pioneered 100% closed-loop recycling of titanium alloy powder—producing over 1,000 tons annually of sustainable green titanium powder. Its powders serve as critical feedstock for LPBF, Laser Solid Forming (LSF), and Metal Injection Molding (MIM) processes. Cumulative production exceeds 100,000 furnace batches, with broad adoption across high-precision manufacturing sectors including aerospace, biomedical, and automotive tooling.

product_name_zh: 中瑞科技iSLA880光固化3D打印设备
company_name: 苏州中瑞智创三维科技股份有限公司
description_zh: iSLA880设备，是中瑞科技自主研发的工业级SLA光固化3D打印设备，占地空间小，性能稳定，打印精度高，自动化程度高，操作简单易维护，成形尺寸为800mm(X)×800mm(Y)×550mm(Z)，可成形材料为光敏树脂；该设备配备变光斑超快扫描模式有效兼顾打印效率和零件质量，液位自动控制系统与专业运动控制系统确保打印过程平稳精准，广泛应用于航空航天、机械制造、汽车交通、模具、手板、电子、高校等领域，满足工业领域用户对快速原型验证和小批量定制产品的多元化生产需求，助力产业转型制造升级。
description_en: The iSLA880 is Zhongrui Tech’s self-developed industrial-grade Stereolithography (SLA) 3D printer. Compact in footprint yet highly stable, it delivers high print resolution and advanced automation with intuitive operation and low maintenance requirements. Its build volume measures 800 mm (X) × 800 mm (Y) × 550 mm (Z), and it processes photopolymer resins. Equipped with a variable-spot ultra-fast scanning mode, it optimally balances printing speed and part quality. An automated resin level control system and a professional motion control system ensure smooth, precise printing. Widely adopted in aerospace, mechanical engineering, automotive, tooling, prototype modeling, electronics, and academia, the iSLA880 satisfies diverse industrial needs—from rapid prototyping validation to small-batch customized production—supporting digital transformation and manufacturing upgrades.

product_name_zh: 中瑞科技iSLM400Q金属3D打印设备
company_name: 苏州中瑞智创三维科技股份有限公司
description_zh: iSLM400Q金属3D打印设备是中瑞科技自主研发的明星机型，结构紧凑，性能稳定，配备四激光器，成形尺寸为400mm(X)×350mm(Y)×400mm(Z)，可成形材料涵盖不锈钢、模具钢、钛合金、铝合金、镍基高温合金等金属粉末材料，采用自研多激光扫描策略与校准算法，以及创新优化的平行风场设计，并配备完善的惰性气体保护，确保零件的致密度和表面质量；通过欧盟CE安全认证、ISO体系认证、ATEX防爆认证和RoHs认证等，具备压力控制、报警监控和一键急停等功能，确保生产过程安全可控，可满足航空航天、汽车、机械、模具等领域用户对高效率、高精度、高质量金属零件的批量化生产需求。
description_en: The iSLM400Q is Zhongrui Tech’s flagship metal 3D printer—compact, robust, and equipped with four lasers. Its build volume is 400 mm (X) × 350 mm (Y) × 400 mm (Z), and it processes stainless steel, tool steels, titanium alloys, aluminum alloys, and nickel-based superalloys. Proprietary multi-laser scanning strategies and calibration algorithms, combined with an innovatively optimized parallel airflow system and comprehensive inert gas shielding, ensure high part density and superior surface finish. Certified to EU CE safety standards, ISO quality management systems, ATEX explosion-proof requirements, and RoHS directives, it incorporates pressure regulation, real-time alarm monitoring, and emergency stop functionality—ensuring safe, controllable production. It meets the high-efficiency, high-precision, and high-quality metal part manufacturing requirements of aerospace, automotive, mechanical, and tooling industries.

product_name_zh: 中瑞科技iSLM600QN金属3D打印设备
company_name: 苏州中瑞智创三维科技股份有限公司
description_zh: iSLM600QN是中瑞科技自主研发的大幅面、四激光粉循环金属3D打印装备，主要由激光扫描系统、成形加工系统、气体保护与循环过滤系统、智能监控系统、粉循环系统以及配套软件等组成，整体布局合理、结构紧凑，自动化程度高、抗干扰能力强、响应速度快，成形尺寸为600mm(X)×600mm(Y)×900mm(Z)（不含基板高度100mm），可成形材料涵盖不锈钢、模具钢、钛合金、铝合金、钴铬合金、镍基高温合金等多种金属粉末，适用于打印大尺寸、高精度、服役条件严苛的复杂异形构件，可以满足航空航天、��工、汽车、机械、院校科研等高端制造领域用户对高性能、高效率、高质量标准零部件的制造需求。
description_en: The iSLM600QN is Zhongrui Tech’s large-format, quad-laser, powder-recirculating metal 3D printer. Comprising laser scanning, build processing, inert gas protection and filtration, intelligent monitoring, powder recirculation, and dedicated software subsystems, it features rational overall layout, compact structure, high automation, strong electromagnetic interference immunity, and rapid response. Its build volume is 600 mm (X) × 600 mm (Y) × 900 mm (Z)—excluding a 100 mm baseplate height—and it processes stainless steels, tool steels, titanium alloys, aluminum alloys, cobalt-chromium alloys, and nickel-based superalloys. Ideal for fabricating large-size, high-precision, complex geometries under demanding service conditions, it serves high-end manufacturing users in aerospace, defense, automotive, mechanical engineering, and academic research requiring high-performance, high-efficiency, and high-quality component production.

company_name: 上海远铸智能技术有限公司
description_zh: FUNMAT PRO 310 APOLLO开启工业级 FDM 3D 打印新时代——融合高性能材料、极速打印与生产级一致性。 从 PEEK 原型验证到 PAEK 终端零件制造，远铸智能以可靠性与性能重新定义工业级 FDM 的新标杆。 通过多物理场控制与过程优化技术，310 APOLLO在打印性能上实现了4倍打印速度、2倍以上Z向强度（>40 MPa）的突破；解决方案层面，配置3kg主动干燥双料箱、INTAMQuality™全流程追溯系统与RFID材料识别，确保打印稳定性与生产一致性；软件层面，INTAMSUITE NEO™智能切片系统通过精确控制温度、流速与路径，实现对高性能材料稳定可控成型。
description_en: The FUNMAT PRO 310 APOLLO ushers in a new era of industrial FDM 3D printing—uniquely combining high-performance material compatibility, ultra-fast printing speeds, and production-grade repeatability. From PEEK prototyping to PAEK end-use part manufacturing, INTAMSYS redefines the benchmark for industrial FDM with uncompromising reliability and performance. Leveraging multi-physics process control and optimization, the 310 APOLLO achieves a 4× increase in print speed and over 2× improvement in Z-direction tensile strength (>40 MPa). Its holistic solution includes a 3 kg active-drying dual-spindle filament station, the INTAMQuality™ end-to-end traceability system, and RFID-enabled material recognition—ensuring print stability and production consistency. At the software level, the INTAMSUITE NEO™ intelligent slicing engine precisely governs temperature, flow rate, and path planning to enable stable, controlled processing of high-performance polymers.

description_zh: 随着金属3D打印技术的不断发展，工业市场也在近几年快速扩张，逐渐转变为“优化制造、重塑供应链”主流选择，驱动工业领域向更高效、更灵活、更可持续的方向发展。 在工业应用领域不断的摸索中，工业制造行业逐渐成为3D金属打印技术新的拓展方向,基于此机会,联泰科技推出适用在工业制造行业的金属打印设备“Muees430L”。
description_en: As metal 3D printing technology matures, industrial markets have rapidly expanded—evolving toward ‘optimized manufacturing and supply chain reconfiguration’ as the dominant paradigm, driving industry-wide progress toward greater efficiency, flexibility, and sustainability. Building on extensive experience in industrial applications, UnionTech has launched the Muees430L: a purpose-built metal 3D printer tailored specifically for industrial manufacturing environments.

company_name: 湖南云箭集团有限公司
description_zh: 消费级熔融沉积(FDM)设备VF100，面向教育、文创、电子消费品等应用场景，主打安全、易用、新手快速入门。适合初级教学与轻量化创意制作用户。 产品特点： 1.拥有空气净化过滤技术，降低微小颗粒对用户伤害； 2.采用过热安全保护技术，工作腔门自动上锁； 3.一体触屏教学界面系统、海量模型库，无基础用户可快速入门。
description_en: The VF100 is a consumer-grade fused deposition modeling (FDM) 3D printer designed for education, cultural & creative industries, and consumer electronics applications—emphasizing safety, ease of use, and rapid user onboarding for beginners. Ideal for introductory teaching and lightweight creative projects. Key features: 1. Air purification and filtration technology minimizing exposure to fine particulates; 2. Overheat safety protection with automatic chamber door locking; 3. Integrated touchscreen instructional interface and extensive model library—enabling immediate usability even for users with zero prior experience.

company_name: 湖南云箭集团有限公司
description_zh: 专注于精密制造与科研开发的中型金属3D打印解决方案，成型尺寸为650mm×650mm×750mm。该装备在保证优异成型精度的同时，提供了适中的建造体积，是进行复杂零部件试制、新材料研发、中小批量定制化生产的理想平台。 产品特点： 1、精密高效：在中等尺寸范围内优化了扫描与成型效率，兼顾打印精度与速度。 2、应用灵活：适用于航空航天精密组件、医疗器械、高端模具、汽车核心部件等多种领域的高价值零件制造。 3、稳定可靠���集成成熟的工艺控制系统与稳定的光学系统，保障长时间打印过程的一致性。 4、成本优化：相较于超大尺寸设备，其在设备投入、运行维护及材料成本上更具可控性，投资回报率清晰。
description_en: The VM650 is a mid-sized metal 3D printing solution optimized for precision manufacturing and R&D applications, offering a build volume of 650 mm × 650 mm × 750 mm. Balancing excellent dimensional accuracy with a practical build envelope, it serves as an ideal platform for complex component prototyping, novel material process development, and low-to-medium volume customized production. Key features: 1. Precision and efficiency: Optimized scan and build dynamics deliver both high resolution and competitive throughput within the mid-size class. 2. Application versatility: Supports high-value part manufacturing across aerospace precision components, medical devices, high-end tooling, and automotive critical parts. 3. Stability and reliability: Integrates a mature process control system and robust optical architecture to ensure consistent, long-duration print performance. 4. Cost-effectiveness: Offers superior capital efficiency, lower operating and maintenance costs, and clearer ROI compared to ultra-large-format systems.

company_name: 深圳市金石三���打印科技有限公司
description_zh: 1、大理石框架结构，高等级丝杆导轨，高精度液位传感器，精密数控加工标定板校准； 2、搭配自主研发的光敏材料，匹配设备和材料的特性，开发出最佳的工艺参数包； 3、通过大理石平台加双导轨、以及双皮带结构，实现静音超平涂铺运动系统；激光即时检测液位，结合真空吸附刮板系统，保障打印的稳定性； 4、自动识别单截面零件内部与外表面信息，即时切换大小光斑进行扫描，极大提高打印速度 5、激光路径采取闭合式防尘处理，极大提高光学元件的使用寿命和环境适应性；激光在线检测，功率衰减自动补偿 6、标准升降浮块控制液位高度，快速而准确，且不用中途频繁加料；伺服电机搭配滚珠丝杆的高精度传动，保障零件尺寸的精确度
description_en: 1. Granite frame structure, high-grade lead screws and linear guides, high-precision liquid-level sensor, and precision CNC-machined calibration plate for accurate system alignment; 2. Paired with proprietary photopolymer resins—optimized material-device compatibility enables pre-validated, application-specific process parameter packages; 3. Ultra-quiet, ultra-flat recoating motion system achieved via granite platform with dual linear guides and dual-belt drive; real-time laser-based liquid-level monitoring combined with vacuum-assisted blade system ensures exceptional print stability; 4. Intelligent single-layer segmentation algorithm automatically distinguishes internal geometry from external surfaces and dynamically switches between large and small laser spot sizes during scanning—significantly accelerating print speed; 5. Fully enclosed laser path design minimizes dust contamination, greatly extending optical component service life and environmental robustness; integrated laser power monitoring with real-time automatic power compensation; 6. Standard float-block lift mechanism delivers rapid, precise resin level control without mid-print refills; high-accuracy servo motor–driven ball screw transmission guarantees dimensional fidelity of printed parts.

company_name: 深圳市金石三维打印科技有限公司
description_zh: Kings-SLS设备利用粉末材料在激光照射下烧结的原理，由计算机控制层层堆结成型。SLS技术同样是使用层叠堆积成型，所不同的是，它首先铺一层粉末材料，将材料予热到接近熔化点，再使用激光在该层截面上扫描，使粉末温度升至熔化点，然后烧结形成粘接，接着不断重复铺粉，烧结的过程，直至完成整个模型成型。可选材料种类多，价格较低。只要材料加热后粘度较低，基本就可以作为SLS的材料。包括高分子，金属，陶瓷，石膏，尼龙等多种粉末材料。
description_en: The Kings-SLS system employs selective laser sintering (SLS), a layer-by-layer additive manufacturing process in which a laser selectively fuses thermoplastic powder particles under computer control. Unlike other powder-bed processes, SLS preheats each powder layer to just below its melting point before scanning the cross-sectional contour with a focused laser beam—inducing localized sintering and bonding. The process repeats through successive powder spreading and sintering cycles until full part completion. SLS offers broad material compatibility—including nylons, polymers, metals, ceramics, gypsum, and composites—at relatively low material costs. Any powder exhibiting sufficiently low melt viscosity upon heating is generally suitable for SLS processing.

company_name: 深圳市金石三维打印科技有限公司
description_zh: 金石FDM系列打印机是以高分子线材为材料的工业级大尺寸打印设备，采用FDM熔融堆积成型工艺的原理，广泛适用PLA、ABS、TPU、碳纤维以及金属质、木质等材料，可实现最快1500克/小时的成型效率
description_en: The Kings FDM series comprises industrial-grade, large-format 3D printers utilizing thermoplastic filament feedstock and fused deposition modeling (FDM) technology. Compatible with a wide range of materials—including PLA, ABS, TPU, carbon-fiber-reinforced composites, metal-filled, and wood-filled filaments—the system achieves a maximum build rate of up to 1500 g/h.

It exclusively uses proprietary polymer composite granules manufactured in-house, delivering key advantages: low material cost, high-speed part production, superior mechanical strength, and excellent outdoor weather resistance.

company_name: 南京中科煜宸激光技术有限公司
description_zh: RM720A×12设备的批量投产，从材料兼容到工艺适配，从精度控制到效率提升，以全维度的性能优势，为鞋企提供了“高质量、高产能、低成本”的一体化解决方案。大幅面：720mm×370mm大幅面（200mm高度可拓展），整基板/分基板灵活可选，轻松实现“一板多双”，大幅提升单次打印产能。效率高：12（或24）多激光协同作业，鞋模打印效率40~120cm³/h，复杂花纹鞋模仍保持40cm³/h保底效率，同比四激光设备提效2.5倍；智能单/双向多段可变速铺粉，兼顾铺粉效率与质量。光束质量M2≤1.1，花纹/透气孔成形精度优于±0.05mm，搭接精度≤0.03mm，多激光拼接无痕过渡，细节无可挑剔。
description_en: The mass-production RM720A×12 system delivers an integrated, high-performance solution for footwear manufacturers—combining broad material compatibility, optimized process parameters, tight dimensional accuracy, and unmatched throughput. Featuring a large build volume of 720 mm × 370 mm (height extendable to 200 mm), with flexible full-plate or segmented-plate options enabling efficient 'one-plate-multiple-pairs' production. Equipped with 12 (or optionally 24) synchronized lasers, it achieves shoe mold printing rates of 40–120 cm³/h—even maintaining a guaranteed minimum of 40 cm³/h for complex tread patterns—delivering a 2.5× productivity gain over conventional 4-laser systems. Intelligent unidirectional/bidirectional multi-segment variable-speed powder recoating balances speed and uniformity. Beam quality M² ≤ 1.1 ensures exceptional feature fidelity: pattern and vent-hole accuracy better than ±0.05 mm, overlap precision ≤ 0.03 mm, and seamless multi-laser stitching with no visible transitions.

Features standardized expansion interfaces for digital laboratory integration. Capable of high-precision additive-subtractive machining of aluminum alloys, nickel-based superalloys, cobalt-based alloys, and iron-based alloys—targeting applications in aerospace, tool & die, and academic research institutions.

description_zh: 专门针对陆战野外维修作业的履带车移动式激光修复系统。该系统将集成激光送粉熔覆功能、送粉器、负载 15kg 的 轻型机器人、激光器、水冷机、集成控制系统以及自行走履带车等核心部件。

description_zh: 该工作站是针对高校及科研院所开发的全新固相增材设备，具备全防护钣金护罩，设备结构紧凑，占地面积小，可实现增材过程全参数监控，能够满足广大科研工作者的设备需求。 设备特点： •配备高性能电主轴，可进行多类型金属的固相增材制造 •增材过程温度、扭矩及压力的在线实时监测 • 数据采集及可视化 • 模块化设计，宜人化人机界面
description_en: A compact, fully enclosed solid-state additive manufacturing workstation designed for universities and research institutes. Features a space-efficient footprint and comprehensive safety enclosure. Enables full-parameter monitoring throughout the additive process—including real-time in-situ measurement of temperature, torque, and axial pressure. Key features: high-performance electric spindle for multi-material solid-state deposition; integrated data acquisition and visualization; modular architecture with ergonomic human-machine interface.

product_name_en: XIHUO M400G Green Laser Metal 3D Printer
company_name: 深圳希禾增材技术有限公司
description_zh: M400G基于希禾增材多年技术积淀与创新突破，搭载500W/700W/1000W单模绿色光纤激光器，提升材料吸收率、光束质量和稳定性，显著改善高反材料打印质量。采用“四激光并行+400³mm大幅面”，支持高精度与长周期连续生产，推动增材制造智能化、规模化。M400G适用于铜、铝、金等高反材料，解决了零件密度不足与细节成形问题，为批量化生产与高端制造提供强有力支持。通过7×24h稳定运行，满足复杂精密零件的需求，广泛应用于航空航天、汽车、医疗器械等行业，提升生产效率和精度，推动制造业技术革新。
description_en: The XIHUO M400G leverages years of proprietary R&D and breakthrough innovations, featuring a 500 W / 700 W / 1000 W single-mode green fiber laser—dramatically enhancing laser absorption, beam quality, and process stability—especially for highly reflective (high-ref) metals. Its 'quad-laser parallel processing + 400³ mm large-format build chamber' architecture supports high-precision, uninterrupted long-duration production—advancing intelligent, scalable metal AM. Optimized for copper, aluminum, gold, and other high-ref materials, the M400G resolves density deficiencies and fine-feature formation challenges—enabling reliable batch production and high-end manufacturing. Certified for continuous 7×24 h operation, it meets demanding requirements for complex, high-precision components across aerospace, automotive, and medical device industries—driving efficiency, accuracy, and technological advancement.

product_name_zh: 希禾M160G绿激光金属3D打印机
product_name_en: XIHUO M160G Green Laser Metal 3D Printer
company_name: 深圳希禾增材技术有限公司
description_zh: 希禾M160G绿光金属3D打印机，打印幅面为160×160×200mm，最小光斑15um，搭配国产自研532nm波长单模连续绿光光纤激光器，兼容高反、难熔及贵金属材料。 可稳定加工纯铜、铜合金、钛合金、不锈钢、纯钨、钨合金、铝合金等，实现微米级精细结构与极小壁厚，在高负载工业环境中长期可靠运行。 让贵金属创意、高反难熔材料精密制造与前沿材料开发一步到位。
description_en: The XIHUO M160G green laser metal 3D printer features a build volume of 160 × 160 × 200 mm and a minimum laser spot size of 15 µm. It integrates a domestically developed, 532 nm wavelength, single-mode continuous-wave green fiber laser—enabling stable processing of highly reflective, refractory, and precious metals. Compatible with pure copper, copper alloys, titanium alloys, stainless steels, pure tungsten, tungsten alloys, and aluminum alloys, it achieves micron-scale resolution and ultra-thin wall structures—operating reliably in high-load industrial environments. Ideal for precious-metal design prototyping, precision manufacturing of challenging materials, and cutting-edge material development.

product_name_zh: 希禾M350G绿激光金属3D打印机
product_name_en: XIHUO M350G Green Laser Metal 3D Printer
company_name: 深圳希禾增材技术有限公司
description_zh: M350G成型空间550x350x500mm，采用自研532nm单模连续绿光光纤激光器，激光功率500W/700W/1000W可选，专为高反、难熔及轻金属材料打造。 显著提升铜、铝、钨等材料对激光的吸收率，彻底解决红外激光成型难题。模块化设计、开源控制系统开放全部工艺参数，材料数据库持续扩展，科研与小批量生产宜。
description_en: The XIHUO M350G offers a build envelope of 550 × 350 × 500 mm and utilizes an in-house-developed 532 nm single-mode continuous-wave green fiber laser, with optional laser powers of 500 W / 700 W / 1000 W—specifically engineered for highly reflective, refractory, and lightweight metals. Significantly improves laser absorption in copper, aluminum, and tungsten—overcoming fundamental limitations of infrared laser processing. Modular hardware architecture and open-source control software provide full access to all process parameters; continuously expanding material database supports both advanced research and low-volume production.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

Fabricated from premium alloy steel offering superior high-pressure resistance and corrosion durability. Manufactured via precision casting, CNC machining, heat treatment, and surface finishing. Typical lead time: ~45 days—reduced through continuous process innovation. Applications include passenger vehicles, trucks, and construction machinery.

description_en: High-rigidity, thermally fatigue-resistant cylinder head featuring optimized intake port and combustion chamber geometry—ensuring exceptional sealing integrity and rapid thermal dissipation. Available in high-grade cast iron, with optional aluminum alloy or compacted graphite iron (CGI) variants. Production sequence: precision casting → CNC machining → heat treatment → surface finishing → helium leak testing. Typical lead time: ~90 days—compressible via concurrent engineering upgrades. Applications include commercial vehicles, heavy-duty trucks, coaches, and construction equipment engines.

product_name_en: KSS1800B High-Speed Binder Jet Sand 3D Printing System
company_name: 康硕电气集团有限公司
description_zh: 高精度 打印分辨率400DPI砂型精度 可由CT8级提高到CT7级 灵活性 打印工作箱可自由离机 便于组线物流 体积小 设备占地面积9.7m² 可大量节约设备安装占地面积 低成本 厚大砂型内壳芯打印可大量节省粘结剂 高效率 双向铺砂 最高铺砂速度400mm/s;宽幅打印 最高打印速度1200mm/s 最高打印效率360L/h
description_en: High-precision sand printing at 400 DPI resolution—improving sand mold accuracy from CT8 to CT7 grade. Highly flexible: removable print box enables seamless integration into automated production lines and logistics workflows. Compact footprint: only 9.7 m²—substantially reducing facility space requirements. Cost-effective: significantly reduces binder consumption for thick-walled cores and shells. High-efficiency operation: bidirectional sand recoating at up to 400 mm/s; wide-format printing at up to 1200 mm/s; peak print throughput of 360 L/h.

description_zh: YCJG-S260C产线，是在YCJG-S260L单机的基础上，为满足市场市场对高性能、复杂结构金属增材制造零件日益增长的规模化、柔性化与高效率生产需求而研发的自动生产线。该生产线具备高稳定性，低成本，国产化，自动化等核心技术要素，为结构复杂、成形周期短、批量制造的生产模式提供全新一站式解决方案。
description_en: The YCJG-S260C is an automated production line developed from the YCJG-S260L standalone system—to meet rapidly growing market demand for high-performance, complex-geometry metal AM parts requiring scalable, flexible, and high-throughput manufacturing. Incorporating core technologies in operational reliability, cost efficiency, domestic supply chain integration, and full automation, this line delivers a comprehensive turnkey solution for complex, short-cycle, high-volume metal part production.

Configurable with either single- or dual-laser modules, it supports processing of titanium alloys, aluminum alloys, high-temperature nickel-based superalloys, tool steels, stainless steels, and cobalt-chromium-molybdenum alloys—ideal for direct manufacturing of large-format, high-precision, high-performance components in aerospace and tooling applications.

With a build volume of Ø100 × 80 mm and a 300 W laser source, it supports biocompatible metals including titanium alloys, cobalt-chromium alloys, and stainless steels—ideal for dental prosthetics, medical devices, and creative consumer products.

product_name_zh: 融速科技-激光送丝增材平台 Laser One
product_name_en: RongSu Tech Laser Wire-Directed Energy Deposition Platform Laser One
company_name: 苏州融速��造科技有限公司
description_zh: Laser One（L1）是融速科技自主研发的DED激光送丝增材制造装备。L1瞄准工业自动化增材制造，搭载自研VEAM六激光同轴送丝打印系统，独立调节每束激光，结合定制能量场技术，提高沉积效率的同时，降低能量热输入40%以上，提高打印件成品质量。L1打印成品粗糙度最高可达5μm，支持全局气密防护系统，满足钛合金等易氧化金属高质量打印需求。配置熔池相机，熔池动态纤毫毕现，保证打印过程稳定；一体化设计实现水-气-丝-光-电全链路集成，小型轻量，安装灵活。采用融速科技自主研发的全闭环精密送丝系统，送丝全程稳定丝滑，兼容0.8—1.2mm直径丝材，且丝材利用率100%。
description_en: Laser One (L1) is RongSu Tech’s proprietary DED laser wire-feed additive manufacturing system. Designed for industrial automation, L1 integrates a self-developed VEAM six-laser coaxial wire-feed printing system with independent laser power control per beam and custom energy-field technology—reducing thermal input by over 40% while enhancing deposition efficiency and part quality. Surface roughness reaches as low as 5 μm. A global inert-gas sealing system ensures high-quality printing of oxidation-prone metals such as titanium alloys. An integrated melt pool camera enables real-time, high-fidelity monitoring of melt dynamics for stable process control. Fully integrated water–gas–wire–laser–electricity architecture delivers compact, lightweight, and flexible installation. The proprietary closed-loop precision wire-feed system ensures smooth, stable feeding across 0.8–1.2 mm wire diameters with 100% wire utilization.

product_name_zh: 协同高科XT-S400P金属3D打印设备
company_name: 深圳协同创新高科技发展有限公司
description_zh: 协同高科XT-S400P金属3D打印设备 以 “更小、更省、更快、更强” 为核心，为先进制造业重构金属增材效率与成本。 它在空间上极致优化：占地面积仅 2.64m²，达到业内最小，让高端制造的空间利用更高效。在效率上，可选配 4/6/8 光学配置配合单刀双向铺粉系统，显著提升零件成形效率。在性能上兼顾成本、精度与气密性，运行更稳定可靠。 XT-S400P 可满足 3C、模具、汽配、机器人等多行业需求，为高端制造提供更稳、更快、更经济的量产支撑，这就是我们给先进制造业的答案。
description_en: The XT-S400P metal 3D printing system redefines metal AM efficiency and cost-effectiveness for advanced manufacturing with its core principles: smaller footprint, lower cost, faster throughput, and higher performance. Its ultra-compact design occupies only 2.64 m²—the smallest in the industry—maximizing space utilization. Optional 4-, 6-, or 8-laser configurations paired with a single-blade bi-directional powder recoating system dramatically improve part build rates. Balanced for cost, dimensional accuracy, and chamber hermeticity, the system delivers stable, reliable operation. Suitable for consumer electronics, molds, automotive components, robotics, and more, the XT-S400P provides robust, rapid, and economical mass-production support for high-end manufacturing.

product_name_zh: 协同高科YJ-F600连续纤维高温工业级3D打印设备
company_name: 深圳协同创新高科技发展有限公司
description_zh: 协同高科高温工业级连续纤维 3D 打印设备 YJ-F600，以最高挤出温度≥500℃、成型腔室温度≥200℃的硬核性能，突破材料边界，可稳定打印 PEEK、PEI 等高性能工程塑料，并适配连续碳纤维、玄武岩纤维、玻璃纤维等增强材料，真正实现 “以塑代钢” 的轻量化与高强度。600×450×500mm 的大成形空间，支持一体化大部件打印，双喷嘴自动切换，兼顾效率与品质，适配小批量定制与工业量产需求。它打印的不仅是形状，更是媲美金属的力学性能，广泛赋能航空航天、汽车轻量化等高端领域，为工业制造注入全新可能。
description_en: The YJ-F600 continuous-fiber high-temperature industrial 3D printer delivers breakthrough performance with a maximum extrusion temperature ≥500°C and chamber temperature ≥200°C, enabling stable processing of high-performance thermoplastics such as PEEK and PEI. It is fully compatible with continuous reinforcement fibers—including carbon, basalt, and glass—enabling true 'plastic-to-metal' substitution through lightweighting and enhanced strength. Featuring a large build volume of 600 × 450 × 500 mm, it supports monolithic large-part fabrication. Dual-nozzle automatic switching ensures optimal balance between speed and quality, meeting both small-batch customization and industrial-scale production needs. Parts exhibit mechanical performance comparable to metal, empowering high-end applications in aerospace, automotive lightweighting, and beyond.

product_name_en: ArcMan Kit Arc Additive Manufacturing Kit
company_name: 南京英尼格玛工业自动化技术有限公司
description_zh: ArcMan Kit 为现有机床提供经济高效的模块化电弧增材制造（DED-Arc AM）解决方案。通过标准化接口，以及可并入机床刀库的枪头，它能快速部署升级现有CNC设备为原位增减材复合制造系统，显著缩短工艺流程并释放前所未有的设计自由度。拓展兼容工业机器人、协作机器人及多轴执行机构，全面覆盖电弧增材制造场景。
description_en: The ArcMan Kit provides a cost-effective, modular arc-based directed energy deposition (DED-Arc AM) solution for retrofitting existing machine tools. Standardized interfaces and a tool-changer–compatible torch enable rapid upgrade of CNC machines into on-machine hybrid additive–subtractive manufacturing systems—shortening process cycles and unlocking unprecedented design freedom. Compatible with industrial robots, collaborative robots, and multi-axis motion platforms, it comprehensively covers diverse arc AM applications.

company_name: 天津埃尔泰克复合材料有限公司
description_zh: DAHLTRAM®系列为埃尔泰克自主研发设计的3D 打印专用树脂，可满足低温、中温及高温需求，已在众多主流3D打印设备上获得性能认证，高强度，高耐温，同时蠕变低，材料中的纤维增强保证其打印的工装及产品具有高刚度，低翘曲率，成品精准可靠，相比同类高温聚合物：吸湿性更低，强度重量比更优、刚度与抗弯强度更高。
description_en: The DAHLTRAM® series comprises Eltek’s proprietary 3D printing resins engineered for low-, medium-, and high-temperature applications. Certified on leading commercial 3D printers, these resins deliver high strength, elevated heat resistance, low creep, and fiber-reinforced rigidity—ensuring high dimensional stability, minimal warpage, and precise, reliable final parts. Compared to peer high-temperature polymers, DAHLTRAM® resins offer lower moisture absorption, superior strength-to-weight ratio, and higher stiffness and flexural strength.

product_name_zh: 铸造砂型3D打印设备——AJS 1800（领跑者产品）
product_name_en: AJS 1800 Foundry Sand Mold 3D Printer (Flagship Product)
company_name: 共享智能装备（安徽）
description_zh: AJS 1800是共享智能装备（安徽）迭代优化后的新一代批量生产机型，设备成型尺寸为1800×1000×700mm，打印精度为±0.3mm，打印层厚可在0.2-0.5mm区间灵活调节，设备单层打印耗时≤18秒，打印效率高达200L/h，是一款面向航空航天、工程机械、泵阀等领域，用于新产品研发及小批量生产的新机型； 同时搭配新旧砂斗、供砂系统、旧砂回用系统等配套设备，可大幅度缩短新产品研发周期、提升生产效率，让企业新品设计突破复杂结构限制！
description_en: The AJS 1800 is the next-generation serial production sand mold 3D printer developed by G-TECH (Anhui). With a build envelope of 1800 × 1000 × 700 mm, ±0.3 mm dimensional accuracy, and adjustable layer thickness (0.2–0.5 mm), it achieves ≤18 seconds per layer and a printing rate of up to 200 L/h. Designed for aerospace, construction machinery, pumps, and valves, it accelerates new product development and supports low-volume production. Integrated with new/old sand hoppers, sand supply, and sand recycling systems, it drastically reduces development cycle time and boosts productivity—enabling innovative, complex casting designs.

company_name: 共享智能装备（安徽）
description_zh: 此产品为KOCEL精心自主设计的马年桌面伴手礼产品，桌面装饰、玄关点缀皆适宜，适合馈赠客户、合作伙伴、亲朋好友等
description_en: A premium desktop ornament designed by KOCEL to commemorate the Year of the Horse—ideal for desk display or entryway accent. Perfect for gifting to clients, partners, family, and friends.

product_name_zh: 铸造砂型3D打印设备——AJS 2500（领跑者产品）
product_name_en: AJS 2500 Foundry Sand Mold 3D Printer (Flagship Product)
company_name: 共享智能装备（安徽）
description_zh: AJS 2500是共享智能装备（安徽）自主研发的产业化应用机型，设备最大成型尺寸为2500×1500×1000mm，打印精度为±0.4mm，打印层厚可在0.2-0.8mm区间灵活调节，满足2-3mm的薄壁砂型、复杂螺旋水套结构以及一体化成型产品等多元需求；设备单层打印耗时≤14秒，打印效率高达650L/h，能够快速响应客户大型复杂铸件的开发需求。此外，多台设备可组成砂型3D打印生产线、3D打印工厂，满足客户大批量生产需求！AJS 2500设备销量已超100台，在一汽铸造等知名客户处已实现产业化应用。
description_en: The AJS 2500 is G-TECH (Anhui)’s independently developed industrial-scale sand mold 3D printer. With a maximum build volume of 2500 × 1500 × 1000 mm, ±0.4 mm accuracy, and adjustable layer thickness (0.2–0.8 mm), it meets demanding requirements including thin-wall molds (2–3 mm), complex spiral water jackets, and monolithic castings. At ≤14 seconds per layer and a printing rate of up to 650 L/h, it rapidly fulfills customer needs for large, complex castings. Multiple units can be deployed as a sand mold 3D printing line or factory for high-volume production. Over 100 units have been sold, with successful industrial deployment at leading customers including FAW Casting.

company_name: 安徽中体新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 银的导电性能卓越，导电率高达6.3×107 S/m，位居所有金属之首，尤其适用于高频、高精度电子器件；其低温加工成型特性避免了高温对基材的损害，在冷喷涂和粘接剂喷射工艺中具有独特优势。在增材制造领域，银粉展现出巨大潜力，尤其在电子、新能源和医疗器械等高端领域表现突出，具体应用包括电子器件与导电线路、5G/6G射频器件、生物传感器及冷喷涂等。增材制造技术能构建复杂结构，如多孔、网状等，有助于提升散热效率或功能性，同时3D打印技术能有效减少材料浪费，非常适合贵金属的成本控制。
description_en: Silver exhibits the highest electrical conductivity among all metals (6.3 × 10⁷ S/m), making it ideal for high-frequency, high-precision electronic components. Its low-temperature processing capability avoids thermal damage to substrates—providing unique advantages in cold spray and binder jetting processes. In additive manufacturing, silver powder demonstrates exceptional potential in high-end sectors including electronics, new energy, and medical devices—enabling applications such as conductive traces, 5G/6G RF components, biosensors, and cold spray coatings. AM enables complex geometries (e.g., porous or lattice structures) that enhance thermal management or functional performance, while minimizing precious metal waste and optimizing cost control.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

product_name_zh: 铜铬锆合金粉——精确成分控制
product_name_en: CuCrZr Alloy Powder — Precise Composition Control
company_name: 安徽中体新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 铜铬锆（CuCrZr）合金粉是典型高强高导铜合金粉，锆（Zr）可抑制晶粒生长，保障高温下的强硬度与导电性，但加工中 Zr 易烧损，成分控精准是行业难题。 中体新材突破此瓶颈，其 CNPC-CuCrZr 可将 Zr 含量精准控在 0.1-1%（偏差≤0.1%），确保批次性能一致；粒度 15-53μm，霍尔流速＜20s/50g，适配激光粉末床熔融工艺，烧结活性好，打印件致密度超 99%、维氏硬度均值 175.3；热处理后抗拉强度 584MPa、屈服强度 487MPa、延伸率 20%，性能行业领先。 目前中体新材月产能达数吨，可稳定供应高品质产品。
description_en: CuCrZr alloy powder is a high-strength, high-conductivity copper alloy. Zirconium (Zr) inhibits grain growth, preserving strength, hardness, and conductivity at elevated temperatures; however, Zr volatility during processing makes precise compositional control a key industry challenge. Zhongti New Materials has overcome this bottleneck: its CNPC-CuCrZr powder maintains Zr content within 0.1–1.0 wt% (tolerance ≤0.1%), ensuring consistent batch-to-batch performance. With particle size 15–53 μm and Hall flow rate <20 s/50 g, it is optimized for laser powder bed fusion (LPBF). It exhibits excellent sintering activity, yielding printed parts with >99% density and an average Vickers hardness of 175.3 HV. After heat treatment, tensile strength reaches 584 MPa, yield strength 487 MPa, and elongation 20%—performance leading the industry. Monthly production capacity exceeds several tons, supporting stable supply of high-quality powder.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 安徽中体新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 中体新材料创新废料回收粉末制造工艺，采用氢化脱氢HDH和等离子球化方 式，废粉利用率＞ 95%。粉末经激光粒度分析和SEM检测确认，卫星球率＜3% ，满足SLM、EBM等工艺要求，打印件力学性能（抗拉强度≥900MPa，延伸率≥ 10%）与原生粉相当，但碳排放仅为EIGA 工艺10%，适用批量化工业生产。
description_en: Zhongti New Materials has innovated a waste-recycling powder manufacturing process combining hydrogenation–dehydrogenation (HDH) and plasma spheroidization, achieving >95% reuse of reclaimed powder. Laser diffraction and SEM analysis confirm satellite particle content <3%, satisfying stringent requirements for SLM and EBM processes. Mechanical properties—including tensile strength ≥900 MPa and elongation ≥10%—match those of virgin powder, while carbon emissions are reduced to just 10% of those from the EIGA process, enabling sustainable, high-volume industrial production.

company_name: 安徽中体新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: Scalmalloy®是一种高性能铝合金粉末材料，由铝、镁和钪等精选元素组成，专为增材制造设计。它具有双峰微观结构，细小的等轴晶粒被较粗的柱状晶粒分隔开，其中在过共晶点（共晶含量 0.4-0.55wt%）添加 Sc，Mg 细化晶粒并提高强度。 相较于传统铝合金，Scalmalloy®展现出卓越特性。抗拉强度可达 533MPa，屈服强度高达527MPa，且在高应力下仍具备良好延展性，断裂伸长率超 10%，优于传统 7 系铝合金。Scalmalloy®的密度较低，同体积下比钛合金轻约 60%，可以显著降低结构重量，适用于需要减轻重量的应用场景。
description_en: Scalmalloy® is a high-performance aluminum alloy powder specifically engineered for additive manufacturing, composed of aluminum, magnesium, and scandium. Its bimodal microstructure features fine equiaxed grains separated by coarser columnar grains. Scandium addition (0.4–0.55 wt% at the eutectic point) refines grain structure and enhances strength, while magnesium further contributes to grain refinement and strengthening. Compared to conventional aluminum alloys, Scalmalloy® delivers superior performance: ultimate tensile strength up to 533 MPa, yield strength up to 527 MPa, and elongation exceeding 10%—surpassing traditional 7xxx-series alloys. With low density, it is ~60% lighter than titanium alloys at equal volume, offering significant weight reduction for structural applications.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 苏州倍丰智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 倍丰登顶批量化高峰的旗舰之作，首次在 400 级设备中加入了 16 激光，打印效率飞升，倍丰 SP450 金属 3D 打印机，作为倍丰勇攀金属 3D 打印批量化应用高峰的标杆旗舰之作，以 450×450×300mm 大尺寸打印幅面解锁工业级量产加工边界，更开创性在 400 级设备阵营中率先搭载 16 激光核心配置，凭借多激光协同联动的硬核技术优势，实现打印效率的跨越式跃升，锋芒尽显、冠绝群雄，为各行业高端智造的批量化落地筑牢核心装备根基。
description_en: The SP450 metal 3D printer represents Befon’s flagship platform for high-volume production—marking the first 400-class system to integrate 16 lasers. With a large build volume of 450 × 450 × 300 mm, it expands the boundaries of industrial-scale additive manufacturing. Its pioneering 16-laser configuration leverages multi-laser synchronized scanning to achieve a quantum leap in build speed and throughput—establishing a new benchmark for scalable, high-productivity metal AM across industries.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 倍丰纯铜打印解决方案
company_name: 苏州倍丰智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 倍丰凭借自研优质铜粉、自研核心工艺与设备创新的三重创新合力，已实现全系设备均具备纯铜、铜合金打印能力；打印成品致密度高达 99.9% 以上，壁厚可至＜0.5mm、精度达＜0.02mm，性能与传统工艺水准完全一致。
description_en: Befon’s pure copper printing solution combines proprietary high-purity copper powder, self-developed core process parameters, and hardware innovations across its entire printer lineup—enabling reliable printing of pure copper and copper alloys. Printed parts achieve >99.9% density, wall thicknesses down to <0.5 mm, and dimensional accuracy better than ±0.02 mm—matching the performance of conventionally manufactured components.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 苏州倍丰智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 通过倍丰自研GHA工艺制备高纯铜及铜合金粉末，球形度高达 95%， 并以其超高品质保证了产品拥有极高的致密度，可达99.95%。倍丰高纯铜粉搭配倍丰自研打印工艺，导热率与导电率基本与常规纯铜性能一致！
description_en: Produced via Beifeng’s proprietary GHA process, this high-purity copper and copper alloy powder achieves a sphericity of up to 95%, ensuring exceptional density—up to 99.95%. When paired with Beifeng’s in-house printing process, its thermal and electrical conductivity closely match those of conventional pure copper.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 西安知象光电科技有限公司
description_zh: INSPIRE 2 搭载全面升级的双模式 3D 扫描系统，细节捕捉能力提升30%，扫描范围扩大 30%，为中尺寸物体提供优秀的追踪精度与扫描准度。INSPIRE 2 配备特征点、标记点和全局标记点三种追踪模式，灵活适应各类扫描需求。结构光模式支持全部三种追踪方式，激光模式则支持标记点与全局标记点追踪。
description_en: The INSPIRE 2 features a comprehensively upgraded dual-mode 3D scanning system, delivering a 30% improvement in detail capture capability and a 30% expansion in scanning range—ideal for medium-sized objects. It offers three tracking modes: feature-point, marker-point, and global marker-point tracking, enabling flexible adaptation to diverse scanning requirements. Structured-light mode supports all three tracking methods; laser mode supports marker-point and global marker-point tracking.

company_name: 西安知象光电科技有限公司
description_zh: 光学跟踪式 3D 扫描仪，大小物体皆可，扫描精度最高可达 0.02 mm。光学追踪与手持扫描双模式切换，轻松应对各类复杂扫描场景。独立扫描功能突破视野限制，精准捕捉跟踪仪盲区隐藏结构
description_en: An optical-tracking handheld 3D scanner capable of high-precision scanning across object sizes, with accuracy up to 0.02 mm. Dual-mode operation—optical tracking and freehand scanning—enables effortless handling of complex scanning scenarios. Independent scanning functionality overcomes field-of-view limitations, precisely capturing hidden geometries within the tracker’s blind zones.

description_zh: 无线蓝色激光 3D 扫描仪，专为中小型工件打造
description_en: A wireless blue-laser 3D scanner engineered specifically for small- to medium-sized workpieces.

product_name_zh: RFD-6 实时烘干和供料系统
product_name_en: RFD-6 Real-Time Drying and Feeding System
company_name: MOVA 原子重塑
description_zh: RFD-6 是一款重新定义多材料管理的新一代智能枢纽。 RFD-6 的一盒多用功能，能够同时为两台打印机供料，最大化利用空间并节省成本。其独特的双区设计支持最高 80°C 的独立烘干，让您在打印的同时，为从常用 PLA、PETG 到尼龙、PC 等高吸湿性材料进行烘干。通过 RFID 自动识别和直观界面设计，耗材管理变得前所未有的简单。一台 Palette 300 可连接多达 6 个 RFD-6，轻松驾驭多达 36 种颜色和多种材料。无论是平面还是垂直放置，RFD-6 都能完美融入您的创意空间，为您带来卓越的使用体验。
description_en: The RFD-6 redefines multi-material management as a next-generation intelligent hub. Its ‘one-box-multiple-functions’ design simultaneously feeds two 3D printers, maximizing space utilization and cost efficiency. Its unique dual-zone architecture enables independent drying at temperatures up to 80°C—ideal for hygroscopic materials ranging from standard PLA and PETG to nylon and polycarbonate. RFID-based automatic filament identification and an intuitive interface simplify material management like never before. A single Palette 300 can connect up to six RFD-6 units—supporting up to 36 colors and multiple materials. Whether placed horizontally or vertically, the RFD-6 seamlessly integrates into any creative workspace, delivering an outstanding user experience.

company_name: MOVA 原子重塑
description_zh: Palette 300拥有 12 个全自动切换的喷嘴构成，在连接6个RFD-6料盒后，不仅能驾驭多达 12 种材料、36 种色彩，更支持0.2/0.4/0.6mm 不同口径的喷嘴，为创作提供前所未有的自由度。凭借自研一体化喷嘴的精简结构和强大的精准定位系统，每一次喷嘴的切换都能实现无缝衔接和微米级的完美打印。高达 50+ 传感器和 4 个摄像头实时监控五大感知系统，从送料到温度管理，确保每一环节都完美无瑕。其最高打印速度可达 800mm/s，最高加速度达 25,000mm/s²，在保证高效稳定的同时，运行噪音低至 ≤48 分贝。
description_en: The Palette 300 features 12 fully automated nozzle positions. When connected to six RFD-6 feeders, it supports up to 12 materials and 36 colors—and accommodates interchangeable nozzles with diameters of 0.2 mm, 0.4 mm, and 0.6 mm, offering unprecedented creative freedom. Its proprietary integrated nozzle design and precision positioning system ensure seamless, micron-level-accurate transitions between nozzles. Over 50 sensors and four cameras continuously monitor five key subsystems—from filament feeding to thermal management—guaranteeing flawless performance at every stage. With a maximum print speed of 800 mm/s and acceleration up to 25,000 mm/s², it delivers high-speed, stable operation while maintaining ultra-low noise levels (≤48 dB).
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

company_name: 浙江精亮新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: PEEK 全称聚醚醚酮，是一种高性能的特种工程塑料，具有耐高温、耐化学腐蚀、机械强度高、自润滑性好等突出优势，能在严苛工况下稳定使用 长期使用温度可达 260℃，短期耐温能突破 300℃，且高温环境下仍能保持良好的机械性能 2. 优异的耐化学腐蚀性：对酸、碱、有机溶剂等多数化学介质稳定，仅在浓硫酸等强氧化性酸中会发生降解 拉伸强度、弯曲强度和抗疲劳性优异，抗冲击能力强，尺寸稳定性好，不易变形 摩擦系数低，无需额外润滑也能实现低磨损运转，适合制作耐磨运动部件 医用级PEEK无毒、不致畸，可用于植入性医疗器械；同时耐γ射线、紫外线辐照，耐候性极佳。 应用于航空航天部件、汽车发动
description_en: PEEK is a high-performance specialty engineering thermoplastic renowned for exceptional thermal stability, chemical resistance, mechanical strength, and inherent lubricity. It maintains structural integrity under severe operating conditions, with continuous service temperatures up to 260°C and short-term resistance beyond 300°C—retaining excellent mechanical properties even at elevated temperatures. It exhibits outstanding resistance to acids, alkalis, and organic solvents—degrading only in strong oxidizing agents such as concentrated sulfuric acid. PEEK demonstrates superior tensile and flexural strength, fatigue resistance, impact toughness, and dimensional stability. Its low coefficient of friction enables low-wear operation without external lubrication—ideal for wear-resistant moving components. Medical-grade PEEK is non-toxic and non-teratogenic, approved for implantable medical devices; it also exhibits excellent resistance to gamma radiation and UV exposure, ensuring outstanding weatherability. Applications include aerospace components and automotive powertrain parts.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 浙江精亮新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: PEBA 全称聚醚嵌段酰胺，是一种由聚醚软段和聚酰胺硬段组成的嵌段共聚物，兼具聚酰胺的刚性、耐磨性与聚醚的柔韧性、耐低温性 它的核心性能特点如下 1. 出色的柔韧性与耐低温性：低温环境下仍能保持良好弹性，耐低温可达 -60℃ 左右，远优于多数常规弹性体。 2. 优秀的抗疲劳与耐磨性：反复弯折、拉伸后不易变形损坏，耐磨性能好，适合制作高频率运动部件。 3. 良好的耐化学性与耐候性：对多数溶剂、油脂有耐受性，抗紫外线老化能力较强，长期使用不易发黄脆化。 4. 易加工与轻量化：可通过注塑、挤出等工艺成型，密度低，制品轻便，还能与部分塑料共混改性提升性能。 PEBA 广泛应用于运动鞋中
description_en: PEBA is a block copolymer composed of polyether soft segments and polyamide hard segments—combining the rigidity and abrasion resistance of polyamide with the flexibility and low-temperature resilience of polyether. Key performance attributes include: (1) Exceptional flexibility and low-temperature performance—retains elasticity down to approximately −60°C, far exceeding most conventional elastomers; (2) Outstanding fatigue resistance and abrasion resistance—maintains structural integrity after repeated bending and stretching, ideal for high-frequency motion components; (3) Good chemical resistance and weatherability—resistant to common solvents and oils, with strong UV resistance and minimal yellowing or embrittlement during long-term use; (4) Ease of processing and lightweight nature—processable via injection molding and extrusion, with low density and potential for polymer blending to enhance performance. Widely used in athletic footwear.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 浙江精亮新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: TPU 全称热塑性聚氨酯弹性体，是一种兼具橡胶高弹性和塑料可加工性的高分子材料。 它的核心性能特点如下： 1. 优异的弹性与韧性：断裂伸长率高，受压或拉伸后能快速恢复原状，抗冲击性强。 2. 良好的耐候与耐化学性：耐高低温（一般耐受 -40℃ 至 120℃），抗紫外线老化，对油脂、弱酸弱碱有较好耐受性。 3. 易加工成型：可通过注塑、挤出、吹塑等常规塑料加工工艺成型，废料还能回收再利用。 4. 生物相容性较好：部分医用级 TPU 可用于制作导管、假肢等医疗用品。 TPU 广泛应用于鞋材、手机壳、水管软管、运动器材、医疗器件等领域。
description_en: TPU is a high-performance thermoplastic elastomer that combines rubber-like elasticity with plastic-like processability. Key attributes include: (1) Excellent elasticity and toughness—high elongation at break and rapid recovery after compression or stretching, with strong impact resistance; (2) Superior environmental and chemical resistance—operational across −40°C to 120°C, resistant to UV aging and compatible with oils, weak acids, and weak alkalis; (3) Ease of processing—compatible with standard plastic manufacturing techniques including injection molding, extrusion, and blow molding; scrap is recyclable; (4) Good biocompatibility—medical-grade TPU is suitable for catheters, prosthetics, and other healthcare applications. Used extensively in footwear, smartphone cases, flexible tubing, sports equipment, and medical devices.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 浙江精亮新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 水溶支撑3D打印耗材是一类可溶于水的专用支撑材料，核心作用是为FDM 3D打印中悬空、悬挑等复杂结构提供支撑，打印完成后可直接用水溶解去除，无需手动剥离。 其核心性能特点如下： 1. 水溶性优异：主流材料（如PVA、PEG、水溶性PETG）在常温或温水（40-60℃）中可快速溶解，搭配搅拌或超声波清洗能进一步提升效率，溶解后无残留，可完美保留模型精细结构。 2. 支撑稳定性强：打印时能与PLA、ABS等常用建模材料良好兼容，成型后支撑结构硬度适中，不易变形坍塌，保障复杂模型的打印精度。 3. 局限性明确:多数水溶耗材（如PVA）吸湿性极强，需密封干燥保存，否则易堵头；部分材料溶解速度受
description_en: A specialized FDM 3D printing support material designed to dissolve completely in water—providing reliable support for overhangs, bridges, and other complex geometries. After printing, supports are removed simply by immersion in water—eliminating manual post-processing. Key features: (1) Rapid water solubility—common formulations (e.g., PVA, PEG, water-soluble PETG) dissolve efficiently in ambient or warm water (40–60°C); agitation or ultrasonic cleaning further accelerates dissolution, leaving zero residue and preserving fine model details; (2) Robust support stability—exhibits excellent compatibility with common modeling filaments (e.g., PLA, ABS), forming rigid yet dimensionally stable supports that resist deformation or collapse during printing—ensuring high-fidelity output; (3) Well-defined limitations—most water-soluble filaments (e.g., PVA) are highly hygroscopic and require sealed, dry storage to prevent nozzle clogging; dissolution rate may vary depending on formulation and water temperature.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

product_name_zh: Laser Plus 激光粉末床锻打印设备
product_name_en: Laser Plus Laser Powder Bed Forging System
company_name: 西安空天机电智能制造有限公司
description_zh: Laser Plus 是西空智造研发推出的鸳鸯版锻打印设备，将光束整形增材制造功能与超快激光冲击强化系统集成于一体，独创分区打印模式，实现“同幅面双工艺”。该设备为航空航天、先进制造等领域的前沿材料研究与创新结构设计，提供了强大的科研与教学实践平台。该设备整合了连续激光成形、激光冲击强化、高质量锻打印以及激光光束整形四种强大的工作模式，可根据不同制造需求进行灵活配置。
description_en: Developed by Xi’an Kaitian Intelligent Manufacturing Co., Ltd., the Laser Plus is a dual-function forging-printing system integrating beam-shaping additive manufacturing with ultrafast laser shock peening. Its innovative zonal printing mode enables ‘dual-process-on-one-build-area’. This platform serves as a powerful research and teaching tool for cutting-edge material development and novel structural design in aerospace and advanced manufacturing. It unifies four core operational modes: continuous-wave laser additive manufacturing, laser shock peening, high-quality forging printing, and laser beam shaping—offering flexible configuration tailored to specific manufacturing requirements.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 西安空天机电智能制造有限公司
description_zh: 电子束选区熔化技术以高能电子束为能量源实现金属粉末材料的选区熔化打印，具备高真空、低应力、��效率、快响应等优势，适用于 TiAl、纯铜/铜合金、难熔/难焊合金等高熔点、高反、硬脆材料的高质量成形。目前普遍采用“线扫描” 策略，存在“热控”能力欠佳、零件易开裂变形、复杂区域直线拟合效率低、精度差等亟待解决的问题。 西空智造在国内率先提出电子束点打印技术，将电子束“线扫描” 改为“点扫描”，瞬间产生成千上万个 “点熔池”，实现“单枪多束点面熔”，精度和效率得以有效提升。
description_en: The XKZZ-M100 employs electron beam melting (EBM) technology—a high-vacuum, low-residual-stress, high-efficiency metal AM process ideal for high-melting-point, highly reflective, or brittle materials such as TiAl alloys, pure copper/copper alloys, and refractory/welding-challenging alloys. Conventional EBM uses line-scanning strategies, which suffer from suboptimal thermal control, part cracking/deformation, inefficient linear approximation in complex regions, and compromised accuracy. Xi’an Kaitian pioneered electron beam point printing in China—replacing line-scanning with dynamic point-scanning—to generate thousands of instantaneous ‘point melt pools’, achieving ‘single-gun, multi-beam, point-and-area melting’. This innovation significantly enhances both accuracy and productivity.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: SJF-P380  工业级增材制造设备
company_name: 厦门汉印股份有限公司
description_zh: 汉印 SJF-P380 应用了自主研发的选择性喷射熔融（SJF）技术。利用了先进的单溶液成型技术，结合闭环温度控制和墨滴检测技术，实现高效、高精度的3D打印。设备装备工业级陶瓷喷头，确保打印过程的稳定性和持久性。同时可以通过实时远程监测功能，轻松掌控打印进程，大大提高生产效率和打印质量。
description_en: The Hanprint SJF-P380 utilizes Hanprint’s proprietary Selective Jet Fusion (SJF) technology. Leveraging advanced single-solution jetting, closed-loop temperature control, and real-time droplet monitoring, it delivers high-efficiency, high-precision 3D printing. Equipped with industrial-grade ceramic printheads, it ensures exceptional process stability and longevity. Integrated remote real-time monitoring enables full visibility into print progress—significantly improving production efficiency and part quality.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

product_name_zh: LCD-L298  商用级弹性体专用增材制造设备
product_name_en: LCD-L298 Commercial-Grade Elastomer-Specific Additive Manufacturing System
company_name: 厦门汉印股份有限公司
description_zh: 汉印LCD-L298 秉持 From machines to systems 的核心理念，是一款专为弹性体材料打印量身打造的商用级增材制造设备。设备搭载 LCD 选择性区域透光技术，COB光源+菲涅尔透镜+染色偏光片+智能光强校准，一举突破传统 LCD 设备的光强瓶颈，为双组份弹性体打印提供高精度与高效率的双重保障。
description_en: Aligned with Hanprint’s ‘From machines to systems’ philosophy, the LCD-L298 is a commercial-grade AM system purpose-built for elastomer materials. It implements LCD-based selective area illumination with a COB light source, Fresnel lens, dyed polarizer, and intelligent light-intensity calibration—overcoming traditional LCD systems’ light uniformity and intensity limitations. This architecture delivers both high precision and high throughput for demanding two-part elastomer printing applications.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

description_en: PEBA-90A is a high-performance 3D printing filament engineered for extreme resilience, lightweight construction, impact resistance, and stable mechanical properties across a wide temperature range—optimized for high-toughness, high-elasticity applications including sports equipment, medical braces, and flexible industrial components.

description_zh: PLA木质（PLA-Wood）具有仿木质外观效果，表面哑光细腻不显层纹。该产品基于PLA材料，具有PLA易打印性的特点；采用发泡技术，轻量化，密度0.7g/cm3。
description_en: PLA-Wood delivers a realistic wood-like appearance with a matte, fine surface finish that conceals layer lines. Based on PLA, it retains excellent printability; its foaming technology achieves lightweighting with a density of 0.7 g/cm³.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

description_en: ABS offers low cost and robust mechanical properties, including superior toughness and impact resistance—ideal for producing durable, functional parts. Its high heat deflection temperature makes it suitable for outdoor and elevated-temperature applications.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

description_zh: PETG是一款性价比高的具有防水性、耐化学性、高韧性的透明材料；韧性远超ABS；打印成品具有一定透明度，表面光滑；像PLA一样易打印，无需恒温腔，不会发生翘边开裂。
description_en: PETG is a high-value transparent material offering water resistance, chemical resistance, and exceptional toughness—significantly exceeding ABS in ductility. Printed parts exhibit good transparency and smooth surface quality. Like PLA, it prints reliably without an enclosed heated chamber and resists warping and cracking.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

product_name_zh: 协同高科YJ-X260-M连续纤维桌面级3D打印设备
product_name_en: Xietong High-Tech YJ-X260-M Desktop Continuous Fiber 3D Printer
company_name: 深圳协同创新高科技发展有限公司
description_zh: 协同高科YJ-X260-M 是一款桌面级连续纤维增强复合材料 3D 打印装备，以桌面机的亲民价格，提供工业级的稳定品质与性能。它配备双喷头与自动剪断功能，可高效打印结构复杂的高性能复合材料零件，适配连续碳纤维、玄武岩纤维、玻璃纤维等增强材料与 PLA、PC、PA 等树脂，广泛应用于高性能工具、工装夹具、固定装置等场景。直线导轨 + 滚珠丝杆运动控制、自动喷嘴清洁与缺丝检测等工业级保障，确保打印过程稳定可靠，让中小企业与研发团队也能轻松拥有工业级增材制造能力，为高性能零部件的研发与小批量生产提供灵活、经济的解决方案。
description_en: The Xietong High-Tech YJ-X260-M is a desktop-grade continuous fiber-reinforced composite 3D printer delivering industrial-grade stability and performance at an accessible price point. Featuring dual nozzles with automated filament cutting, it efficiently produces complex, high-performance composite parts. Compatible with continuous carbon, basalt, and glass fibers—as well as PLA, PC, and PA resins—it is widely used for high-performance tools, jigs, fixtures, and workholding applications. Industrial-grade features—including linear rails + ball screws motion control, automatic nozzle cleaning, and filament run-out detection—ensure reliable, stable printing, empowering SMEs and R&D teams to adopt industrial additive manufacturing for flexible, cost-effective prototyping and low-volume production.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

product_name_zh: 协同高科YJ-X300-M连续纤维小型工业级3D打印设备
product_name_en: Xietong High-Tech YJ-X300-M Compact Industrial Continuous Fiber 3D Printer
company_name: 深圳协同创新高科技发展有限公司
description_zh: 协同高科YJ-X300-M 是一款小型工业级连续纤维增强复合材料 3D 打印装备，提供工业级的稳定品质与性能。它配备双喷头与自动剪断功能，可高效打印结构复杂的高性能复合材料零件，适配连续碳纤维、玄武岩纤维、玻璃纤维等增强材料与 PLA、PC、PA 等树脂，广泛应用于高性能工具、工装夹具、固定装置等场景。直线导轨 + 滚珠丝杆运动控制、自动喷嘴清洁与缺丝检测等工业级保障，确保打印过程稳定可靠，让中小企业与研发团队也能轻松拥有工业级增材制造能力，为高性能零部件的研发与小批量生产提供灵活、经济的解决方案。
description_en: The Xietong High-Tech YJ-X300-M is a compact industrial continuous fiber-reinforced composite 3D printer engineered for industrial-grade reliability and performance. Equipped with dual nozzles and automated filament cutting, it enables efficient fabrication of structurally complex, high-performance composite components. It supports continuous carbon, basalt, and glass fibers alongside PLA, PC, and PA resins—making it ideal for high-performance tooling, jigs, fixtures, and workholding. Precision motion control (linear rails + ball screws), automatic nozzle cleaning, and filament run-out detection ensure consistent, dependable operation—enabling SMEs and R&D teams to deploy industrial additive manufacturing for agile prototyping and economical small-batch production.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 山东创瑞激光科技有限公司
description_zh: CR-S350专为高反射金属设计，该机搭载超高精度光学系统，激光光斑直径小于20微米，铺粉层厚可在10-30微米之间选调，配置高精度扫描系统，能够在整个成形区域内保持高度一致的成形质量。CR-S350成功将绿光超精密3D打印技术优势直接转化为产品优势，实现了纯铜材料打印件最小壁厚0.1毫米，最小流道间隙0.15毫米，成形尺寸精度达0.05毫米。成型件密度超过99.8%，表面粗糙度Ra值低至3微米以下，这些指标均为行业先进水平。
description_en: The CR-S350 is specifically engineered for highly reflective metals. It integrates an ultra-high-precision optical system with a laser spot diameter <20 µm and adjustable layer thickness from 10–30 µm. A high-accuracy scanning system ensures uniform build quality across the entire build area. Leveraging green-light ultra-precision technology, the CR-S350 achieves industry-leading specifications: minimum wall thickness of 0.1 mm and minimum flow channel gap of 0.15 mm for pure copper parts; dimensional accuracy of ±0.05 mm; relative density >99.8%; and surface roughness Ra <3 µm.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 全流程一站式粉末自动化循环方案
company_name: 山东创瑞激光科技有限公司
description_zh: 全流程一站式粉末自动化循环方案，包含粉末筛分、输送、供料、回收循环方案，保证了零件打印过程、移动粉缸更换、清粉过程中粉末始终处于密封和保护气体环境中，为大型 SLM 设备提供定制化的粉末后处理方案，提高了设备的可靠性、安全性和自动化水平。
description_en: This end-to-end automated powder recycling solution encompasses powder sieving, conveying, feeding, and recovery. It maintains full powder containment and inert gas protection throughout printing, powder cylinder replacement, and post-build powder removal—providing customized powder handling for large-scale SLM systems and significantly enhancing equipment reliability, safety, and automation levels.

product_name_en: CR-M600 Series Industrial Mold-Dedicated SLM System
company_name: 山东创瑞激光科技有限公司
description_zh: CR-M600是公司自主研发的第二代工业模具专用定制机型，激光数量升级为8束，继承第一代模具专机稳定的打印质量和工艺数据的基础上，极大提升了金属鞋模、轮胎模具等工业模具制造速度。成形材料有铝合金、钛合金、镍基高温合金、钴铬合金、不锈钢、模具钢等，成形尺寸600x450x200 mm 。
description_en: The CR-M600 is the company’s second-generation industrial mold-dedicated SLM system, featuring an upgraded 8-laser configuration. Building upon the proven process stability and data consistency of the first-generation mold system, it dramatically accelerates production of industrial molds—including footwear and tire molds. Compatible with aluminum alloys, titanium alloys, nickel-based superalloys, cobalt-chrome alloys, stainless steels, and mold steels, it offers a build volume of 600 × 450 × 200 mm.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 工业级光固化DLP高速打印机
company_name: 杭州喜马拉雅信息科技有限公司
description_zh: 1.设备类型：工业级高速光固化成型技术； 2.可用材料：双组分材料，韧性材料，透明材料等405nm光敏树脂材料； 3.整机尺寸：670×530×1700mm； 4.打印尺寸：280×160×350mm 5.光源：工业级 4K 光机（分辨率 3840×2160）； 6.均匀度：≥90%； 7.打印速度：90~200mm/h;（配合透氧膜使用） 8.分层厚度：0.03-0.2mm（可调）； 9.XY轴精度：0.075mm； 10.Z轴类型：滚珠丝杆+双直线导轨+闭环电机；
description_en: An industrial-grade high-speed DLP 3D printer utilizing 405 nm photopolymer resins—including dual-component, tough, and transparent formulations. Key specifications: machine dimensions 670 × 530 × 1700 mm; build volume 280 × 160 × 350 mm; industrial 4K light engine (3840 × 2160 resolution); optical uniformity ≥90%; print speed 90–200 mm/h (with oxygen-permeable membrane); layer thickness adjustable from 0.03–0.2 mm; XY resolution 0.075 mm; Z-axis driven by ball screw + dual linear rails + closed-loop motor.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 杭州喜马拉雅信息科技有限公司
description_zh: 1.打印尺寸:350×350×350mm 2.挤出头规格：2~3mm 3.打印材料：各类陶泥、瓷泥、紫砂泥等黏土材料 4.打印层厚：0.2~3mm 5.打印速度：50~120mm/s 6.运动轴定位精度：0.01mm±0.01mm(≤10mm)或±0.01%XL(≤10mm) 7.料仓容积：2.4L、4kg 8.设备净重：120kg 9.材料仓：防爆合金容器
description_en: A dedicated ceramic clay 3D printer supporting various clays—including earthenware, porcelain, and zisha (purple sand) clay. Specifications: build volume 350 × 350 × 350 mm; extruder nozzle diameter 2–3 mm; layer thickness 0.2–3 mm; print speed 50–120 mm/s; motion axis positioning accuracy 0.01 mm ± 0.01 mm (≤10 mm) or ±0.01% XL (≤10 mm); material hopper capacity 2.4 L (4 kg); net weight 120 kg; explosion-proof alloy material container.
categories_zh: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备

company_name: 杭州喜马拉雅信息科技有限公司
description_zh: 1.喷嘴温度：≤270℃ 2.床温度：≤120℃ 3.成型室温度：≤50℃ 4.喷嘴直径：0.4mm、0.6mm 5.喷嘴数量：2个 6.平台数量：2个，可独立进行工作 7.每个平台打印尺寸：200X300X330mm 8.XY轴精度：0.01mm 9.Z轴方向：0.025mm 10.打印层厚：0.1mm-0.4mm 11.打印速度：20-120mm/s 12.整机尺寸：780X560X1750mm 13.柔性耗材打印速度：≥60mm/s，最高80mm/s，可高速打印多种柔性材料。 14.支持耗材：316L不锈钢、PA12-CF、PA12-GF、85A TPU等耗材
description_en: A versatile multi-material FDM 3D printer supporting high-performance and flexible filaments. Key features: nozzle temperature ≤270 °C; heated bed temperature ≤120 °C; chamber temperature ≤50 °C; dual nozzles (0.4 mm and 0.6 mm); dual independent build platforms (each 200 × 300 × 330 mm); XY resolution 0.01 mm; Z resolution 0.025 mm; layer thickness 0.1–0.4 mm; print speed 20–120 mm/s; flexible-material print speed ≥60 mm/s (up to 80 mm/s); overall dimensions 780 × 560 × 1750 mm; compatible with 316L stainless steel, PA12-CF, PA12-GF, and 85A TPU.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 埃太科(上海)贸易有限责任公司
description_zh: Artec Jet是一款基于SLAM技术的强大激光雷达系统，专为大范围高精度数据采集而设计。 Artec Jet支持手持、无人机和车载三种部署方式，灵活应对各类场景需求。凭借超快采集速度和强大适应能力，该设备可在GPS信号缺失等传统三维测绘技术难以覆盖的环境中，实现测量级精度的大范围数据采集。
description_en: The Artec Jet is a powerful SLAM-based LiDAR system designed for large-scale, high-precision 3D data acquisition. Supporting handheld, UAV-mounted, and vehicle-mounted deployment, it delivers survey-grade accuracy even in GPS-denied environments where conventional 3D mapping techniques fall short—thanks to its ultra-fast capture speed and exceptional environmental adaptability.

company_name: 无锡爱丽兹三维科技有限公司
description_zh: “爱丽兹”隶属于江阴市龙山合成材料有限公司，“龙山合成”是一家从事改性材料30年+的国家重点高新技术企业，为国家级专精特新小巨人，拥有独立CNAS实验室。Aliz应运而生，专注于3D打印耗材产品的ODM/OEM服务，为整个非金属3D打印行业提供整体解决方案。 Aliz爱丽兹3D打印耗材--兼容所有类型的FDM 3D打印机 PLA/PETG/ABS/ASA/TPU柔性耗材/PET/PPS/PA，以及各类CF、GF高性能工业级3D打印耗材等
description_en: Aliz is a brand under Jiangyin Longshan Synthetic Materials Co., Ltd.—a national high-tech enterprise with over 30 years’ expertise in polymer modification, recognized as a national 'Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative' (ZXXT) 'Little Giant' enterprise and equipped with an independent CNAS-accredited laboratory. Aliz specializes in ODM/OEM services for 3D printing filaments, delivering comprehensive solutions for the non-metal 3D printing industry. Aliz filaments are fully compatible with all FDM printers and include PLA, PETG, ABS, ASA, flexible TPU, PET, PPS, PA, and high-performance industrial-grade CF/GF-reinforced variants.
categories_zh: 复合材料（碳纤维增强复合材料等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 无锡爱丽兹三维科技有限公司
description_zh: Aliz爱丽兹PETG透明度高（表面光泽度好-亮）；与常规PETG相比，拥有良好的抗冲击性（韧性好）；打印件，可长期使用；食品接触级； 品质对标一线品牌，如（eSun、Polymaker、Kexcelled等），但，爱丽兹Aliz现属于品牌推广阶段，价格存在绝对优势，完全是对标二线进行让利销售，我们的耗材有一线品牌品质的五大核心特点： （1）层接黏度高，层接性好； （2）颜色很正，完全对应拓竹打印机的色卡； （3）支持高速打印（可以开高流量打印），全程开狂暴模式； （4）打印的支撑容易拆除； （5）层接强度好，不易拉丝。
description_en: Aliz PETG offers high transparency and excellent surface gloss. Compared to standard PETG, it delivers superior impact resistance (enhanced toughness) and long-term durability in printed parts. Certified for food contact, its quality matches leading global brands (e.g., eSun, Polymaker, Kexcelled), while its competitive pricing reflects strategic market positioning during brand rollout. Five core quality attributes distinguish Aliz PETG: (1) high interlayer adhesion strength; (2) precise color fidelity aligned with Bambu Lab’s official color chart; (3) support for high-flow, high-speed printing—even in 'Turbo Mode'; (4) easy support removal; (5) strong interlayer bonding and minimal stringing.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 无锡爱丽兹三维科技有限公司
description_zh: 我们为什么要开发PLA+ Pro版本？ 随着3D打印机制造商推动速度的极限，材料必须跟上。PLA+ Pro版本是专门设计的： *解锁更高的打印速度：即使在加速打印速度下，也能实现出色的层粘合和细节。 *增强层间粘合：它拥有比我们的PLA+ Basic更强的层粘结力，显着降低分层的风险，更坚固，更可靠的零件。 *保持易用性：它保留了您期望从我们的材料中获得的低翘曲和易于印刷的特性。 来自工业3D打印机制造商测试的反馈是响亮的： 他们证实，与我们的PLA+ Basic配方相比，Pro提供了“更好的层粘合和更快的打印速度”。
description_en: Developed to meet the accelerating demands of next-generation 3D printers, Aliz PLA+ Pro delivers enhanced performance without sacrificing usability: • Enables higher print speeds while maintaining excellent interlayer adhesion and fine detail resolution. • Features stronger interlayer bonding than Aliz PLA+ Basic—reducing delamination risk and yielding more robust, reliable parts. • Retains low warpage and ease-of-printing characteristics expected from Aliz materials. Feedback from industrial 3D printer manufacturers confirms: 'PLA+ Pro delivers better layer adhesion and faster print speeds versus our PLA+ Basic formulation.'
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 无锡爱丽兹三维科技有限公司
description_zh: 采用Aliz碳纤维3D打印耗材实现工业性能！ PA-CF碳纤维：内含15-30%碳纤维，力学性能对比普通PA大幅提升，是一款具备高强度、高韧性、耐冲防震、 耐高温、质量轻的优异功能线材。 PETG-CF碳纤维：其通过添加5-15%短切碳纤维增强PETG的刚性，使打印出来的模型作为结构件经久耐用。 PLA-CF碳纤维：添加5%-10%含量的碳纤维来增强PLA易分解，易老化特性，同时保留原有的易打印性，加入纤 维的同时使得打印产品不显层纹，更具表现力。 PPS-CF碳纤维：优越的机械性能，高阻燃性，尺寸稳定、低吸水率、耐化学性，使得在工业产品应用中有更好的选择。
description_en: Aliz carbon-fiber-reinforced filaments deliver true industrial performance: • PA-CF (15–30% carbon fiber): Dramatically improves mechanical properties vs. standard PA—offering high strength, toughness, impact resistance, thermal stability, and lightweighting. • PETG-CF (5–15% short carbon fiber): Enhances stiffness and structural longevity for load-bearing applications. • PLA-CF (5–10% carbon fiber): Mitigates PLA’s inherent biodegradability and aging while preserving ease of printing—and yields smoother, layer-line-free surfaces with improved visual fidelity. • PPS-CF: Combines outstanding mechanical performance, flame retardancy, dimensional stability, low moisture absorption, and chemical resistance—ideal for demanding industrial applications.
