product_name_zh: SIMATIC ET 200BL-西门子新一代经济型IO
product_name_en: SIMATIC ET 200BL — Siemens New Generation Economical I/O System
company_name: 西门子（中国）有限公司
description_zh: 全新推出的SIMATIC ET 200BL是西门子分布式I/O系统的最新产品，专为满足各行业客户需求而设计的经济型自动化解决方案。该系统在保持SIMATIC质量标准的同时，以优化的功能特性，为您提供了极具吸引力的高性价比选择。SIMATIC ET 200BL作为专为经济型自动化解决方案设计，支持全球供货，以及全球主要区域认证，特别适合基本I/O功能需求的应用场景。
description_en: The newly launched SIMATIC ET 200BL is Siemens’ latest distributed I/O system, engineered as a cost-optimized automation solution tailored to diverse industry requirements. Maintaining Siemens’ rigorous quality standards, it delivers exceptional value through optimized functionality—supporting global supply and major regional certifications. Ideal for applications requiring fundamental I/O capabilities.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 西门子（中国）有限公司
description_zh: S7-200 SMART G2 是 S7-200 SMART 的第二代全新升级款，更是该系列自 2012 年上市以来最新的重磅革新升级！超薄外观设计大幅节省柜体空间占用，CPU 与扩展模块具备高度灵活扩展性，可轻松适配各类自动化应用场景。 • 紧凑刀片式设计，减少柜内空间占用 • 硬件升级，项目空间大幅提升 • 便捷的迁移工具，方便快速项目转换 • 直插式端子设计，布线更合理 • 多轴运控，支持 Trace 功能
description_en: The S7-200 SMART G2 is the second-generation upgrade of the S7-200 SMART series—and the most significant evolution since its 2012 launch. Its ultra-slim blade design minimizes cabinet space requirements. The CPU and expansion modules offer highly flexible scalability for diverse automation applications. Key features include: compact blade-style form factor; enhanced hardware enabling larger project capacity; intuitive migration tools for rapid project conversion; plug-in terminal blocks for optimized wiring; and multi-axis motion control with Trace functionality.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: 西门子全新系列触摸屏SMART LINE PLUS
product_name_en: Siemens New SMART LINE PLUS HMI Series
company_name: 西门子（中国）有限公司
description_zh: 西门子推出全新系列硬件 SMART LINE PLUS，包含 7 寸和 10 寸两个型号，组态软件为 WinCC flexible SMART V5 SP1。 SMART LINE PLUS 采用了全新的外观设计，除了支持 SMART LINE V5 的所有功能外，还额外支持 SIMATIC S7-1200/1500 (S7 Plus Communication)，SIMATIC S7-1200/1500 (S7 PUT/GET Communication) 和 MODBUS TCP/IP 通讯驱动，支持导入博途工程文件中的 PLC 变量，支持把数据记录存储到 HMI设备内存。
description_en: Siemens introduces the new SMART LINE PLUS HMI series, available in 7-inch and 10-inch models, configured with WinCC flexible SMART V5 SP1 engineering software. Featuring a modern industrial design, SMART LINE PLUS extends beyond SMART LINE V5 functionality by adding native support for SIMATIC S7-1200/1500 (S7 Plus Communication), SIMATIC S7-1200/1500 (S7 PUT/GET Communication), and MODBUS TCP/IP protocols. It enables direct import of PLC variables from TIA Portal engineering projects and supports local data logging to HMI device memory.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: 毅速第三代多激光金属3D打印机E3-420
product_name_en: Yisu Third-Generation Multi-Laser Metal 3D Printer E3-420
company_name: 上海毅速激光科技有限公司
description_zh: 1.最大成形尺寸（含基材厚度）：400×400×420mm； 2.零件打印精度：尺寸100mm以内，±0.1mm~±0.2mm；大于100mm，±0.1%~±0.15%； 3.最大扫描速度：7m/s（根据工艺需求确定）； 4.焦平面光斑直径：40~80μm； 5.最小成形层厚度：20μm； 6.打印过程成形室氧含量：≤100ppm（ 由客户气源纯度决定）； 7.主机配备长效过滤系统，用于气体粉尘过滤； 8.主机配备冷却系统，用于光学部件、加热板； 9.成形舱可装配不同材质的刮刀，根据所做零件材质和结构，选用合适刮刀，可实现最佳铺粉效果， 且铺粉刮刀可由操作者自行更换。
description_en: The Yisu E3-420 is a third-generation multi-laser metal 3D printer (SLM) with a maximum build volume (including substrate thickness) of 400 × 400 × 420 mm. Key specifications: dimensional accuracy ±0.1–0.2 mm (for features ≤100 mm) or ±0.1–0.15% (for features >100 mm); maximum scan speed 7 m/s (process-dependent); focused spot diameter 40–80 µm; minimum layer thickness 20 µm; build chamber oxygen content ≤100 ppm (dependent on customer gas purity); integrated long-life filtration system for gas and particulate removal; dedicated cooling system for optics and heated build plate; interchangeable wiper blades (material- and geometry-optimized) for optimal powder spreading—user-replaceable for maximum flexibility.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 深圳市智能派科技有限公司
description_zh: 爱乐酷土星4U 16K是一款高性能光固化3D打印机，基于创新的土星4U倾斜离型技术和智能检测系统，针对用户核心需求进行全面升级：16K超高清打印精度，集成料槽恒温加热系统，优化构建板防滑设计，并新增智能摄像头照明功能。进一步降低使用门槛，带来更稳定高效率的使用体验，轻松获得手办级精细模型。
description_en: The Anycubic Saturn 4U 16K is a high-performance SLA 3D printer featuring an innovative Saturn 4U tilting release technology and an intelligent detection system. It delivers comprehensive upgrades addressing core user needs: 16K ultra-high-resolution printing accuracy, an integrated resin tank temperature stabilization system, optimized anti-slip build plate design, and a newly added intelligent camera illumination function. These enhancements lower the operational barrier while delivering greater stability and efficiency—enabling effortless production of figurine-grade, highly detailed models.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

company_name: 深圳市智能派科技有限公司
description_zh: CC2是爱乐酷在国内推出的首款CoreXY结构3D打印机，让多彩模型打印更简单高效。其搭载CANVAS单喷头多通道切换系统，可流畅实现四色打印，打印速度高达500mm/s。料架升级为自动可回收设计，换色效率提升15%，轻松呈现色彩丰富的作品。 机身采用全封闭金属与钢化玻璃结构，配合内部阻燃材料，兼顾坚固与安全。运行噪音低至45dB，内置HEPA H12高效滤网与椰壳活性炭复合滤芯，对0.3μm颗粒物过滤效率超99%，呵护环境与呼吸健康。 CC2具备强大兼容性，热端最高支持350℃，可打印碳纤维、玻璃纤维等高性能材料。无论是作为个人兴趣还是专业生产力，都能完美胜任。
description_en: The Anycubic CC2 is Anycubic’s first domestically launched CoreXY-architecture 3D printer, engineered to simplify and accelerate full-color model printing. Equipped with the CANVAS single-nozzle multi-channel switching system, it enables seamless four-color printing at speeds up to 500 mm/s. Its filament spool holder has been upgraded to an automatic, recyclable design—improving color-change efficiency by 15% and enabling vibrant, multi-hued outputs. The fully enclosed metal-and-tempered-glass chassis incorporates flame-retardant internal materials for enhanced durability and safety. Operating noise is reduced to just 45 dB, and the built-in HEPA H12 filter combined with coconut-shell activated carbon achieves >99% filtration efficiency for 0.3 µm particles—ensuring a healthier working environment. With hotend compatibility up to 350 °C, the CC2 supports high-performance materials including carbon fiber and glass fiber composites—making it equally suitable for professional production and advanced personal use.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

company_name: 北京格拉飞可斯科技有限公司
description_zh: Meshy 6：更智能的几何体，更适配多色 3D 打印的工作流 Meshy 6 提升了生成模型的精度与适用性，主要体现于以下三方面： - 更平滑的有机模型：为角色、生物等有机形态生成更符合解剖结构的网格，表面更平滑。 - 更清晰的硬表面模型：显著提升机械、建筑等模型的边缘锐利度，拓扑结构更简洁合理。 - 适配多色 3D 打印：自动简化复杂纹理为干净色块，直接生成已涂色的 3MF 文件，无缝过渡物理打印。 Meshy 6 带来更稳定可靠的贴图表现，主要体现在： - 贴图更清晰、更干净、更完整，对复杂细节的还原更精准。 - 新增去光照控制，支持自由选择是否生成带烘焙光影的贴图。
description_en: Meshy 6: Smarter Geometry Generation, Optimized for Multi-Color 3D Printing Workflows. Meshy 6 significantly enhances model fidelity and print readiness across three key dimensions: (1) Smoother Organic Models—generates anatomically accurate, surface-smooth meshes ideal for characters and biological forms; (2) Crisper Hard-Surface Models—sharply defines edges and simplifies topology for mechanical and architectural models; (3) Native Multi-Color 3D Printing Support—automatically converts complex textures into clean, discrete color blocks and directly exports pre-colored 3MF files for seamless physical printing. Meshy 6 also delivers more stable and reliable texture mapping: textures are sharper, cleaner, and more complete—with improved fidelity on intricate details. A new lighting-removal control allows users to freely choose whether baked lighting is included in the output texture.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 西安赛隆增材技术股份有限公司
description_zh: 西安赛隆掌握SEBM和PREP的核心技术，为材料、设备、模型设计优化、打印工艺验证等多个行业的客户提供完整的3D打印解决方案。 在医疗领域：赛隆已与多家医疗器械公司建立合作，共同开发和注册骨科植入物。产品涉及髋关节、膝关节和脊柱等标准化和个性化的骨科应用场景。 在汽车领域：为满足汽车零部件感应加热的技术要求，赛隆开发了铜及铜合金的成型工艺包，并研发了多种类型的铜感应线圈。 在航空航天领域：赛隆已成功实现了对裂纹敏感材料（钛铝合金）、难熔金属及其合金的选区电子束熔化（SEBM）打印。
description_en: Xi’an Sailong Additive Manufacturing Co., Ltd. masters core technologies in Selective Electron Beam Melting (SEBM) and Plasma Rotating Electrode Process (PREP), offering end-to-end 3D printing solutions—including material development, equipment integration, part design optimization, and process validation—for diverse industries. In healthcare, Sailong collaborates with multiple medical device companies to co-develop and register orthopedic implants for hip, knee, and spinal applications—covering both standardized and patient-specific use cases. In automotive, Sailong has developed specialized copper and copper alloy processing packages to meet induction-heating requirements, along with various copper induction coil designs. In aerospace, Sailong has successfully achieved SEBM printing of crack-sensitive alloys (e.g., titanium aluminides), refractory metals, and their alloys.

product_name_zh: Sailong-Y150Plus型电子束选区熔化成形设备
product_name_en: Sailong-Y150Plus Selective Electron Beam Melting Equipment
company_name: 西安赛隆增材技术股份有限公司
description_zh: 西安赛隆Y150 Plus选区熔化成形设备搭载自主研发的大功率、高精度、长寿命的间热式电子枪，成形尺寸170 mm × 170 mm × 180 mm，在医用骨科植入物领域的小批量、高精度制造方面优势明显。适用材料:钛及钛合金、Ta、ZrNb等医用材料。
description_en: The Sailong-Y150Plus selective electron beam melting (SEBM) system features an in-house developed high-power, high-precision, long-life indirectly heated electron gun. With a build volume of 170 mm × 170 mm × 180 mm, it excels in small-batch, high-precision manufacturing of medical orthopedic implants. Compatible materials include titanium and titanium alloys, tantalum (Ta), and zirconium-niobium (ZrNb) biomedical alloys.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: 赛隆微波等离子体制粉设备
product_name_en: Sailong Microwave Plasma Powder Production System
company_name: 西安赛隆增材技术股份有限公司
description_zh: 西安赛隆将柔性制造、低碳减排与循环再生的核心理念深度融合，自主开发了15kW、25kW两大功率微波等离子体发生器，配备了高效的粉末收集与分级系统、冷却系统、送料系统、高精度温度控制系统及气体控制系统，突破高功率微波加热技术和多种气流压力精确调控技术，实现了不同牌号金属、非金属球形粉末的制备。 设备可搭载球化制粉与纳米制粉工艺模块，方便用户按需进行金属、非金属类粉末生产，具有纯度高、粒径可控、节能环保、适应性广等优点。 纳米粉末(10-100nm):Si、Cu、Ni、碳化物、氮化物、氧化物等。 球化粉末(1~100um):钛合金、铁基合金、难熔金属及合金、高温合金、高温陶瓷等。
description_en: Integrating flexible manufacturing, low-carbon emission, and circular regeneration principles, Xi’an Sailong has independently developed 15 kW and 25 kW microwave plasma generators. The system includes high-efficiency powder collection and classification, cooling, feeding, high-precision temperature control, and gas control subsystems—breaking through high-power microwave heating and precise multi-pressure gas flow regulation technologies to enable spherical powder production across diverse metallic and non-metallic grades. Modular configurations support both spheroidization and nanopowder production, empowering users to produce custom metallic and non-metallic powders on demand. Key advantages include high purity, controllable particle size distribution, energy efficiency, environmental sustainability, and broad material adaptability. Nanopowders (10–100 nm): Si, Cu, Ni, carbides, nitrides, oxides, etc. Spherical powders (1–100 µm): titanium alloys, iron-based alloys, refractory metals & alloys, superalloys, high-temperature ceramics, etc.

product_name_zh: 3DeVOK MT 专业级三维扫描仪
company_name: 思看科技（杭州）股份有限公司
description_zh: 3DeVOK MT定位于更专业的生产力工具，依托工业扫描仪的技术积累，配备创新的多光源技术，满足多场景用户需求；结合专业工具软件、更灵活的参数设置、直观高效的交互设计及稳定性能，全面提升您的工作效率。 特色功能：34线蓝色激光高效扫描、蓝色/红外激光免贴点扫描、大幅面红外散斑与局部精细扫描智能结合、超级混合拼接、无光扫描、黑色/反光物品无需喷粉即可扫描、轻松应对户外环境扫描。
description_en: The 3DeVOK MT is a professional-grade productivity tool built upon industrial-grade scanning expertise. Featuring innovative multi-source illumination technology, it meets diverse application requirements across multiple scenarios. Integrated with professional software, flexible parameter configuration, intuitive and efficient human-machine interaction, and robust performance, it significantly elevates workflow efficiency. Key capabilities include: high-speed 34-line blue laser scanning; markerless scanning using blue or infrared lasers; intelligent fusion of large-area infrared speckle scanning with localized fine-detail scanning; Super Hybrid Registration; ambient-light-free scanning; direct scanning of black or reflective objects without spray; and reliable outdoor operation.

product_name_zh: SIMSCAN-E智能无线掌上型三维扫描仪
company_name: 思看科技（杭州）股份有限公司
description_zh: SIMSCAN-E是一款集前沿无线扫描技术、强劲性能和轻盈形态于一身的掌上三维扫描仪。不惧复杂车间、高空作业、户外无电环境，随心掌控百般测量场景 。全方位轻量化设计，轻巧随行。前沿边缘计算模组，搭配无线数据传输，无线驾驭，实力非凡。不惧复杂车间、高空作业、户外无电环境，皆能稳定驾驭。
description_en: The SIMSCAN-E is a cutting-edge, wireless handheld 3D scanner that unites frontier wireless scanning technology, exceptional performance, and ultra-lightweight ergonomics. Engineered for demanding environments—including complex workshops, elevated workspaces, and outdoor locations without power access—it delivers confident, versatile measurement capability. Its fully lightweight design ensures effortless portability. An advanced edge-computing module paired with wireless data transmission enables true untethered operation—delivering outstanding performance under any challenging condition.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: TrackScan Sharp系列跟踪式三维扫描系统
product_name_en: TrackScan Sharp Series Tracking-Based 3D Scanning System
company_name: 思看科技（杭州）股份有限公司
description_zh: TrackScan Sharp系列跟踪式三维扫描系统集全速、超远、超广为一体，8.5m远距离测量从容驾驭，高精测量范围跃升至135m³，以非凡性能成就超大型测量项目专业之作。标配2500万高像素工业相机，内置边缘计算模组，可全域电池供电、真无线数据传输，精准实力，广域尽现。
description_en: The TrackScan Sharp series is an all-in-one tracking-based 3D scanning system combining maximum speed, extended range, and ultra-wide coverage. It confidently handles measurements up to 8.5 m and achieves a high-precision volumetric measurement capacity of 135 m³—making it the premier solution for ultra-large-scale metrology projects. Standard equipment includes a 25-megapixel industrial camera, an embedded edge-computing module, full-battery operation, and true wireless data transmission—delivering precision performance across expansive workspaces.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: KSCAN-X 智能无线超广大面幅三维扫描仪
company_name: 思看科技（杭州）股份有限公司
description_zh: KSCAN-X融入智能无线与混合摄影测量技术，集超大面幅、超大景深、超快扫描于一身，助力大型装备制造企业效率跃升、精准质控。超大面幅：基于自研算法优化，单面幅最大可达2.6m×1.8m，快速捕捉超大型工件的全场景特征。超大景深：扫描景深覆盖0.3m-2.5m，兼容超大型工件远距离大范围快速捕捉和中大型工件精密测量。
description_en: The KSCAN-X integrates smart wireless connectivity and hybrid photogrammetry technology to deliver unparalleled large-format scanning, deep depth-of-field, and rapid acquisition—empowering heavy-equipment manufacturers with enhanced productivity and precision quality control. Ultra-large format: Leveraging proprietary algorithm optimization, single-frame capture reaches up to 2.6 m × 1.8 m, enabling fast, full-scene acquisition of oversized components. Ultra-deep depth-of-field: Covers 0.3–2.5 m, supporting both long-range, wide-area capture of massive parts and high-precision measurement of medium-to-large components.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 中天上材增材制造有限公司
description_zh: CoCrW齿科合金粉末是一种钴基高温合金粉末，专为牙科修复体的制造（如义齿支架、牙冠、牙桥）而优化设计。其特点包括高强度、高硬度、优异的耐磨性、良好的耐腐蚀性和生物相容性，能够满足口腔环境的长期使用要求。该粉末主要用于通过选择性激光熔化（SLM）等金属增材制造技术，生产高精度、贴合度佳且机械性能可靠的定制化牙科修复体。
description_en: CoCrW dental alloy powder is a cobalt-based high-temperature alloy specifically optimized for dental restorations—including frameworks, crowns, and bridges. It offers high strength, high hardness, excellent wear resistance, superior corrosion resistance, and proven biocompatibility—ensuring long-term reliability in the oral environment. Primarily used with metal additive manufacturing processes such as Selective Laser Melting (SLM), it enables production of highly accurate, anatomically precise, and mechanically robust custom dental prostheses.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 中天上材增材制造有限公司
description_zh: 316L是一种低碳奥氏体不锈钢粉末，以其卓越的耐腐蚀性（尤其在氯化物环境中）、良好的生物相容性以及优异的成形性和韧性而著称。在增材制造领域，它广泛用于制造海洋环境设备、化工处理装置、医疗器械（如手术工具、植入物原型）、食品加工部件以及对耐腐蚀和力学性能有综合要求的复杂功能零件。
description_en: 316L is a low-carbon austenitic stainless steel powder renowned for its exceptional corrosion resistance—especially in chloride-rich environments—as well as excellent biocompatibility, superior formability, and high toughness. In additive manufacturing, it is widely employed to fabricate marine equipment, chemical processing apparatus, medical devices (e.g., surgical instruments, implant prototypes), food-processing components, and complex functional parts requiring balanced corrosion resistance and mechanical performance.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 中天上材增材制造有限公司
description_zh: GH3536（对应于Hastelloy X）是一种固溶强化型镍基高温合金粉末。其核心特性在于优异的抗氧化和抗热腐蚀性能，以及良好的高温强度、成形性和抗应力松弛能力。该粉末主要用于增材制造航空航天发动机和燃气轮机的高温部件，如燃烧室部件、火焰筒、过渡段以及工业炉用高温构件等，适用于极端高温和复杂热循环环境。
description_en: GH3536 (equivalent to Hastelloy X) is a solid-solution-strengthened nickel-based high-temperature alloy powder. Its defining characteristics include outstanding oxidation and hot-corrosion resistance, excellent high-temperature strength, good formability, and superior stress relaxation resistance. This powder is primarily used in additive manufacturing of critical high-temperature components for aerospace engines and gas turbines—including combustor parts, flame tubes, transition sections—as well as high-temperature industrial furnace components, designed for extreme thermal cycling and elevated-temperature service.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 中天上材增材制造有限公司
description_zh: TC4（Ti-6Al-4V）是最为经典和广泛应用的双相（α+β）钛合金粉末。因其优异的比强度、良好的生物相容性、出色的耐腐蚀性及综合力学性能，被广泛应用于航空航天领域的结构件（如支架、叶片）、生物医疗器械（如骨科植入物、牙科修复体）以及高性能赛车零部件的增材制造（3D打印）与热等静压等粉末冶金工艺中。
description_en: TC4 (Ti-6Al-4V) is the most established and widely adopted dual-phase (α+β) titanium alloy powder. Celebrated for its exceptional specific strength, excellent biocompatibility, outstanding corrosion resistance, and balanced mechanical properties, it is extensively applied in additive manufacturing (3D printing) and powder metallurgy processes—including Hot Isostatic Pressing (HIP)—for aerospace structural components (e.g., brackets, blades), biomedical devices (e.g., orthopedic implants, dental prostheses), and high-performance motorsport parts.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 碳索科技
description_zh: 碳索者三号是全球首款消费级连续纤维 3D 打印机，旨在让专业工程师与资深创作者轻松触及工业级高强度复合材料制造技术。 独家研发的复合纤维共挤（CFC）技术，沿关键受力路径采用连续碳纤维对打印件进行增强。能生产轻量化、高强度的零件，性能远超传统 FDM 打印的局限 —— 碳索者三号可胜任真正的功能性零件制造，而非仅作为原型展示。 碳索者三号填补了昂贵的工业级复合材料设备与消费级 3D 打印机之间的空白，让工程师无需依赖专业工厂，在桌面即可直接完成生产。 设备配备智能切片软件，既简化了复杂的复合材料加工流程，又为资深用户保留了完整的操控权限。
description_en: CarbonX Three is the world’s first consumer-grade continuous-fiber 3D printer—designed to bring industrial-grade high-strength composite manufacturing within reach of professional engineers and experienced creators. Its proprietary Continuous Fiber Co-Extrusion (CFC) technology reinforces printed parts with continuous carbon fiber precisely aligned along critical load paths. The result is lightweight, high-strength components whose mechanical performance far exceeds traditional FDM limitations—enabling true functional part production, not just prototyping. CarbonX Three bridges the gap between costly industrial composite systems and entry-level 3D printers, allowing engineers to manufacture end-use parts directly from their desktop—without reliance on external fabrication facilities. An intelligent slicing software streamlines complex composite workflows while preserving full manual control for advanced users.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

product_name_zh: Snapmaker 工匠三合一 3D 打印机
company_name: 深圳快造科技有限公司
description_zh: ‍Snapmaker 工匠三合一 3D 打印机采用模组化和 1 分钟快换设计，集三种加工方式于一体，满足双喷嘴 3D 打印、10W/40W高功率激光雕刻和切割，以及 200W CNC 雕刻和切割的需求。它将工业级传动系统运用在桌面制造领域，并提供 400*400*400mm 的巨大加工空间，带来更快、更准、更稳的创作体验，适用于专业创作者、资深爱好者以及有复杂项目需求的用户。
description_en: The Snapmaker Artisan is a modular, all-in-one 3D printer featuring one-minute quick-swap toolheads to seamlessly integrate three distinct fabrication modalities: dual-nozzle 3D printing, 10 W / 40 W high-power laser engraving and cutting, and 200 W CNC milling and carving. Bringing industrial-grade motion systems to the desktop, it provides an expansive 400 × 400 × 400 mm work envelope—delivering faster, more precise, and more stable creative output for professional makers, advanced hobbyists, and users tackling complex multidisciplinary projects.

applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 深圳快造科技有限公司
description_zh: Snapmaker U1 采用 SnapSwap™ 独立四头并联系统，四头可预装/预热耗材，5秒快换；通过换头切换耗材，告别换料冲刷，多色多材更高效、低废料（最高可节约 80% 耗材）。支持刚柔结合与水溶 / 易拆支撑等多材料打印场景。智能校准涵盖多头偏移、振动补偿、压力提前与自动调平；自动耗材系统支持自动进料、备份模式与 RFID 识别。提供 270 × 270 × 270mm 成型体积，500mm/s 运动速度。3.5 英寸触控屏配合 Snapmaker Orca 与 App，轻松操控与监控。
description_en: The Snapmaker U1 features the proprietary SnapSwap™ independent quad-head parallel system—allowing four toolheads to be pre-loaded and pre-heated, with toolhead swaps completed in under five seconds. By switching heads instead of purging filaments, it eliminates wasteful purge cycles and enables efficient multi-color and multi-material printing—reducing material waste by up to 80%. It supports hybrid rigid-flexible printing and water-soluble or easily removable support structures. Intelligent calibration includes multi-head offset correction, vibration compensation, pressure advance, and auto-bed leveling. An automated filament system provides auto-loading, backup mode, and RFID identification. With a build volume of 270 × 270 × 270 mm and travel speeds up to 500 mm/s, it is operated via a 3.5-inch touchscreen, Snapmaker Orca software, and mobile app for intuitive control and real-time monitoring.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

company_name: 上海远铸智能技术有限公司
description_zh: FUNMAT PRO 410 是一款配备了智能双喷头的工业级 FDM 3D 打印设备。它拥有可观的打印尺寸，更丰富的打印材料选择，能够为工业用户提供完善的高性能材料与纤维复合材料 3D 打印解决方案。其自动调平、堵头报警、远程监控等工业智能设计为 3D 打印完美输出，保驾护航。
description_en: The FUNMAT PRO 410 is an industrial-grade FDM 3D printer equipped with an intelligent dual-extrusion system. Offering a generous build volume and extensive material compatibility—including high-performance engineering thermoplastics and fiber-reinforced composites—it delivers a complete, high-performance 3D printing solution for industrial users. Industrial-grade smart features—including auto-bed leveling, nozzle-clog detection, and remote monitoring—ensure consistent, reliable, and high-fidelity print outcomes.

company_name: 上海远铸智能技术有限公司
description_zh: FUNMAT PRO 610HT 是一款高腔温、大尺寸、旗舰级 3D 打印设备。它能够充分满足工业级别对高性能材料 PEEK、 PEKK 、PEI(ULTEM™)、PPSU 打印的需求。该款机型打印尺寸高达 610 x 508 x 508 mm，可以为航空航天、国防军工、汽车、医疗、教育科研、通用制造等行业中定制化，小批量生产及功能件测试提供稳定支持。
description_en: The FUNMAT PRO 610HT is a flagship high-chamber-temperature, large-format 3D printer engineered for industrial-grade processing of high-performance polymers—including PEEK, PEKK, PEI (ULTEM™), and PPSU. With a maximum build volume of 610 × 508 × 508 mm, it provides stable, repeatable support for customized, low-volume production and functional testing across aerospace, defense, automotive, medical, education, research, and general manufacturing sectors.

company_name: 上海远铸智能技术有限公司
description_zh: FUNMAT PRO 310 NEO以其卓越的性能和可靠性，为工程师和设计师们带来了前所未有的3D打印体验。最高温度可达100℃的恒温腔室，真正意义上实现305×260×260 mm的全尺寸打印，解决了打印PC、ABS等工程材料时翘曲和开裂的痛点。更兼具强大的高速打印能力，最高打印速度可达500mm/s,最高打印加速度可达10,000mm/s2,显著提升生产效率的同时也给用户带来了极致的打印体验。
description_en: The FUNMAT PRO 310 NEO redefines desktop 3D printing with unmatched performance and reliability. Its heated chamber maintains a precise 100 °C environment—enabling distortion-free, full-volume (305 × 260 × 260 mm) printing of demanding engineering materials such as polycarbonate (PC) and ABS. It further delivers exceptional speed: maximum print velocity reaches 500 mm/s and acceleration peaks at 10,000 mm/s²—significantly accelerating throughput while delivering an elite user experience.

product_name_zh: TDC4-LEX 4KW防爆滤筒除尘器+DC901/1500打磨抽风工作台
product_name_en: TDC4-LEX 4 kW Explosion-Proof Cartridge Dust Collector + DC901/1500 Grinding and Fume Extraction Workbench
company_name: 浙江拓博环保科技有限公司
description_zh: TDC系列除尘器常规处理风量在 2500m³/h-7000m³/h之间，该系列设备对等离子、激光、火焰切割、焊接、磨削加工应用中释放的中、低负荷粉尘和烟气表现出极高的抽吸过滤性能。 打磨抽风工作台，需要通过管道与除尘器连接配合使用。采用多孔工作面板下抽风，并配合背侧条缝孔抽风的设计方式。以下是标准尺寸规格，也可以根据客户需求定制不同尺寸要求的工作台。同时工作台可根据需求配置电源、气源等接口，便于各种工具的l连接，台面可加装台钳等工装，各种不同需求请联系拓博公司咨询。
description_en: The TDC series dust collectors deliver standard airflow capacities ranging from 2,500 to 7,000 m³/h. They exhibit exceptional suction and filtration performance for medium-to-low-load dust and fumes generated during plasma, laser, flame cutting, welding, and grinding operations. The grinding and fume extraction workbench must be connected to the dust collector via ducting. It features downward airflow through a perforated work surface, supplemented by slot-type side exhaust openings. Standard dimensions are provided; custom sizes are available upon request. Optional utility interfaces—including power and compressed air outlets—can be integrated to accommodate various tools. Workholding fixtures such as bench vises may also be installed. Contact Topbo Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. for customized configurations.

company_name: 浙江拓博环保科技有限公司
description_zh: TSF-F20系列防爆振动筛分机具备惰性气体保护、筛分、自动排杂等功能。在线排杂功能，无需停机开盖清理杂质重新洗气的繁杂过程。加装进口防爆超声波系统高效筛分，通过振动电机定向振动设计，将杂质分离至回收桶内，实现在线自动排杂。
description_en: The TSF-F20 series explosion-proof vibratory sieve features inert gas protection, high-efficiency sieving, and fully automated on-line impurity discharge. Its on-line discharge function eliminates the need for shutdowns, lid removal, manual cleaning, and re-purging—streamlining maintenance significantly. Equipped with an imported explosion-proof ultrasonic system and precision-engineered directional vibration motors, the unit efficiently separates contaminants into a dedicated recovery bin, enabling continuous, automatic impurity removal.

product_name_en: TEX5-E 1.2 kW IB 9 L K Explosion-Proof Wet/Dip-Type Vacuum Cleaner
company_name: 浙江拓博环保科技有限公司
description_zh: 本系列产品属于单相电动防爆吸尘器，适用于爆炸性粉尘环境的22区，用于清理回收火药，铝粉，镁粉等高危险性粉尘的设备。广泛用于航空航天，军工，化学制药，机械加工，金属3D打印等行业。
description_en: This single-phase electric explosion-proof vacuum cleaner is certified for use in Zone 22 explosive dust environments. It is specifically designed for safe collection and recovery of highly hazardous combustible dusts—including gunpowder, aluminum powder, and magnesium powder. Widely deployed across aerospace, defense, pharmaceutical, mechanical machining, and metal additive manufacturing industries.

product_name_zh: TCB-300防爆3D打印工件清粉系统
product_name_en: TCB-300 Explosion-Proof Powder Removal System for Metal 3D Printed Parts
company_name: 浙江拓博环保科技有限公司
description_zh: 本系列设备主要用途在于为工艺操作人员创建了一个安全环境空间来清理金属3D打印工件中残留的粉末，这些残留的粉末通常处于工件的复杂几何结构体内部，并且缝隙空间狭小，工件重量较大，常规人工操作很难安全地清理干净。金属3D打印工件中的金属粉末通常都是易燃、易爆的，比如铝粉、钛粉，所以防爆是设备的必要性能。本系列设备经过第三方权威认证机构认证，确保防爆性能符合相关规定。
description_en: This system provides operators with a safe, enclosed environment for removing residual metal powder from complex, geometrically intricate 3D printed parts—especially where narrow internal channels and high part mass hinder conventional manual cleaning. Given the inherent flammability and explosivity of metal powders (e.g., aluminum, titanium), intrinsic explosion protection is essential. The TCB-300 series has been rigorously certified by accredited third-party testing agencies to comply fully with international explosion-protection standards.
categories_zh: 其他（如后处理工艺服务）

company_name: 上海玛瑞斯三维打印技术有限公司
description_zh: 在进行 3D 打印之前，您需要一个能够以清晰明确的方式将零件数据传输给打印机的解决方案。我们的构建处理器可在软件和硬件之间实现无缝连接，帮助设备所有者充分发挥 3D 打印机的性能，简化打印流程，并显著提高生产效率。
description_en: Prior to 3D printing, a robust solution is required to reliably and unambiguously transmit part data to the printer. Our Build Processor bridges software and hardware seamlessly—enabling equipment owners to maximize printer performance, simplify print workflows, and significantly boost production efficiency.

company_name: 上海玛瑞斯三维打印技术有限公司
description_zh: 通过数字线程连接数据，最大化您的投资回报率，并确保您从增材制造 (AM) 生产中获得最大收益。CO-AM 将我们行业领先的预打印软件（例如 Magics 和下一代构建处理器）与我们的 AM 数字工厂软件（例如我们先进的 AM MES 和 Identify3D）相结合。
description_en: CO-AM connects your digital thread to maximize ROI and ensure optimal returns from your additive manufacturing (AM) production investment. It integrates industry-leading pre-print software—including Magics and the next-generation Build Processor—with our AM Digital Factory suite, such as our advanced AM MES and Identify3D platforms.

description_en: The Magics Ansys Simulation module enables simulation of the metal additive manufacturing (AM) build process to enhance part quality and minimize errors during production.

company_name: 上海玛瑞斯三维打印技术有限公司
description_zh: 使用 Magics——我们全面且行业领先的 3D 打印软件——简化和优化数据及模型准备工作，它同时具备 CAD 和网格工具。您可以更有效地控制流程、自动化重复性任务并提高打印成功率——无论您使用哪种 3D 打印技术，它都能为您提供支持。
description_en: Magics—the comprehensive, industry-leading 3D printing software—streamlines and optimizes data preparation and model processing. Featuring integrated CAD and mesh tools, it empowers users to gain tighter process control, automate repetitive tasks, and increase print success rates—regardless of the underlying 3D printing technology (SLA, SLM, FDM, etc.).

company_name: 南通金源智能技术有限公司
description_zh: 公司主要产品包括铝基、钛基、镍基、钴基、铁基、铜基、难熔稀有金属（钨、钼、钽、铌）粉末及粉末定制，能满足各种金属3D打印技术对粉末的需求。 公司拥有VIGA/EIGA/PA/HDH/PS五大国际主流气雾化制粉设备，打通EIGA生产更高纯净度的高温合金粉末流程，国内领先实现钛合金100%循环复用，铝合金获低碳认证。 公司生产的金属粉末产品已广泛运用于航空航天、齿科骨科、3C电子等领域，并获得市场认可。
description_en: Our core product portfolio includes aluminum-, titanium-, nickel-, cobalt-, iron-, copper-, and refractory rare-metal-based (tungsten, molybdenum, tantalum, niobium) powders, along with custom powder formulations tailored to diverse metal AM requirements. We operate five internationally recognized gas atomization systems: VIGA, EIGA, PA, HDH, and PS. Our proprietary EIGA process enables ultra-high-purity superalloy powder production. We lead domestically in achieving 100% titanium alloy powder recyclability and hold low-carbon certification for aluminum alloys. Our powders are widely adopted in aerospace, dental and orthopedic implants, and 3C electronics—earning broad market recognition.

product_name_zh: Qbeam S600大尺寸电子束金属3D打印机
product_name_en: Qbeam S600 Large-Format Electron Beam Metal 3D Printer
company_name: 北京清研智束科技有限公司
description_zh: Qbeam S600由清研智束精心打造，满足航天航空对大尺寸、结构复杂构件的高效率、低成本批量化制造需求。使用自主开发2×2阵列电子枪及电磁绝缘和拼接技术，将打印尺寸扩大到600×600×700mm，保证高尺寸精度和拼接质量。使用新版EG3.1电子枪及操作软件，充分发挥电子束能量密度高、穿透能力强、偏转速度快的特点，将钛合金极限沉积效率提高至400cm3/h以上。使用最新开发的自动标定技术、吹粉检测技术、光学检测技术及打印结果分析，提高操作便利性、打印质量可靠性及可追溯性。
description_en: The Qbeam S600, engineered by Tsinghua QBeam Technology Co., Ltd., addresses aerospace demands for high-efficiency, cost-effective, large-scale production of large, structurally complex components. Leveraging a proprietary 2×2 electron gun array with electromagnetic insulation and seamless beam stitching technology, it achieves a build volume of 600 × 600 × 700 mm while maintaining high dimensional accuracy and consistent seam quality. Powered by the latest EG3.1 electron gun and control software, it capitalizes on the electron beam’s high energy density, deep penetration, and rapid deflection—achieving titanium alloy deposition rates exceeding 400 cm³/h. Integrated advanced features—including auto-calibration, powder-blow detection, optical monitoring, and build analytics—enhance operational convenience, print reliability, and full traceability.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 宝辰鑫激光3D打印子系统
company_name: 深圳市宝辰鑫激光科技有限公司
description_zh: 宝辰鑫激光3D打印子系统 BLAM-COL，提供专业适用于3D打印的激光器及配套可调光斑准直头，具备高光束质量、高稳定性、结构紧凑、方便集成等特性。带准直可调光斑3D打印子系统，更加方便安装调试，极大保持安装水平面的一致性，及产品参数的一致性。通过结合先进的光学技术、稳定的功率输出，为金属3D打印过程带来突破性的效果和体��，可支持医疗、汽车、工业模具等行业零部件金居打印。
description_en: The BCX Laser BLAM-COL 3D printing subsystem delivers professional-grade lasers and adjustable collimated spot optics specifically optimized for additive manufacturing. It features high beam quality, exceptional stability, compact form factor, and ease of integration. The collimated, adjustable-spot configuration simplifies installation and alignment, ensuring consistent horizontal mounting and uniform performance parameters. Combining advanced optics with stable power output, it delivers breakthrough performance and versatility for metal AM applications in medical devices, automotive, and industrial tooling.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

product_name_zh: BFMC 500/3000M 3D打印专用双光束(点环光斑)
product_name_en: BFMC 500/3000M Dual-Beam (Spot-Ring Spot) Fiber Laser for 3D Printing
company_name: 深圳市宝辰鑫激光科技有限公司
description_zh: BFMC-500/3000M 是宝辰鑫激光专为3D打印行业研发的高性能版光纤激光器，采用双光束点环光斑模式,电光转换效率高、光束质量优,功率稳定性强、一致性高，同时点环光斑独立可控，满足高品质3D打印的多样化需求，也适用于工业精密切割、焊接等应用。
description_en: The BFMC-500/3000M is a high-performance fiber laser developed by BCX Laser exclusively for 3D printing. Operating in dual-beam spot-ring mode, it offers high electro-optical conversion efficiency, superior beam quality, excellent power stability, and outstanding parameter consistency. Its independently controllable spot-ring beams meet diverse high-fidelity AM requirements—and are equally suited for precision industrial cutting and welding.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

product_name_zh: BFSC 100M-500M 单模绿光连续激光器
company_name: 深圳市宝辰鑫激光科技有限公司
description_zh: BFSC 100-500M单模绿光激光器是宝辰鑫激光开发的高效率、高可靠性、免维护的单模绿光连续激光器系列，采用水冷方式，波长范围 530-534nm，不仅具有更高的光电转换效率，更低的功耗和更高的光束质量，同时兼具结构紧凑、接口丰富，软硬件功能丰富且强大等优势，便于系统设备集成，对于纯铜、铜合金、铝合金等高反金属材料的加工具有独特的优势，适用于新能源汽车等领域中高反金居材料的切割和焊接、异种金居材料焊接，以及高反金属材料的 3D 打印等场景。
description_en: The BFSC 100M–500M series comprises high-efficiency, high-reliability, maintenance-free single-mode green CW lasers developed by BCX Laser. Water-cooled and operating at 530–534 nm, they deliver superior photoelectric conversion efficiency, lower power consumption, higher beam quality, compact packaging, rich I/O interfaces, and powerful embedded software/hardware functionality—facilitating seamless system integration. Their unique capability to process highly reflective metals—including pure copper, copper alloys, and aluminum alloys—makes them ideal for cutting, welding, and AM applications in new-energy vehicles, dissimilar-metal joining, and other demanding sectors.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

product_name_zh: BFSC 80W 3D 打印专用连续光纤激光器 ( 风冷 )
product_name_en: BFSC 80 W Air-Cooled Continuous-Wave Fiber Laser for Desktop 3D Printing
company_name: 深圳市宝辰鑫激光科技有限公司
description_zh: BFSC-80W 是 宝 辰 鑫 面 向 桌 面 级 3D 打 印 应 用推出的高性价比方案，采用风冷小型化设计，波长1064nm，具有高光束质量、高功率稳定性以及安全易用等特性，是桌面级 3D 打印的理想激光源，可满足样品、小型件的精密 3D 打印需求。
description_en: The BFSC-80W is BCX Laser’s cost-optimized, air-cooled, compact fiber laser solution tailored for desktop 3D printing. Emitting at 1064 nm, it delivers high beam quality, excellent power stability, and user-friendly safety features—making it the ideal laser source for desktop AM systems requiring precision printing of prototypes and small functional parts.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: 广州瑞通增材科技有限公司
description_zh: RXDent-D130是瑞通面向齿科应用设计的一款专业高精度DLP打印机，有着非常出色的稳定性与高效率的成型速度。通过软件、硬件和材料紧密联系，确保设备和材料最佳状态与打印效果。它以精准、稳定、高效的特性，成为齿科诊疗与义齿加工的得力助手，为实现生产数字化转型提供最优解决方案。
description_en: The RXDent-D130 is a professional, high-precision DLP 3D printer purpose-built by Riton Additive Manufacturing Technology Co., Ltd. for dental applications. It delivers exceptional operational stability and high-speed, high-fidelity part production. Tight integration of software, hardware, and compatible resins ensures optimal system performance and consistent print outcomes. With its hallmark precision, reliability, and speed, the RXDent-D130 serves as a trusted partner for dental clinics and laboratories—accelerating digital transformation in dentistry and prosthodontics.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

product_name_zh: MLAB 桌面级金属3D打印机
company_name: 广州瑞通增材科技有限公司
description_zh: MLAB 桌面级金属3D打印机以 0.36m² 小巧尺寸与 Φ100×90mm 成形空间，具备±1W功率精控、上/下送粉与铺粉优化技术，支持微量开机与智能续打，轻松衔接科研验证与小批量制造。其搭载全新 Riton Controller，实现无线传输与实时记录，让打印操作变得更加简单易上手，为教育科研、实训竞赛、齿科、饰品定制等提供高效灵活解决方案。
description_en: The MLAB desktop metal 3D printer combines a compact footprint (0.36 m²) with a build volume of Φ100 × 90 mm. It features ±1 W laser power precision control, optimized top/bottom powder feeding and recoating, minimal startup powder usage, and intelligent resume printing—seamlessly bridging R&D validation and small-batch manufacturing. Powered by the new Riton Controller, it supports wireless data transfer and real-time build logging—simplifying operation and lowering the entry barrier. Ideal for education, training, competitions, dental labs, and jewelry customization.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 广州瑞通增材科技有限公司
description_zh: RT-430 金属3D打印机，以430x430x350mm大成形尺寸，结合四/八激光高效架构，面向模具、消费电子、医疗及工业领域的批量化生产需求专属打造。设备支持上送粉与管道供粉，配备满足 ATEX 要求的防爆永久滤芯系统与智能监测闭环控制，实现自动化、更安全、更稳定、更可追溯的工业级品质生产。
description_en: The RT-430 metal 3D printer features a large build volume of 430 × 430 × 350 mm and a high-throughput multi-laser architecture (4 or 8 lasers), purpose-engineered for batch production in tooling, consumer electronics, medical devices, and general industrial applications. It supports both top powder feeding and pipeline-fed powder delivery, and incorporates an ATEX-compliant explosion-proof permanent filter cartridge system with intelligent closed-loop monitoring—ensuring automated, safer, more stable, and fully traceable industrial-grade production.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 广州瑞通增材科技有限公司
description_zh: RT-270金属3D打印机，双光/四光全幅面覆盖，搭载自动化舱门系统与自主研发永久滤芯过滤系统，打印尺寸达270x270x350mm，±0.05mm重复精度，兼容钴铬、钢、钛、铜、钨铝、钽等多种金属粉末，复杂件一次成型，为您提供模具、医疗、消费电子、工业制造等高效专业解决方案。
description_en: The RT-270 metal 3D printer delivers full-area coverage using dual- or quad-laser configurations, an automated chamber door system, and a proprietary permanent filter cartridge filtration system. With a build volume of 270 × 270 × 350 mm and ±0.05 mm repeatability, it is compatible with cobalt-chrome, stainless steel, titanium, copper, tungsten-aluminum, tantalum, and other metal powders. Complex parts can be produced in a single print—providing efficient, professional solutions for tooling, medical, consumer electronics, and industrial manufacturing.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: FGF高分子颗粒熔融挤出3D打印机
product_name_en: FGF Polymer Granule Fusion Extrusion 3D Printer
company_name: 青岛领科汇创智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 工业级高分子颗粒熔融挤出 3D 打印机，具备打印速度快、材料成本低、产品强度高、环保可回收的优势，支持复杂结构一体化成型，适配多种高性能复合材料。 未来应用广泛：铸造模具领域可缩短 1-2 周快速交付，实现定制化生产；水泵阀门行业能精准打印叶轮、阀芯，提升液压性能；航空航天可打造轻量化结构件，助力减重增效；风力发电可定制耐高温、高强度零部件；船舶重工领域适配大型复杂构件制造，简化流程并降低成本，推动各行业数字化、高效化升级。
description_en: An industrial-grade polymer granule fusion extrusion 3D printer offering high print speed, low material cost, superior part strength, and environmental sustainability via recyclability. It supports monolithic fabrication of complex geometries and is compatible with multiple high-performance composite materials. Key application benefits include: casting mold production with 1–2 week lead-time reduction and full customization; precision printing of impellers and valve cores for enhanced hydraulic performance in pump/valve industries; lightweight structural components for aerospace; high-temperature, high-strength parts for wind turbine applications; and large, complex component manufacturing for shipbuilding—driving digital, efficient upgrades across industries.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

description_en: A sustainable filament containing 10% recycled coffee grounds; emits a subtle, natural coffee aroma during printing—replacing conventional plastic odors with an eco-friendly, uplifting sensory experience. Coffee particles impart fine surface texture and warm tonal variation, harmonizing creative expression with environmental responsibility.

description_en: 1. Silicon carbide nozzle for enhanced wear resistance, supporting high-intensity printing. 2. Innovative thermal management: angled dendritic fin structure combined with hollow cavity extension. 3. High-speed printing capability up to 50 mm³/s.

company_name: 菲托斯三维科技（苏州）有限公司
description_zh: 1. 革命性维护体验：磁吸组合设计 彻底实现无螺丝化维护，采用专利磁吸式机械结构 2. 精准切割方案：金属框架切刀系统D3vil Fang 创新可拆换式DLC涂层刀片结构，专为碳纤维等高性能耗材设计。 3. 双齿轮精准啮合设计 双齿轮联动设计，接触面积提升2倍，有效减少耗材打滑，确保连续稳定送料。 4. 专利RNC超耐磨涂层齿轮 齿轮表面采用RNC涂层，HV3300
description_en: 1. Revolutionary maintenance experience: fully screwless design enabled by patented magnetic coupling. 2. Precision cutting system: D3vil Fang metal-frame cutter with interchangeable DLC-coated blades—engineered specifically for carbon fiber and other high-performance filaments. 3. Dual-gear synchronized feeding: doubled contact area significantly reduces filament slippage, ensuring continuous, stable material delivery. 4. Patented RNC ultra-wear-resistant gear coating (HV3300).

description_zh: 圆形、正方形、长方形、线形等各类光斑均匀分布。 光斑尺寸从百微米级至数米且可调整。 均匀度优于95%，边缘陡峭。 功率从百瓦至十万瓦可定制。 温度闭环反馈调整功率，可将温度精度和波动均控制在5%内。
description_en: Delivers uniformly distributed optical spots—including circular, square, rectangular, and linear profiles—with adjustable spot sizes ranging from hundreds of micrometers to several meters. Achieves >95% uniformity and steep edge profiles. Customizable output power from 100 W to 100 kW. Closed-loop temperature feedback enables precise power control with temperature accuracy and fluctuation maintained within ±5%.

description_zh: 中久大光拥有规格最多的环形光斑系列光源，且可定制特殊规格。 自带波形编辑功能。规格最全且可定制。芯区圆斑：功率（1kW～10kW）、芯径（14μm～100μm） 外围环斑功率（1kW～10kW）、直径（10μm～600μm），单模环形（功率3+x，芯区直径14μm、20μm）

Annular ring spot: 1–10 kW output, diameter 10–600 µm. Single-mode annular variants: 3+x kW output, core diameters 14 µm or 20 µm.

description_zh: 4kW以上功率输出时仍能保持光束质量M²<1.5，聚焦功率密度高； 20um芯径长距离（>10m）传输有效抑制非线性效应，光谱纯净； 市面唯一量产4kW单模产品。

Fully compatible with the IEMAI FAST-JET-1500 pellet printer and robotic arms, supporting virtually all commercial polymer pellets—including post-consumer plastic waste. Capable of printing standard thermoplastics (e.g., PLA), engineering plastics, and high-performance polymers such as PEEK.

description_zh: MAGIC-HT-MAX是一个专为高性能工程材料而设计的3D打印机。拥有高达500℃的打印温度，高达200℃的热床温度，以及高达150℃的内胆温度，它可以支持打印市场上大多数普温和高温塑料。它拥有两个模块化的打印头以及更加简单的维护操作，并且支持打印水溶性支撑。
description_en: The MAGIC-HT-MAX is engineered specifically for high-performance engineering materials. It delivers a maximum nozzle temperature of 500°C, heated bed temperature up to 200°C, and chamber temperature up to 150°C—supporting the vast majority of standard and high-temperature thermoplastics on the market. Features dual modular print heads, simplified maintenance, and compatibility with water-soluble support materials.

product_name_zh: EinScan Rigil Pro 多功能无线一体式手持3D扫描仪
product_name_en: EinScan Rigil Pro Multi-Function Wireless All-in-One Handheld 3D Scanner
company_name: 先临三维科技股份有限公司
description_zh: EinScan Rigil Pro采用第三代无线技术，实现一体式轻量化设计，一台设备即可完成三维扫描工作，无需电脑，便携高效，提升3D测量工作效率。 采集的高品质三维数据可导出至电脑端，通过PTB认证的先临三维自研工业计量三维检测模块（选配），快速完成3D比较、3D测量并输出检测报告，能够满足汽车工业、铸造行业等领域高精度3D测量需求。
description_en: Powered by third-generation wireless technology, the EinScan Rigil Pro features an integrated lightweight design enabling standalone 3D scanning—no external computer required. Delivers high-fidelity 3D data exportable to PC for analysis via Shining 3D’s PTB-certified proprietary industrial metrology module (optional), enabling rapid 3D comparison, dimensional measurement, and automated inspection reporting—meeting stringent accuracy requirements in automotive, foundry, and other precision industries.

applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: FreeScan Omni 无线一体式手持三维扫描测量仪
product_name_en: FreeScan Omni Wireless All-in-One Handheld 3D Scanning & Metrology System
company_name: 先临三维科技股份有限公司
description_zh: FreeScan Omni无线一体式手持三维扫描测量仪是先临三维自主创新开发的一款具有划时代意义的产品，其采用第三代无线扫描技术，无需电脑，搭载算法通过德国PTB双重精度认证的自研工业计量三维检测模块，可实现一台设备独立完成“三维扫描+三维检测”（无需连接电脑以及电源线）。 且保持了FreeScan系列高精度三维扫描设备高效高质获取三维数据的能力，精度最高0.02mm，扫描速度可达835万点/秒，配备5种测量模式（高速/精细/深孔/不贴点扫描模式，摄影测量），且小巧便携（一体式机身净重1.1kg），适应多项不同尺寸的工业测量场景。
description_en: A groundbreaking innovation from Shining 3D, the FreeScan Omni integrates third-generation wireless scanning with a self-developed industrial metrology module independently certified to German PTB standards—enabling full ‘3D scanning + 3D metrology’ operation without any PC or power cable connection. Maintains FreeScan-series benchmark performance: up to 0.02 mm accuracy and 8.35 million points/sec scanning speed. Offers five operational modes (High-Speed, Fine, Deep-Hole, Markerless, Photogrammetry), weighs only 1.1 kg (net), and adapts seamlessly to diverse industrial measurement tasks across part sizes.

description_en: HP’s Metal Jet S100 solution delivers production-ready, high-quality end-use metal parts at scale for diverse industries. This next-generation metal additive manufacturing platform advances sustainability and unlocks breakthrough applications through scalable, repeatable production.

product_name_zh: HP Jet Fusion 5600 系列 3D 打印解决方案
product_name_en: HP Jet Fusion 5600 Series 3D Printing Solution
company_name: 中国惠普有限公司
description_zh: 惠普Jet Fusion 5600系列工业3D打印解决方案，专为提升制造能力并优化应用而设计，实现了大规模的灵活生产。该系列打印机通过其创新的3D打印技术，实现了生产的高度灵活性、成本降低和可扩展性，使制造商能够快速响应市场变化，缩短产品上市时间，同时降低生产成本。此外，该系列支持多种材料打印，包括新的阻燃材料和防静电模式打印，其高效的打印速度和精确的打印质量，确保了生产的一致性和可靠性。
description_en: The HP Jet Fusion 5600 Series is an industrial-grade 3D printing solution engineered to enhance manufacturing agility and optimize application deployment. Its innovative voxel-level 3D printing technology enables unprecedented production flexibility, cost reduction, and scalability—empowering manufacturers to accelerate time-to-market while lowering unit costs. Supports multiple advanced materials including flame-retardant and electrostatic-dissipative grades. Combines high throughput with consistent, precision output to ensure reliable, repeatable production quality.

company_name: 武汉易制科技有限公司
description_zh: EASYMFG M550Plus 是Plus系列的旗舰型号，专为高需求、快速批量生产中型和大型零件而设计。M550Plus在Max系列的基础上进行了重大升级，采用了最先进的运动组件和最新的生产平台，提供无与伦比的稳定性和精确度。 ● 工作缸尺寸: L550 * W370 * H200mm ● 打印体积: 40.7升 ● 最大打印速度: 2442cc/小时 ● 层厚：40～200µm可调
description_en: The flagship model of EASYMFG’s Plus series, purpose-built for high-demand, rapid batch production of medium- to large-scale parts. A major evolution over the Max series, the M550Plus integrates state-of-the-art motion systems and an advanced production platform to deliver unmatched stability and dimensional accuracy. Build volume: 550 × 370 × 200 mm (40.7 L). Maximum print speed: 2442 cm³/h. Layer thickness: adjustable from 40 to 200 µm.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 武汉易制科技有限公司
description_zh: M400Plus 是Plus系列金属粘结喷射3D打印机的最新款，专为高需求、小批量生产的生产级零件设计。M400Plus在Pro系列的基础上进行了升级，采用了最新的运动组件和生产平台，提供卓越的稳定性和精确度，确保零件的高精度和生产管理的高效性。 ●工作缸尺寸: L400 x W250 x H200 mm ●外部尺寸: L1756 * W809 * H1504.5mm ●打印体积：20升 ●最大打印速度：1340cc/小时 ●层厚：30-100μm可调
description_en: The latest metal binder jetting 3D printer in EASYMFG’s Plus series, optimized for high-demand, small-batch production of production-grade parts. An upgraded evolution of the Pro series, the M400Plus features cutting-edge motion components and a refined production platform—ensuring superior stability, precision, and production efficiency. Build volume: 400 × 250 × 200 mm (20 L). Maximum print speed: 1340 cm³/h. Layer thickness: adjustable from 30 to 100 µm. Overall dimensions: 1756 × 809 × 1504.5 mm.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 中纤三维
description_zh: 重新定义了工业级3D打印标准，以“性能革新”和“用户体验”为核心，为中小企业、创新团队及个人提供兼具工业级性能与消费级易用的完整解决方案。 设备配备半米级成型尺寸与500mm/s高速打印能力，在保障精度的同时显著提升效率。其模块化快拆喷头支持从通用塑料到连续纤维复合材料的灵活打印，覆盖从原型验证到终端部件制造的全流程。集成自动送料、120℃高温烘干及涡轮主动干燥技术的“耗材无忧系统”，实现全程智能防潮。配合直观易用的智能切片软件，用户可轻松驾驭多样化材料。 A500以稳定性能、灵活模块与智能操作，突破工业设备传统门槛，成为推动工业级3D打印普及化的标杆产品。
description_en: Redefining industrial-grade 3D printing standards with a dual focus on ‘performance innovation’ and ‘user experience’, the A500 Series delivers a complete solution that merges industrial-grade capabilities with consumer-level ease of use—ideal for SMEs, innovation teams, and individual creators. Features a semi-meter-scale build volume and 500 mm/s high-speed printing for accelerated throughput without compromising precision. Modular quick-swap nozzles enable seamless transition from commodity plastics to continuous-fiber composites—covering the full workflow from prototyping to end-part manufacturing. The ‘Material无忧 System’ integrates automatic filament feeding, 120°C hot-air drying, and turbo active dehumidification for intelligent moisture protection. Paired with intuitive smart slicing software, it simplifies multi-material workflows. With robust performance, flexible modularity, and intelligent operation, the A500 breaks down traditional barriers to industrial 3D printing adoption.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

product_name_zh: 盈普三维新一代粉体全性能处理工作站 PPS V3.0
product_name_en: INTAMSYS Next-Generation Full-Performance Powder Handling Workstation PPS V3.0
company_name: 盈普三维
description_zh: 盈普PPS V3.0六合一智能粉末管理系统，针对SLS后处理流程繁琐、设备分散、自动化低、粉尘污染等行业痛点，集成零件清理、粉体回收、投放新料、配比混合、自动供粉、粉尘收集六大功能，构建打印后处理到粉末循环利用的全流程闭环。占地减少20%，压缩空气消耗降低90%，清粉效率提升50%，300L大容量粉仓支持24小时连续作业，一拖二适配大尺寸机型，以紧凑、高效、洁净、自动化赋能SLS全流程洁净生产。
description_en: The INTAMSYS PPS V3.0 is a six-in-one intelligent powder management system addressing key industry pain points in SLS post-processing—including process fragmentation, low automation, equipment dispersion, and dust contamination. It consolidates six critical functions: part cleaning, powder recovery, fresh powder dispensing, ratio mixing, automated powder feeding, and dust collection—establishing a closed-loop workflow from post-processing to full powder recycling. Reduces footprint by 20%, cuts compressed air consumption by 90%, improves cleaning efficiency by 50%, supports 24-hour continuous operation with a 300 L high-capacity powder reservoir, and enables one-to-two machine integration for large-format SLS systems—delivering compact, efficient, clean, and fully automated SLS production.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

product_name_zh: 盈普三维P系列SLS激光烧结打印设备- P360 Ultra
product_name_en: INTAMSYS P-Series SLS Laser Sintering System – P360 Ultra
company_name: 盈普三维
description_zh: 盈普P360 Ultra全面升级工业级SLS系统，集成单粉缸底部供粉、优化刮刀驱动与内置氮气发生器，占地减少11%实现紧凑设计。专利主动冷却技术提升效率，全内置模块化控制系统确保稳定温控，符合ISO 12100、ISO 14121及PL-d安全标准。支持PPS V3后处理站一拖四协同作业，以高效、稳定、高性价比赋能中批量精密制造。
description_en: The INTAMSYS P360 Ultra represents a comprehensive upgrade to industrial SLS platforms, integrating bottom-fed single-powder-cylinder architecture, optimized blade drive mechanics, and an onboard nitrogen generator—achieving an 11% smaller footprint for compact installation. Patented active cooling technology enhances productivity, while a fully internalized modular control system ensures precise, stable thermal management compliant with ISO 12100, ISO 14121, and PL-d safety standards. Supports one-to-four coordinated operation with the PPS V3.0 post-processing station—delivering high-efficiency, reliability, and cost-effectiveness for medium-batch precision manufacturing.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: C系列紧凑型专业级打印设备 CF200+PPS200
product_name_en: INTAMSYS C-Series Compact Professional SLS System – CF200+PPS200
company_name: 盈普三维
description_zh: 盈普CF200+PPS200紧凑型专业级SLS系统，占地<1㎡，220V即插即用，30W光纤激光器+200×200×320mm成型缸，24小时交付工业级精度零件。全自动闭环实现打印-清粉-筛粉-混粉-供粉一键完成，办公室即可洁净运行，以高性价比赋能中小企业、科研机构快速拥有专业级增材制造能力。
description_en: The INTAMSYS CF200+PPS200 is a compact, professional-grade SLS system occupying less than 1 m², operating on standard 220 V AC power. Equipped with a 30 W fiber laser and a 200 × 200 × 320 mm build chamber, it delivers industrial-precision parts within 24 hours. Its fully automated closed-loop workflow—integrating printing, part cleaning, sieving, mixing, and powder feeding—enables clean, office-friendly operation. Designed for affordability and accessibility, it empowers SMEs and research institutions to rapidly deploy professional-grade additive manufacturing capabilities.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 北京格拉飞可斯科技有限公司
description_zh: Meshy 推出行业首个「从 AI 创意到实体交付」的一站式平台：Meshy Creative Lab，让数字灵感直接转化为触手可及的精美实物。 •【AI 极速建模】 依托 Meshy 顶尖算法，只需输入一段文字或一张图片，几秒钟内即可生成高精度 3D 模型，零门槛开启创作。 •【万物皆可定制】 打破模型与实物的边界，支持将创意直接定制为机械键帽、冰箱贴、潮玩手办、精美摆件等多种实体品类，打造你想要的各种生活好物。 •【工业级交付】 直连高端全彩 3D 打印供应链，从模型修复、工业级生产到全球物流，我们提供全程托管服务。你只需一键下单，专属定制的作品就会直达你的手中。
description_en: Meshy introduces the industry’s first end-to-end platform for transforming AI-generated creativity into physical products: Meshy Creative Lab. This solution enables digital inspiration to be directly realized as high-fidelity, tangible objects. • [AI-Powered Instant Modeling]: Leveraging Meshy’s state-of-the-art algorithms, users generate precision 3D models in seconds—simply by inputting text or uploading an image—enabling barrier-free creation. • [Universal Customization]: Bridging the gap between digital models and physical goods, the platform supports direct customization into diverse real-world items—including mechanical keycaps, refrigerator magnets, collectible figurines, and premium display pieces—empowering personalized lifestyle product development. • [Industrial-Grade Fulfillment]: Seamlessly integrated with a premium full-color 3D printing supply chain, the service covers automated model repair, industrial-scale manufacturing, and global logistics—all fully managed. Customers simply place a one-click order; their bespoke creations are delivered directly to their door.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: 定站式三维空间扫描仪RayZoom S100
company_name: 深圳积木易搭科技技术有限公司
description_zh: RayZoom S100 是睿数信息专为高精度测绘与工程应用打造的专业级定站式三维空间扫描解决方案。整机采用模块化主机+稳固三脚架设计，实现超大视域无盲区采集。内置高精度激光雷达，结合自研SLAM 算法，短时间可完成高密度点云及真彩纹理同步获取，满足工程测量、逆向建模、BIM 校核等高要求场景。设备支持多站点自动拼接，实现大场景无缝融合。采集成果可一键导出点云、彩色点云、3D 高斯模型等，并直连云端进行跨设备共享、多人协作与二次开发。
description_en: The RayZoom S100 is a professional-grade fixed-station 3D spatial scanning solution engineered by Ruishu Information for high-precision surveying and engineering applications. Its modular host unit mounted on a robust tripod enables ultra-wide field-of-view acquisition without blind spots. Equipped with a high-accuracy laser radar and proprietary SLAM algorithm, it synchronously captures high-density point clouds and true-color textures in minimal time—meeting stringent requirements for engineering surveying, reverse modeling, and BIM validation. The system supports automatic multi-station registration for seamless large-scale scene fusion. Output formats include point clouds, colorized point clouds, and 3D Gaussian models—exportable with one click and natively compatible with cloud platforms for cross-device sharing, collaborative workflows, and secondary development.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: 手持三维空间采集与建模设备 RayZoom G200
product_name_en: RayZoom G200 Handheld 3D Spatial Capture & Modeling Device
company_name: 深圳积木易搭科技技术有限公司
description_zh: RayZoom G200采用多回波激光雷达技术，测距综合精度提升至±1.5cm，点云扫描速率高达480,000点/秒，配合360°水平与63.5°垂直视场角，可高效捕捉复杂环境中的三维轮廓。一次扫描即可生成着色点云、3D高斯模型与MESH网格。内置8核2.4GHz算力与3.9英寸AMOLED触控屏，支持开机即用，无需外接设备，适配背包、车载及无人机等多种作业场景，广泛应用于公安勘测、智慧工厂、文化遗产数字化与应急重建等领域。
description_en: The RayZoom G200 employs multi-echo LiDAR technology, achieving a comprehensive distance measurement accuracy of ±1.5 cm and a point cloud scanning rate of up to 480,000 points/second. With a 360° horizontal and 63.5° vertical field of view, it efficiently captures complex 3D geometries in challenging environments. A single scan generates colorized point clouds, 3D Gaussian models, and mesh surfaces. Integrated with an 8-core 2.4 GHz processor and a 3.9-inch AMOLED touchscreen, the device operates standalone—requiring no external computing hardware—and is adaptable to backpack-mounted, vehicle-mounted, and UAV-based deployment scenarios. It serves critical applications including public security forensics, smart factory digitization, cultural heritage documentation, and emergency reconstruction.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 深圳积木易搭科技技术有限公司
description_zh: RayZoom G100是积木易搭旗下推出的第一款手持式三维空间扫描仪，采用混合固态激光技术，具备360°水平视场角与80米最大测距能力，测量精度达±2cm，点云扫描速率为200,000点/秒。设备集成四颗高清鱼眼相机，实现激光点云与8K色彩纹理的同步采集，支持实时颜色映射与多源数据融合。其配套的RayStudio软件可一键完成点云去噪、智能拼接与三维建模，输出着色点云、3D高斯模型及MESH网格等多种成果格式，适用于公安现场勘测、消防场景重建、文物数字化保护、房产测绘与数字工厂等高精度空间采集场景。产品荣获美国国际杰出工业设计奖（IDEA）“Featured Finalist”奖项。
description_en: The RayZoom G100 is JimoYida’s inaugural handheld 3D spatial scanner, featuring hybrid solid-state laser technology. It delivers a 360° horizontal field of view and a maximum range of 80 meters, with measurement accuracy of ±2 cm and a point cloud scanning rate of 200,000 points/second. Four integrated high-resolution fisheye cameras enable synchronized acquisition of laser point clouds and 8K color texture, supporting real-time color mapping and multi-source data fusion. Its companion RayStudio software provides one-click point cloud denoising, intelligent registration, and 3D modeling—outputting colorized point clouds, 3D Gaussian models, and mesh surfaces. Ideal for high-precision spatial capture applications including crime scene forensics, fire scene reconstruction, cultural relic digitization, real estate surveying, and digital factory implementation. Awarded 'Featured Finalist' at the U.S. International Design Excellence Awards (IDEA).
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 深圳积木易搭科技技术有限公司
description_zh: Toucan无线一体式3D扫描仪‌是积木易搭推出的首款全无线、一体式专业级3D扫描设备，内置8核CPU与Mali-G52 GPU，支持本地全流程处理，无需外接电脑。搭载双镜头系统（微距0.03mm精度/大幅面1000×750mm）与4800万像素全彩相机，结合MEMS蓝光投影技术，可精准扫描珠宝、文物、汽车部件等复杂材质。6英寸AMOLED触控屏实现户外独立作业，支持STL/OBJ一键导出。适用于文博数字化、工业逆向工程与数字文创等行业。
description_en: The Toucan Wireless All-in-One 3D Scanner is JimoYida’s first fully wireless, integrated professional-grade 3D scanning system. Featuring an 8-core CPU and Mali-G52 GPU, it performs end-to-end processing locally—eliminating the need for external computers. Its dual-lens optical system delivers micro-scale precision (0.03 mm) for close-range scanning and a large-format capability (1000 × 750 mm), paired with a 48-megapixel full-color camera and MEMS-based blue-light projection for accurate scanning of intricate geometries and reflective or delicate materials—including jewelry, cultural artifacts, and automotive components. A 6-inch AMOLED touchscreen enables autonomous outdoor operation, with one-click export to STL/OBJ formats. Designed for museum digitization, industrial reverse engineering, and digital cultural & creative industries.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 上海睿准工业装备有限公司
description_zh: PX100 粘结剂喷射系统为 Digital Forge 增添了新功能： 一个能够制造数千个复杂最终金属零件的生产系统。该系统支持在需要时进行大规模金属生产，使企业能够充分掌控其生产流程。 新产品，新市场 利用金属粘结剂喷射技术，制造商能够设计并生产以往无法制造的零件，并解锁规模化零件定制的新领域，从而成为行业先锋。 掌控供应链 通过关键生产流程内包，消除第三方供应商带来的风险和成本。变被动为主动。 低废直接制造 无需工具和夹具，大幅减少零件制造产生的废料，降低产品售价，加快上市速度
description_en: The PX100 Binder Jetting System expands Digital Forge’s capabilities with a production-ready metal additive manufacturing platform capable of fabricating thousands of complex, near-net-shape final metal parts. It enables scalable, on-demand metal part production—giving manufacturers full control over their production processes. New Products, New Markets: Leveraging metal binder jetting, manufacturers can now design and produce previously unmanufacturable geometries while unlocking new opportunities in mass-customized part production—positioning them as industry pioneers. Supply Chain Control: By insourcing critical production steps, enterprises eliminate third-party supplier risks and associated costs—shifting from reactive to proactive operations. Low-Waste Direct Manufacturing: Eliminates tooling and fixturing requirements, significantly reducing material waste, lowering part costs, and accelerating time-to-market.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: FX20 是一款高温大幅面 3D 打印机
company_name: 上海睿准工业装备有限公司
description_zh: Markforged FX20 简介 FX20 是一款高温大幅面 3D 打印机，可将 Digital Forge 平台和连续纤维增强 (CFR) 技术带入零件、问题与行业的新 纪元。FX20 打印机旨在满足航空航天、汽车、国防等一些要求最为严苛的制造行业需求；与其他任何 Markforged 3D打印机相比，其打印尺寸更大、速度更快、温度也更高。无论您需要的是工具还是生产零件，FX20 都能带给您高品质、高性能的解决方案。
description_en: The Markforged FX20 is a high-temperature, large-format 3D printer that extends the Digital Forge platform and Continuous Fiber Reinforcement (CFR) technology into new domains of parts, challenges, and industries. Engineered for the most demanding manufacturing sectors—including aerospace, automotive, and defense—the FX20 offers the largest build volume, highest print speed, and greatest thermal capability among all Markforged 3D printers. Whether producing tooling or end-use production parts, the FX20 delivers consistently high quality and exceptional performance.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: FX10 第一台工业级金属和复合打印机
product_name_en: Markforged FX10 First Industrial-Grade Metal and Composite 3D Printer
company_name: 上海睿准工业装备有限公司
description_zh: 第一台工业级金属和复合打印机。 FX10 是首款工业级金属和复合 3D 打印机，也是数年来的工程创新与技术进步的结晶。基于 Markforged X7 和 Metal X 的成功，FX10可快速为您的工厂提供强大、精确的工具和夹具。 FX10 具有模块化打印系统，支持用户快速高效地在金属和复合材料打印引擎之间进行切换。所有 FX10 均具有复合材料打印能力，金属材料打印则为可购买的附加功能。安装在打印头上的光学传感器可以检验零件的尺寸精度，并评估设备的运行状况和性能。 FX10 具有自动校准和换料功能，可提供简单的低接触用户体验，从而降低客户对专职操作人员的需求。
description_en: The Markforged FX10 is the world’s first industrial-grade metal and composite 3D printer—a culmination of years of engineering innovation and technological advancement. Building upon the proven success of the Markforged X7 and Metal X platforms, the FX10 rapidly delivers robust, high-precision tooling and fixtures to your factory floor. Its modular print system enables fast, efficient switching between metal and composite print engines. All FX10 systems include composite printing capability; metal printing is available as an optional upgrade. An optical sensor mounted on the print head verifies part dimensional accuracy and continuously monitors machine health and performance. Automated calibration and material changeover ensure a low-touch, intuitive user experience—minimizing reliance on dedicated operator personnel.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 江苏铬莱铂数字科技有限公司
description_zh: 尾喷管是航空发动机的关键排气装置，其核心功能是将涡轮后的高温高压燃气膨胀加速并排出，通过反作用力产生推力，同时通过调节喉道和出口面积优化发动机性能，通过金属3D打印技术，可将尾喷管一次打印成型。
description_en: The exhaust nozzle is a critical exhaust component in aircraft engines. Its primary function is to expand, accelerate, and expel high-temperature, high-pressure turbine exhaust gases—generating thrust via reaction force. Performance optimization is achieved by dynamically adjusting throat and exit areas. Fabricated as a single-piece component using metal 3D printing, it eliminates traditional assembly constraints and enhances structural integrity.

company_name: 江苏铬莱铂数字科技有限公司
description_zh: 这款鞋模采用钛合金粉末经 SLM 选区激光熔化工艺一体成型，是面向高性能制鞋场景的工业级模具解决方案。模腔表面的渐变式仿生纹路，是结合马拉松运动员足部动态受力测试数据设计的，可在注塑后让鞋底获得更贴合的支撑性；而分布于模具侧壁的菱形镂空与微孔结构，不仅实现减重效果，更能在注塑冷却阶段加速热量散发，缩短鞋材固化时间。 依托 3D 打印的数字化制造特性，为制鞋行业从 “批量生产” 向 “精准定制” 的转型提供了技术载体。
description_en: This industrial-grade shoe mold is fabricated as a monolithic structure from titanium alloy powder using Selective Laser Melting (SLM). Its cavity surface features a gradient biomimetic texture—engineered from dynamic foot-pressure data collected during marathon running—to deliver superior, anatomically adaptive support in molded soles. Rhombic镂空 (perforations) and micro-pores distributed across the mold sidewalls reduce weight while enhancing heat dissipation during injection molding—shortening material curing time. Leveraging the digital manufacturing advantages of 3D printing, this solution serves as a technical enabler for the footwear industry’s strategic shift from mass production to precision customization.

company_name: 江苏铬莱铂数字科技有限公司
description_zh: 展品为金属 3D 打印打造的涡扇发动机剖面模型。依托高精度金属增材制造工艺，它 1:1 还原航空涡扇发动机核心结构，从前端风扇到多级压气机、涡轮的细节均精准复刻，复杂流道与装配关系清晰呈现。 作为航空动力科普、教学实训及工业展示的优质载体，该模型打破传统制造对复杂构件的加工限制，以一体化打印实现精密结构的高效成型，直观展现 3D 打印在航空装备类复杂模型研发中的技术优势，是增材制造赋能高端装备展示的典型范例。
description_en: This exhibit is a metal 3D-printed cutaway model of a turbofan engine. Produced via high-precision metal additive manufacturing, it achieves true 1:1 geometric fidelity—accurately replicating core structures from the front fan through multi-stage compressors and turbines. Complex internal flow paths and precise assembly relationships are clearly visualized. As an outstanding educational, training, and industrial demonstration tool, the model overcomes conventional manufacturing limitations for intricate components—demonstrating how monolithic 3D printing enables efficient, high-fidelity fabrication of sophisticated assemblies. It exemplifies the transformative impact of additive manufacturing on high-end equipment visualization and prototyping.

company_name: 江苏铬莱铂数字科技有限公司
description_zh: GLB-400M 工业级 SLM 金属 3D 打印机，设备核心采用高精密扫描振镜与 RTC4 激光控制系统，激光光斑尺寸精准控制在 70-100μm，确保复杂结构件的细节还原度与成型质量。 双向循环铺粉系统，成型尺寸达 390×380×300mm，支持大尺寸构件的一体化成型，无需后续拼接加工，减少工序误差。层厚可在 0.02-0.09mm 范围内灵活调节，适配不同精度需求的应用场景： 从齿科领域微米级精度的钛合金牙桥，到工业领域高致密度的鞋模，再到航空航天领域抗疲劳性能优异的叶片，均能稳定输出。
description_en: The GLB-400M is an industrial-grade Selective Laser Melting (SLM) metal 3D printer. Its core system integrates a high-precision galvanometric scanning mirror and RTC4 laser control system, enabling precise laser spot size control within 70–100 μm—ensuring exceptional detail reproduction and part quality for complex geometries. A bi-directional powder recoating system supports a maximum build envelope of 390 × 380 × 300 mm, enabling monolithic fabrication of large-scale components without post-processing assembly—reducing cumulative process errors. Layer thickness is flexibly adjustable from 0.02 to 0.09 mm, accommodating diverse precision requirements: from micron-accurate titanium dental bridges in dentistry, to high-density shoe molds in industrial manufacturing, to fatigue-resistant turbine blades in aerospace—each produced with consistent reliability.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 张家港市弗兰德机械有限公司
description_zh: 本生产线专为中大规模耗材制造商打造，产能可达40kg/h，兼顾效率与精度。配备高速挤出螺杆与优化流道模具，配合闭环自动测径系统，确保高速生产下线径仍稳定控制在±0.02mm以内。集成恒张力牵引与精密收卷装置，有效解决高速生产中的拉伸变形与收卷杂乱问题。适用于PLA、ABS、PETG、TPU等多种材料，帮助客户实现高效稳定的大批量生产。
description_en: This production line is purpose-built for medium- to large-scale filament manufacturers, delivering a throughput capacity of up to 40 kg/h—balancing high efficiency with tight dimensional control. It incorporates a high-speed extrusion screw and optimized flow-path die, coupled with a closed-loop automatic diameter measurement system to maintain filament diameter tolerance within ±0.02 mm—even at peak output speeds. Integrated constant-tension traction and precision winding units effectively resolve elongation distortion and winding irregularities common in high-speed production. Compatible with PLA, ABS, PETG, TPU, and other thermoplastic materials, it enables customers to achieve stable, high-volume filament manufacturing.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

product_name_zh: FLD-25 3D 打印耗材实验挤出机
company_name: 张家港市弗兰德机械有限公司
description_zh: FLD-25精密实验线专为高校实验室、材料研发中心及小批量打样场景设计。设备集成工业级高精度挤出技术与闭环控制系统，在微型化设计的同时，依然能将线径公差控制在±0.02mm以内。占地面积小、能耗低、换料便捷，是新材料配方验证、工艺参数研究的理想选择。全面兼容PLA、ABS、PETG、TPU等3D打印耗材。
description_en: The FLD-25 precision experimental extrusion line is designed specifically for university laboratories, materials R&D centers, and low-volume prototyping applications. Integrating industrial-grade high-precision extrusion technology and a closed-loop control system, it maintains filament diameter tolerance within ±0.02 mm—even in its compact, space-efficient form factor. With minimal footprint, low energy consumption, and rapid material changeover, it is ideal for validating novel material formulations and optimizing process parameters. Fully compatible with standard 3D printing filaments including PLA, ABS, PETG, and TPU.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 张家港市弗兰德机械有限公司
description_zh: 双色3D打印丝生产线是用于制造双色或单色打印丝的设备。它可以将不同颜色的塑料结合成一根连续的多色打印丝。双色多色3D打印丝生产线需要2台或者多台挤出机，每一台挤出机挤出一种颜色。
description_en: The dual-color 3D printing filament production line manufactures both dual-color and single-color filaments. It fuses plastic strands of different colors into a single, continuous multicolor filament. Dual- or multi-color filament production requires two or more extruders—each dedicated to feeding and melting one color.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: 全自动3D打印耗材收卷机
company_name: 张家港市弗兰德机械有限公司
description_zh: 全自动3D打印耗材收卷机 全自动3D打印耗材收卷机通过自动化、智能化的设计，显著提高了3D打印耗材的生产效率和质量，减少了人工干预，是现代3D打印耗材生产中不可或缺的设备。 主要特点和功能描述： 1.自动化操作:自动收卷,自动换卷,自动张力控制。 2.智能控制系统：PLC控制，触摸屏界面，传感器自动反馈。 3.高效收卷：高速收卷，排线整齐 4.多功能性：兼容多种耗材，支持不同尺寸的卷轴。 5.安全与可靠性：过载保护，故障报警。 6. 结构设计：设备结构紧凑，占地面积小。 7.节能环保：采用高效电机和节能控制系统，降低能耗。
description_en: The Fully Automatic 3D Printing Filament Winder leverages automation and intelligent control to significantly enhance filament production efficiency and quality—minimizing manual intervention. It is an indispensable asset in modern 3D printing filament manufacturing. Key features include: (1) Fully automated operation—auto-winding, auto-spool changeover, and auto-tension control; (2) Intelligent PLC-based control system with HMI touchscreen interface and real-time sensor feedback; (3) High-speed, precision winding with uniform layer alignment; (4) Versatile compatibility—supports multiple filament types and spool sizes; (5) Enhanced safety and reliability—integrated overload protection and fault alarm systems; (6) Compact structural design—optimized for minimal floor space; (7) Energy-efficient operation—featuring high-efficiency motors and intelligent power management.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

product_name_zh: AI 低代码SaaS ERP管理系统
product_name_en: AI-Powered Low-Code SaaS ERP Management System
company_name: 零犀智造(天津)科技有限公司
description_zh: 云犀IMS是零犀智造旗下零代码应用搭建平台，让非技术人员也能快速构建管理系统。通过拖拽式操作，无需代码即可设计智能表单、可视化流程与数据分析看板，实现业务数字化。 核心功能覆盖数据收集、流程审批、数据分析和协同管理、3D文件显示、工艺管理系统。广泛用于搭建ERP、MES、CRM、项目管理等应用。深度集成企业微信/钉钉，支持API连接外部系统，打破信息孤岛。 其价值在于敏捷响应业务变化，大幅降低开发成本与时间，助力中小企业高效完成数字化转型。易用性强、高性价比，是企��实现降本增效的实用工具。
description_en: Yunxi IMS is Lingxi Zhizao’s zero-code application development platform—enabling non-technical users to rapidly build customized management systems. Through intuitive drag-and-drop interfaces, users can design intelligent forms, visualized workflow automations, and interactive data dashboards—accelerating business digitization. Core modules cover data collection, approval workflows, analytics, collaborative management, native 3D file viewing, and process planning. Widely deployed for building ERP, MES, CRM, and project management applications. Deeply integrated with WeCom and DingTalk, and extensible via API for enterprise system interoperability—breaking down information silos. Yunxi IMS delivers agile responsiveness to evolving business needs, dramatically reducing development time and cost—making it a highly practical, cost-effective tool for SMEs pursuing efficient digital transformation.

company_name: 零犀智造(天津)科技有限公司
description_zh: MAT-DLS380采用世界最先进HSCP高速打印技术，具有超高的打印速度及精度。配合全自研的双组分弹性材料及高性能塑性材料，轻松实现终端产品的生产。打造一个idea-to-production的创新平台，标志着3D打印技术从产品打样到终端零件小批量生产的一个新里程碑。
description_en: The MAT-DLS380 employs the world’s most advanced HSCP (High-Speed Continuous Printing) technology—delivering exceptional print speed and resolution. Paired with proprietary dual-component elastomeric resins and high-performance photopolymer materials, it enables seamless production of functional end-use parts. This system establishes an innovative idea-to-production platform—marking a pivotal milestone in advancing 3D printing from prototyping to small-batch end-part manufacturing.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

product_name_en: Integrated Powder Supply, Sieving & Recovery System
company_name: 万晟智造科技(天津)有限公司
description_zh: 本系统为辅助3D打印机工作,完成供粉、旧粉回收等工作各环节的自动化对接,实现高效、安全、简单、环保的粉末处理。系统主要由供粉系统、旧粉回收系统、筛分系统、新粉添加系统、尾气处理系统、清洗系统、控制系统等组成,做到了多机一体,大幅减少了使用设备所需场地面积,节省人力消耗。
description_en: This integrated system automates auxiliary functions for metal 3D printers—including powder feeding, spent powder recovery, and sieving—enabling efficient, safe, simple, and environmentally responsible powder handling. Comprising powder supply, spent powder recovery, sieving, fresh powder replenishment, exhaust gas treatment, cleaning, and centralized control subsystems, it consolidates multiple discrete units into a single compact platform—significantly reducing required floor space and labor requirements.

company_name: 万晟智造科技(天津)有限公司
description_zh: 用于金属3D打印工件的粉尘清理与回收,在性气体保护下工作,即能充分清理零件复杂路径里面存在的粉末,又能解决清粉过程出现的粉末污染和安全等方面的隐患,并防止清粉过程中粉末吸入人体的风险。
description_en: The Powder Cleaning Chamber is designed for post-processing dust removal and powder recovery from metal 3D printed parts. Operating under inert gas protection, it thoroughly cleans residual powder from intricate internal channels and geometries—while simultaneously mitigating powder contamination, explosion hazards, and operator inhalation risks during cleaning operations.

company_name: 万晟智造科技(天津)有限公司
description_zh: 筛分机是我公司研发的一款专门应用于3D打印行业的新型直线筛分机,该机型采用了振动电机加高频超声振动波(机械波)相结合的工作模式,针对小分量筛分而开发的一款筛分机,大幅度提高筛分效率和筛分质
description_en: A novel linear screening machine developed by our company specifically for the 3D printing industry. It employs a hybrid operation mode combining vibration motors with high-frequency ultrasonic mechanical waves, optimized for small-batch screening to significantly enhance screening efficiency and precision.

product_name_en: Permanent Filter Cartridge Dust Collection System
company_name: 万晟智造科技(天津)有限公司
description_zh: 适用于不锈钢、模具钢、铝合金、钛合金等金属粉末在打印过程中产生的烟尘净化与惰化防爆。
description_en: A dust extraction and inerting explosion-protection system designed for metal powders—including stainless steel, tool steel, aluminum alloys, and titanium alloys—generated during additive manufacturing processes.
categories_zh: 手套箱，除尘防爆及禁烟设备
categories_en: Glove Boxes, Dust Extraction & Safety Equipment

company_name: 东莞市空实科技有限公司
description_zh: 空实科技联合多家高校研发的TJ-5536工程高韧树脂，是光固化3D打印材料的划时代突破。它攻克了行业长期存在的“打印即老化”“退韧”难题，实现“即打即用、长久不退韧”，打印后性能锁定，力学保持率超90%，承重不变形、存放不开裂；同时具备耐刮耐磨、优异耐热性与出色尺寸稳定性，耐化学腐蚀表现良好，性能对标ABS塑料。相较于金属材料，它可实现轻量化设计（重量降低50%）、成本直降60%，无需开模即可小批量生产，覆盖重型工装夹具、产品外壳、高要求原型验证、文创模型等多元场景，真正让光固化材料能与PLA的便捷性、金属的耐用性正面抗衡。
description_en: A groundbreaking photopolymer resin co-developed by Dongguan Kongshi Technology Co., Ltd. and multiple universities. TJ-5536 solves long-standing industry challenges of 'immediate aging upon printing' and 'toughness degradation', enabling 'print-and-use' functionality with permanent toughness retention. Post-curing mechanical properties remain >90% stable; parts maintain load-bearing integrity without deformation and resist cracking during storage. The material delivers excellent abrasion resistance, thermal stability, dimensional accuracy, and chemical corrosion resistance—performance-matched to ABS plastic. Compared to metals, it enables 50% weight reduction, 60% cost savings, and rapid low-volume production without tooling—ideal for heavy-duty jigs & fixtures, product enclosures, high-fidelity prototyping, and cultural/creative models. It bridges the gap between PLA’s ease-of-use and metal’s durability.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 东莞市空实科技有限公司
description_zh: 采用军用级密封LED光机与半导体DMD芯片，光源寿命达60,000小时（7年连续运行），较传统LCD设备提升300%，运维成本趋近于零。384×216×400mm超大构建空间支持汽车零件、建筑模型一体化打印，杜绝拼接变形；双Z轴军工稳构结合恒温平台与动态气压补偿，确保大型件层厚误差≤0.05mm。革命性透气离型膜（ACF膜） 透氧率提升30%，模型剥离力下降40%，支撑结构减少50%，尺寸还原度≥90%。面曝光整层固化速度400mm/小时，较SLA提速20倍，单日量产300+精密零件。脚踢式感应仓门2.0实现手套零接触操作，全面兼容工程树脂、耐高温材料及生物相容聚合物。
description_en: A high-performance DLP printer featuring military-grade sealed LED optics and a semiconductor DMD chip, delivering 60,000 hours (7 years continuous) light source lifetime—300% longer than conventional LCD systems—with near-zero operational maintenance costs. Its ultra-large build volume (384 × 216 × 400 mm) supports monolithic printing of automotive components and architectural models, eliminating assembly-induced distortion. Dual Z-axis military-grade rigid structure, constant-temperature platform, and dynamic air-pressure compensation ensure layer thickness accuracy ≤0.05 mm. Revolutionary ACF (Air-Permeable Release Film) increases oxygen permeability by 30%, reduces part release force by 40%, cuts support volume by 50%, and achieves ≥90% dimensional fidelity. Full-layer exposure curing speed reaches 400 mm/h—20× faster than SLA—enabling daily mass production of 300+ precision parts. Foot-activated 2.0 sensing chamber door enables glove-free operation. Fully compatible with engineering resins, high-temperature materials, and biocompatible polymers.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 东莞市空实科技有限公司
description_zh: 采用液晶显示技术（LCD）实现高精度面成型制造。核心机型K1配备13.6英寸7K分辨率屏幕（6480×3600dpi），像素精度达±0.046mm，Z轴精度0.02mm，最大打印尺寸298×165×380mm。设备集成双重加热系统（舱室恒温+料槽预热）、抗挤压模块及空气塔滤尘设计，保障连续打印稳定性和元件长寿命。支持10-20mm/h打印速度及0.025-0.1mm层厚调节，适配30+种工程树脂（如高强度、耐高温280℃、柔性类材料），满足航空航天、齿科修复、珠宝铸造等工业场景需求。整机采用模块化设计，关键部件（如LCD屏、离型膜）支持快速更换，降低维护成本。
description_en: An LCD-based high-precision vat photopolymerization printer. The core K1 model features a 13.6-inch 7K-resolution display (6480 × 3600 dpi), pixel accuracy of ±0.046 mm, Z-axis resolution of 0.02 mm, and maximum build volume of 298 × 165 × 380 mm. Integrated dual heating (chamber temperature control + resin vat preheating), anti-compression modules, and AirTower dust filtration ensure robust, uninterrupted printing and extended component life. Supports print speeds of 10–20 mm/h and adjustable layer heights from 0.025–0.1 mm, compatible with 30+ engineering resins—including high-strength, 280°C heat-resistant, and flexible formulations—for aerospace, dental restoration, and jewelry casting applications. Modular design enables rapid replacement of critical components (e.g., LCD panel, release film), minimizing maintenance downtime and cost.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 东莞市空实科技有限公司
description_zh: 一体成型工艺 仿生晶格结构 动态足压自适应·透气性提升60% 基于AI算法的晶格密度调控技术，精准匹配足弓、前掌、后跟的力学需求，镂空结构增强透气性与缓震效能
description_en: Monolithic footwear fabricated using biomimetic lattice architecture with AI-driven lattice density optimization. Dynamically adapts to plantar pressure distribution while improving breathability by 60%. Lattice geometry is precisely tuned to match biomechanical requirements of the arch, forefoot, and heel—enhancing both ventilation and impact absorption.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

description_zh: J200粘接剂喷射打印技术，以微米级金属粉末为成型材料，成型室尺寸可达 200×180×150mm3 （W×D×H），打印效率快，可打印不锈钢、钨合金、硬质合金、陶瓷 等材料，适用于汽车、消费品、刀具、模具、航空航天等领域高精度零部件的直接制造。
description_en: A binder jetting system utilizing micrometer-scale metal powders, with a build chamber size of 200 × 180 × 150 mm³ (W × D × H). Offers high-speed printing capability for stainless steel, tungsten alloy, cemented carbide, and ceramics—suitable for direct manufacturing of high-precision components in automotive, consumer goods, cutting tools, molds, and aerospace applications.

This marks the first time Dai’s iconic Water Margin characters have been converted into high-fidelity 3D models using proprietary technology from MATHMAGIC—the parent company of Hitem3D—and manufactured as museum-grade sculptures.

company_name: 南京长江工业技术研究院有限公司
description_zh: 高温连续纤维预浸渍丝材成型设备采用熔融浸渍原理，模具最高温度可达480℃，通过全线张力调控、高温去浆、组合展纤、“S型”可变浸渍流道等工序可制备出高浸渍均匀度、纤维含量体积分数为45%-55%的丝材。
description_en: A high-temperature continuous fiber pre-impregnation filament production system based on melt impregnation. The die temperature reaches up to 480°C. Integrated tension control, high-temperature sizing removal, multi-stage fiber spreading, and an adjustable 'S-shaped' impregnation flow channel enable production of filaments with uniform resin distribution and fiber volume fraction of 45–55%.

company_name: 南京长江工业技术研究院有限公司
