description_en: An industrial-grade CF1000 printer equipped with a liquid-cooled high-temperature quad-nozzle print head and a six-channel high-efficiency turbo-controlled chamber temperature system. It enables synchronized short- and continuous-fiber deposition under elevated chamber temperatures—delivering a cost-effective, high-productivity solution for large-scale, high-performance composite component manufacturing in aerospace, automotive, and marine industries.

description_zh: SC12060是一款大型工业级FDM 3D打印机，成型尺寸达1.2米×0.6米×0.6米，具备优异的稳定性和精度。它集成了精准温控、多材料挤出系统及专用算法，有效解决了大尺寸打印件易变形、层间结合弱等核心难题。设备可兼容碳纤维等高性能复合材料，能直接制造高强度终端部件。广泛应用于机器人、汽车、无人机、医疗器械等领域，满足高端制造业对小批量、轻量化、高强度部件的快速生产需求，是推动产品研发与定制化生产的先进工具。
description_en: A large-format industrial FDM 3D printer with a build volume of 1.2 × 0.6 × 0.6 m, delivering exceptional dimensional stability and print accuracy. Integrated precision thermal management, multi-material extrusion, and proprietary algorithms effectively resolve key challenges in large-part fabrication—including warping and weak interlayer bonding. Compatible with high-performance composites such as carbon fiber, SC12060 directly produces high-strength end-use components. Widely deployed in robotics, automotive, UAV, and medical device manufacturing to meet rapid prototyping and customized production demands for lightweight, high-strength, low-volume parts—accelerating R&D and agile manufacturing.

description_zh: INLONG Vulcan 600 是一款大尺寸工业级高温3D打印设备。它集高效恒温腔、精密控温与工业级可靠性于一体，拥有600×500×500mm成型空间，并搭载极速均热系统，专为释放PEEK等顶级工程材料的潜能而设计，能直接将高性能材料转化为耐用的终端部件。它以精密、稳定、永续的制造能力，持续赋能机器人、无人机、航空航天、汽车制造、医疗设备及工业治具等领域的直接生产与创新。
description_en: The INLONG Vulcan 600 is a large-format, industrial-grade high-temperature 3D printing system. Integrating an efficient constant-temperature build chamber, precision thermal control, and industrial-grade reliability, it features a 600 × 500 × 500 mm build volume and an ultra-fast uniform-heating system—engineered specifically to unlock the full potential of premium engineering thermoplastics such as PEEK. It directly transforms high-performance materials into durable end-use parts with exceptional dimensional accuracy, stability, and repeatability—empowering direct production and innovation across robotics, UAVs, aerospace, automotive manufacturing, medical devices, and industrial tooling.

description_zh: ripo 3.0正式发布，通过核心算法升级与功能模块优化，参数级别达到200亿，将几何清晰度与细节纹理质感都推向极限。集十亿体素级三维分辨率、任意拓扑结构和高效计算三大能力于一身，用户可轻松还原最复杂的细节与形态，让每一次生成都“毫发毕现”，从此3D生成迈入IMAX新时代。
description_en: Tripo 3.0 is now officially launched. Leveraging upgraded core algorithms and optimized functional modules, it achieves a parameter scale of 20 billion—pushing geometric fidelity and surface texture detail to their limits. Combining 1-billion-voxel-level volumetric resolution, support for arbitrary topology, and high-efficiency computation, Tripo enables effortless reconstruction of the most complex geometries and fine details, delivering photorealistic output in every generation. This marks the dawn of the IMAX era in generative 3D modeling.

description_zh: S800系列不仅以超大型成型仓定义 生产规模,更以"全流程无人化"自 动化、顶尖配置带来的极致效率, 重新诠释粘结剂喷射技术(BJT)的 内核。它从根源上重构了"打印-烧结" 全链路,旨在直接批量化制造最终零 件,其超越传统认知的稳定性与一致 性,正在重新定义BJT的生产边界与 商业价值。
description_en: The S800 series redefines production-scale binder jetting (BJT) through its ultra-large build chamber and 'fully unattended end-to-end automation'—enabled by top-tier hardware integration and intelligent process control. It fundamentally re-engineers the entire print-and-sinter workflow to enable true batch production of final parts. With unprecedented stability and part-to-part consistency, the S800 expands the technological and commercial boundaries of BJT manufacturing.

description_en: The S400 binder jetting 3D printer is a production-grade solution engineered for high-efficiency, high-volume manufacturing. Featuring premium core components and an intelligent control system, it enables precise, closed-loop management across materials, equipment, and process parameters—ensuring exceptional batch-to-batch consistency. description_zh: S200,是入门级金属粘结剂喷射打印机。搭载稳定、安全的开放材料平台,兼容金属、陶瓷及难熔合金等多元粉末。整机体积小巧,单相电源即可运行,降低实验室和工坊部署门槛。可灵活切换1-3L成型仓,适配多场景应用,满足高校、科研、小批量生产、贵金属制造等开发需求。
description_en: The S200 is an entry-level metal binder jetting printer featuring a robust, open-material platform compatible with metals, ceramics, and refractory alloys. Its compact form factor and single-phase power requirement lower deployment barriers for labs and workshops. With interchangeable build chambers (1–3 L), it offers flexible scalability for diverse applications—including university research, prototyping, small-batch production, and precious-metal fabrication.

description_zh: 成型尺寸：600*600*400（mm） IDK-600 DDICO 分层厚度：0.05-0.12可调（mm） OSS 迪料科 成型精度：+0.1mm/100mm 垂直精度：土0.002mm 树脂槽容积：约160kg 100% 工作环境温度：20~26℃ 设备尺寸：1220*1300*1880（mm） 激光器：全固态紫外脉冲激光器 激光功率：5w 波长：354.7nm 光斑直径:0.12-0.7mm 扫描速度：6~12m/s（典型） 操作系统：Windows7 数据导入格式：STL 额定功率：3.6KVA 设备重量：约1300公斤（含一缸材料
description_en: IDK-600 DDICO SLA 3D printer with a build volume of 600 × 600 × 400 mm. Layer thickness adjustable from 0.05 to 0.12 mm. Positional accuracy: ±0.1 mm per 100 mm; Z-axis resolution: ±0.002 mm. Resin tank capacity: ~160 kg. Operating ambient temperature: 20–26 °C. Machine dimensions: 1220 × 1300 × 1880 mm. UV pulsed solid-state laser source (354.7 nm, 5 W), spot diameter: 0.12–0.7 mm, scanning speed: 6–12 m/s (typical). Runs on Windows 7; accepts STL input files. Rated power: 3.6 kVA. Net weight: ~1300 kg (including one resin tank).

product_name_zh: 陶瓷/多材料复合3D打印机
company_name: 佛山市光垒智能制造有限公司
description_zh: DLP与DIW技术双融合的工业级设备，能满足高端制造的多样需求，适合生物医疗复合材料、电子陶瓷器件、异构集成、陶瓷封装基板、航空航天等应用领域。既可以复合打印又能各自独立打印，想提高效率或分开做不同件都能满足。核心模块性能上，DLP模块配的是4K48W的液冷激光光机，精度特别高，X/Y分辨率能到36μm，光功率密度180mW/cm²��曝光均匀性也超过90%，像光敏陶瓷浆料、光敏金属、光敏树脂这些材料都能高精度成型；DIW模块搭载双喷头，喷头可加热至100°C，直径还能在0.2-1.0mm之间调，光敏陶瓷膏料、细胞生物组织材料、石墨烯材料、硅胶材料等都能加工。
description_en: An industrial-grade hybrid system integrating DLP and Direct Ink Writing (DIW) technologies to meet demanding multi-material manufacturing requirements. Ideal for biomedical composites, electronic ceramics, heterogeneous integration, ceramic packaging substrates, and aerospace components. Supports both concurrent multi-material printing and independent single-process operation. The DLP module features a liquid-cooled 4K/48W laser projector delivering 36 µm XY resolution, 180 mW/cm² optical power density, and >90% exposure uniformity—capable of high-precision printing of photosensitive ceramic slurries, metal pastes, and resins. The DIW module includes dual heated nozzles (up to 100 °C), with adjustable orifice diameters from 0.2 to 1.0 mm—enabling processing of photosensitive ceramic pastes, bio-inks, graphene-based inks, and silicone materials.
applications_zh: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备
applications_en: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备

company_name: 泉州迪科科技有限公司
description_zh: DK-388Pr0 分辨率：3840*2400（XPR） Z轴：研磨滚珠丝杆 打印尺寸：384*240*400mm 光源：DLP-4K投影光机 打印速度：0.05mm-0.3mm每层曝光2~8s 数据传输：USB和网络传输 智能恒温：恒温控制 内部照明：支持 打印层厚：0.025-0.3mm 波长：405mm 整机功率：800W XY像素精度：100um像素 电源输入：100-240VAC50-60Hz 产品净重：310Kg 产品毛重：350Kg 机器尺寸：750*650*1850mm 包装尺寸：800*700*1900mm
description_en: DK-388Pro DLP 3D printer with 3840 × 2400 (XPR) resolution and a build volume of 384 × 240 × 400 mm. Features a ground-ball-screw Z-axis drive, 4K DLP projection light engine, and layer thickness adjustable from 0.025 to 0.3 mm. Exposure time per layer: 2–8 s. Light source wavelength: 405 nm. XY pixel resolution: 100 µm. Data transfer via USB or Ethernet. Integrated intelligent thermal regulation and internal illumination. Power input: 100–240 VAC, 50–60 Hz. Rated power: 800 W. Net weight: 310 kg; gross weight: 350 kg. Machine dimensions: 750 × 650 × 1850 mm; packaging dimensions: 800 × 700 × 1900 mm.

description_zh: 此次我们将展出针对文创、工业、牙科和消费品领域的3D打印光敏树脂材料，类ABS水洗树脂和单、双组份弹性体材料将作为新品首次亮相，展出的亮点产品还包括颜色鲜艳浓实的彩色坚韧系列树脂。
description_en: A portfolio of photopolymer resins tailored for cultural & creative industries, industrial prototyping, dental applications, and consumer goods. Highlights include newly launched ABS-like washable resins and single- and dual-component elastomers. Also featured are vivid, highly pigmented tough-color resins offering outstanding mechanical performance and rich chromatic depth.

company_name: 深圳数马三维科技有限公司
description_zh: Xscanner 3D是一款便捷式专业级蓝线激光三维扫描仪，采用工业级蓝光技术，通过一类人眼安全认证，满足创客、DIY玩家、设计师及工程师等人群的专业需求。 设备搭载强劲算法与高清相机，配备14束交叉激光和1束强化激光，提供双扫描模式，轻松应对深孔和复杂表面。抗干扰性能卓越，无需喷粉即可扫描黑色及金属物体。扫描精度和分辨率高达0.05mm，扫描速度高达420,000次/秒，扫描尺寸覆盖指尖小物与大型结构件，细节还原出色。 Xscanner 3D配套软件可实现毫秒级三维建模预览，零基础也能轻松完成点云编辑与模型处理。Xscanner 3D，让人人畅享高质量3D扫描乐趣！
description_en: Xscanner 3D is a professional-grade, portable blue-line laser 3D scanner certified Class 1 eye-safe. Designed for makers, DIY enthusiasts, designers, and engineers, it employs industrial blue-light technology with powerful onboard algorithms and high-definition imaging. Equipped with 14 cross-line lasers plus one reinforced laser, it supports dual scanning modes for seamless capture of deep cavities and complex surfaces. Exceptional anti-interference capability enables direct scanning of black and metallic objects without spray coating. Delivers up to 0.05 mm accuracy and 420,000 points/sec scan speed—covering objects from fingertip-sized components to large structural assemblies with exceptional detail fidelity. Its companion software provides millisecond-level real-time mesh preview and intuitive point-cloud editing and model processing—making professional-grade 3D scanning accessible to all users.

product_name_zh: Xmachine XM-100桌面五轴加工中心
product_name_en: Xmachine XM-100 Desktop Five-Axis Milling Center
company_name: 深圳数马三维科技有限公司
description_zh: Xmachine是一款真正适合创作者的桌面五轴加工中心，专为创客、DIY玩家、设计师及工程师量身打造。 设备搭载RTCP功能，真五轴联动轻松应对复杂立体造型。其紧凑机身能胜任金属、木材、塑料及复合材料等多种材质的零件加工。设备集成创新的6工位隐藏伸缩式自动换刀系统，可实现多工序高效连续作业，将桌面加工效率提升至新高度。新一代高精度无线测头，更实现了自动工件与轴线测量，使桌面创造更加简单方便。 我们自主研发的智能CAM软件——能够自动识别三维模型特征，智能生成最优加工刀路，实现复杂部件的自动编程。这意味着，您无需成为CNC专家，就可轻松驾驭五轴加工的无限可能，真正专注于设计与创造本身。
description_en: Xmachine is a true creator-focused desktop five-axis CNC milling center, purpose-built for makers, DIY users, designers, and engineers. Featuring RTCP (Rotational Tool Center Point) functionality, it enables genuine simultaneous five-axis machining for intricate 3D geometries. Its compact frame handles metals, woods, plastics, and composites with precision. An innovative 6-station retractable automatic tool changer ensures efficient multi-operation continuity. A next-generation high-precision wireless probe enables automatic workpiece and axis alignment—simplifying setup and enhancing accessibility. Coupled with our proprietary intelligent CAM software—which automatically recognizes 3D model features and generates optimal toolpaths—complex five-axis programming becomes fully automated. Users need no CNC expertise to harness the full creative potential of five-axis machining.

company_name: 湖南珞佳智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 产品亮点： 全过程质量智能监控：标配铺粉状态实时监测，保障生产稳定性与打印精度；可选配熔池及应力监控模块，实现成形过程动态反馈与闭环调控，全方位护航打印质量； 航空航天级高效生产系统：搭载大尺寸成型仓与智能化控制系统，支持自动化操作与长时连续运行，专为航空航天领域大型复杂构件的高标准、高稳定性制造而设计； 粉末自动循环与连续供应：集成全自动送粉与储粉系统，实现粉末智能化管理、不间断供给与循环利用，确保工业化规模下的安全、高效、连续生产； 应用领域： 航空、航天、船舶、核电、汽车、工业等领域； 成型材料： 不锈钢、模具钢、铝合金、钛合金、铜合金、高温合金、钴铬合金等；
description_en: The SLM800A metal 3D printer delivers intelligent, end-to-end quality assurance: standard real-time powder-bed monitoring ensures stable, high-precision builds; optional melt-pool and residual stress monitoring modules provide dynamic process feedback and closed-loop control for uncompromised part integrity. Engineered for aerospace-grade production, it features a large-format build chamber and intelligent automation for extended unattended operation—meeting stringent requirements for large, complex components. Its fully integrated powder handling system enables automated powder feeding, storage, recycling, and continuous supply—ensuring safe, efficient, and uninterrupted industrial-scale manufacturing. Applications span aerospace, aviation, marine, nuclear power, automotive, and general industry. Compatible materials include stainless steels, tool steels, aluminum alloys, titanium alloys, copper alloys, superalloys, and cobalt-chrome alloys.
applications_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 湖南珞佳智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 产品亮点： 本设备集成在线检测与闭环反馈系统，并结合接触/非接触式改质工艺。通过融合宏观至微观的多维度质量监测与材料调质手段，显著提升工件力学性能（尤其是疲劳性能），为航空航天等领域的关键部件制造提供高效解决方案 应用领域： 航空、航空、科研、教育、工业等领域 成型材料： 不锈钢、模具钢、铝合金、钛合金、铜合金、高温合金、钴铬合金等
description_en: The SLM350A integrates online process monitoring with closed-loop feedback and hybrid contact/non-contact material modification techniques. By combining macro- to micro-scale quality monitoring with advanced in-situ material conditioning, it significantly enhances mechanical properties—particularly fatigue resistance—delivering an efficient, high-value solution for critical component manufacturing in aerospace and other high-reliability sectors. Applications include aerospace, aviation, research, education, and industrial manufacturing. Compatible materials include stainless steels, tool steels, aluminum alloys, titanium alloys, copper alloys, superalloys, and cobalt-chrome alloys.

description_zh: 驱动器产品特点： 1.全自主研发生产; 2.支持脉冲控制，EtherCAT总线等通讯方式; 3.支持多种编码器类型，应用场合广泛； 4.支持高性能软硬龙门双驱功能； 5.三段增益控制，有效抑制电流噪声; 编码器产品特点： 1.小巧紧凑； 2.高响应速度、栅矩多样性、高精度、多种分辨率，适合多种应用场景； 3.对温度变化不敏感，无机械间隙； 4.LED状态指示灯； 5.易于拆装；
description_en: AKS Drive: Fully in-house designed and manufactured; supports pulse train and EtherCAT communication protocols; compatible with multiple encoder types for broad application flexibility; features high-performance software/hardware龙门 (dual-drive) synchronization; employs three-stage gain control to effectively suppress current noise. AKS Encoder: Compact and lightweight; offers high response speed, diverse line pitches, high accuracy, and multiple resolution options for versatile deployment; exhibits minimal thermal drift and zero mechanical backlash; includes LED status indicators; designed for rapid, tool-free installation and removal.

description_zh: 产品名称：直线电机模组 产品分类：BMS系列直线电机模组、BMW系列直线电机模组、LMS系列直线电机模组。 适用领域：适用于半导体芯片的生产检测、医疗设备检测、新能源行业、激光高精密加工、液晶面板的生产检测、锂电池生产制造、3C电子的组装检测、流水线等。 产品特点： 直接驱动，无接触传动损耗，噪音小，寿命长。 高速运行与高精度兼备。 可做超长行程，多滑台独立运行。 结构紧凑，易维护，省空间。
description_en: Product Name: Linear Motor Module. Series: BMS Series, BMW Series, and LMS Series Linear Motor Modules. Applications: Semiconductor chip manufacturing and inspection, medical device testing, new energy industry, high-precision laser processing, LCD panel production and inspection, lithium battery manufacturing, 3C electronics assembly and inspection, and production lines. Features: Direct drive with zero-contact transmission loss; low noise and extended service life. Combines high-speed operation with high precision. Supports ultra-long travel and independent multi-slider operation. Compact structure for easy maintenance and space efficiency.

Applications: High-precision positioning inspection, precision metrology, semiconductor, laser, lithium battery, LCD panel, solar photovoltaic, 3C assembly, and digital printing industries—where ultra-precise motion control is required. Features: 1. Extensive range of linear motor specifications with multiple cooling options including air-cooling and liquid-cooling; 2. Optional IP67-rated waterproof design for reliable operation in dusty or humid environments; 3. Optimized performance with Zhiying AKS high-performance servo drives for enhanced motion accuracy and smoothness.

description_zh: 展品特点：相对传统伺服，直线电机拥有超高精度与分辨率，更加快速响应与高频运动，运行更平稳且低噪，简化了结构且可靠性更高。 适用领域：金属或者塑料3D打印设备。
description_en: Compared to conventional servo systems, linear motors deliver superior accuracy and resolution, faster dynamic response, higher-frequency motion capability, smoother and quieter operation, simplified mechanical structure, and improved reliability. Application: Metal and plastic 3D printing equipment.

company_name: 安徽丰原生物技术股份有限公司
description_zh: 丰原生物新研制的生物基聚乳酸3D打印材料，由聚乳酸生物材料与生物复合材料混合制成，在一定环境温度和工业堆肥条件下更易快速生物降解，有良好的物理和加工性能，气味较低。产品优势：无刺激气味、低收缩率、优异的抗老化性能、高透镜、高光泽、高韧性、易配色优异的空间粘合力。
description_en: Fengyuan Bio’s newly developed bio-based polylactic acid (PLA) 3D printing material—blended from PLA biopolymer and bio-composites—exhibits accelerated biodegradation under controlled industrial composting conditions and elevated ambient temperatures. It offers excellent physical properties, processability, and low odor. Key advantages: non-irritating odor, low shrinkage, outstanding aging resistance, high transparency, high gloss, high toughness, excellent colorability, and superior interlayer adhesion.

company_name: 曼界创意
description_zh: 通透躯体如凝露般澄澈，将海洋的轻盈与剔透具象化；内部骨骼脉络清晰可见，每一寸弧度都复刻着生命的精密美学。当冷峻的骨骼线条邂逅海洋灵韵，打破次元的潮玩艺术，正为你解锁 “刚与柔” 的惊艳碰撞。​
description_en: A translucent, dew-like body captures the ocean’s lightness and clarity. Internally, skeletal structures are rendered with exceptional anatomical fidelity—every curve embodies life’s intricate aesthetic precision. Where stark skeletal geometry meets ethereal marine grace, this cross-dimensional art toy redefines the striking juxtaposition of strength and softness.

company_name: 曼界创意
description_zh: 融青花瓷非遗独韵于骏马肌理，传统瓷韵碰撞现代技术，突破艺术���界。骏马昂首奔跃、活力四射，承载青花文脉之魂，彰显创新求索的时代气魄。
description_en: Integrating the intangible cultural heritage of blue-and-white porcelain into the equine form, this piece merges traditional ceramic artistry with cutting-edge manufacturing technology—expanding artistic boundaries. The spirited horse rears dynamically, embodying vitality and the enduring spirit of Chinese blue-and-white culture, while reflecting an era defined by innovation and exploration.

company_name: 曼界创意
description_zh: 凝露般澄澈的通透躯体，将海洋的轻盈与剔透尽数具象；内里骨骼脉络清晰可辨，尽展大白鲨骨骼系统的独特结构与精妙特质。
description_en: A dew-clear, translucent body fully conveys the ocean’s buoyancy and crystalline purity. Internally, skeletal anatomy is rendered with exceptional clarity—highlighting the great white shark’s distinctive skeletal architecture and refined biological traits.

company_name: 曼界创意
description_zh: 艺术作品：骨骼大象 不同于寻常的厚重肌理，作品以近乎透明的粉嫩材质为基底，像浸在温水中的蜜桃果冻，既保留着幼兽特有的软萌质感，又藏着令人屏息的通透感。 最惊艳的是对 “生命内部” 的细腻呈现：透过浅浅的粉色皮肤层，淡白色的骨骼脉络清晰可见，从微微弯曲的脊椎到小巧的四肢骨节，每一处都精准还原着胚胎时期的脆弱形态；而胸腔中央，一抹淡红色的 “心脏” 静静悬浮，似裹着薄纱的烛火，虽不浓烈，却带着生命最初的搏动感。骨骼的清冷与心脏的暖红在粉嫩基底中相互映衬，既打破了单一色调的
description_en: Artwork: Skeletal Elephant. Departing from conventional dense textures, this sculpture employs a near-transparent, blush-pink base material evoking peach jelly immersed in warm water—retaining the tender, youthful softness of a newborn while revealing breathtaking translucency. Most striking is its meticulous depiction of ‘internal life’: through the delicate pink dermal layer, pale-white skeletal structures—including the gently curved spine and diminutive limb joints—are precisely rendered to reflect embryonic fragility. At the chest’s center floats a soft rose-hued ‘heart’, suspended like a candle flame veiled in gauze—subtle yet pulsing with primordial vitality. The cool clarity of bone and warmth of the heart harmonize within the rosy matrix, transcending monochromatic limitation.

product_name_zh: 卫星球粘连气流打散机
product_name_en: Inert Gas-Protected Air Jet Disaggregation Machine for Satellite Spheres
company_name: 绵阳九方智能装备科技有限公司
description_zh: 惰性气体保护气流粉碎分级系统，以惰性气体作为工作介质整个系统采用全封闭生产，惰性气体保护完全隔绝空气，全自动实现惰性气体自动补充排放，系统压力自动调节确保系统压力平稳运行；系统配置有水冷却装置，降低设备内部循环温度，使设备性能更加稳定。 全套设备生产制造工艺技术成熟，质量可靠，性能稳定，目前在国内国外行业中如合金类、易氧化原料及易燃易爆物料中的加工已得到广泛应用。
description_en: An inert gas-protected air jet pulverization and classification system utilizing inert gas as the working medium. The entire system operates in a fully sealed environment, completely isolating oxygen. Fully automated inert gas replenishment and exhaust ensure stable system pressure regulation. Integrated water-cooling maintains low internal circulation temperature for enhanced equipment stability. Mature manufacturing processes guarantee reliability, consistent performance, and broad applicability—widely adopted domestically and internationally for processing alloys, oxidation-prone materials, and flammable/explosive substances.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

company_name: 绵阳九方智能装备科��有限公司
description_zh: 1、该系统可加工各种粉体材料，包括高硬度难磨材料。经过对设备对内部加衬保护后，还可实现产品无磁性物质污染。 2、最新的分级流场技术可以获得最佳的分级效率和严格的粒度分布，粒度可以任意调整1-74um之间。 3、适用范围广，根据易燃性、爆炸性和可氧化性粉末特性，可将适合它们的惰性气体选为保护性气体。 4、惰性气体的纯度可根据工艺要求和产品特点进行控制。 5、惰性气体回收利用，损耗小，成本低。 6、合理的冷却流场，降低系统气体温度，特别适用于热敏感低熔点材料的加工。 7、采用新型端面气体密封技术，保证了成品颗粒粒径分布合理，提高了分级精度。
description_en: 1. Processes diverse powder materials—including high-hardness, difficult-to-grind substances—with optional internal lining to eliminate magnetic contamination. 2. Advanced classification flow-field technology delivers optimal separation efficiency and strict particle size distribution, adjustable across 1–74 µm. 3. Broad applicability: inert gas selection tailored to material characteristics—flammability, explosivity, or oxidation sensitivity. 4. Inert gas purity precisely controlled per process requirements and product specifications. 5. Efficient inert gas recovery minimizes consumption and operational cost. 6. Optimized cooling flow-field reduces gas temperature—ideal for heat-sensitive, low-melting-point materials. 7. Novel end-face gas sealing ensures tight particle size distribution and enhanced classification accuracy.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

product_name_zh: 惰性气体保护气流分级机
company_name: 绵阳九方智能装备科技有限公司
description_zh: 设备介绍： 惰性气体保护气流分级机是针对易燃易爆、易氧化等特种物料的分级需求而开发的一种利用惰性气体循环保护的闭式超微分级系统。通过惰性气体置换系统中的氧气，当氧含量低于要求的标定值后，把物料输送到分级机内，高速旋转的分级转子产生的旋流离心力，把粗颗粒分选至腔体内壁，失速下落，沿筒壁下降至卸料口处排出，同时细粉穿过分级轮叶片间隙，进入旋风收集器或者直接进入除尘器，从而到达了粗细物料分离的目的。 惰性气体保护气流分级机可多级串联使用，以满足多粒径产品分级的需求。
description_en: The inert gas-protected air jet classifier is a closed-loop ultrafine classification system engineered for materials prone to combustion, explosion, or oxidation. Oxygen is displaced from the system via inert gas until oxygen content falls below the specified threshold; feed material is then introduced. A high-speed rotating classifier rotor generates a vortex centrifugal force field: coarse particles migrate to the chamber wall, lose momentum, descend along the cylinder wall, and exit via the discharge port; fine particles pass through gaps between classifier wheel blades into a cyclone collector or dust collector—achieving precise coarse/fine separation. Multiple units may be cascaded to meet multi-size fractionation requirements.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

Delivers exceptional beam quality, extreme power stability, continuously adjustable laser output, high electro-optical conversion efficiency, high brightness, and outstanding reliability—meeting diverse application demands.

company_name: 深圳奇遇科技有限公司
description_zh: 目前公司已氧化铝、氧化锆、碳化硅和羟基磷灰石，光固化树脂。经过上万种配方测试，成功研发出4种9类陶瓷浆料，可满足打印不同尺寸、不同精度要求的陶瓷样品，打印成功率高，收缩率可控。已验证的个性化定制材料：奇遇科技的陶瓷3D打印服务已超300单，已验证光固化打印的材料30余种，并成功助力客户在医疗、航空航天、汽车等领域实现研发技术突破。
description_en: Qiyu Technology offers ceramic 3D printing services using alumina, zirconia, silicon carbide, hydroxyapatite, and photocurable resins. After extensive formulation testing (>10,000 iterations), four families comprising nine specialized ceramic slurries have been developed—enabling high-success-rate printing of samples across varied dimensions and precision requirements, with controllable shrinkage. Over 300 custom orders completed; >30 validated photocurable ceramic materials; proven support for R&D breakthroughs in medical devices, aerospace, and automotive applications.

applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 深圳奇遇科技有限公司
description_zh: 奇遇科技的DLP陶瓷3D打印设备产品线具备超快速、高精度、大尺寸打印等特点，可满足从研发到生产需求。我们具有全球领先的打印速度:最快可达700层/小时(氧化铝)，精度最高可达25um，氧化铝最大可打印且烧结不开裂的实心样品尺寸为：φ20*80mm与φ40*40mm。适用于生产高精度的陶瓷部件，可用于高校材料和结构研究、航空航天、医疗、工业应用等的精细模型和零件的制造。
description_en: Qiyu Technology’s DLP ceramic 3D printers combine ultra-high speed, micron-level precision, and large build volumes—supporting both R&D prototyping and production-scale manufacturing. Industry-leading print speed: up to 700 layers/hour (alumina); maximum resolution: 25 µm. Largest crack-free sintered solid parts: Ø20 × 80 mm and Ø40 × 40 mm (alumina). Ideal for producing high-precision ceramic components used in university materials/structural research, aerospace, medical, and industrial applications.

product_name_zh: PAM点环能量可调光纤激光器
company_name: 上海飞博激光科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 1. 输出亮度高、热影响区小、防飞溅 2. 功率稳定性高、响应速度快、输出芯径可选 3. 实时监控中芯、环芯输出功率 4. 支持以太网、RS485等总线通信 5. 全时域波形编辑，特有单脉冲波形编辑 满足新能源行业车身、动力电池等高速、高质量焊接
description_en: 1. High-brightness output with minimal heat-affected zone and spatter suppression; 2. High power stability, rapid response, and selectable output core diameters; 3. Real-time monitoring of central and ring core power outputs; 4. Communication interfaces include Ethernet and RS485; 5. Full-time-domain waveform editing, including proprietary single-pulse waveform customization—optimized for high-speed, high-quality welding in new energy applications such as electric vehicle bodies and battery packs.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_en: Fiber Laser for 3D Printing (300 W, 500 W)
company_name: 上海飞博激光科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 1. 光束质量优：采用主流14μm芯径，支持定制 2. 功率稳定性高：功率波动3W@100% 3. 一致性强：产品一致性强，多激光更可靠 4. 功率实时监控：实时功率监控预警，提升应用稳定性 5. 强抗高反：回返光滤除技术，轻松应对高反材料 满足航空航天、医疗、齿科、鞋模、汽车、3C、模具等行业应用需求
description_en: 1. Superior beam quality: standard 14 µm core diameter, customizable; 2. High power stability: ±3 W fluctuation at full rated power; 3. Excellent unit-to-unit consistency—enhanced reliability in multi-laser configurations; 4. Real-time power monitoring with alerting for improved process robustness; 5. Strong anti-back-reflection capability: advanced back-reflected light filtering for seamless processing of highly reflective materials. Suitable for aerospace, medical, dental, footwear tooling, automotive, 3C electronics, and mold-making industries.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 三河蓝芯智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 大尺寸光固化3D打印弹性体设备，成形尺寸：576 x 324 x 650mm 。构建了覆盖鞋类、运动类、消费品、工业制造、医疗健康、汽车零部件、教育科研、文创艺术八大领域的应用矩阵。
description_en: Large-format stereolithography (SLA) 3D printer for elastomers. Build volume: 576 × 324 × 650 mm. Enables applications across eight verticals: footwear, sports equipment, consumer goods, industrial manufacturing, healthcare, automotive components, education/research, and cultural/creative arts.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 三维流动贸易（上海）有限公司
description_zh: FLOW-3D AM 软件基于离散元方法（DEM）和计算流体动力学（CFD）为各种增材制造过程提供建模平台，包括粉末床熔融、定向能量沉积、黏结剂喷射以及材料挤出等。FLOW-3D AM的自由液面跟踪算法和多物理场建模功能可高精度模拟铺粉、熔池动力学、孔隙形成、渗透和扩散，分析和优化工艺参数。
description_en: FLOW-3D AM is a multiphysics modeling platform for additive manufacturing processes—including powder bed fusion, directed energy deposition, binder jetting, and material extrusion—built upon discrete element method (DEM) and computational fluid dynamics (CFD). Its free-surface tracking algorithm and multiphysics simulation capabilities enable high-fidelity modeling of powder spreading, melt pool dynamics, pore formation, infiltration, and diffusion—supporting comprehensive analysis and optimization of process parameters.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 光速一构智能科技(杭州)有限公司
description_zh: 打印工厂首选 旗舰机型：DP400系列聚焦高性能与稳定性，搭载超高清显示与高功率驱动系统，支持连续高强度作业。 既能精准输出复杂精密零件，满足企业批量生产需求，也能适配高端研发部门的严苛原型打样标准，是追求效率与精度的专业用户首选。 注：配置可选
description_en: Flagship model for production-grade 3D printing: The DP400 Series prioritizes high performance and operational stability. Equipped with ultra-high-definition display and high-power drive systems, it supports continuous, heavy-duty operation. Delivers precise fabrication of complex, high-tolerance parts for mass production, while meeting stringent prototyping standards of advanced R&D departments—ideal for professionals demanding both speed and precision. (Configurations optional.)
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 光速一构智能科技(杭州)有限公司
description_zh: 尺寸更大，速度不打折 高阶机型：拥有卓越打印速度、超高精细度和更大的成型尺寸等特点。 450的大尺寸能为智能3D打印工厂提升效率，降低成本，适配需长期稳定运行的大规模化产线。
description_en: Higher capacity without compromising speed: The DP450 Series features industry-leading print speed, exceptional detail resolution, and an enlarged build volume. Its 450 mm scale enhances throughput and reduces cost-per-part in smart 3D printing factories—engineered for long-term, stable operation in large-scale production lines.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 光速一构智能科技(杭州)有限公司
description_zh: 低成本玩转高精度，小批量智造无压力 GS-RS-350凭借16寸8K高清屏与低投入优势，成为入门市场的精准之选。既能实现边缘清晰的高精度打印，满足小型工作室的鞋类部件打样与小批量生产，又以低初期投入和后期维护成本，适配个人爱好者与高校教学，让高精度打印触手可及。
description_en: Achieve high-precision printing at low cost—effortless small-batch manufacturing. The GS-RS-350 features a 16-inch 8K high-definition LCD screen and low initial investment, making it the ideal entry-level solution for precision applications. It delivers sharp-edge, high-resolution prints suitable for footwear component prototyping and small-batch production in compact studios, while its low acquisition and maintenance costs make it equally suited for hobbyists and university teaching labs—bringing high-precision additive manufacturing within reach.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 深圳黑格智造信息科技有限公司
description_zh: 解锁更大幅面 量产无忧 -成型体积增至2.3倍*打印35cm高件不受限，轻松打印大体积鞋子、护具、枕头等应用 「黑格首创」1032分区驭光系统 -独立控光 成品表面质量好 -定制光学透镜 有效准直、均匀光线 -多件排版 发挥精准曝光优势 高透光琥珀屏Pro 高性能材料量产利器 -10%透过率*，支持高光强打印 -耐UV，稳定打印6000小时 -耐压频次提升100倍*，可打印高粘度材料 -8万分区AI校准，长期稳定打印 成型原理：LCD面成型 成型尺寸：230×144 x 350 mm *数据来源于黑格实验室
description_en: Unlock larger build volumes—production-ready at scale. With a 2.3× increased build volume*, the Reflex 2 Pro prints parts up to 35 cm tall without restriction—ideal for large footwear, protective gear, pillows, and other applications. 'HEG’s world-first' 1032-zone light-control system enables independent pixel-level illumination for superior surface quality. Custom optical lenses ensure precise collimation and uniform light distribution. Multi-part nesting fully leverages accurate exposure control. High-transmittance amber LCD Pro screen—10% transmittance*—enables high-intensity printing; UV-resistant for stable operation over 6,000 hours; pressure-cycle durability enhanced 100×*, supporting high-viscosity resins. 80,000-zone AI calibration ensures long-term print stability. Printing principle: LCD-based vat photopolymerization. Build volume: 230 × 144 × 350 mm. *Data sourced from HEG Laboratory.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

product_name_zh: 增材制造过程检测系统
company_name: 广州德擎光学科技有限公司
description_zh: 增材制造过程检测系统采用同轴传感器实时监控打印过程的激光能量、金属蒸汽、反射激光能量、 以及熔池光辐射，通过基准值和自适应算法来实时诊断打印过程工艺状态并显示打印零部件的异常区域，从而实现增材制造过程缺陷检测与过程质量追溯。
description_en: This real-time in-process monitoring system employs coaxial sensors to simultaneously track laser energy, metal vapor, reflected laser energy, and molten pool radiation during metal additive manufacturing. Using reference thresholds and adaptive algorithms, it continuously diagnoses process health and highlights defective regions on the printed part—enabling comprehensive defect detection and full traceability of process quality.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 纵横增材智能科技(珠海)有限公司
description_zh: SLA800以大构建容积和卓越精度满足工业需求，专为高效量产设计，可制造全尺寸建筑模型、汽车主模型、医疗原型及高表面质量终端零件，坚固耐用、操作简便，是航空航天医疗及汽车行业生产级光固化首选。 大尺寸高速扫描-6000-10000mm/s高速扫描，兼顾大幅面与高速度，显著缩短大尺寸原型交付周期。 大工件全流程监控-实时可视化显示大尺寸工件每一层的打印状态与核心参数，全程精准掌控制造品质。 大尺寸构建容量-专为大型模型优化的大构建体积，轻松应对建筑、汽车及全尺寸工业组件的打印需求。
description_en: The SLA-800 meets industrial demands with its large build volume and exceptional accuracy—engineered for efficient mass production. It produces full-scale architectural models, automotive master patterns, medical prototypes, and end-use parts with outstanding surface finish. Robust, reliable, and user-friendly, it is the preferred production-grade stereolithography (SLA) system for aerospace, medical, and automotive industries. High-speed large-area scanning—at 6,000–10,000 mm/s—balances speed and scale, drastically reducing lead times for large prototypes. End-to-end large-part monitoring provides real-time, layer-by-layer visualization of critical parameters and print status, ensuring consistent quality control. Optimized large build volume supports architectural, automotive, and full-size industrial components.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 纵横增材智能科技(珠海)有限公司
description_zh: DM200专为专业人士、创作者及教育工作者设计，机身紧凑，适用于办公室、个人工作室及学校实验室。它能以卓越的细节和光滑的表面质量打印小型复杂模型，操作简便可靠，兼容多种光敏树脂，是快速原型制作、产品设计、珠宝铸造及教育项目的理想选择。 高速DLP打印技术-搭载4K405nm光源，每层固化仅需5-6秒，实现高效的快速原型与模型制作。 高精度打印-拥有50umXY分辨率，可呈现极其精细的模型细节，确保作品表面光滑、结构精准。
description_en: The DM200 is a compact, professional-grade DLP 3D printer designed for creators, professionals, and educators—ideal for offices, personal workshops, and academic laboratories. It delivers exceptional detail and smooth surface finishes on small, complex models with intuitive, reliable operation and broad compatibility with photosensitive resins—making it perfect for rapid prototyping, product design, jewelry casting, and educational projects. High-speed DLP technology—powered by a 4K 405 nm light source—cures each layer in just 5–6 seconds, enabling highly efficient prototyping and model production. High-precision printing—with 50 µm XY resolution—ensures intricate geometries, smooth surfaces, and dimensional accuracy.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 纵横增材智能科技(珠海)有限公司
description_zh: SLS2030搭载先进激光烧结技术，专为工业化量产场景打造。支持中型机械构件、功能原型及终端部件的低成本高效制造，在保障卓越烧结性能的同时显著降低设备投入与运营成本。是汽车、航空、装备制造等领域实现中尺寸、高性价比批量生产的专业解决方案。 双激光系统-可选配光纤激光器或CO2激光器，实现更广泛的材料兼容性与打印品质提升。 中大型尺寸零件打印-大成型空间，满足大型机械结构件的一体化制造需求。 高速双侧送粉系统-仅需8公斤粉末即可启动打印，实现≤8小时完成满缸高效成型，大幅降低启动门槛与生产周期。
description_en: The SLS-2030 leverages advanced laser sintering technology specifically engineered for industrial-scale serial production. It enables cost-effective, high-efficiency manufacturing of mid-sized mechanical components, functional prototypes, and end-use parts—delivering outstanding sintering performance while significantly reducing both capital expenditure and operational costs. As a professional solution for mid-size, high-value batch production, it serves automotive, aerospace, and heavy equipment manufacturing sectors. Dual-laser configuration—optionally equipped with fiber or CO₂ lasers—expands material compatibility and enhances print quality. Mid-to-large part capability—large build envelope supports monolithic fabrication of major structural components. High-speed dual-side powder feeding—requires only 8 kg of powder to initiate printing and achieves full-cylinder completion in ≤8 hours—dramatically lowers entry barriers and shortens production cycles.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 纵横增材智能科技(珠海)有限公司
description_zh: 桌面级精密烧结3D打印机，小巧空间，工业起点，是一款专为设计验证、研发测试与教育��用打造的桌面型SLS(选择性激光烧结)打印机。它突破传统工业设备对空间与操作的高门槛，将专业级烧结技术融入紧凑机身，让精密制造触手可及。 桌面级SLS，迷你尺寸-占地仅0.33m’，性能专业，单次启动成本极低；高速生产工业级激光系统结合自动送粉装置，实现8小时内完成全桶面打印。 标配专业软件，免费搭载价值10,000美元的VoxelDance SLS工业版软件，最大化利用打印空间。
description_en: A desktop-class precision SLS (Selective Laser Sintering) printer—compact footprint, industrial-grade performance—designed for design validation, R&D testing, and education. It breaks down traditional industrial barriers of space and operational complexity by integrating professional sintering technology into an ultra-compact form factor—bringing precision additive manufacturing to every desk. Desktop SLS, miniaturized design—occupies only 0.33 m², yet delivers professional performance with minimal per-print startup cost. High-speed industrial laser system paired with automated powder delivery enables full-cylinder printing within 8 hours. Includes standard professional software—bundled with VoxelDance SLS Industrial Edition, valued at USD $10,000—maximizing build volume utilization.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 新乡市先锋振动机械有限公司
description_zh: 本系列产品主要用于金属3D打印机配套使用，在打印结束后，回收再利用残留粉末。可选配超声波清网系统和惰性气体保护系统。配备超声波系统，可大大提高筛分效率，同时避免细微粉末的吸附，降低筛网网孔的堵塞几率。细微金属粉末或特别的合金粉末，暴露在空气中更易氧化，尤其是金属3D打印行业中的高端金属粉末，含氧量有更高的要求，在筛分时不能接触空气，因此本产品在筛分过程中可加入惰性气体保护系统，全过程自动控制系统氧含量防金属粉接触空气，保证粉末的纯度进而提高金属3D打印件的品质。
description_en: This system is designed as a dedicated post-processing solution for metal 3D printers, enabling efficient recovery and reuse of residual metal powders after printing. Optional ultrasonic mesh-cleaning and inert-gas protection systems are available. The integrated ultrasonic system significantly improves sieving efficiency while preventing fine-powder adhesion and minimizing screen clogging. For reactive metal powders—including high-performance alloys used in metal AM—oxygen content must be strictly controlled to prevent oxidation. This system incorporates an inert-gas protection module that maintains oxygen-free conditions throughout the entire sieving process via automatic oxygen-level control, preserving powder purity and ensuring superior print quality.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 中国科学院宁波材料技术与工程研究所
description_zh: 本设备专为金属增材制造中的多材料粉末回收与处理而设计，可高效筛分铁磁性与非铁磁性混合粉末。系统采用磁性筛分与气力输送相结合的核心原理，实现粉末的快速、精准分离。整个筛分过程密闭运行，有效避免交叉污染与粉尘逸散。同时设备集成有铁磁性粉末消磁模块，筛分后的铁磁性粉末将在输出前经过自动消磁处理，彻底消除残余磁性，确保粉末后续使用的流动性与铺粉均匀性，完全满足多材料打印对粉末物性的严苛要求。 该系统操作简便、自动化程度高，是提升多材料金属增材制造粉末利用率、保障打印质量与降低成本的理想解决方案，助力于高性能构件的创新与可持续生产。
description_en: Engineered specifically for multi-material powder recycling and processing in metal additive manufacturing, this system efficiently separates ferromagnetic and non-ferromagnetic powder mixtures. Its core methodology combines magnetic separation with pneumatic conveying to achieve rapid, precise powder sorting. The entire process operates in a fully sealed environment—preventing cross-contamination and airborne dust emissions. Integrated demagnetization module automatically treats ferromagnetic powders prior to discharge, eliminating residual magnetism to ensure optimal flowability and uniform powder bed spreading—meeting stringent multi-material AM requirements for powder physical properties. Highly automated and easy to operate, SMP001 maximizes powder utilization, ensures print quality, and reduces costs—enabling innovative, sustainable production of high-performance components.

product_name_zh: 多材料粉床激光增材制造装备（AMM150）
product_name_en: Multi-Material Powder-Bed Laser Additive Manufacturing System (AMM150)
company_name: 中国科学院宁波材料技术与工程研究所
description_zh: 本产品是面向高端制造的多材料金属增材制造设备，可为航空、航天、核能等极端环境提供高性能、一体化的复杂构件解决方案。 该设备核心技术在于实现4种不同金属材料的智能协同与高精度一体化成形。在150mm×150mm×150mm成形幅面下，精确构筑具有梯度成分、复合结构或功能集成的复杂部件。其成形尺寸精度±0.05mm，单种材料铺吸粉时间小于30s/层，单层吸粉厚度误差小于14um，并配备旁轴红外热成像、可见光成像等原位观测手段，实现200μm级别的元素分布主动控制精度，在微观尺度上精准调控材料的组织和性能。 该设备适用于科研院所开展多材料金属增材制造材料学研究以及小尺寸多材料金属构件一体化成形。
description_en: A high-end multi-material metal AM system designed for mission-critical applications in aerospace, defense, nuclear energy, and other extreme environments—delivering high-performance, monolithic complex components. Its core innovation lies in intelligent, high-precision co-processing of up to four distinct metallic materials within a 150 × 150 × 150 mm build volume, enabling gradient-composition, hybrid-structure, or functionally integrated parts. Achieves dimensional accuracy of ±0.05 mm, single-material powder recoating time <30 s/layer, and layer-thickness error <14 µm. Equipped with in-situ monitoring tools including off-axis infrared thermal imaging and visible-light imaging—enabling active elemental distribution control at 200 µm resolution for microstructural and property tailoring. Ideal for academic and research institutions conducting multi-material metallurgy studies and small-scale monolithic multi-material component fabrication.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 多材料粉床激光增材制造装备（AMM250）
product_name_en: Multi-Material Powder-Bed Laser Additive Manufacturing System (AMM250)
company_name: 中国科学院宁波材料技术与工程研究所
description_zh: 本产品是面向高端制造的多材料金属增材制造设备，可为航空、航天、深海等极端环境提供高性能、一体化的复杂构件解决方案。 该设备核心技术突破在于实现了4种不同金属材料的智能协同与高精度一体化成形。在250mm×250mm×250mm的成形幅面下，能够精确构筑具有梯度成分、复合结构或功能集成的复杂部件。其成形尺寸精度±0.05mm，单种材料铺吸粉时间小于30s/层，单层吸粉厚度误差小于14um，并且配备有旁轴红外热成像、近红外成像、可见光成像、结构光形貌观测等原位观测手段，可实现200μm级别的元素分布主动控制精度，从而在微观尺度上精准调控材料的组织和性能。 该设备适用于中小尺寸多材料金属构件一体
description_en: A high-end multi-material metal AM system engineered for extreme-environment applications in aerospace, defense, and deep-sea engineering—producing high-performance, monolithic complex components. Its breakthrough capability is intelligent, high-precision co-processing of up to four distinct metallic materials within a 250 × 250 × 250 mm build volume—supporting gradient-composition, hybrid-structure, and functionally integrated parts. Delivers dimensional accuracy of ±0.05 mm, single-material powder recoating time <30 s/layer, and layer-thickness error <14 µm. Features comprehensive in-situ monitoring: off-axis infrared thermal imaging, near-infrared imaging, visible-light imaging, and structured-light topography—enabling active elemental distribution control at 200 µm resolution for precise microstructural and functional property engineering. Designed for medium- to small-size monolithic multi-material metal component fabrication.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 多材料粉床激光增材制造装备（AMM040）
product_name_en: Multi-Material Powder-Bed Laser Additive Manufacturing System (AMM040)
company_name: 中国科学院宁波材料技术与工程研究所
description_zh: 本产品是面向高端制造的多材料金属增材制造设备，旨在为航空、航天、深海等极端使役环境提供高性能、一体化的复杂构件解决方案。 该设备核心技术突破在于实现了6种不同金属材料的智能协同与高精度一体化成形。在80mm×40mm×100mm的成形幅面下，能够精确构筑具有梯度成分、复合结构或功能集成的复杂部件。其成形尺寸精度±0.05mm，单种材料铺吸粉时间小于20s/层，单层吸粉厚度误差小于14um，并且配备有旁轴红外热成像、可见光成像等原位观测手段，可实现200μm级别的元素分布主动控制精度，从而在微观尺度上精准调控材料的组织和性能。 该设备适用于科研院所开展多材料金属增材制造材料学研究。
description_en: A high-end multi-material metal AM system developed for extreme-service environments in aerospace, defense, and deep-sea applications—providing high-performance, monolithic complex components. Its core advancement is intelligent, high-precision co-processing of up to six distinct metallic materials within an 80 × 40 × 100 mm build volume—enabling gradient-composition, hybrid-structure, and functionally integrated parts. Achieves dimensional accuracy of ±0.05 mm, single-material powder recoating time <20 s/layer, and layer-thickness error <14 µm. Equipped with off-axis infrared thermal imaging and visible-light imaging for in-situ monitoring—enabling active elemental distribution control at 200 µm resolution to precisely tailor microstructure and functional properties. Optimized for academic and research institutions conducting fundamental multi-material metal AM metallurgical research.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 上海普利生三维科技有限公司
description_zh: 自主研发的MP/MCP系列微纳3D打印机，以2μm精度、全场景多材料兼容、快速打印三大核心优势，为实验室打造 “自主可控的科研智造核心装备”。从微流控芯片到陶瓷喷嘴，从实验结构模型到医疗器械原型，这台设备系统性攻克 “依赖外协、周期不可控、试错成本高” 的核心瓶颈，让科研团队彻底掌握制造主动权，推动创新从理论走向应用实践的全流程自主化。
description_en: The independently developed MP/MCP-series micro/nano 3D printers deliver three core advantages: 2 µm resolution, full-spectrum multi-material compatibility, and rapid printing—establishing a 'self-reliant, controllable smart research infrastructure' for laboratories. From microfluidic chips and ceramic nozzles to experimental structural models and medical device prototypes, this system comprehensively resolves critical bottlenecks—outsourced dependency, unpredictable timelines, and high trial-and-error costs—empowering research teams with full manufacturing autonomy and accelerating innovation from theory to practical application.

company_name: 必趣创新科技(深圳)有限公司
description_zh: BIGTREETECH ViViD 多样兼容 · 色彩呈现 · 一步到位 ViViD 是一款支持最高 16 色打印的耗材管理系统，基于开源 Klipper 协议打造，集耗材烘干、自动进料与自动续料等功能于一体，为多色打印提供稳定、高效且智能的整体解决方案。
description_en: BIGTREETECH ViViD—broad compatibility, vibrant color fidelity, all-in-one execution. ViViD is a multi-material management system supporting up to 16-color printing, built upon the open-source Klipper firmware platform. Integrating filament drying, automatic feeding, and seamless splicing functions, it delivers a stable, efficient, and intelligent end-to-end solution for multi-color printing.

product_name_zh: Pandas Love Bamboo 适用于拓竹打印机的升级解决方案
product_name_en: Pandas Love Bamboo — Upgraded Solutions for Bambu Lab Printers
company_name: 必趣创新科技(深圳)有限公司
description_zh: BIQU Panda系列专为提升拓竹全系列打印机使用体验而设计，涵盖功能拓展改造、打印性能升级、个性化装饰、产品收纳四大板块。通过搭配智能控制管理APP BIQU BIFROST，BIQU将为拓竹用户构建全方位配件生态体系，提供一站式购买体验。 不止于升级，致力于体验。必趣-您的3D打印升级专家始终致力于为每一位maker（创造家）提供优质的打印机升级改造解决方案！
description_en: The BIQU Panda series is purpose-built to enhance the user experience across Bambu Lab’s full printer lineup—covering functional expansion, print performance upgrades, personalized aesthetics, and storage solutions. Paired with the intelligent control app BIQU BIFROST, BIQU establishes a comprehensive accessory ecosystem for Bambu users—delivering a one-stop purchasing experience. More than just upgrades—we focus on holistic experience enhancement. BIQU: Your trusted 3D printing upgrade specialist, committed to delivering premium printer enhancement solutions for every maker.

company_name: 形朗(深圳)科技有限公司
description_zh: Fuse 1+30W ​​在延续初代 Fuse 1 紧凑、办公室适用设计​​的同时，​​升级搭载 30W 高功率激光器​​，​​显著提升打印速度并优化部件质量​​。​​该设备可当日完成原型制作，并能在 24 小时内实现耐用终端部件的小批量生产。​ Fuse Sift 是一款​​一体化粉末回收系统​​，​​涵盖部件取放、粉末回收、储存及混合功能​​，​​实现高效的粉末再利用并最大程度减少人工干预。 Fuse Blast 是一款专为 SLS 部件打造的​​自动化精整方案​​，可​​快速去除附着粉末​​，​​持续产出清洁无尘、触感洁净的成品部件​​。
description_en: Fuse 1+30W retains the compact, office-friendly design of the original Fuse 1 while upgrading to a 30 W high-power laser—significantly accelerating print speeds and improving part quality. It enables same-day prototyping and small-batch production of durable end-use parts within 24 hours. Fuse Sift is an all-in-one powder recycling station—integrating part handling, powder recovery, storage, and mixing—to maximize powder reuse and minimize manual intervention. Fuse Blast is an automated post-processing solution for SLS parts, rapidly removing adhered powder to consistently deliver clean, dust-free, tactilely refined finished components.

product_name_zh: Form Wash 清洗机 & Form Cure 固化机
product_name_en: Form Wash Cleaning System & Form Cure Curing System
company_name: 形朗(深圳)科���有限公司
description_zh: Form Wash V2为Form 4系列打印机提供自动化树脂清洗流程。用户只需将打印完成的部件连同构建平台直接放入设备，工业级磁力搅拌系统即可在几分钟内彻底清洁复杂结构。设备支持可调清洗周期并兼容多种溶剂，提供可重复、无需手动干预的清洗效果，确保后处理结果的一致性。 Form Cure V2 精准结合热量与405纳米光源，以前所未有的速度与一致性，实现坚固强韧的打印成品。用户可以在短短60秒内完成Form 4/B打印件的后固化——设备具备高达4倍的紫外光功率、5倍更快的升温速度，以及1.3倍更大的固化舱容积。只需为Formlabs旗下45种以上材料选择经验证预设方案，即可开始固化。
description_en: Form Wash V2 delivers automated resin cleaning for Form 4-series printers. Simply load printed parts mounted on their build platform directly into the unit—the industrial-grade magnetic stirring system thoroughly cleans intricate geometries in minutes. Programmable wash cycles and solvent compatibility ensure repeatable, hands-free results—guaranteeing consistent post-processing outcomes. Form Cure V2 synergistically applies heat and 405 nm UV light to deliver robust, high-strength final parts with unprecedented speed and uniformity. Form 4/B parts can be post-cured in just 60 seconds—featuring 4× higher UV power, 5× faster heating, and a 1.3× larger curing chamber. With pre-validated settings for over 45 Formlabs engineering resins, curing begins instantly.

product_name_zh: Form Wash L V2 大清洗机 & Form Cure L V2 大固化机
product_name_en: Form Wash L V2 Large-Scale Cleaning System & Form Cure L V2 Large-Scale Curing System
company_name: 形朗(深圳)科技有限公司
description_zh: Form Wash L V2为大尺寸打印提供自动化工业级清洗方案，兼容多种溶剂并配备高效循环过滤系统。通过可编程清洗流程与大幅面清洗舱，可同时处理多个大型部件或批量中小零件，显著提升后处理效率与一致性，是规模化生产与原型制作的可靠搭档。 Form Cure L V2重新定义批量后固化效率，通过升级的光热协同系统为大幅面打印提供强力、均匀的固化性能。专为匹配Form 4L等大幅面打印机设计，可在数分钟内完成大尺寸或批量部件的后处理，并支持全系列Formlabs工程材料预设。其智能温控与光学系统，确保每个部件获得一致的机械性能与表面质量。
description_en: Form Wash L V2 delivers automated, industrial-grade cleaning for large-format prints—compatible with multiple solvents and equipped with an efficient recirculating filtration system. Programmable wash protocols and an oversized cleaning chamber enable simultaneous processing of multiple large parts or batches of smaller components—dramatically improving post-processing throughput and consistency for both prototyping and scalable production. Form Cure L V2 redefines bulk post-curing efficiency. Its upgraded thermo-optical system delivers powerful, uniform curing across large build volumes—optimized for printers like the Form 4L. Large or batched parts complete post-processing in minutes, with full support for all Formlabs engineering resins via pre-validated settings. Intelligent thermal and optical control ensures consistent mechanical properties and surface quality across every part.

product_name_zh: Form 4 & Form 4L 光固化3D打印机
company_name: 形朗(深圳)科技有限公司
description_zh: Form 4 是一款采用 Low Force Display™（低作用力立体光固化）打印技术的快速光固化 3D 打印机，凭借其高速打印性能与卓越精度，可实现高达 99% 的打印成功率（经第三方实验室独立测试验证），并在两小时内完成绝大多数打印任务。该设备专为产品原型开发和生产级终端部件制造而设计，全面兼容多种工程级与特种树脂材料。 Form 4L 传承 Form 4 的优异性能，专为大尺寸零件打印与批量生产而优化，可在六小时内完成大部分大型打印任务。
description_en: The Form 4 is a high-speed stereolithography (SLA) 3D printer leveraging Low Force Display™ (LFD) technology, delivering exceptional precision and up to 99% print success rate—validated by independent third-party laboratory testing—and completing most prints within two hours. Designed for product prototyping and production-grade end-use parts, it supports a broad range of engineering and specialty resins. The Form 4L inherits the Form 4’s outstanding performance and is optimized for large-part printing and batch production, completing most large-format prints within six hours.

product_name_en: TFME23A—Additive Manufacturing Powder for Die-Casting Molds
company_name: 江苏天工爱和科技有限公司
description_zh: 简介：TFME23A是一种通过气雾化工艺制备的应用 于压铸模具的粉末。该热作模具钢适用于 压铸、热锻和热挤压等高要求的热作应用 领域。 TFME23A在增材制造领域具有多种优势： 1、耐高温、高温强度； 2、在淬回火状态以及直接回火状态下均具 有卓越的韧性水平； 3、非常适用于高铬马氏体工具钢作基体时 的嫁接打印； 应用领域：高压压铸嵌件，热成形模具，塑料模具。
description_en: TFME23A is a gas-atomized hot-work tool steel powder engineered specifically for die-casting molds and other demanding thermal applications—including hot forging and hot extrusion. Key advantages in additive manufacturing include: (1) excellent high-temperature strength and thermal stability; (2) superior toughness in both quenched-and-tempered and direct-tempered conditions; and (3) outstanding compatibility for hybrid printing onto high-chromium martensitic tool steel substrates. Typical applications include high-pressure die-casting inserts, hot-forming dies, and plastic injection molds.
applications_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_en: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

product_name_zh: 近净成型＞压铸模具内置流道镶件—浇口套
product_name_en: Near-Net-Shape > Internally Cooled Die-Casting Mold Insert—Sprue Bushing
company_name: 江苏天工爱和科技有限公司
description_zh: 天工国际可为客户提供定制化服务，提供适用于压铸工况下的浇口套。 我们提供此类模具镶件的尺寸选项可满足各类应用需求。 主要优势 1.可根据客户需求提供定制尺寸和冷却选项，定制化、大批量生产。 2.优化后的冷却流道，能够显著减少向模具传递的热量，降低模具热量载 荷，延缓近浇口区域龟裂出现时间，延长浇口套使用寿命，大幅度增加生 产效率。 3.流道内壁全部采用耐蚀材料，内置流道全环节无需后期加工，可直接使 用。内壁表面光滑且无尖角结构，除流道接头位置、本产品零渗水风险。
description_en: Tiangong International offers fully customized sprue bushings engineered for die-casting operating conditions. Available in a wide range of dimensions to meet diverse application requirements. Key advantages: (1) Fully customizable dimensions and cooling configurations—including high-volume production options; (2) Optimized conformal cooling channels significantly reduce heat transfer to the mold, lower thermal loading, delay crack initiation near the gate, extend service life, and substantially improve production efficiency; (3) Entire internal channel surfaces are fabricated from corrosion-resistant material—requiring zero post-processing—and feature smooth, chamfer-free inner walls. Zero water leakage risk except at channel connection points.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: 近净成型 ＞ 压铸模具内置流道镶件— 料筒
product_name_en: Near-Net-Shape > Internally Cooled Die-Casting Mold Insert—Shot Sleeve
company_name: 江苏天工爱和科技有限公司
description_zh: 天工国际可为客户提供定制化服务，提供适用于压铸工况下、长度 1700mm以内的各式料筒。 主要优势 ： 1.料筒内部可内置多组随形流道，可根据料筒不同部位工况不同、温度需 求不同布置多套组合流道，更贴近热量集中区。 2.流道内壁全部采用耐蚀材料，内置流道全环节无需后期加工，可直接使 用。内壁表面光滑且无尖角结构，除流道接头位置、本产品零渗水风险。 3.采用流道胚体双层设计，大幅度提高产品使用的安全性。 可选择性服务 ： 1.内表面耐热冲蚀熔覆层，适用于正对进料口料筒内壁等恶劣工况部位。 2.可定制化布置内置流道，不改变抽真空孔位置情况下，改变料筒内部抽真空位置
description_en: Tiangong International provides customized shot sleeves for die-casting applications, with lengths up to 1700 mm. Key advantages: (1) Multiple sets of conformal cooling channels can be embedded internally and strategically distributed across zones based on localized thermal demands—targeting heat-concentrated areas with precision; (2) Entire internal channel surfaces are fabricated from corrosion-resistant material—requiring zero post-processing—and feature smooth, chamfer-free inner walls. Zero water leakage risk except at channel connection points; (3) Dual-layer channel body design significantly enhances operational safety. Optional services include: (1) Heat- and erosion-resistant cladding on inner surfaces—ideal for severe wear zones such as the feed-port-facing region; (2) Customizable internal vacuum port placement without relocating existing vacuum holes.

applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 深圳麓邦光学技术股份有限公司
description_zh: LBTEK持续响应改善或解决3D打印行业加工效率问题，加工过程飞溅问题及降本问题，实现效率与性能的双重跨越式升级，助力金属3D打印的规模化应用需求，推出了高精度变焦光纤准直器、高性能点环光斑无级调节模块、高功率场镜等性能对标国际知名品牌的优质国产替代。
description_en: LBTEK has developed high-performance optical modules to address key industry challenges in metal 3D printing—including process efficiency, spatter mitigation, and cost reduction—enabling a dual leap forward in throughput and performance. Products include high-precision zoomable fiber collimators, high-performance continuous-adjustment spot-ring beam modules, and high-power F-theta lenses. These domestically manufactured solutions match the performance specifications of leading international brands and serve as reliable alternatives for scalable metal additive manufacturing.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 河北依铂新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 铜合金粉末是指采用粉末冶金技术将铜粉和其他金属粉末直接成型的铜合金。用金属粉末可直接制成各种形状的制品或零件，不需进行切削或只需少量切削。传统工艺为：制粉、混料、压型、烧结等。主要用于刹车材料、真空开关电器、电阻焊机的电极、X射线管、微波管、混合电路封装等。
description_en: Copper alloy powders are produced via powder metallurgy, enabling direct net-shape or near-net-shape fabrication of complex components with minimal or no machining required. Traditional processing involves powder production, blending, compaction, and sintering. Primary applications include brake materials, vacuum switchgear, resistance welding electrodes, X-ray tubes, microwave tubes, and hybrid circuit packaging.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 河北依铂新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 镍基合金GH3625是以钼铌为主要强化元素的固溶强化型镍基变形高温合金，具有优良的耐腐蚀和抗氧化性能，从低温到980摄氏度均具有良好的拉伸性能和疲劳性能，并且耐盐雾气氛下的应力腐蚀。因此，可广泛用于制造航空发动机零部件、宇航结构部件和化工设备。
description_en: GH3625 is a solution-strengthened nickel-based superalloy, primarily strengthened by molybdenum and niobium. It exhibits outstanding corrosion resistance, oxidation resistance, excellent tensile and fatigue properties from cryogenic temperatures up to 980 °C, and high resistance to stress corrosion cracking in salt-spray environments. Widely used in aerospace engine components, space structural parts, and chemical processing equipment.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 河北依铂新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 18Ni300钢是一种含碳量超低的马氏体时效钢，其强度高，韧性好，同时具有优良的焊接性和热塑性，主要适用于注塑模具等随形冷却流道模具、机械零件、批量铸模工具等的打印。
description_en: 18Ni300 is an ultra-low-carbon maraging steel offering high strength, excellent toughness, superior weldability, and favorable hot workability. Ideal for additive manufacturing of conformal-cooling mold inserts (e.g., for injection molding), mechanical components, and high-volume casting tooling.

company_name: 河北依铂新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 铝合金是工业中应用最广泛的一类有色金属结构材料，在航空、航天、汽车、机械制造、船舶及化学工业中已大量应用。工业经济的飞速发展，对铝合金焊接结构件的需求日益增多，使铝合金的焊接性研究也随之深入。 铝合金粉末以其密度轻、强度高的优良性能，广泛使用在民用航空工业中，国产大飞机C919便使用了3D打印铝合金制品。铝合金粉末在3D打印、激光熔覆、粉末冶金领域使用很广。
description_en: Aluminum alloys are among the most widely adopted non-ferrous structural materials in industry—extensively applied in aerospace, automotive, marine, machinery, and chemical sectors. With rapid industrial growth, demand for aluminum alloy welded structures continues to rise, driving deeper research into aluminum welding behavior. Aluminum alloy powders combine low density and high specific strength, making them ideal for civil aviation applications—including 3D-printed components in China’s COMAC C919 aircraft. They are widely utilized across additive manufacturing, laser cladding, and powder metallurgy.

description_zh: 产品具备球形度高、流动性好、无空心粉率、纯净度高等优点，适用于激光选区熔化（SLM）、电子束熔化（EBM）、热等静压（HIP）、热喷涂（Thermal Spray）等技术。
description_en: Ti6Al4V powder features high sphericity, excellent flowability, zero hollow-particle content, and high purity—optimized for laser powder bed fusion (SLM), electron beam melting (EBM), hot isostatic pressing (HIP), and thermal spray processes.

description_zh: 产品具备球形度高、流动性好、无空心粉率、纯净度高等优点，适用于激光选区熔化（SLM）、电子束熔化（EBM）、热等静压（HIP）、热喷涂（Thermal Spray）等技术。
