product_name_zh: 通用型高精密CT检测系统FX0-CT2000
product_name_en: Universal High-Precision CT Inspection System FX0-CT2000
company_name: 上海福柯斯智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 福柯斯通用型高精密CT适用于大多数工件检测，本系统具备卓越的模块化设计，可灵活适配多种射线源与探测器组合。它不仅实现了更宽泛的穿透能力与成像视野，更能在对大尺寸样品进行检测的同时，依然保证图像拥有超高的精细分辨率，是一款集卓越的扩展性与运行稳定性于一身的通用型CT系统。
description_en: The Fox CT FX0-CT2000 is a universal high-precision computed tomography system suitable for inspection of a broad spectrum of industrial components. Its highly modular architecture enables flexible integration of various X-ray sources and detectors. The system delivers extended penetration capability and large field-of-view imaging while maintaining ultra-high spatial resolution—even for large-scale samples—making it a robust, stable, and highly scalable solution for industrial CT inspection.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: LRS-MCx 4K 真4K分辨率滚动投影DLP光机
product_name_en: LRS-MCx 4K True 4K Rolling Projection DLP Engine
company_name: 挪视光学显示技术(上海)有限公司
description_zh: 凭借前所未有的紫外输出功率和真4K DMD的原生分辨率，无与伦比的LRS-MCx 4K将工业生产性能提升到一个新的水平。它具有小巧的外观尺寸和可拼接的模块，可以实现小至25微米的多台无缝拼接。LRS-MCx 4K可以运用在滚动扫描系统中时，以实现超高的生产效率。特殊的对齐功能可实现模块的像素级精确对准。专门为UV光优化的光学系统为N-UV 光源提供最高的功率输出。而且有多款不同放大倍率的镜头可供选择，从而支持广泛的可扩展性。
description_en: The LRS-MCx 4K delivers unprecedented UV output power and native true 4K resolution via its DMD chip—raising industrial production performance to a new benchmark. Its compact form factor and tileable module design enable seamless multi-unit tiling down to 25 µm pixel pitch. When integrated into rolling-scan systems, it achieves exceptionally high throughput. Pixel-level alignment functionality ensures precise inter-module registration. An optics system specifically optimized for UV wavelengths maximizes power delivery for N-UV light sources. A selection of interchangeable lenses with varying magnifications supports broad scalability across applications.
categories_zh: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备

company_name: 中山市胜洋电机有限公司
description_zh: 35混合式步进电机：3D打印通用精密动力单元 核心定位：高精度且紧凑。通用适配桌面3D打印机挤出头、微型3D打印机平台驱动，尤其助力多色打印系统等新技术潮流设备开发，为中小尺寸高精度打印供稳定动力。 核心优势： - 精密驱动：精准定位，保障打印细节 - 紧凑通用：35mm小巧尺寸，适配多场景 - 稳定低耗：低噪低振，适配桌面近距离工况 适配与定制： - 定制灵活：支持高度、轴径等参数定制，可选编码器、多规格齿轮带轮（适配多色系统协同需求） - 兼容性强：标准安装孔，兼容主流桌面级主板及驱动 - 适用广泛：覆盖DIY桌面机、微型3D打印机、多色打印系统开发等场景
description_en: The 35 hybrid stepper motor is a compact, high-precision motion solution designed for desktop 3D printers. Optimized for extruder drives and miniature printer platforms—including emerging multi-color printing systems—it delivers stable, accurate motion for small-to-medium format high-resolution printing. Key advantages: (1) Precision motion control ensures fine print detail fidelity; (2) Compact 35 mm footprint enables versatile integration across multiple platforms; (3) Low-noise, low-vibration operation suits close-proximity desktop environments. Customization options include adjustable stack height, shaft diameter, encoder integration, and various timing pulley configurations. Compatible with standard mounting interfaces and mainstream desktop controller boards.

company_name: 中山市胜洋电机有限公司
description_zh: 57步进电机，工业级3D打印机重载动力核心，专为工业级大型3D打印机设计，大功率大扭矩，适配大型平台、重型挤出等重载场景，为大尺寸高精度打印供稳定动力。 核心优势： - 扭矩强劲：远超小型电机，轻松驱动大负载，避免重载丢步 - 精准可控：高精度步进+细分驱动，微米级定位，保障大零件精度 - 耐用可靠：高强度合金外壳，散热优，支持长期工业运行，降维护成本 适配与定制： - 定制灵活：支持高度、轴径、扭矩定制，多种结构及编码器、减速机等配件可选 - 兼容性强：标准NEMA安装孔，兼容工业级主板及大功率驱动 - 适用广泛：适配工业量产线、大型原型设备及定制重型方案
description_en: The 57 hybrid stepper motor is an industrial-duty motion solution engineered for large-format 3D printers. Delivering high torque and power, it is ideal for heavy-load applications—including large build platforms and high-force extruders—to ensure stable, high-fidelity large-part printing. Key advantages: (1) High torque output prevents step loss under load; (2) High-resolution stepping combined with microstepping enables micron-level positioning accuracy; (3) Robust alloy housing and optimized thermal management support long-duration industrial operation with reduced maintenance. Supports customization of stack height, shaft diameter, torque rating, encoders, gearboxes, and more. Features standard NEMA 57 mounting and full compatibility with industrial controllers and high-power drivers.

company_name: 中山市胜洋电机有限公司
description_zh: 36圆形步进电机，36mm标准圆形外径设计，结构紧凑纤细，完美适配挤出头狭小安装空间，为打印材料精准输送提供核心动力。 核心优势： - 送料精准：稳定微量化材料推送，避免堵料、断料，适配PLA、PETG、TPU等多种打印材料 - 运行优异：运行平稳且噪音低，契合挤出头近距离工作场景需求 定制细节： - 配件适配：可匹配不同齿形齿轮带轮 - 结构定制：支持齿轮直接滚齿在轴上 - 性能可调：性能参数可按需调试 - 环境适配：可在高温高湿工控环境稳定运行 适配范围：全面兼容主流挤出头驱动系统，适配各类DIY及量产型3D打印机挤出机构。
description_en: The 36 round stepper motor features a compact 36 mm circular outer diameter—optimized for tight extruder mounting spaces. It delivers precise, consistent filament feeding for reliable material extrusion across PLA, PETG, TPU, and other common thermoplastics. Key advantages: (1) Stable micro-feeding minimizes clogging and filament breakage; (2) Smooth, quiet operation meets stringent acoustic requirements of extruder-mounted deployments. Customization includes tooth-profile timing pulleys, direct-gear-on-shaft construction, tunable performance parameters, and enhanced environmental resilience for humid or elevated-temperature industrial settings. Fully compatible with mainstream extruder drive systems across DIY and production-grade 3D printers.

company_name: 中山市胜洋电机有限公司
description_zh: 42步进电机：3D打印机核心动力部件 核心定位：42mm标准外径设计（对应NEMA17标准），完美适配桌面级、工业级各类3D打印设备，广泛用于XYZ轴驱动、平台升降等关键场景。 核心优势： - 精准定位：保障打印细节清晰 - 动力强劲：避免打印错位 - 稳定耐用：减少设备维护，适配多种打印材料需求 适配与定制： - 定制灵活：支持高度定制，可按需调整电机高度，提供多种结构及可选配件 - 兼容性强：搭配标准安装孔设计，全面兼容主流3D打印主板及驱动系统，适配不同品牌、型号设备 - 适用广泛：DIY创客与工业量产均适用
description_en: The 42 hybrid stepper motor—designed to NEMA 17 standards (42 mm outer diameter)—is a versatile core motion component for both desktop and industrial 3D printers. Widely deployed for XYZ-axis motion control and Z-axis platform lifting. Key advantages: (1) High positional accuracy preserves fine print details; (2) Sufficient torque ensures stable layer alignment and eliminates misprinting; (3) Robust construction reduces maintenance frequency and supports diverse material extrusion profiles. Offers flexible customization including stack height adjustment and optional accessories. Standard mounting interface ensures broad compatibility with major 3D printer controller boards and driver systems—suitable for both maker and industrial applications.

product_name_zh: 融速科技—超集成激光送丝增材系统L1 Lite
product_name_en: Rongsu Tech—Ultra-Integrated Laser Wire Additive System L1 Lite
company_name: 苏州融速智造科技有限公司
description_zh: 融速科技自主研发的全新多激光送丝增材系统L1 Lite深度组合优化水、气、丝、光、电五大功能模块，一体化设计使得产品结构更加紧凑，机身尺寸仅为380mm*870mm*1233mm，大幅降低空间占用，减少场地整改布置成本。L1 Lite支持多种工业协议，可与市面上大部分机器人、机床、车床等工业制造设备集成，即挂即用即打印，满足增材制造、激光熔覆、零件维修、增减一体等多种不同作业场景需求。L1 Lite还可配有“送粉伴侣”气罩送粉头，实现丝粉同送升级，更换原有送丝打印头的罩子，可支持送粉、送丝、丝粉同送三种打印模式并自由切换，拓展设备工艺灵活性。同时搭载3000W高功率激光头，支持铝合金等高反射金
description_en: The Rongsu L1 Lite is an ultra-integrated laser wire additive manufacturing system—co-optimizing water, gas, wire, laser, and electrical subsystems into a single compact unit measuring just 380 mm × 870 mm × 1233 mm. This dramatically reduces floor space requirements and facility retrofitting costs. Supporting multiple industrial communication protocols, the L1 Lite integrates seamlessly with robots, CNC machines, lathes, and other factory equipment—enabling plug-and-play operation for additive manufacturing, laser cladding, part repair, and hybrid additive-subtractive workflows. Equipped with an optional ‘Powder Companion’ shrouded powder feeder, the system supports three interchangeable modes—wire-only, powder-only, and simultaneous wire-powder deposition—enhancing process flexibility. Powered by a 3000 W high-brightness laser source, it is capable of processing highly reflective metals including aluminum alloys.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 埃太科(上海)贸易有限责任公司
description_zh: Artec Studio 20 —— 集3D扫描、摄影测量、逆向工程与质量检验于一体的多功能软件。 全新工作流程功能，构建更快速、全自动且可自定义的数据处理流程，专为数字化、设计迭代与批量产品分析打造。AI摄影测量升级，优化遮罩功能生成超逼真的3D模型，大幅削减CGI、视觉特效及法医鉴定的后期编辑工作。 功能全方位升级，数字孪生捕获更快速、更便捷。
description_en: Artec Studio 20 is an all-in-one software platform for 3D scanning, photogrammetry, reverse engineering, and quality inspection. Its new workflow engine enables faster, fully automated, and customizable data processing pipelines—optimized for digitalization, iterative design, and mass-product analysis. Upgraded AI-powered photogrammetry improves masking and generates ultra-realistic 3D models—significantly reducing post-processing effort for CGI, visual effects, and forensic applications. Comprehensive feature enhancements streamline digital twin capture—making it faster and more intuitive than ever.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 南京工艺装备制造股份有限公司
description_zh: 滚动花键副是一种直线运动系统，当花键套利用其中的钢球在经过精密磨削的花键轴上直线运动时，可以传递扭矩。花键副具有较紧凑的结构，能够传递超额的载荷及动力，并具有较长的寿命。
description_en: A ball spline assembly is a linear motion system that transmits torque while the spline nut moves linearly along a precision-ground spline shaft via recirculating steel balls. Featuring a compact design, it delivers high load capacity, superior power transmission, and extended service life.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 南京工艺装备制造股份有限公司
description_zh: GZB滚柱重载直线导轨副是由导轨，滑块，滚柱，返向器，保持架，密封端盖等组成。将传统的点接触受力方式改制为线接触受力，由于滚柱的刚性极高，从而大大提高了负载能力。滚柱导轨采用中间内V型槽设计，能承受更大的转动转矩。GZB型滚柱直线导轨副以滚动体为滚柱取代了滚珠，滚动体与滚道的接触方式由点接触变为线接触，大幅提高了滚动直线导轨副的刚性，使机床能够维持更高的加工精度。
description_en: The GZB roller-type heavy-duty linear guide assembly consists of a guide rail, carriage, rollers, return mechanism, cage, and sealed end caps. By replacing conventional point-contact loading with line-contact loading—enabled by ultra-rigid rollers—the system achieves significantly higher load capacity. Its centrally located internal V-groove design enhances resistance to torsional moments. Replacing balls with rollers transforms the rolling element–raceway contact from point to line, substantially increasing rigidity and enabling higher machining accuracy on machine tools.

company_name: 南京工艺装备制造股份有限公司
description_zh: 滚珠丝杠副是由丝杠、螺母、滚珠等零件组成的机械元件，其作用是将旋转运动转变为直线运动或将直线运动转变为旋转运动，它是传统 滑动丝杠的进一步延伸发展。这一发展的深刻意义如同滚动轴承对滑动轴承所带来得改变一样。滚珠丝杠副因优良的摩擦特性使其广泛运用于 各种工业设备、精密仪器、精密数控机床。
description_en: A ball screw assembly comprises a screw, nut, and recirculating balls, converting rotary motion into precise linear motion—or vice versa. As an advanced evolution of traditional sliding screws, its significance parallels that of rolling bearings over plain bearings. Owing to its excellent friction characteristics, the ball screw assembly is widely used in industrial machinery, precision instruments, and high-accuracy CNC machine tools.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 武汉渡诣科技有限公司
description_zh: 光固化陶瓷打印机是一种基于光固化成型原理，专门用于制造高精度、复杂结构陶瓷零件的增材制造设备。它通过将陶瓷粉末与光敏树脂均匀混合成陶瓷浆料，利用紫外光（激光或 DLP）逐层固化，再经过脱脂和烧结，最终获得致密、高强度的陶瓷部件。能够实现传统方法难以加工的内部流道、薄壁结构、晶格结构和复杂型腔，是航空航天、电子、医疗、能源等高端领域的关键制造装备。
description_en: An SLA ceramic 3D printer is an additive manufacturing system specifically engineered for fabricating high-precision, complex-geometry ceramic components. It processes a homogeneous slurry of ceramic powder and photosensitive resin, which is selectively cured layer-by-layer using UV light (laser or DLP), followed by debinding and sintering to yield dense, high-strength ceramic parts. Capable of producing intricate internal flow channels, thin-walled structures, lattice geometries, and complex cavities—features unattainable via conventional methods—it serves as a critical manufacturing platform for aerospace, electronics, medical devices, and energy applications.
categories_zh: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备

company_name: 武汉渡诣科技有限公司
description_zh: 金属 3D 打印机（也称金属增材制造设备）是基于离散 - 堆积原理，通过逐层添加金属材料直接制造复杂金属零件的先进制造装备，无需传统模具与复杂加工流程，彻底改变了金属零部件的生产方式。轻松制造传统工艺无法实现的镂空结构、晶格结构、内部流道等复杂部件。
description_en: An SLM metal 3D printer is an advanced additive manufacturing system based on the discrete-additive principle, enabling direct fabrication of complex metal parts by layerwise deposition of metal material—eliminating the need for traditional tooling and multi-step machining processes. It enables seamless production of previously unmanufacturable geometries, including hollow structures, lattice architectures, and internal flow channels.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 全球首款高温多材料四喷头连续纤维3D打印机
product_name_en: World’s First High-Temperature Multi-Material Quad-Extrusion Continuous Fiber 3D Printer
company_name: 苏州纤意融飞科技有限责任公司
description_zh: 全球首款能同时驾驭高强度、高温、多材料、四喷头协同的连续纤维3D打印机。它集成了多材料打印头，能将连续纤维的高强度、特种树脂的耐高温耐腐蚀、柔性材料的柔软触感、电子材料的导电性和绝缘性结合在一次打印任务中。从多色到多功能，真正实现多种材料性能的组合 ，让3D打印机从原型制造升级到到终端产品制造机。别人在纠结「能不能打」，我们在解决「怎么打得更好」。40%-60%纤维体积分数，900MPa打印强度，200°C耐热上限——这些数字背后是工业级零件的底气，也是设计师不再妥协的自由。 连续纤维的路径，由你定义。材料的组合，没有禁区。
description_en: The world’s first continuous fiber 3D printer capable of simultaneous high-strength, high-temperature, multi-material, and quad-extrusion operation. Integrated multi-material print heads combine the tensile strength of continuous fibers, the high-temperature/chemical resistance of specialty resins, the flexibility of elastomeric materials, and the conductivity/insulation properties of electronic-grade materials—all within a single print job. Transitioning 3D printing from prototyping to end-part production, it delivers true multimaterial performance integration. While others ask ‘Can it be printed?’, we answer ‘How can it be printed better?’ With 40–60% fiber volume fraction, 900 MPa printed tensile strength, and 200°C thermal resistance, this system delivers industrial-grade part reliability—and design freedom without compromise. Fiber path definition is fully user-controllable; material combinations are unconstrained.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 山东诺森塑胶有限公司
description_zh: PETG是高性价比3D打印耗材，兼具PLA易打印、ABS高韧性优势，环保无异味，打印低翘曲、粘附性好，无需加热床也能精准成型。材质高透、抗冲击、耐候，成品表面细腻，可打磨、染色等二次加工。主流1.75mm规格，含透明、纯色、珠光等色系，成品与耗材同色，适配各类FDM/FFF打印机，新手也易操作，广泛用于功能性零件、透明模型、文创摆件、教具等场景。
description_en: PETG is a cost-effective, high-performance 3D printing filament offering the ease-of-use of PLA and the toughness of ABS. Eco-friendly and odorless, it exhibits low warpage and excellent bed adhesion—even without a heated build plate—ensuring dimensional accuracy. Highly transparent, impact-resistant, and weather-resistant, it yields smooth-surface parts amenable to post-processing such as sanding and dyeing. Available in standard 1.75 mm diameter with transparent, solid-color, and pearlescent variants; color-matched to final parts. Fully compatible with all FDM/FFF printers and ideal for functional components, transparent models, cultural-creative displays, and educational tools.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 山东诺森塑胶有限公司
description_zh: 渐变色PLA 3D打印耗材是以玉米、甘蔗等可再生植物淀粉为原料制成的生物基环保耗材，核心保留PLA易打印、低翘边、成型精准的优势，同时搭载渐变色彩工艺，单丝实现自然色彩过渡，无需换料即可打印出炫彩渐变成品。耗材适配1.75mm主流规格，打印无异味、成型效果细腻，适配各类FDM/FFF 3D打印机，新手也能轻松操作；渐变色彩覆盖幻彩、马卡龙、莫兰迪等多种风格，成品适用于手办模型、文创摆件、潮玩周边、教学教具等创意制作。产品耐热性适配日常环境，需密封防潮保存，为3D打印创意提供环保、高颜值的材料选择。
description_en: A bio-based, renewable-gradient PLA filament derived from corn and sugarcane starches. Retaining core PLA advantages—including easy printing, minimal warping, and high dimensional accuracy—it features proprietary gradient-color technology for natural, seamless hue transitions along a single spool—enabling vibrant multicolor prints without filament changes. Compatible with standard 1.75 mm FDM/FFF printers, it produces fine-detail, odorless parts suitable for figurines, cultural-creative displays, collectibles, and teaching aids. Available in holographic, macaron, and morandi palettes. Optimized for ambient-temperature use; store sealed and dry. An eco-conscious, high-aesthetic material choice for creative 3D printing.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 山东诺森塑胶有限公司
description_zh: 植物基环保PLA耗材，1.75mm通用规格，色彩丰富且打印门槛低，无异味、成型稳定不翘边，新手易操作。适配各类FDM打印机，适用于手办、文创摆件、教学教具等创意制作，日常密封防潮保存即可。
description_en: A plant-based, eco-friendly PLA filament in universal 1.75 mm diameter. Offering rich color options and low printing barriers, it is odorless, dimensionally stable, and warp-free—ideal for beginners. Fully compatible with all FDM printers and widely applied in figurine modeling, cultural-creative displays, and educational tools. Requires only standard sealed, moisture-proof storage.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 米开罗那(上海)工业智能科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 手套箱广受大学、国家实验室和工业界的信任，支持物理化学、锂电池、钙钛矿和太阳能电池、OLED/PLED、3D打印和焊接等多个领域的研发、试点生产和大规模制造。
description_en: Trusted by universities, national laboratories, and industrial R&D facilities, this glove box supports research, pilot-scale production, and mass manufacturing across multiple domains—including physical chemistry, lithium-ion batteries, perovskite and solar cells, OLED/PLED devices, 3D printing, and welding.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 北京造物时代科技有限公司
description_zh: 刻未来Z1 入门级体验，专业级动力 *快速换刀装置 *有线自动探针 *气动除尘系统 *激光雕刻 *NEMA17步进电机 *重复定位精度正负0.02mm *一体式压铸铝框架 *0-13000RPM（闭环控制） *四轴加工
description_en: Ke Weilai Z1: Entry-level accessibility meets professional-grade performance. Features include rapid tool-change mechanism, wired automatic probing, pneumatic dust extraction, laser engraving capability, NEMA17 stepper motors, ±0.02 mm repeatability, monolithic die-cast aluminum frame, closed-loop spindle control (0–13,000 RPM), and 4-axis machining capability.

company_name: 玩的每刻
description_zh: 一款全封闭式四头多色打印机，具备： ·5s快速换头 ·24倍速材料切换 ·零材料浪费 ·600 mm/s打印速度 ·300×270×290mm构建体积 ·60°C恒温腔室 ·HEPA 13级空气过滤系统 ·内置摄像头与辅助风扇
description_en: A fully enclosed quad-nozzle multi-color 3D printer featuring: 5-second nozzle swap, 24× accelerated material switching, zero material waste, 600 mm/s print speed, 300 × 270 × 290 mm build volume, 60°C constant-temperature chamber, HEPA 13 air filtration, and integrated camera plus auxiliary cooling fans.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

company_name: 玩的每刻
description_zh: 一款开放式框架、四头的多色打印机，具备： ·5s快速换头 ·24倍速材料切换 ·零材料浪费 ·600mm/s打印速度 ·300×270×290mm体积 这是实现多色打印真正高效且普及化的重要一步。
description_en: An open-frame, quad-nozzle multi-color 3D printer featuring: 5-second nozzle swap, 24× accelerated material switching, zero material waste, 600 mm/s print speed, and 300 × 270 × 290 mm build volume. A pivotal step toward efficient, accessible multi-color 3D printing.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

company_name: 飞而康快速制造科技有限责任公司
description_zh: TPMS结构在自然界中广泛存在，其作为一种周期性重复单元的三维曲面结构，拥有着光滑的表面，无尖锐的转折和连接点。这使得此结构贯通流体时，具有更好的流动性，同时光滑的过度可以适当降低流阻，重复性的多面结构在通过热性流体时提供了更好的散热。
description_en: Triply periodic minimal surface (TPMS) structures occur naturally and consist of smoothly curved, repeating 3D surfaces—free of sharp corners or junctions. This geometry promotes superior fluid flow uniformity and reduced flow resistance. When exposed to thermally conductive fluids, the repetitive multi-faceted topology enhances heat dissipation efficiency.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 飞而康快速制造科技有限责任公司
description_zh: 基于增材工艺设计的各类点阵结构和微通道结构，展现轻量化能力。
description_en: Additively manufactured lattice and microchannel structures engineered to maximize lightweighting performance.

company_name: 飞而康快速制造科技有限责任公司
description_zh: 机壳内部为多流道结构，有效提高产品的冷却效率。增材制造有效解决焊接流道窜腔问题。
description_en: Internally integrated multi-channel cooling architecture significantly improves thermal management efficiency. Additive manufacturing eliminates conventional welding-induced channel cross-contamination issues.

company_name: 飞而康快速制造科技有限责任公司
description_zh: 多结构复合一体化成型，密集气膜孔一次性打印，一致性和均匀性高。通过增材优化迭代，缩短制造周期，降低开发成本，有效提高效率。气膜孔最小直径0.5mm，精度控制到±0.1mm之内，一致性和均匀性高。壁厚＜2mm，外轮廓尺寸精度≤±0.3mm。
description_en: Multi-structural, monolithic additively manufactured component featuring dense, uniformly distributed film-cooling holes printed in a single operation—with exceptional consistency and uniformity. Process optimization via iterative AM design reduces lead time and development cost while enhancing overall productivity. Minimum hole diameter: 0.5 mm; dimensional tolerance: ±0.1 mm; wall thickness < 2 mm; outer contour accuracy: ≤ ±0.3 mm.

product_name_zh: LAVA550⼯业级复合材料 连续纤维 3D打印机
product_name_en: LAVA550 Industrial-Grade Composite Continuous Fiber 3D Printer
company_name: 合肥蔚戴数字技术有限公司
description_zh: LAVA 550是打印⾼性能复合材料的⾸选，它的出现填补了国内在该领域产品的空⽩。机器采⽤创新型架构，由国内外技术团队联合设计完成，外观部分则由国内知名设计公司主持，⿊⽩搭配彰显专业与沉稳。整机厚度为仅860mm，可以通过常规客运电梯运输，场地适应性更强。 在控制整体外观尺⼨的同时，打印面积并没有被牺牲，高达 560*450*550mm的打印尺⼨，可以满⾜⽤⼾绝⼤多数的打印需求。 机器的零配件供应与⽣产制造100%在中国境内完成，使⽤与维护成本可控。
description_en: The LAVA550 is the premier solution for high-performance composite 3D printing—filling a critical domestic market gap. Designed collaboratively by international and Chinese engineering teams, with industrial design led by a top-tier domestic firm, its black-and-white aesthetic conveys professionalism and stability. At just 860 mm deep, it fits standard passenger elevators, ensuring broad site adaptability. Despite its compact footprint, it offers a generous 560 × 450 × 550 mm build volume—meeting the vast majority of user requirements. All components are 100% domestically sourced, manufactured, and serviced—ensuring full cost control and maintenance predictability.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

product_name_zh: S5系列专业级⼤尺⼨ 连续纤维 3D打印机
product_name_en: S5 Series Professional Large-Format Continuous Fiber 3D Printer
company_name: 合肥蔚戴数字技术有限公司
description_zh: S5系列⽀持FFF Plus/CFC/CFD 三挤出技术，传统上是⽤与模型本⾝不同的材料来打印⽀撑结构，但我们希望它的作⽤远不⽌于此， 我们认识到 ，⼈们对⽤由两种或两种以上⾼性能聚合物 3D打印复合材料部件的需求越来越⼤，⽽这正是我们已经实现的成果。我们的 ⼯程师使⽤早已被欧空局⼴泛认可的材料与连续纤维混合打印出有⾼强度且耐⾼低温、⻓寿命的太空零件。 S5 Dual 标配双挤出机（一个塑料挤出机和一个纤维挤出机） S5 TC 标配双挤出机（⾄多可 选装 6 个挤出机）
description_en: The S5 series supports triple extrusion technologies: FFF Plus, Continuous Fiber Composite (CFC), and Continuous Fiber Deposition (CFD). While conventional support materials differ from the model material, our approach extends far beyond temporary scaffolding—we address the growing demand for hybrid composite parts fabricated from two or more high-performance polymers. Our engineers have successfully printed space-grade components—certified by the European Space Agency—for extreme temperature resistance, high strength, and long service life using continuous fiber–polymer composites. S5 Dual: Standard dual extrusion (one polymer + one fiber extruder). S5 TC: Standard dual extrusion, expandable up to six extruders.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

product_name_zh: 四倍速全覆盖SLM打印单元
company_name: 菲镭泰克
description_zh: 模块化设计 全覆盖模块化设计，可以拓展更大的打印幅面。四头一体为最小单元，最小涵盖320*320mm的加工区域阵列。 冗余结构设计与动态数据分配 四重保障机制高效运作，良品率与制造效率的双重优化。 最小单元模块内，个别器件发生故障，系统迅速调整，重新动态数据分配，打印机工作无中断风险。 多头同时工作，制造效率大大提高。 传感器过程监控，振镜实时校准。 多种激光复合系统 多束同种波段或不同波段光束可随机组合，根据工艺需要满足不同应用场景。
description_en: Modular full-coverage architecture enables scalable expansion to larger build areas. The smallest operational unit integrates four synchronized lasers covering a minimum 320 × 320 mm array. Redundant structural design and dynamic data allocation provide quadruple safeguards—optimizing both yield and throughput. Should individual components fail within a module, the system autonomously reassigns processing tasks in real time, ensuring uninterrupted operation. Simultaneous multi-laser operation dramatically increases manufacturing efficiency. In-process sensor monitoring and real-time galvanometer calibration ensure consistent quality. Flexible multi-beam laser configuration supports random combinations of same- or different-wavelength beams—tailored to diverse process requirements.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: Fujifilm Dimatix, Inc.
description_zh: 富士胶片 Dimatix 星光1024 F 系列打印头专为需要耐腐蚀性流体的高温、高磨损应用设计。经实用验证的材料可确保在长期使用过程中保持稳定输出。该 F 系列广泛适用于原型制作与规模化量产。 墨滴尺寸范围为 30-200pL，物理分辨率达 400 dpi。富士胶片 Dimatix 星光 F 系列可支持 UV 墨、水性墨水及有机溶剂。
description_en: The Fujifilm Dimatix StarFire 1024 F Series printhead is engineered for high-temperature, high-wear applications involving corrosive fluids. Proven materials ensure stable, consistent output over extended operational life. Widely deployed in both prototyping and high-volume production, the F Series delivers droplet volumes of 30–200 pL and a native physical resolution of 400 dpi. Compatible with UV-curable inks, aqueous inks, and organic solvents.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 深圳阿尔比斯科技有限公司
description_zh: 本品为3D打印小龙虾创意雕塑，以鲜活小龙虾为原型，融合艺术创意与精密工艺，打造兼具观赏性、实用性与收藏价值的特色雕塑作品，打破传统雕塑的局限，适配多场景摆放与使用需求。 工艺过程：从编程-上机-下机-粘接-加固-上色。 优点：精度高 速度快 成本低。 支持批量定制与个性化专属设计，可印刻logo、文字等专属标识，满足个人、商家、企业的多样化需求，让每一件作品都独具特色，成为传递创意与心意的载体。
description_en: A lifelike, artistically interpreted 3D-printed lobster sculpture that merges creative expression with precision additive manufacturing. Designed for visual appeal, functional utility, and collectible value, it transcends traditional sculptural constraints and suits diverse display environments. Manufacturing process includes programming, printing, post-processing (removal, bonding, reinforcement), and finishing (painting). Key advantages: high dimensional accuracy, rapid production, and cost efficiency. Supports batch customization and fully personalized design—including logo engraving and bespoke text—to meet individual, commercial, and enterprise requirements, transforming each piece into a unique medium for creativity and meaningful expression.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 辽宁冠达新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 4J32合金是一种低膨胀精密材料，在-60℃至80℃温度区间内表现出比4J36合金更低的平均线膨胀系数，主要用于环境温度变化场景下的高精度仪表零件制造。 等效牌号：Super-Invar、FeNi32Co4、Super Invar 32-5
description_en: 4J32 is a low-expansion precision alloy exhibiting a lower mean coefficient of linear expansion than 4J36 across the temperature range of −60 °C to +80 °C. Primarily used in high-precision instrument components subject to ambient temperature fluctuations. Equivalent grades: Super-Invar, FeNi32Co4, Super Invar 32-5.

company_name: 辽宁冠达新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: GH3625是一种固溶强化型镍基高温合金，有优良的耐腐蚀和搞氧化性能，980℃以下具有良好的拉伸性能和疲劳性能，主要应用于航空发动机燃烧室、涡轮叶片、燃气轮机部件、宇航结构部件、核反应堆部件及石油化工设备制造。 等效牌号：Inconel 625、N06625、Alloy 625
description_en: GH3625 is a solid-solution strengthened nickel-based superalloy offering excellent corrosion resistance and oxidation resistance. It maintains outstanding tensile strength and fatigue resistance up to 980 °C. Primary applications include aerospace engine combustion chambers, turbine blades, gas turbine components, aerospace structural parts, nuclear reactor components, and petrochemical equipment. Equivalent grades: Inconel 625, N06625, Alloy 625.

description_en: 2205 duplex stainless steel powder combines high strength, excellent ductility, and superior corrosion resistance. Widely applied in marine engineering, oil & gas extraction, and chemical processing industries. Equivalent grades: S32205, X2CrNiMoN 22-5-3, 1.4462.

description_zh: EU354 是一款高性能 TPU 塑料粉末材料，硬度为 60A，兼具优异的柔韧性与成型稳定性。该产品为全球首发型号，适用于对弹性、耐磨性与精细成型要求较高的应用场景。
description_en: UE354 is a high-performance TPU powder material with a Shore A hardness of 60. It delivers exceptional flexibility coupled with outstanding process stability. As a globally launched first-of-its-kind formulation, UE354 is optimized for applications demanding high elasticity, abrasion resistance, and fine-feature resolution.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 无锡伊博特环保科技有限公司
description_zh: 这是一款工业级除尘设备，用以解决客户现场生产过程中产生的粉尘，采用高负压风机，具有风量大，负压高等特点，独立的主机仓与过滤仓，有效降低噪音，方便检修，脉冲自动清理功能，无需人工手动清理，延长设备使用时间，自动泄压装置，防止电机高负载运转，影响使用寿命
description_en: An industrial-grade dust collection system engineered to capture airborne particulates generated during on-site manufacturing processes. Features a high-static-pressure fan delivering large airflow volume and elevated suction performance. Modular design separates the main unit chamber from the filtration chamber—reducing operational noise and simplifying maintenance access. Integrated pulse-jet automatic filter cleaning eliminates manual intervention, extending service life. Equipped with an automatic pressure-relief mechanism to prevent motor overload and safeguard long-term reliability.
categories_zh: 手套箱，除尘防爆及禁烟设备
categories_en: Glove Boxes, Dust Extraction & Safety Equipment

company_name: Liaoning Xinjingcai Plastic New Material Co., Ltd.
description_zh: 该系列PLA/PETG 3D打印耗材具备以下突出特点： 1. 色彩卓越：高浓度色母粒技术，颜料分散均匀，避免堵头与色差，色彩鲜艳、批次稳定； 2.质感丰富：支持丝绸质感等表面改性，成品光泽柔和、层纹淡化，美观且触感佳； 3. 适配性优：材料流动性稳定，兼容各类FDM打印机，成功率高，支持多色混配与定制 ； 4. 功能可定制：提供增韧、增强等改性方案，改善材料脆性与层间结合力，提升力学性能。 系列耗材兼顾打印稳定性、功能性与外观，适用于从模型到功能部件的多样化需求。
description_en: This PLA/PETG filament series offers four key performance advantages: (1) Superior color fidelity: High-concentration masterbatch technology ensures uniform pigment dispersion—minimizing nozzle clogging and inter-batch color variation while delivering vibrant, consistent hues; (2) Enhanced surface aesthetics: Optional silk-finish surface modification yields soft luster and reduced layer visibility for visually refined, tactilely pleasing parts; (3) Broad compatibility: Stable melt flow ensures reliable extrusion across all mainstream FDM platforms, enabling high first-pass success rates, multi-color blending, and custom formulations; (4) Functional customization: Available toughening and reinforcing modifications improve impact resistance, interlayer adhesion, and overall mechanical performance. Engineered for balanced printability, functionality, and appearance—from concept models to mission-critical functional components.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

product_name_zh: [PCA 450/450H] 气泡式光敏树脂余料清洗机/微加热版
product_name_en: [PCA 450/450H] Bubble-Type Photopolymer Resin Cleaning System / Micro-Heated Version
company_name: 惠州奥瑞科技有限公司
description_zh: 1. 专为小尺寸LCD/DLP光敏树脂3D打印打造 2. 有效清洗尺寸：W250 x H115 x D230 mm 3. 水槽容积：最大14.2L / 最小4.5L 4. 不通电、不发热、噪音小、效率高 5. 配有可悬挂网篮 6. 配有高效及活性炭过滤网 7. 密封锁扣增加溶剂存放安全性 H. 微加热版：可从室温加热到60度C (完美适用MJP后处理)
description_en: Specifically designed for small-format LCD/DLP photopolymer 3D printers. Effective cleaning chamber dimensions: W250 × H115 × D230 mm. Tank capacity: 4.5–14.2 L. Operates passively—no electrical heating, minimal heat generation, ultra-low noise, and high cleaning efficiency. Includes a suspended mesh basket, high-efficiency activated carbon filtration, and a secure locking lid for enhanced solvent storage safety. Micro-heated version (PCA 450H): Precisely heats from ambient temperature to 60 °C—optimized for MultiJet Printing (MJP) post-processing.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

product_name_zh: [PCA 5000] 气泡式光敏树脂余料清洗机
company_name: 惠州奥瑞科技有限公司
description_zh: 1. 专为工业级SLA 3D打印机打造 2. 更高效清洗晶格状打印结构 3. 有效清洗尺寸：W600 x H300 x D400 mm 4. 水槽容积：115L 5. 不通电、不发热、噪音小、效率高 6. 配有可悬挂网籃: 通用版 或是 鞋类清洗专用版 7. 配有高效及活性炭过滤网 8. 配有移动方便的医用静音脚轮
description_en: Engineered for industrial-scale SLA 3D printers. Optimized for efficient cleaning of complex lattice structures. Effective cleaning chamber dimensions: W600 × H300 × D400 mm. Tank capacity: 115 L. Passive operation—no electrical heating, minimal thermal output, low acoustic signature, and high throughput. Includes interchangeable suspended mesh baskets (universal or footwear-specific variants), high-efficiency activated carbon filtration, and medical-grade silent casters for effortless mobility.

description_en: An upgraded support-removal system specifically developed for PolyJet water-soluble support removal. Key enhancements include: (1) enlarged bottom filtration screen for higher throughput; (2) single-hand-operated sliding door for streamlined part loading/unloading; (3) overhead spray bar enabling hands-free part handling during cleaning; (4) integrated air nozzle inside the processing chamber for comprehensive, one-step cleaning; (5) enlarged, mobile water reservoir to maximize productivity.

company_name: 河南金丹乳酸科技股份有限公司
description_zh: L-丙交酯(L-Lactide)，CAS号为4511-42-6，是一种重要的生物可降解材料中间体。其外观为白色晶体或片状固体。L-丙交酯具有光学活性，主要用于合成左旋聚乳酸(PLLA)，聚乳酸是一种重要的生物降解高分子材料。
description_en: L-Lactide (CAS No. 4511-42-6) is a key chiral intermediate in the synthesis of biodegradable polymers. Appearing as a white crystalline or flake-like solid, it possesses optical activity and serves as the primary monomer for producing poly(L-lactic acid) (PLLA)—a leading biodegradable aliphatic polyester.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 河南金丹乳酸科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 乳酸(Lactic Acid)是一种有机化合物，常温下为无色或微黄色液体，易溶于水。它既是α-羟基酸(AHA)，也是羧酸，广泛存在于自然界，尤其在生物体内。
description_en: Lactic acid is an organic α-hydroxy carboxylic acid. At room temperature, it exists as a colorless to pale yellow liquid, fully miscible with water. Naturally abundant—especially in biological systems—it serves diverse roles in food, pharmaceutical, and chemical industries.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 河南金丹乳酸科技股份有限公司
description_zh: PBAT(聚对苯二甲酸-己二酸丁二酯)是1,4丁二醇(BDO)己二酸(AA)，对苯二甲酸(PTA)的三元共聚物，具有良好的生物降解性能，机械性能和加工性能。
description_en: Poly(butylene adipate-co-terephthalate) (PBAT) is a ternary copolymer derived from 1,4-butanediol (BDO), adipic acid (AA), and terephthalic acid (PTA). It exhibits excellent biodegradability alongside strong mechanical properties and processability.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 河南金丹乳酸科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 聚乳酸是一种新型高分子绿色环保材料，集资源可再生性、生物完全降解性、生物相容性、良好加工性于一身，被誉为是最有发展前景、传统石油基塑料最具竞争力的替代品之一。聚乳酸产业符合可持续发展、低碳发展全新理念，是循环经济的典型。生产聚乳酸所需的原料乳酸由可再生资源（如玉米、秸秆、纤维等）经生物发酵获得，乳酸经过进一步脱水聚合得到聚乳酸，聚乳酸及其制品废弃后降解生成水和二氧化碳，成为农作物光合作用的原料，循环往复。
description_en: Polylactic acid (PLA) is a next-generation, eco-friendly biopolymer distinguished by its renewable feedstock origin, complete biodegradability, inherent biocompatibility, and excellent processability. Recognized as one of the most promising and commercially viable alternatives to conventional petroleum-based plastics, PLA aligns with sustainable development, low-carbon economy, and circular economy principles. Its monomer—lactic acid—is produced via microbial fermentation of renewable biomass (e.g., corn starch, straw, cellulose). Subsequent dehydration and polymerization yield PLA, which—upon end-of-life disposal—fully degrades into water and CO₂, re-entering the natural carbon cycle as photosynthetic feedstock.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: Liaoning Xinjingcai Plastic New Material Co., Ltd.
description_zh: 本产品是一款用于3D打印耗材生产的增韧功能母料，专为解决PLA材料脆性及PETG层间结合力不足等核心问题而设计。通过高相容性的增韧体系，可有效提升基材的抗冲击性、韧性与耐久性，使所生产的线材适用于对力学性能有更高要求的功能性打印。 该产品与PLA、PETG等基料相容性良好，分散均匀，能稳定提升最终线材的层间结合强度与抗开裂性能，为生产高韧性、高可靠性的功能性3D打印线材提供核心解决方案。
description_en: A functional masterbatch engineered to enhance toughness in 3D printing filament production—specifically addressing PLA brittleness and PETG’s weak interlayer adhesion. Utilizing a highly compatible toughening system, it significantly improves impact resistance, ductility, and durability of base resins, enabling functional prints requiring superior mechanical performance. Demonstrates excellent compatibility and uniform dispersion in PLA and PETG matrices, reliably increasing interlayer bond strength and crack resistance—delivering a core solution for high-reliability, high-toughness functional filament manufacturing.
categories_zh: 复合材料（碳纤维增强复合材料等）

company_name: 惠州市彩多屋科技有限公司
description_zh: 强度与韧性兼得,功能与美观并存 PETG是一种高性能工程材料,完美结合了PLA的易打印性与ABS的强度韧性。通过精确的分子改性和添加剂配比,PETG具有优异的层间结合力、高抗冲击性和出色的耐化学性,成为功能件打印的理想选择。
description_en: PETG delivers an optimal balance of strength and toughness—uniquely combining the ease of printing associated with PLA and the mechanical robustness of ABS. Through precise molecular modification and optimized additive formulation, PETG achieves exceptional interlayer adhesion, high impact resistance, and outstanding chemical resistance—making it the preferred choice for demanding functional part fabrication.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 惠州市彩多屋科技有限公司
description_zh: 强度与柔韧的完美结合 我们的高性能TPU线材,为您解锁全新的创作可能。它完美结合了类橡胶的弹性与卓越的耐用性,能打印出可弯曲、拉伸并有效吸收冲击的功能性弹性部件。
description_en: Our high-performance TPU filament achieves an ideal synergy of strength and elasticity. Combining rubber-like flexibility with exceptional durability, it enables the reliable production of functional elastomeric parts capable of bending, stretching, and effectively absorbing mechanical shock.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 惠州市彩多屋科技有限公司
description_zh: PLA丝绸是一种基于PLA进行美学改性的特色线材,通过特殊工艺使打印成品表面呈现丝绸般的光泽与顺滑质感,极大提升了模型的外观表现力。彩多屋的丝绸系列在市场上享有极高知名度,多款独家研发的色彩成为3D打印爱好者中经久不衰的爆款。我们提供单色、双色、三色、四色及彩虹渐变多种效果,色号总数近100种,是PLA丝绸品类中色彩最丰富的品牌之一。如需打印玩具、首饰等注重美观的模型,CAILAB丝绸系列是您不可错过的经典选择。
description_en: PLA Silk is an aesthetically enhanced PLA filament developed through proprietary processing to deliver a lustrous, silky-smooth surface finish that significantly elevates the visual appeal of printed models. CAILAB’s Silk Series enjoys exceptional market recognition, with numerous exclusive colors consistently ranking among the most popular choices among 3D printing enthusiasts. Available in solid, dual-, tri-, quad-, and rainbow-gradient color effects, the series offers nearly 100 distinct shades—making it one of the most color-diverse PLA silk filament brands available. Ideal for high-aesthetic applications such as toys and jewelry, the CAILAB Silk Series remains a classic, must-consider choice.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 惠州市彩多屋科技有限公司
description_zh: 源自自然,强于性能 PLA(聚乳酸)是一种源自玉米、木薯等可再生植物的生态友好材料,在特定工业堆肥条件下可完全降解为 二氧化碳和水,打印过程无毒无害,气味温和。 彩多屋PLA+ Bio系列,在此绿色基因上革新升级--我们不仅为卓越性能而生,更为实现地球可持续发展的承诺而行。 当您为孩子打印玩具或创作任何会亲密接触皮肤的物品时,彩多屋PLA+ Bio让您获得从材料源头开始的绝对安心。
description_en: Born from nature, engineered for performance: PLA (polylactic acid) is an eco-friendly biopolymer derived from renewable plant sources such as corn and cassava. Under industrial composting conditions, it fully degrades into CO₂ and water; its printing process is non-toxic, odorless, and safe. The CAILAB PLA+ Bio Series builds upon this green foundation with advanced formulation—designed not only for superior mechanical and thermal performance but also to uphold a steadfast commitment to planetary sustainability. When printing children’s toys or any item intended for direct skin contact, CAILAB PLA+ Bio delivers peace of mind from material origin to final product.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: Liaoning Xinjingcai Plastic New Material Co., Ltd.
description_zh: 本产品为适用于PLA/PETG等多种基材的丝绸质感改性材料，专为提升3D打印成品表面效果而开发。通过特殊配方设计，可在打印件表面形成均匀致密的丝滑光泽，有效减少层间纹路，同时保持良好的打印稳定性和附着力。 使用本产品可以使您的制品增添细腻触感与雅致光泽，适用于文创设计、装饰展示、高质感外壳等各类对表面效果有要求的应用场景。支持多色系选择与定制，是实现高品质外观的一站式解决方案。
description_en: This silk-finish modifier is compatible with multiple base materials—including PLA and PETG—and is specifically engineered to enhance the surface aesthetics of 3D-printed parts. Its proprietary formulation produces a uniform, dense, silky gloss on printed surfaces while effectively minimizing layer lines. It maintains excellent print stability and bed adhesion. The resulting parts exhibit refined tactile quality and elegant luster, making this modifier ideal for applications demanding premium surface appearance—such as cultural & creative design, display decoration, and high-end enclosures. Available in multiple standard color families and customizable options, it serves as a comprehensive, one-stop solution for achieving high-quality visual finishes.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 艾弗尔塑料机械制造江苏苏州有限公司
description_zh: 该设备主要用于大规模生产各种用于3D打印的线材材料，包括PLA/ABS/PVA/PETG/PEEK/ASA/CF/GF/TPU/ASA/PHA/PHB等，可根据客户的特殊材料及需求定制不同配置的生产线。
description_en: The AFE45 production line is designed for high-volume manufacturing of 3D printing filaments, supporting a wide range of materials including PLA, ABS, PVA, PETG, PEEK, ASA, CF (carbon fiber), GF (glass fiber), TPU, PHA, and PHB. Fully configurable, the system enables customized setups to meet specific material requirements and production specifications.

company_name: 秦皇岛秦皇玻璃微珠有限公司
description_zh: 实心玻璃微珠F系列产品是粒径微小的玻璃实心球体，由硅、钠、钙为主要成分的玻璃粉碎后，经高温烧制而成。其具有圆度高、硬度好、耐磨性强、热膨胀系数低等特点。主要应用领域有3D打印、电子胶黏剂、塑料橡胶、耐磨地坪、及工艺品灯饰等领域以填充材料的形式得到了广泛应用。
description_en: The Solid Glass Microspheres F Series consists of micron-sized, fully dense spherical glass particles manufactured by high-temperature sintering of crushed soda-lime-silica glass. Characterized by exceptional sphericity, high hardness, outstanding wear resistance, and low thermal expansion coefficient, these microspheres are widely used as functional fillers in 3D printing, electronic adhesives, plastics and rubber composites, wear-resistant flooring, and decorative lighting applications.

applications_en: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

company_name: 浙江海正生物材料股份有限公司
description_zh: 海正生材的聚乳酸(PLA)3D打印材料，不仅环保安全、广泛兼容，而且材料源自生物基原料，无刺激性气味，并通过了RoHS认证，确保了其在教育、创意、家庭等多种应用场景下的安全适用性，此外，该材料能够轻松适配Bambu Lab、Creality等主流3D打印机型，无需频繁调试参数，为用户提供了更加便捷、高效的打印体验，也为3D打印行业带来全新的解决方案。
description_en: Haiseng Bio-Materials’ polylactic acid (PLA) 3D printing filament combines environmental safety, broad printer compatibility, and bio-based origin. Odorless during printing and RoHS-certified, it ensures safe usage across educational, creative, and home environments. Seamlessly compatible with mainstream printers—including Bambu Lab and Creality models—the filament requires minimal parameter tuning, delivering a streamlined, efficient, and reliable printing experience. This innovative material introduces a new benchmark in performance and usability for the 3D printing industry.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 浙江海正生物材料股份有限公司
description_zh: 聚乳酸(PLA)树脂是目前FDM热熔堆叠式3D打印机使用较佳的耗材原料之一。海正生材聚乳酸(PLA)树脂凭借其出色的性能，在3D打印中展现出独特优势。其尺寸稳定、层间粘合力强、着色性好，打印时无刺激性气味，且不易翘曲变形。同时，良好的流动性和适宜的冷却速度确保了打印质量。
description_en: Polylactic acid (PLA) resin is one of the optimal raw materials for FDM (fused deposition modeling) 3D printers. Haiseng Bio-Materials’ PLA resin demonstrates distinctive advantages in 3D printing, including excellent dimensional stability, strong interlayer adhesion, superior colorability, negligible odor during extrusion, and minimal warping or deformation. Its balanced melt flow behavior and optimized cooling rate further ensure consistent, high-fidelity print quality.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: Liaoning Xinjingcai Plastic New Material Co., Ltd.
description_zh: 本产品专为3D打印耗材生产提供高效、洁净的色彩解决方案。采用高浓度、高相容性配方，确保颜料在PLA、PETG等基材中达到极致分散，从根本上避免打印过程中的喷头堵塞、色差及层纹和表面光泽问题。 本产品色彩鲜艳饱满，批次稳定性优异，并可提供标准化颜色与灵活定制服务，是农场创业的理想选择。
description_en: This universal color masterbatch is engineered to deliver high-efficiency, contamination-free coloring for 3D printing filament production. Formulated with ultra-high pigment concentration and exceptional compatibility, it ensures homogeneous dispersion within PLA, PETG, and other base resins—effectively eliminating nozzle clogging, color inconsistency, layer banding, and surface gloss variation. Featuring vibrant, saturated hues and outstanding batch-to-batch consistency, it supports both standardized color palettes and flexible custom color development—making it an ideal solution for filament manufacturers pursuing scalable, high-quality production.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 武汉美构信息科技有限公司
description_zh: “FSD·全链服务数字化系统”是由武汉美构信息科技有限公司（简称“美构”）团队，为制造业打造的一体化全链路管理软件，涵盖销售、生产、质量、仓储、供应链、财务、人资等众多企业核心工作流程管理模块，为企业提供一站式数字化解决方案，实现企业业务、数据全流程互通。 通过精细化管理并深度沉淀企业全流程数据，助力企业逐步迈向智能化转型之路。基于海量数据的智能分析与处理，企业能够获得精准的智能决策支持，从而在激烈的市场竞争中抢占先机，实现可持续发展。
description_en: The FSD·End-to-End Digital Service System is an integrated, full-lifecycle enterprise management software platform developed by Wuhan Meigou Information Technology Co., Ltd. ('Meigou'). Designed specifically for manufacturing enterprises, it unifies core operational modules—including sales, production, quality control, warehousing, supply chain, finance, and HR—into a single, interoperable digital ecosystem. By enabling end-to-end business and data connectivity, the system facilitates intelligent decision-making through deep data analytics and AI-driven insights, empowering manufacturers to advance confidently toward smart transformation and sustainable growth.

company_name: 常州市创联电源科技股份有限公司
description_zh: TDP-350-xP系列产品为一款350W风冷金属机壳型工业电源，全系列产品具有宽电压交直流输入、输出电压包括12V/24V/48V，具备PFC功能。另外，产品EMC及安全标准满足国IEC/EN/UL62368,EN 60335,GB4943标准。高转换效率，紧凑的外壳设计，内置直流风扇，良好的散热，以及全方位保护，保障了本系列产品的高可靠性和高稳定性。
description_en: The TDP-350-xP series comprises 350W, fan-cooled, metal-cased industrial power supplies. Featuring universal AC/DC input voltage range and selectable output voltages (12V, 24V, or 48V), all units incorporate active Power Factor Correction (PFC). Compliant with IEC/EN/UL 62368, EN 60335, and GB 4943 safety and EMC standards, the series delivers high conversion efficiency, compact form factor, built-in DC cooling fans, robust thermal management, and comprehensive protection circuits—ensuring exceptional reliability and operational stability in demanding industrial environments.

product_name_zh: HDH系列： 经济型钛合金粉末
product_name_en: HDH Series: Cost-Effective Titanium Alloy Powder
company_name: 湖南哈森唯特新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 针对传统粉末冶金工艺优化的高性价比选择。提供灵活的粒度规格，具有良好的成形性与烧结活性。能够经济地制造出性能可靠、结构复杂的近净形零件，是汽车、工具及工业部件等领域实现轻量化、降低成本的理想材料解决方案。
description_en: An optimized, high-value titanium alloy powder tailored for conventional powder metallurgy processes. Offering flexible particle size distributions, it delivers excellent formability and sintering activity—enabling economical production of near-net-shape components with reliable mechanical performance and complex geometries. An ideal lightweighting and cost-reduction solution for automotive, tooling, and industrial component applications.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

product_name_zh: TPR系列： 绿色高性能钛合金粉末
product_name_en: TPR Series: Green High-Performance Titanium Alloy Powder
company_name: 湖南哈森唯特新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 源自创新循环技术的突破性产品。在保证与高端粉末相当的球形度、纯度及力学性能的前提下，实现了显著的成本优势与碳减排。为客户提供了一条兼顾卓越性能、经济效益与环境责任的可持续材料路径，特别适合有大规模制造与绿色供应链需求的企业。
description_en: A breakthrough product enabled by innovative closed-loop recycling technology. Maintaining ball shape, purity, and mechanical properties equivalent to premium-grade powders, the TPR Series achieves substantial cost reduction and measurable carbon footprint savings. It provides customers a sustainable materials pathway that harmonizes uncompromised performance, economic viability, and environmental stewardship—particularly suited for enterprises with large-scale manufacturing and green supply chain commitments.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

product_name_zh: PA系列： 高纯球形钛合金粉末
product_name_en: PA Series: High-Purity Spherical Titanium Alloy Powder
company_name: 湖南哈森唯特新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 专为追求极致性能的关键部件制造而设计。粉末具有极高的球形度与优异的流动性，确保打印过程稳定高效，成形件致密度接近理论值，力学性能卓越。特别适用于对疲劳强度、生物相容性及耐腐蚀性有严苛要求的航空航天精密构件、高端医疗植入物等领域。
description_en: Engineered for mission-critical components requiring ultimate performance. This powder exhibits ultra-high sphericity and superior flowability, ensuring stable, high-efficiency printing and near-theoretical density in as-built parts. Its exceptional mechanical properties—including fatigue strength, biocompatibility, and corrosion resistance—make it the preferred choice for aerospace precision components and high-end medical implants.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

product_name_zh: 重塑制造未来：SynaCore 金属增材制造基于数字孪生的自适应路径技术全球首发
product_name_en: Redefining Manufacturing Futures: SynaCore Metal AM Adaptive Path Technology Based on Digital Twin – Global Launch
company_name: SynaCore
description_zh: SynaCore数字孪生体AM-DT的多模态仿真模型与AI算法，能预测3D打印零件的微观组织、机械性能等，并根据所预测的包含析出相的微观组织进一步预测热处理结果。SynaCore 基于数字孪生体AM-DT的Adaptive Tool Path优化后的加工参数确保每一层都在最优工艺窗口内进行，持续反馈的数据包括在变形、开裂等缺陷的结果可以使AM-DT数字孪生体形成“感知-仿真-决策-执行-学习”的自治闭环，使下一轮3D打印在缺陷控制上再进化，形成‘越打越准、越打越稳’的自进化制造范式。
description_en: SynaCore’s AM-DT (Additive Manufacturing Digital Twin) integrates multimodal simulation models and AI algorithms to predict microstructure evolution—including precipitate formation—as well as mechanical properties of 3D-printed parts. Leveraging these predictions, the system further forecasts post-processing heat treatment outcomes. SynaCore’s Adaptive Tool Path technology dynamically optimizes process parameters for each layer, ensuring continuous operation within the optimal process window. Real-time feedback—including deformation, cracking, and other defect metrics—closes the loop between sensing, simulation, decision-making, execution, and learning, enabling autonomous self-improvement across successive builds—a paradigm shift toward ‘increasingly precise and increasingly stable’ evolutionary manufacturing.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: CMS SPA
description_zh: “Pick-up”解决方案允许以半自动方式接合一个吞吐量为30公斤/小时的螺杆塑化单元，以便在5轴加工中心上灵活且便捷地集成大型热塑性材料打印工艺。 该解决方案允许使用垂直和45°打印方式，红色箭头指示工件堆积的方向。
description_en: The 'Pick-up' solution enables semi-automatic integration of a screw plasticization unit (30 kg/h throughput) onto a 5-axis machining center, facilitating flexible and seamless implementation of large-format thermoplastic additive manufacturing. Compatible with vertical and 45° printing orientations, the system clearly indicates part build direction via red arrows.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: CMS SPA
description_zh: CMS大幅面3D打印机配备用于热塑性聚合物的螺杆挤出单元，材料吞吐量可达30公斤/小时。 关键买家效益 • 经济高效的大幅面增材制造（LFAM）解决方案 • 专为满足工业应用需求而设计的挤出机和成型体积 • 通过挤出机倾斜机构从垂直式切换到倾斜式3D打印 • 一体化编程和流程监控环境 可持续解决方案 与传统工具制造工艺（生命周期评估）相比，绿色气体排放量减少60%。
description_en: The CMS KREATOR A3 is a large-format 3D printer equipped with a screw extrusion unit for thermoplastic polymers, capable of up to 30 kg/h material throughput. Key benefits include: • A cost-effective, industrial-grade large-format additive manufacturing (LFAM) solution; • Extruder and build volume engineered specifically for demanding industrial applications; • Adjustable extrusion head tilt mechanism enabling rapid switching between vertical and angled printing modes; • Integrated programming environment and real-time process monitoring. Sustainability: Reduces greenhouse gas emissions by 60% compared to conventional tooling manufacturing methods (based on lifecycle assessment).
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: KREATOR ARES: Hybrid system for additive manufacturing and milling
product_name_en: KREATOR ARES: Hybrid System for Additive Manufacturing and Milling
company_name: CMS SPA
description_zh: CMS Kreator是CMS Advanced Materials Technology（先进材料技术）为大幅面增材制造（LFAM或LSAM）领域设计的尖端解决方案。它是一款独特的混合机器，将3D打印的强大功能与铣削精度相结合，保证了生产过程中前所未有的效果。 优势： 生产灵活性： 能够轻松适应特定项目需求。 材料节约： 通过优化生产过程中的资源利用，实现材料的有效节省。 可持续性： 在设计中充分考虑环境可持续性，提供符合最新制造需求的解决方案。 此外，CMS Kreator的多功能性进一步增强，可以配备不同尺寸（10至100公斤/小时）的挤出机，确保更好地适应特定生产需求。
description_en: The CMS KREATOR is an advanced hybrid solution developed by CMS Advanced Materials Technology for large-format additive manufacturing (LFAM/LSAM). Uniquely combining the versatility of 3D printing with the precision of CNC milling, it delivers unprecedented capability in a single machine. Advantages include: • Production flexibility: Rapid adaptation to project-specific requirements; • Material efficiency: Optimized resource utilization minimizes waste; • Sustainability: Designed with environmental responsibility at its core, meeting evolving industrial sustainability benchmarks. Enhanced versatility is achieved through optional extruders ranging from 10 to 100 kg/h, enabling precise tailoring to diverse production needs.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 星尘科技（广东）有限公司
description_zh: 高纯低氧、球形度高、表面光滑、无卫星球、粒度分布均匀，具有优异的流动性能以及高的松装密度和振实密度，具有优异的生物相容性，通过3D打印成形的钽植入体具有与人体软骨组织最为接近的弹性模量，是最为理想的骨科植入材料。公司球形钽粉完全满足YY/T 0966-2014、ISO13782：1996等医疗植入领域标准。
description_en: Ultra-high-purity, low-oxygen, highly spherical tantalum powder with smooth surface morphology, negligible satellite particles, and narrow particle size distribution. Exhibits outstanding flowability, high apparent density, and high tapped density. Demonstrates excellent biocompatibility; 3D-printed tantalum implants achieve an elastic modulus closely matching human cartilage tissue—making it the optimal orthopedic implant material. Fully compliant with YY/T 0966–2014 and ISO 13782:1996 medical implant standards.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 星尘科技（广东）有限公司
description_zh: 球形C103合金粉，即铌铪合金C103，具有多种优良的物理和化学性能。这种合金具有高的熔点、低密度、高温高强度和良好的可加工性能。此外，它在室温和高温下都展现出优异的力学性能。该粉末高纯、低氧、球形度高、表面光滑、极少空心粉且流动性能优异。
description_en: Spherical C103 alloy powder (niobium–hafnium alloy) combines a high melting point, low density, excellent high-temperature strength, and superior machinability. It delivers outstanding mechanical performance across both ambient and elevated temperatures. This powder features ultra-high purity, low oxygen content, exceptional sphericity, smooth surface finish, minimal hollow particles, and excellent flowability.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 星尘科技（广东）有限公司
description_zh: 球形Nb521合金粉具有熔点高、密度较低、高温下比强度高，良好的塑性和可加工性，是宇航方面优选的热防护材料和结构材料。该粉末高纯（>99.98）低氧（<200ppm）、球形度高、表面光滑、极少空心粉且流动性能优异。
description_en: Spherical Nb521 alloy powder offers a high melting point, relatively low density, high specific strength at elevated temperatures, excellent ductility, and good workability—making it a preferred material for aerospace thermal protection and structural components. The powder features ultra-high purity (>99.98%), ultra-low oxygen content (<200 ppm), high sphericity, smooth surface morphology, minimal hollow particles, and exceptional flowability.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 星尘科技（广东）有限公司
description_zh: 球形Ta-10W合金粉具有良好的室温加工性、耐腐蚀性、超耐温特性以及低蒸气压和高温下的低蒸发速率等优点，被广泛用于电子技术、航空航天技术、武器系统等重大工程领域。该粉末高纯低氧、球形度高、表面光滑、无卫星球、粒度分布均匀且流动性能优异。
description_en: Spherical Ta-10W alloy powder offers excellent room-temperature workability, corrosion resistance, exceptional high-temperature stability, low vapor pressure, and minimal evaporation rate at elevated temperatures. It is widely employed in critical engineering applications including electronics, aerospace, and defense systems. This powder features ultra-high purity, low oxygen content, high sphericity, smooth surface morphology, absence of satellite particles, narrow and uniform particle size distribution, and outstanding flowability.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 卡门哈斯激光
description_zh: 3D打印产品主要包括准直模块、扩束镜、振镜、场镜、光束分析仪。其中金属3D打印场镜主要为150mm*150mm以上的大幅面产品，振镜则为14mm或者20mm光斑高精度水冷振镜。非金属3D打印场镜主要为紫外大幅面场镜。
description_en: This product line comprises collimation modules, beam expanders, galvanometer scanners (galvo scanners), F-theta field lenses, and beam profilers. Metal 3D-printed field lenses are available in large-format configurations (≥150 mm × 150 mm), while galvo scanners feature high-precision, water-cooled optics with 14 mm or 20 mm spot diameters. Non-metal 3D-printed field lenses are optimized for UV large-format applications.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: 卡门哈斯激光
description_zh: 卡门哈斯激光自主设计的3D打印振镜头模块，采用硅或者石英高功率镀膜光学复合镜片及F-theta扫描场镜，像差级别达到衍射极限，可满足各种高光束质量单模激光应用场合。搭配多种倍率的常规水冷扩束镜或者多种焦距的水冷QBH准直模块，适配市面上各主流厂商标准输出接头。可以承受激光功率高达2000W。振镜通光口径包含常规14mm、20mm，扫描幅面依据不同配置最大可达440mmX440mm。基于全套系统自主研发设计，可灵活定制各种非常规扫描幅面、焦距、光斑大小和工作距离的光学系统。
description_en: A proprietary galvo scanner head designed by Karmenhaus Laser, incorporating high-power coated silicon or fused silica compound optics and an F-theta scanning lens. Its optical performance achieves diffraction-limited aberration correction, making it suitable for high-brightness single-mode laser applications. Compatible with standard water-cooled beam expanders of various magnifications and water-cooled QBH collimators with multiple focal lengths, it interfaces seamlessly with mainstream OEM laser output connectors. Rated for laser powers up to 2000 W, it offers standard clear apertures of 14 mm and 20 mm, with maximum scan fields reaching 440 mm × 440 mm depending on configuration. Fully自主研发 and modularly engineered, the system supports flexible customization of non-standard scan fields, focal lengths, spot sizes, and working distances.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: 卡门哈斯激光
description_zh: 光束分析仪是将入射到光束分析仪内的激光光束，经过内部光学系统，将其传输于CCD靶面。利用专业测量软件对精密光学尺传输的数据和实时影像画面进行图像数据处理，由操作者使用鼠标或键盘在电脑上进行观测判断和测量。即插即用的设计保证了设备的易兼容性和操作的简易性。此外OEM光束分析仪采用模块化设计，使用外加衰减装置，适用于各类产品检测，光路调试等应用场景。其具备光束宽度，光束形状，位置，能量强度分布，尺寸测量，M2检测等多种参数测试能力。测量光斑直径从15μm-4.3mm。可对光斑能量分布进行各类分析。本仪器使用USB3.0通用接口。
description_en: The beam profiler captures incident laser beams via an internal optical train and projects them onto a CCD sensor. Proprietary measurement software processes high-precision optical scale data and real-time imaging for comprehensive beam analysis—including beam width, shape, centroid position, intensity distribution, dimensional measurements, and M² characterization. Plug-and-play USB 3.0 connectivity ensures seamless integration and intuitive operation via mouse or keyboard. The OEM version adopts a modular design with external attenuation accessories, enabling versatile use in product inspection, optical alignment, and R&D. Measurement range covers spot diameters from 15 μm to 4.3 mm, supporting advanced spatial energy distribution analysis.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: 安徽森鸿新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 添加天然竹粉成分，低碳环保可降解，自带自然竹材的温润质感，兼具生态友好与独特触感。呈现细腻的哑光磨砂效果，表面带有自然颗粒纹理，告别塑料感，打造贴近自然的高级视觉体验。清新的竹粉绿配色，自带山林草木的松弛氛围感，适配各类自然风、侘寂风的创作主题。
description_en: Infused with natural bamboo powder, this eco-friendly, low-carbon, biodegradable filament delivers the warm, tactile feel of authentic bamboo. Its fine matte sandblasted surface features subtle natural grain texture—eliminating plastic-like aesthetics and delivering a premium, nature-inspired visual experience. The refreshing bamboo-green hue evokes serene forest and botanical ambiance, perfectly complementing naturalist and wabi-sabi design themes.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 安徽森鸿新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 高弹柔韧：具备优异的弹性与回弹力，打印成品可承受反复弯折、挤压而不易断裂，耐用性强。 高透质感：水晶般的透明外观，光线可穿透材质，让打印作品兼具通透美感与实用功能。 TPU优质基材：采用柔性TPU原料，较市面常规TPU耗材，打印速度更快。材料具备良好的耐磨性与抗撕裂性，
description_en: Highly elastic and resilient: exhibits superior elasticity and recovery, enabling printed parts to withstand repeated bending and compression without cracking or failure. Crystal-clear transparency: provides glass-like optical clarity and light transmission, combining aesthetic translucency with functional utility. Premium TPU base material: formulated from high-performance flexible TPU, offering faster print speeds compared to conventional TPU filaments, along with excellent abrasion resistance and tear strength.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 安徽森鸿新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 梦幻渐变：蓝绿红紫四色柔和过渡，每一层打印都呈现独一无二的色彩流动效果，让作品自带彩虹滤镜。夜光蓄能：吸收自然光或灯光后，在黑暗环境中持续散发莹润微光，白天吸光、夜晚发光，打造昼夜双绝的视觉惊喜。
description_en: Dreamy four-color gradient: smoothly transitions between blue, green, red, and violet—each printed layer displays unique chromatic flow, imparting an inherent rainbow-filter effect. Photoluminescent capability: absorbs ambient daylight or artificial light and emits a soft, persistent glow in darkness—enabling dynamic day/night visual contrast and dual-phase aesthetic impact.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 安徽森鸿新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 这款耗材采用我公司专有配色黄绿、莲瓣红、橙、溪水蓝四色分别寓意春夏秋冬，整体色泽鲜艳，故取名花开四季。彩虹系列独特的共挤工艺，在一根丝材上实现了不同颜色的平滑过渡，无需更换线材即可打印出色彩斑斓的作品，让你的创作充满惊喜。
description_en: This filament features proprietary co-extruded coloring—yellow-green (spring), lotus-petal red (summer), orange (autumn), and stream-blue (winter)—symbolizing the four seasons. Vibrant and harmonious, its name reflects this thematic concept. Leveraging Rainbow Series’ exclusive co-extrusion technology, seamless multi-color transitions are achieved within a single filament spool, eliminating filament swaps and enabling effortlessly colorful, surprise-rich prints.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

description_en: Features an ultra-large build volume of 1000 × 1000 × 1000 mm. Powered by Klipper firmware for high-speed printing. Integrated camera enables remote monitoring and control via network interface.

description_zh: 应用领域 无论手动或者自动操作，都可以用到食品加工，制药和化工等工业的流体产品应用中。 技术规格 规格 DN10至DN300,1/2"-12" 温度：160℃ 压力：10bar 材质：ASTM T304/T316L,1.4301/1.4404 连接方式 焊接 卡箍 螺纹 法兰等 执行标准 DIN SMS RJT 3A ISO IDF 气动操作：单作用、双作用、三作用 认证：PED/97/23/EC
description_en: Application: Suitable for fluid handling in food processing, pharmaceutical, and chemical industries—compatible with both manual and automated operation. Technical Specifications: Nominal diameter DN10–DN300 (½″–12″); max. operating temperature 160 °C; max. pressure rating 10 bar. Materials: ASTM A312 TP304/TP316L or EN 1.4301/1.4404 stainless steel. Connection types: welded, clamp, threaded, flanged. Compliance standards: DIN, SMS, RJT, 3-A, ISO, IDF. Actuation options: spring-return (single-acting), double-acting, and triple-acting pneumatic actuators. Certified per PED 97/23/EC.

company_name: 聚塔时代(江苏)材料科技有限公司
description_zh: RAG系列是聚塔时代根据客户需求，定制化设计开发的结构功能（中子屏蔽）一体化的增材制造铝合金材料，该材料能够实现核屏蔽结构功能一体化与复杂构件的高效成形，兼顾良好的机械性能与中子屏蔽性能，可广泛应用于增材制造复杂构件、核燃料储罐及小型化核装置等场景。
description_en: The RAG series is a custom-designed, structural-functional (neutron shielding) integrated aluminum alloy developed by Juta Era (Jiangsu) Material Technology Co., Ltd. Specifically engineered for additive manufacturing, it enables simultaneous neutron shielding functionality and high-fidelity fabrication of complex geometries. It balances outstanding mechanical properties with effective neutron attenuation, making it ideal for AM-manufactured nuclear components, spent fuel storage containers, and compact nuclear devices.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 聚塔时代(江苏)材料科技有限公司
description_zh: RAL系列铝合金是聚塔时代针对增材制造全工艺链特点运用基于物理冶金规律和人工智能集成计算技术设计的耐热铝合金。 RAL在设计理念上有效结合“共晶成相元素”和“界面稳定化元素”，并创立非平衡凝固相结构优选方案，首次引入可高温承载的低界面能三维网络相结构。这些具有开创性的设计理念与崭新的组织结构共同造就了RAL系列合金在性能，制造，成形和工业化上的突出优势。
description_en: The RAL series is a heat-resistant aluminum alloy developed by Juta Era (Jiangsu) Material Technology Co., Ltd. using physics-informed, AI-integrated computational design tailored to the full AM process chain. Its innovative architecture synergistically combines eutectic-forming elements and interface-stabilizing elements, establishing a novel non-equilibrium solidification phase selection strategy. It introduces, for the first time, a thermally stable, low-interfacial-energy 3D network phase structure—delivering breakthrough advantages in performance, manufacturability, geometric fidelity, and industrial scalability.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 聚塔时代(江苏)材料科技有限公司
description_zh: RAE系列合金是聚塔时代针对增材制造全工艺链特点，运用基于物理的人工智能集成计算技术，正向设计的超高强铝合金。 RAE系列在设计理念上有效结合 “共晶元素” 和 “包晶元素” 各自特性，并创立非平衡快速凝固相工程方法，首次引入可变形金属间化合物骨架结构。这些具有开创性的设计理念与崭新的组织结构共同造就了 RAE系列合金在性能、制造、成形和工业化上的突出优势。
description_en: The RAE series represents a class of ultra-high-strength aluminum alloys developed by Juta Era (Jiangsu) Material Technology Co., Ltd. through physics-guided, AI-integrated computational design optimized for the entire AM process chain. Its design philosophy uniquely integrates the distinct characteristics of eutectic and peritectic elements, establishing a pioneering non-equilibrium rapid solidification phase engineering methodology. It introduces, for the first time, a deformable intermetallic compound scaffold microstructure—resulting in unprecedented advantages in mechanical performance, process robustness, part accuracy, and industrial readiness.

product_name_zh: i型同轴送丝送粉激光头
product_name_en: Type-I Coaxial Wire/Powder Feeding Laser Head
company_name: 上海通历激光科技有限公司
description_zh: TL-WP将光路整形为中空的环形光斑，使金属丝材（粉末）从环形激光中心同轴送出，得到一种近乎完美的光包丝（粉末）的解决方案，内丝（粉）外光方案熔融过程，几乎无飞溅，特别适用于增材制造、表面熔覆和焊接等激光应用；其环形光斑内送丝材料利用率可达到100%，送粉加工材料利用率可达到95%以上，加工效率 高达400cm³/h；中空环形光斑，丝材（粉末）同轴内侧送出，对加工轨迹无方向性及角度要求；可选配红外测温模块和CCD，全方位、多维度的保证加工效果；加工材料广泛，可用线材/粉末，包括不锈钢、碳钢、铝合金、钛合金、镍基合金、巴氏合金等。
description_en: The TL-WP laser head shapes the incident beam into a hollow ring-shaped profile, enabling coaxial delivery of wire or powder feedstock precisely through the center of the ring. This ‘light-wraps-wire/powder’ configuration yields near-zero spatter during melting—ideal for additive manufacturing, cladding, and welding. Wire feeding achieves 100% material utilization; powder feeding exceeds 95% efficiency. Processing rates reach up to 400 cm³/h. The coaxial feed geometry imposes no directional or angular constraints on toolpath planning. Optional infrared pyrometry and CCD imaging modules provide comprehensive, multi-dimensional process monitoring. Compatible with diverse materials including stainless steel, carbon steel, aluminum alloys, titanium alloys, nickel-based superalloys, and Babbitt metal.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: 第10代同轴送丝送粉激光头
company_name: 上海通历激光科��有限公司
description_zh: TL-WP将光路整形为中空的环形光斑，使金属丝材（粉末）从环形激光中心同轴送出，得到一种近乎完美的光包丝（粉末）的解决方案，内丝（粉）外光方案熔融过程，几乎无飞溅，特别适用于增材制造、表面熔覆和焊接等激光应用；其环形光斑内送丝材料利用率可达到100%，送粉加工材料利用率可达到95%以上，加工效率 高达400cm³/h；此外，激光头还可丝粉同送，选配热丝电源，提高加工效率，中空环形光斑，丝材（粉末）同轴内侧送出，对加工轨迹无方向性及角度要求；可选配红外测温模块和CCD，全方位、多维度的保证加工效果；加工材料广泛，可用线材/粉末，包括不锈钢、碳钢、铝合金、钛合金、镍基合金、巴氏合金等。
description_en: The TL-WP laser head shapes the incident beam into a hollow ring-shaped profile, enabling coaxial delivery of wire or powder feedstock precisely through the center of the ring. This ‘light-wraps-wire/powder’ configuration yields near-zero spatter during melting—ideal for additive manufacturing, cladding, and welding. Wire feeding achieves 100% material utilization; powder feeding exceeds 95% efficiency. Processing rates reach up to 400 cm³/h. Dual wire-and-powder feeding capability is supported, with optional hot-wire power supply integration to further enhance deposition efficiency. The coaxial feed geometry imposes no directional or angular constraints on toolpath planning. Optional infrared pyrometry and CCD imaging modules provide comprehensive, multi-dimensional process monitoring. Compatible with diverse materials including stainless steel, carbon steel, aluminum alloys, titanium alloys, nickel-based superalloys, and Babbitt metal.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 江苏华苏工业炉制造有限公司
description_zh: 真空时效炉为卧式高真空电阻炉，可采用涡轮分子泵+直联机械泵的抽气机组，操作过程自动控制、 适用真空钎焊、真空除气、退火、时效及对清洁度要求高的热处理工艺。
description_en: A horizontal high-vacuum resistance furnace equipped with a turbomolecular pump + direct-drive mechanical pump vacuum system. Fully automated operation supports high-cleanliness thermal processes including vacuum brazing, vacuum degassing, annealing, and aging treatments.
categories_zh: 其他（如后处理工艺服务）

company_name: 上海如昂超声波设备有限公司
description_zh: 吸筛机要和真空输送连接，将物料从储料罐或吨包里吸出，过筛并直接输送到下一工序。吸筛机结合超声波筛分和真空输送，机构紧凑，针对比重轻的物料，真空吸力加速过筛速度，叠加超声波高频振动，物料在高频加速度下，更容易过筛，过筛后的物料经管道输送至成品料仓，减少二次吸料工序，降低操作工吸入粉尘的风险。吸筛机针对比重轻的物料，筛分效率成倍提升，结构紧凑，节省工序，节约时间，加上自动化控制，可以实现输送筛分一体化。
description_en: Designed for integration with vacuum conveying systems, this unit draws bulk material from storage bins or ton bags, performs ultrasonic-assisted sieving, and directly transfers sifted material to downstream processes. Combining ultrasonic vibration with vacuum aspiration significantly accelerates screening—especially for low-density, cohesive powders. High-frequency acceleration disrupts agglomeration, static adhesion, and caking, enabling efficient passage through mesh. Discharged material is pneumatically conveyed directly to final storage, eliminating secondary handling and minimizing operator exposure to airborne dust. Compact, fully automated, and highly efficient, it reduces process steps, saves time, and delivers integrated vacuum conveying and precision sieving in a single platform.

company_name: 上海如昂超声波设备有限公司
description_zh: 超声波检验筛是如昂公司工程师在普通检验筛的基础上研发的高科技自动化微细分级设备，是当前实验室在做自动化微细分样筛分选时网孔堵塞的最有效的解决仪器。可广泛应用于制药、冶金、化工、选矿、食品等行业的实验室，具有筛分精度高、网孔不堵塞等特点，真正解决了因团聚、静电、强吸附性卡堵网孔等实验室筛分难题，是国内筛分行业的一项重大技术突破。
description_en: An advanced automated micro-fractionation instrument developed by Ru’Ang engineers, building upon conventional test sieves. It is the most effective solution currently available for resolving mesh blinding issues during automated laboratory-scale particle sizing. Widely deployed across pharmaceutical, metallurgical, chemical, mineral processing, and food laboratories, it delivers high-precision classification with zero screen clogging—even for challenging materials prone to agglomeration, electrostatic adhesion, or strong surface cohesion. This represents a major technological advancement in domestic sieving equipment.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: 上海如昂超声波设备有限公司
description_zh: 真空上料机由真空泵(无油、无水)、不锈钢吸料枪、输送软管、过滤器、压缩空气反吹装置、气动放料装置、真空料斗等组成，整套系统设计合理、制造精美。真空上料机又称真空输送机，是一种借助于真空负压来传送颗粒和粉末状物料的无尘密闭管道输送设备，利用负压差形成管道内气体流动，带动粉状物料运动，从而完成粉体的输送。现广泛用于化工、制药、食品、冶金、建材、农副等各轻、重工行业。
description_en: A dust-free, hermetically sealed pneumatic conveying system comprising an oil-free, water-free vacuum pump; stainless-steel suction lance; flexible conveying hose; filter assembly; compressed-air reverse-pulse cleaning system; pneumatic discharge valve; and vacuum hopper. Engineered for optimal performance and precision fabrication, it transports granular and powdered materials via vacuum-induced airflow. Widely adopted across chemical, pharmaceutical, food, metallurgical, construction materials, and agricultural sectors for clean, efficient, and reliable material transfer.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 上海如昂超声波设备有限公司
description_zh: 气体保护筛，是针对在筛分过程中有些物料不能与空气接触，否则就会发生氧化或爆炸。所以在筛分过程中，筛机、料仓、收料斗呈完全密封状态，同时需要充入惰性气体保护。筛分前对筛机、接料仓，管道内进行气体置换，氧含量低于设定值后，方可进行投料生产。启动旋振筛，同时打开超声波电源，打开放料阀，物料匀速投入超声波振动筛，进行精细筛分。
description_en: The inert gas-protected vibratory sieve is designed for materials that must be isolated from ambient air during sieving to prevent oxidation or explosion. The entire system—including the sieve unit, feed hopper, and collection bin—is fully sealed and purged with inert gas prior to operation. Oxygen concentration in the sieve chamber, receiving hopper, and associated piping is reduced below a predefined threshold before feeding begins. During operation, the rotary vibratory sieve is activated simultaneously with the ultrasonic generator, and material is fed uniformly into the ultrasonic vibrating sieve for high-precision classification.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 创材深造（苏州）科技有限公司
description_zh: 创材深造自主研发的模具钢，成功应用于知名高尔夫品牌球杆杆头制造，完美解决了传统模具钢在增材制造过程中存在开裂敏感性高、力学性能不匹配、打印窗口窄等明显不足。新材料通过成分-工艺-组织的精准调控，实现了三大核心突破：大幅降低打印开裂倾向，成形良率较传统材料提升30%以上，是目前全球唯一3D打印不开裂的金属材料；同时具有超强的力学表现，在承受高温循环热疲劳的同时，保持优异的耐磨性和韧性，模具寿命延长2-3倍；精密的尺寸控制，确保杆头重心与设计完美。
description_en: Developed in-house by Chuangcai Shenzao (Suzhou) Technology Co., Ltd., this proprietary tool steel enables crack-free additive manufacturing of premium golf club heads. It overcomes key limitations of conventional tool steels—namely high cracking sensitivity, mismatched mechanical properties, and narrow process windows. Through precise compositional-process-microstructural co-optimization, it achieves three breakthroughs: (1) drastically reduced cracking tendency—yielding >30% higher part qualification rate versus conventional materials, making it the world’s only metal AM material proven crack-free in production; (2) exceptional mechanical performance—maintaining outstanding wear resistance and toughness under high-cycle thermal fatigue, extending mold service life by 2–3×; and (3) micron-level dimensional accuracy—ensuring perfect alignment of club head center of gravity with design specifications.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 创材深造（苏州）科技有限公司
description_zh: CA300T铝合金是一种新型低成本无稀土耐热铝合金，主要应用于航空航天、汽车、能源动力等领域，在300℃仍具备较高的耐热性和导热性能。基于五种主体元素的联调可实现成分-工艺-性能的定制化开发与逆向设计，同时可实现复杂构件的无裂纹打印成形。热处理后材料室温拉伸性能：屈服强度>300 MPa，抗拉强度>400 MPa，延伸率>10%；300℃拉伸性能：屈服强度>210 MPa，抗拉强度>240 MPa，延伸率>6%。
description_en: CA300T is a novel low-cost, rare-earth-free heat-resistant aluminum alloy powder engineered for aerospace, automotive, and energy power applications. It retains excellent thermal stability and high thermal conductivity at temperatures up to 300°C. Leveraging synergistic tuning of five principal alloying elements, CA300T enables customized composition–process–property development and inverse design, supporting crack-free printing of complex components. After heat treatment, its room-temperature tensile properties are: yield strength >300 MPa, ultimate tensile strength >400 MPa, elongation >10%; at 300°C: yield strength >210 MPa, ultimate tensile strength >240 MPa, elongation >6%.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 创材深造（苏州）科技有限公司
description_zh: CA760H铝合金是一种新型低成本无稀土高强铝合金，主要应用于航空航天、消费电子等领域，属于7系可热处理强化铝合金，高强度的设计以实现轻量化减重需求。基于五种主体元素的联调可实现成分-工艺-性能的定制化开发与逆向设计，搭配创新的热处理方案可以实现复杂构件的无裂纹打印。热处理后材料拉伸性能：屈服强度>550 MPa，抗拉强度>600 MPa，延伸率>8%。
description_en: CA760H is a novel low-cost, rare-earth-free high-strength aluminum alloy powder belonging to the heat-treatable 7xxx series. Designed to meet stringent lightweighting requirements, it delivers superior strength-to-density performance. Through coordinated optimization of five principal elements, CA760H supports tailored composition–process–property development and inverse design. Coupled with an innovative heat treatment protocol, it enables crack-free printing of geometrically complex parts. Post-heat-treatment tensile properties: yield strength >550 MPa, ultimate tensile strength >600 MPa, elongation >8%.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 创材深造（苏州）科技有限公司
description_zh: CT1400H钛合金是一种新型超高强钛合金，主要应用于航空航天、消费电子等领域，属于可热处理强化的亚稳β型钛合金，超高强度的设计以实现轻量化减重需求。基于六种主体元素联调可实现成分-工艺-性能的定制化开发与逆向设计，搭配创新的热处理方案可以实现复杂构件的无裂纹打印。热处理后材料拉伸性能：屈服强度>1100 MPa，抗拉强度>1400 MPa，延伸率>8%。
description_en: CT1400H is a novel ultra-high-strength metastable β-type titanium alloy powder, heat-treatable and engineered for aerospace and consumer electronics applications where extreme lightweighting is critical. By precisely balancing six principal alloying elements, CT1400H enables fully customizable composition–process–property development and inverse design. Its innovative heat treatment pathway ensures crack-free printing of intricate geometries. After heat treatment, tensile properties are: yield strength >1100 MPa, ultimate tensile strength >1400 MPa, elongation >8%.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 常州熠立增材科技有限公司
description_zh: 纯铜粉末是以高纯铜为原料制成的金属粉末，兼具优异导电性、导热性及延展性，冷喷涂后涂层致密度高、结合力强，广泛用于电力设备导电涂层、模具导热涂层及金属部件导电防腐修复等冷喷涂领域。
description_en: High-purity copper powder manufactured from ultra-high-purity copper feedstock, offering exceptional electrical and thermal conductivity alongside superior ductility. When applied via cold spray, it forms dense, strongly adherent coatings ideal for conductive coatings on power equipment, thermally conductive mold coatings, and conductive corrosion-resistant repair of metallic components.

company_name: 常州熠立增材科技有限公司
description_zh: Ti-6Al-4V（15-53μm）是一种用于金属3D打印的关键球形钛合金粉末。 该粉末成分为钛（Ti）基体中加入约6%的铝（Al）和4%的钒（V），粒度为15至53微米。此规格保证了粉末具备良好的流动性和铺展性，适合激光选区熔化等精密增材制造工艺，能打印出高精度、高强度的复杂零件，广泛应用于航空航天和医疗植入等高端制造领域。
description_en: Ti-6Al-4V (15–53 μm) is a high-performance spherical titanium alloy powder optimized for metal additive manufacturing. Composed of a titanium matrix with approximately 6 wt.% aluminum and 4 wt.% vanadium, its tightly controlled particle size distribution ensures excellent flowability and uniform powder bed spreading—making it ideal for precision processes such as Selective Laser Melting (SLM). It enables fabrication of high-accuracy, high-strength complex components widely used in aerospace and medical implant applications.

description_zh: 适用于3C电子产品的零部件的真空退火工艺。 有效温区：900*600*600mm 温度范围：RT-1200°C 真空度：5.0*10E-4Pa 适用材料：钛合金、铝合金、不锈钢、高温合金
description_en: A vacuum annealing furnace engineered for precision thermal processing of 3C electronic components. Effective hot zone dimensions: 900 × 600 × 600 mm; operating temperature range: ambient to 1200°C; ultimate vacuum level: 5.0 × 10⁻⁴ Pa. Compatible with titanium alloys, aluminum alloys, stainless steels, and high-temperature superalloys.

product_name_zh: 实验型独立双喷嘴3D打印机UPS-LiteD
company_name: 深圳升华三维科技有限公司
description_zh: 升华三维实验型独立双喷嘴3D打印机UPS-LiteD是基于粉末挤出打印（PEP）技术打造的实验型金属/陶瓷3D打印设备，采用独立双喷嘴设计，可以同时打印或者各自轮流打印陶瓷、金属、陶瓷/金属复合材料，实现不同种类材料的产品开发及制备。凭借桌面级创新设计与广泛适配性，为科研机构、职业技术/高校、学生教学培训等领域材料研发、产品设计及PEP工艺开发提供支撑。
description_en: The UPS-LiteD is an experimental metal/ceramic 3D printer developed by Shenzhen Upshine Technologies Co., Ltd., based on Powder Extrusion Printing (PEP) technology. Featuring dual independent nozzles, it enables simultaneous or sequential printing of ceramics, metals, and ceramic–metal composites—accelerating multi-material R&D and prototyping. Its compact desktop form factor and broad material compatibility make it ideal for research institutions, vocational/technical colleges, universities, and student training programs focused on materials development, product design, and PEP process optimization.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 上海魔塑丝新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 在基础PLA上进行配方优化升级版，更是理念的革新。我们通过高分子增韧技术，在保留PLA所有优点的同时，赋予了它更 强的强度和抗冲击韧性，实现了强度与打印易用性的完美平衡是追求耐用性用户的性价比首选。
description_en: An advanced formulation upgrade of standard PLA, representing both a material and conceptual innovation. Using proprietary polymer toughening technology, it retains all inherent advantages of PLA while significantly enhancing tensile strength and impact toughness—achieving an optimal balance between mechanical robustness and printability. This cost-effective, high-durability filament is the preferred choice for users prioritizing part reliability and functional performance.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

product_name_zh: 食品接触级 & 抗菌 PLA+
company_name: 上海魔塑丝新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 食品可接触级PLA 耗材我们为对安全有更高要求的用户专门开发的。它采用符合食品接触安全标准的原材料和配 方，这意味 着由它打印的物件，在符合特定使用条件下，可以安全地接触食物。在保证安全的同时，保持了优秀的打印性能和极低的打印气味。
description_en: A specialized food-contact-grade PLA filament developed for users with stringent safety requirements. Manufactured using raw materials and formulations compliant with international food-contact safety standards, printed parts are safe for incidental food contact under specified usage conditions. It maintains excellent printability, minimal odor during extrusion, and consistent layer adhesion—ensuring both regulatory compliance and user confidence.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 上海魔塑丝新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 性能均衡的工程材料，韧性好，强度高，打印时几乎无味，是介于PLA和ABS之间的“全能选手”。它比PLA更耐冲击，比ABS更易 打印，是工程师和创客的可靠伙伴。具有良好的抗冲击和抗撕裂能力，零件掉在地上不易碎裂，可承受轻微形变。
description_en: A well-balanced engineering-grade filament combining high toughness, elevated strength, and near-odorless printing. Positioned as the 'all-rounder' between PLA and ABS, PETG+ offers superior impact resistance compared to PLA and easier printability than ABS. Ideal for engineers and makers, it delivers excellent impact and tear resistance—parts remain intact when dropped and tolerate slight deformation without fracture.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 上海魔塑丝新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 性能均衡的工程材料，韧性好，强度高，打印时几乎无味，是介于PLA和ABS之间的“全能选手”。它比PLA更耐冲击，比ABS更易 打印，是工程师和创客的可靠伙伴。具有良好的抗冲击和抗撕裂能力，零件掉在地上不易碎裂，可承受轻微形变。
description_en: A high-performance engineering filament featuring enhanced toughness, increased strength, and virtually odorless printing—designed as the versatile 'all-rounder' bridging PLA and ABS. It surpasses standard PLA in impact resistance and outperforms ABS in ease of printing. Engineered for reliability, it provides outstanding impact and tear resistance—printed parts resist shattering upon impact and accommodate minor elastic deformation.
