company_name: 磐采股份有限公司
description_zh: 變色龍光固化樹脂以「視角與光線變色」為核心特色，展現藍、綠、金等多層次色彩流動效果；以「曲面與立體造型應用」完整釋放色彩層次；並以「動態視覺表現」為作品注入鮮活且具張力的藝術生命力。
description_en: Chameleon Resin is a photopolymer resin engineered for dynamic chromatic effects, delivering multilayered color shifts—including blue, green, and gold—based on viewing angle and light incidence. Its formulation is optimized for curved and complex 3D geometries to fully express depth and dimensionality in color transitions. Designed for artistic expression, it imparts vivid, high-contrast visual dynamism and expressive vitality to printed works.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 磐采股份有限公司
description_zh: 透明鎧甲是一款「專為 3D 列印件設計的高透明光固化塗料」，透過「一浸一固化」即可快速成膜，實現晶瑩剔透的高光澤外觀；在「表面效果」上有效消除層紋並提升光澤與細節表現；於「材料相容性」方面具備卓越附著力，適用於光固化列印、PLA、PETG 等材質；同時在「耐久性能」上不龜裂、不黃化，長效強化表面保護，讓每一件 3D 列印作品如同披上透明鎧甲般全面升級。
description_en: Crystal Armor is a high-transparency, UV-curable coating specifically formulated for 3D-printed parts. Applying via simple dip-and-cure yields a crystal-clear, high-gloss finish. It effectively eliminates visible layer lines while enhancing surface gloss and fine-detail resolution. Exhibiting exceptional adhesion across diverse substrates—including SLA resins, PLA, and PETG—it delivers long-term durability: non-yellowing, non-cracking, and highly resistant to environmental degradation—providing comprehensive, armor-like surface protection for every 3D-printed creation.

company_name: 磐采股份有限公司
description_zh: PLA-Pottery 線材以「陶瓷複合材料結合 PLA」為材料核心，兼顧陶瓷質感與列印穩定性；在「列印表現」上具備順暢成形、不堵頭且支撐易拆的優勢；並透過「退火處理」強化結構強度與耐熱性能，最終以「高抗衝擊特性」為 3D 列印作品帶來更耐用、更可靠的使用表現。
description_en: PLA-Pottery filament integrates ceramic particles into a PLA matrix, uniquely combining authentic ceramic aesthetics with reliable FDM printability. It exhibits smooth extrusion, zero nozzle clogging, and easy support removal. Post-print annealing significantly improves structural integrity and heat resistance. Final parts deliver high impact resistance—enhancing durability and functional reliability for demanding applications.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 磐采股份有限公司
description_zh: PLA 仿石線材 (PLA-Stone) 以「天然植物纖維結合 PLA」為材料基礎，透過「獨家製程技術」打造真實細膩的仿石質感，在「打印表現」上具備順暢成形、不堵頭的穩定特性，並以「多色仿石外觀」讓 3D 列印作品自然呈現如石材般質樸而有靈魂的視覺效果。
description_en: PLA-Stone filament blends natural plant fibers with PLA to replicate the authentic texture and visual subtlety of natural stone. A proprietary compounding process ensures realistic grain structure and tactile fidelity. It prints smoothly without clogging, and delivers multi-tone stone-like appearances—imparting organic, soulful visual character and artisanal authenticity to 3D-printed objects.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 深圳市依迪姆智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 永恒Y8光固化3D打印机作为一款专为大尺寸桌面应用打造的LCD3D打印机，拥有10.3英寸打印面积和8K的高分辨率，凭借其卓越的性能和出色的打印效果，为专业设计师和普通用户提供了全新的3D打印体验。这款打印机以其高精度、高效率和大尺寸打印空间等特点，非常适合在家装家居定制小件、产品设计、3D人像定制等领域。(颜色可供选，黄、橙、黑)永恒Y8光固化3D打印机凭借其高精度打印、高速打印体验���大尺寸打印
description_en: The Eternal Y8 is a large-format desktop LCD 3D printer featuring a 10.3-inch build area and native 8K resolution. Engineered for professional designers and mainstream users alike, it delivers unprecedented print quality, speed, and dimensional capability. Its high-precision output, rapid throughput, and spacious build volume make it ideal for home décor customization, product prototyping, and personalized 3D portrait printing. Available in yellow, orange, and black.

description_zh: UV光敏树脂是一款专为高精度3D打印设计的先进材料，它融合了高硬度、低气味、快速成型、高精度、低粘度等特性，并拥有广泛的设备兼容性，刚性光敏树脂以其高硬度、低气味、快速成型、高精度、低粘度等特性，以及广泛的设备兼容性，为3D打印领域带来了革命性的变化。无论是对于专业设计师还是业余爱好者来说，它都是一款值得信赖的3D打印材料。产品特性高硬度与低气味：刚性光敏树脂具有极高的硬度，能够确保打印成品具有优
description_en: A high-performance UV-curable photopolymer resin engineered for high-precision 3D printing. It combines high hardness, low odor, rapid curing, micron-level resolution, and low viscosity with broad compatibility across LCD, DLP, and SLA platforms. Its rigid formulation delivers exceptional surface finish, dimensional stability, and mechanical integrity—making it a trusted material for professional designers and hobbyists seeking reliable, high-fidelity results.

company_name: 深圳市依迪姆智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 永恒D1是一款10.1英寸14K分辨率的光固化3D打印机，作为依迪姆科技精心打造的一款全新升级LCD3D打印机，以卓越的性能和革命性的设计，为高精度3D打印领域树立了新的标杆。其领先的14K分辨率打印技术，确保了打印产品的极致细节和精度，对于寻求高精度定制和外观的买家，提供专用生产线和定制组装加工能力，满足质量和交付和售后服务要求。广泛应用于珠宝设计、义齿模型，齿科医疗模型、教育科研以及高端工业制
description_en: The Eternal D1 is a next-generation LCD 3D printer featuring a 10.1-inch build area and industry-leading 14K resolution (13,664 × 7,680 pixels). Developed by Shenzhen Idim Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd., it redefines high-precision additive manufacturing with unmatched detail fidelity and surface quality. Designed for demanding applications, it supports dedicated production lines and custom assembly services to meet strict quality, delivery, and after-sales requirements. Widely deployed in jewelry design, dental models (including orthodontic and prosthodontic applications), educational research, and high-end industrial prototyping.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 深圳市依迪姆智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 永恒M2是一款集高精度、高效率与广泛兼容性于一体的工业级光固化3D打印机，专为追求极致细节与创意实现的用户量身打造。采用先进的光固化面成型技术，M2能够在保证卓越打印质量的同时，提供快速且稳定的打印体验，是专业设计师、艺术家、科研机构及教育领域的理想选择。永恒M2高精度光固化3D打印机，凭借其卓越的性能、高精度的打印质量以及广泛的应用场景
description_en: The Eternal M2 is an industrial-grade SLA 3D printer engineered for exceptional precision, high throughput, and broad material compatibility—ideal for professionals demanding ultimate detail fidelity and creative realization. Leveraging advanced mask-based stereolithography (MSLA), the M2 delivers rapid, reliable printing without compromising print quality. It is the preferred solution for professional designers, artists, research institutions, and educational applications.

company_name: 普罗森
description_zh: 专为光固化与 FDM 3D 打印工作空间打造，普罗森空气清净机 Max 从源头捕捉烟雾、异味、VOCs 与微细粉尘，保持环境洁净安全，让你安心长时间打印。 - 六层高效过滤系统：双 HEPA 与活性碳结构，有效过滤 PM2.5、VOCs 与打印粉尘。 - 光固化与 FDM 全面适用：稳定处理树脂 VOCs 与 ABS / 尼龙打印烟雾。 - 源头抽排设计：直连打印机，污染未扩散即被吸除。 - 大风量 · 低噪音：240 m³/h 强劲风量，42 dB 安静运行。 - 三档风速模式：强效、均衡、静音，灵活对应不同任务。 - 快速维护设计：1 秒更换滤芯，省时又省心。
description_en: Engineered specifically for SLA and FDM 3D printing environments, the Proson Air Purifier Max captures smoke, odors, VOCs, and fine particulates at the source—ensuring a clean, safe workspace for extended printing sessions. Features include: a six-stage high-efficiency filtration system with dual HEPA filters and activated carbon for effective removal of PM2.5, VOCs, and printing dust; universal compatibility with both SLA resins and FDM thermoplastics (e.g., ABS, nylon); source-capture ducting for direct printer integration; powerful airflow (240 m³/h) with ultra-quiet operation (42 dB); three adjustable fan-speed modes (Turbo, Balanced, Silent); and tool-free, one-second filter replacement for effortless maintenance.

company_name: 普罗森
description_zh: 专为原型开发与小批量生产打造，Sonic Mega 8K V2 彻底革新工程与工业零件制造流程。通过内部快速打样，将交付周期从数周压缩至数小时，整体效率最高提升 90%。 - 超大打印空间：搭载 15 英寸打印平台与 40 cm Z 轴高度，可一次完成大型工程或工业零件打印。 - 高精度：43 微米解析度，确保尺寸精准、降低公差问题。 - 稳固结构：全金属机身与双线性导轨，提供稳定可靠的列印品质。 - 自动树脂补充：自动注料设计，轻松应对大体积打印需求。
description_en: Designed for rapid prototyping and small-batch production, the Sonic Mega 8K V2 redefines engineering and industrial part manufacturing by enabling in-house rapid prototyping—reducing lead times from weeks to hours and boosting overall efficiency by up to 90%. Key features include: an ultra-large build volume (15-inch XY platform with 40 cm Z-height) for single-piece printing of large-scale engineering or industrial components; high-resolution 43 µm XY pixel pitch for dimensional accuracy and minimized tolerance deviation; a rigid all-metal frame with dual linear rails ensuring consistent print quality; and automated resin replenishment for uninterrupted large-volume printing.

company_name: 普罗森
description_zh: 专为高精度原型开发与专业级生产而生，Sonic Mighty Revo 16K 带来细腻无比的表面表现与出色稳定性，加速内部制作流程，稳定输出可直接用于展示与交付的专业级成果。 - 超高 16K 分辨率：新一代 16K LCD 捕捉极致细节，表面光滑、边缘锐利。 - 加热舱体：内置加热系统维持最佳温度，提升树脂稳定性与打印成功率。 - 稳固结构设计：全金属机身、双线性导轨与滚珠丝杆 Z 轴，确保长时间打印依然精准稳定。 - 智能监测与安全防护：智能传感器可侦测异常并自动暂停打印，全面保护设备、树脂与成品。
description_en: Built for high-precision prototyping and professional-grade production, the Sonic Mighty Revo 16K delivers exceptional surface finish, edge definition, and long-term print stability—accelerating internal workflows and enabling direct-use output for presentation and delivery. Highlights include: industry-leading 16K resolution LCD panel for unparalleled detail capture, yielding smooth surfaces and razor-sharp edges; heated build chamber with precise thermal control to enhance resin stability and first-layer adhesion; robust mechanical architecture featuring an all-metal frame, dual linear rails, and ball-screw Z-axis drive for sustained accuracy during extended prints; and intelligent monitoring with safety interlocks—automatically pausing printing upon anomaly detection to protect equipment, resin, and printed parts.

description_zh: 适用于快速原型制作与功能性零件生产，普罗森 ARCO FDM 打印机 结合高速打印与工业级稳定性，实现高效且可靠的内部制造流程。 - 高速 FDM 打印：高��速度运动系统，大幅缩短生产时间。 - 大尺寸成型空间：300 × 300 × 300 mm，支持大型零件与批量打印。 - 固定平台 CoreXY 结构：坚固的 CoreXY 架构结合固定加热平台，即使在高速打印下也能保持稳定与高精度。 - 智能开放系统：兼容多种切片与控制软件，工作流程更自由，支持深度参数调校，并可扩展多色打印方案。
description_en: The Proson ARCO FDM 3D Printer enables fast, reliable in-house prototyping and functional part production—combining high-speed performance with industrial-grade mechanical stability. Key attributes include: high-acceleration motion system for significantly reduced cycle times; large build volume (300 × 300 × 300 mm) supporting oversized parts and batch fabrication; fixed-bed CoreXY architecture delivering superior rigidity and positional accuracy—even at elevated speeds; and an open, intelligent control ecosystem compatible with major slicing and host software, enabling full parameter customization and seamless expansion to multi-color printing configurations.

Compatible with most FDM printers, it extrudes smoothly without clogging or nozzle jams and emits no pungent odor—suited for elastic accessories, protective cases, and soft-functional prototypes.

The material expands *in situ* during extrusion, achieving finished part densities of 0.6–0.8 g/cm³—significantly lower than conventional TPU. Suitable for footwear, insoles, and drone components where weight reduction is critical.

company_name: 科森塑业（山东）有限责任公司
description_zh: 科森PETG Basic系列以高性能透明PETG树脂为基材，线材颜色饱和度高，呈现出鲜亮、通透视觉效果丰富，颜色种类丰富可满足客户颜色定制化要求，且具有高韧性、高强度、耐候性与耐久性，满足普通打印与工业打印需求。
description_en: Kosen PETG Basic series utilizes high-performance transparent PETG resin as its base material. The filament exhibits high color saturation, brilliant clarity, and rich visual depth. Available in a wide range of customizable colors, it delivers high toughness, tensile strength, weather resistance, and long-term durability—meeting both general-purpose and industrial-grade printing requirements.

company_name: 科森塑业（山东）有限责任公司
description_zh: 科森PLA Flex Matte系列选用生物基聚乳酸（PLA）为基材，原有配方基础上添加了PBS，增强了材料的韧性和耐热、耐寒性能，线材颜色丰富，可满足客户颜色定制化要求，且线材表面呈现细腻柔和哑光质感，无刺眼反光，打印时层纹遮盖力优异，能弱化细微瑕疵，让模型整体更显精致，自带低调奢华风格，视觉上更显高级内敛，不易堵塞喷嘴或产生拉丝，打印细节清晰，层纹细腻。
description_en: Kosen PLA Flex Matte series is formulated using bio-based polylactic acid (PLA) enhanced with PBS for improved toughness, heat resistance, and low-temperature performance. Available in a broad spectrum of customizable colors, it features a refined, non-reflective matte surface that minimizes glare and effectively masks layer lines—enhancing perceived model quality and conveying understated elegance. Its optimized rheology ensures reliable extrusion, minimal stringing or nozzle clogging, and crisp detail reproduction with fine layer resolution.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 科森塑业（山东）有限责任公司
description_zh: 科森PLA Silk系列选用生物基聚乳酸（PLA）为基材，线材颜色丰富，单色丝绸、 彩虹丝绸、 双色渐变及三色渐变颜色可供选择，且线材具有丝绸般光泽，细腻且柔和，打印的制品视觉冲击力与吸引力强且有效掩盖打印过程中产生细微层纹，使模型整体更显精致、高级此外，PLA Silk具有较好的韧性，打印出的物品不易脆断，具备一定的抗冲击能力，能满足日常使用及普通展示需求。
description_en: Kosen PLA Silk series uses bio-based polylactic acid (PLA) as its foundation and delivers a luxurious, silky sheen—soft yet visually striking. Available in solid-color, rainbow, dual-gradient, and tri-gradient variants, it effectively conceals subtle layer lines while enhancing visual appeal and perceived refinement. With enhanced toughness and impact resistance, printed parts resist brittleness and meet everyday functional and display requirements.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 科森塑业（山东）有限责任公司
description_zh: 科森PLA Flex系列在原有的PLA原料基础上添加了PBS，兼具传统PLA的易打印性和耐用性，同时增强了材料的韧性和耐热、耐寒性能，线材颜色丰富，可满足客户颜色定制化要求，且耗材质量稳定，线径误差±0.02mm，在相对苛刻的打印环境温度下挤出顺畅，不易堵塞喷嘴与拉丝问题，对新手友好；兼容绝大多数 FDM 打印机，无需频繁调试设备参数。
description_en: Kosen PLA Flex series enhances standard PLA with PBS additives—retaining PLA’s user-friendly printability while significantly improving toughness, thermal stability (heat/cold resistance), and dimensional consistency. Featuring a wide color palette and customizable options, it maintains tight diameter tolerance (±0.02 mm), ensures smooth extrusion even under challenging ambient temperatures, and eliminates nozzle clogs and stringing—making it exceptionally beginner-friendly. Fully compatible with most FDM printers without requiring frequent parameter tuning.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 德国DIAMANT有限责任公司
description_zh: dichtol AM Hydro是一种用于密封增材制造部件的即用型聚合物体系。这种水基密封剂是一种无害物质，因此无刺激气味，操作方便, 对个人玩家友好。该密封剂可用于密封增材制造部件，实现零件液密气密，并保护它们免受环境影响。该密封剂适用于所有常见的打印工艺和打印材料。 - 适用于细孔（小于0.2毫米） - 水基，不含VOC（挥发性有机化合物） - 良好的耐温性（130°C） - 良好的耐溶剂性 - 操作方法多样：浸渍、注射、喷涂或刷涂 - 60分钟后表面干燥
description_en: dichtol AM Hydro is a ready-to-use, water-based polymer sealing system designed specifically for post-processing additively manufactured parts. As a non-hazardous, VOC-free formulation, it is odorless, safe for personal use, and highly operator-friendly. It renders 3D-printed components liquid-tight and gas-tight while protecting against environmental degradation. Compatible with all common AM processes and materials—including fine pores (<0.2 mm)—it supports multiple application methods (dip, injection, spray, or brush coating) and achieves surface dryness within 60 minutes. Additional benefits include excellent thermal resistance (up to 130°C) and robust chemical resistance.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 德国DIAMANT有限责任公司
description_zh: dichtol AM UV Protection是一种极低粘度、基于聚合物的浸渍剂，用于增材制造的部件。该产品将增材制造部件密封至实现零件液密气密，并保护部件免受紫外线辐射。这是通过一个仅几微米厚的非常薄的保护层实现的，该保护层会包裹颗粒并吸收有害的紫外线。dichtol AM UV Protection能密封并保护部件，从而可以防止例如SLS打印的聚酰胺 部件（如眼镜框）的变色。 - 适用于较大孔隙（0.1 - 0.5毫米） - 密封 + UV防护 - 含有机溶剂 - 良好的耐温性（200°C） - 良好的耐化学性 - 操作方法多样：浸渍、注射、喷涂或刷涂
description_en: dichtol AM UV Protection is an ultra-low-viscosity, polymer-based impregnation agent for additively manufactured parts. It seals AM components to achieve full liquid and gas tightness while providing protection against ultraviolet (UV) radiation. This is accomplished via an extremely thin protective layer—only a few micrometers thick—that encapsulates particles and absorbs harmful UV rays. The product prevents discoloration in SLS-printed polyamide components (e.g., eyeglass frames). Features: suitable for large pores (0.1–0.5 mm); dual function—sealing + UV protection; contains organic solvents; excellent temperature resistance (up to 200°C); good chemical resistance; application methods include immersion, injection, spraying, or brushing.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 德国DIAMANT有限责任公司
description_zh: dichtol AM Makro是一种极低粘度、高性能聚合物，用于渗透、浸渍和密封多孔结构、层和部件。dichtol AM 能自主渗入多孔结构和裂纹，并永久可靠地将其密封。该产品具有极高的毛细活性，在常温环境下操作，无需加热、加压和抽真空，固化后的dichtol可将孔隙或裂纹完全填充并具有良好的耐油、润滑剂和冷却剂性能。 - 适用于大孔（0.1-0.5毫米） - 含有机溶剂 - 耐高温（300°C） - 良好的耐化学性 - 操作方法多样：浸渍、注射、喷涂或刷涂 - 6分钟后表面干燥 - 具有饮用水认证 - 主要用于FDM的打印部件
description_en: dichtol AM Makro is an ultra-low-viscosity, high-performance polymer for impregnating, infiltrating, and sealing porous structures, layers, and components. It autonomously penetrates porous substrates and microcracks, achieving permanent, reliable sealing. Exhibiting exceptional capillary activity, it operates at ambient temperature without requiring heating, pressure, or vacuum. Upon curing, dichtol fully fills pores and cracks and demonstrates excellent resistance to oils, lubricants, and coolants. Features: suitable for large pores (0.1–0.5 mm); contains organic solvents; high-temperature resistance (up to 300°C); good chemical resistance; application methods include immersion, injection, spraying, or brushing; surface dry in 6 minutes; certified for potable water contact; primarily intended for FDM-printed parts.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

description_zh: dichtol AM是一种极低粘度、高性能聚合物，用于渗透、浸渍和密封多孔结构、层和部件。dichtol AM 能自主渗入多孔结构和裂纹，并永久可靠地将其密封。该产品具有极高的毛细活性该产品具有极高的毛细活性, 在常温环境下操作，无需加热、加压和抽真空，固化后的dichtol可将孔隙或裂纹完全填充并具有良好的耐油、润滑剂和冷却剂性能。 - 适用于细孔（小于0.1毫米） - 含有机溶剂 - 耐高温（300°C） - 良好的耐化学性 - 操作方法多样：浸渍、注射、喷涂或刷涂 - 6分钟后表面干燥 - 具有饮用水认证 - 主要用于SLS和MJF的打印部件
description_en: dichtol AM is an ultra-low-viscosity, high-performance polymer for impregnating, infiltrating, and sealing porous structures, layers, and components. It autonomously penetrates porous substrates and microcracks, achieving permanent, reliable sealing. Exhibiting exceptional capillary activity, it operates at ambient temperature without requiring heating, pressure, or vacuum. Upon curing, dichtol fully fills pores and cracks and demonstrates excellent resistance to oils, lubricants, and coolants. Features: suitable for fine pores (<0.1 mm); contains organic solvents; high-temperature resistance (up to 300°C); good chemical resistance; application methods include immersion, injection, spraying, or brushing; surface dry in 6 minutes; certified for potable water contact; primarily intended for SLS- and MJF-printed parts.

company_name: 扫描喷雾销售有限公司
description_zh: AESUB Magnetic Dots are a cutting-edge solution for 3D scanning, designed with a 6 mm diameter and retro-reflective surface for precise scanning accuracy. These dots feature a magnetic backing, allowing easy placement on any metal surface for efficient scanning preparation. Created by 3D scanning experts, AESUB Magnetic Dots are reusable, offering a sustainable and time-saving approach to setting up scans. Perfect for professionals looking for quick, reliable, and reusable reference points in their 3D scanning workflow.
description_en: AESUB Magnetic Dots are an advanced solution for 3D scanning, featuring a 6 mm diameter and retro-reflective surface to maximize scanning accuracy. Equipped with a magnetic backing, they enable rapid, secure placement on any metal surface—streamlining scan preparation. Developed by 3D scanning specialists, these reusable dots offer a sustainable, time-efficient method for establishing reference points in professional 3D scanning workflows.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 扫描喷雾销售有限公司
description_zh: AESUBdots high-reflective 3D scanning targets are specialized markers that significantly enhance the accuracy and efficiency of 3D scanning workflows. With retro-reflective properties, these targets reflect light back to its source, improving the scanner’s ability to identify reference points, especially on complex or large surfaces. Their high reflectivity makes them ideal for applications requiring precise reference points, such as when scanning objects over long distances. These high-reflective targets assist in aligning multiple scans seamlessly, creating a unified 3D model crucial for precision-focused tasks like quality control, reverse engineering, and product design. For optimal results, it’s essential to follow best practices in applying these targets, including careful distribution and placement on the object, to maintain accurate scanner positioning throughout the process.
description_en: AESUBdots High Retro are specialized, high-retro-reflective 3D scanning targets engineered to significantly improve the accuracy and efficiency of 3D scanning operations. Their retro-reflective properties direct light precisely back to the scanner’s source, enhancing detection of reference points—especially on complex, large, or low-contrast surfaces. Ideal for long-distance scanning and precision-critical applications such as quality control, reverse engineering, and product design, these targets ensure seamless multi-scan alignment and unified 3D model generation. Optimal performance requires careful, uniform placement across the object surface to maintain consistent scanner positioning throughout acquisition.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 扫描喷雾销售有限公司
description_zh: AESUB violet is a new self-volatilizing scanning spray developed by scanning experts. It eliminates basic application problems of 3D metrology, especially in sensitive areas (laboratories, production, etc.) and protects the equipment from contamination by deposition of pigments. Expensive transports of externally matted measuring objects to the sensor as well as the time-consuming cleaning of the measuring environment and objects after scanning are no longer necessary. With AESUB violet, you achieve a significant increase in efficiency and productivity in the entire digitization process.
description_en: AESUB violet is a next-generation, self-volatilizing scanning spray developed by metrology experts. It eliminates fundamental application challenges in 3D metrology—particularly in sensitive environments such as laboratories and production facilities—while preventing pigment deposition and equipment contamination. AESUB violet eliminates the need for costly external transport of matte-finished measurement objects to sensors and time-consuming post-scan cleaning of both the measurement environment and objects. It delivers a substantial increase in overall digitization efficiency and productivity.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 扫描喷雾销售有限公司
description_zh: AESUB diamond is a cutting-edge solution tailored for the jewellery industry. Developed by scanning experts, AESUB diamond is a revolutionary self vanishing scanning spray designed to enhance your scanning experience. Unlike conventional sprays, AESUB diamond is pigment-free, ensuring zero pigment contamination in crucial areas like scanner, equipment, and users. With its unique formulation, AESUB diamond eliminates the need for cleaning after scanning, as it naturally evaporates within abt. 10 minutes. This means you can scan rings and other jewellery items, applying AESUB diamond directly on the spot, without worrying about transporting them to prevent pigment contamination. By choosing AESUB diamond, you’re not just investing in a product; you’re investing in efficiency and productivity. Experience seamless digitizing processes, streamline your workflow, and elevate your productiv
description_en: AESUB diamond is a cutting-edge, self-vanishing scanning spray purpose-built for the jewelry industry. Developed by 3D scanning specialists, this revolutionary pigment-free formulation ensures zero risk of pigment contamination to scanners, equipment, or operators. Its unique chemistry enables complete natural evaporation within approximately 10 minutes—eliminating post-scan cleaning entirely. Users can apply AESUB diamond directly on-site to rings and other delicate jewelry items without concern for pigment transfer or transport requirements. AESUB diamond enhances workflow efficiency, accelerates digitization, and elevates productivity across jewelry inspection, design, and manufacturing.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: 3D打印康复辅具、3D打印矫形鞋垫、3D打印手术导板
product_name_en: 3D-Printed Rehabilitation Aids, Orthopedic Insoles, and Surgical Guides
company_name: 珠海赛纳数字医疗技���有限公司
description_zh: 3D打印康复辅具：由固定器主体、尼龙绑带、尼龙搭扣、金属关节/支条、螺丝铆钉组成。其中固定器主体是由高分子材料（聚十二内酰胺）通过增材制造工艺制备;尼龙绑带、尼龙 3D打印矫形鞋垫：由热塑性聚氨酯弹性体（TPU）高分子材料、EVA材料制成。 3D打印手术导板：产品由聚酰胺12材料（PA12）经增材制造工艺生产而成，其上有固定钉孔、骨贴合区域，部分导板带有截骨引导槽。3D打印定制式手术导板分为髋关节导板、膝关节导板、脊柱导板、四肢导板，其中膝关节导板由股骨髁截骨导板、胫骨平台截骨导板、股骨四合一截骨导板组成。供医疗机构用于髋关节、膝关节、脊柱和四肢部位的骨科手术中定位、导向和保护。
description_en: 3D-Printed Rehabilitation Aids: Comprising a main orthosis body fabricated via additive manufacturing using polydodecanolactam (PA12), plus nylon straps, hook-and-loop fasteners, metallic joints/struts, and screws/rivets. 3D-Printed Orthopedic Insoles: Manufactured from thermoplastic polyurethane elastomer (TPU) and EVA materials. 3D-Printed Surgical Guides: Produced via additive manufacturing using polyamide 12 (PA12), featuring fixation pin holes, bone-contact surfaces, and optional osteotomy guide slots. Custom surgical guides are available for hip, knee, spine, and extremity procedures; knee guides include femoral condylar, tibial plateau, and quadruple-cut femoral osteotomy variants. Intended for use in orthopedic surgery to provide precise anatomical localization, intraoperative guidance, and tissue protection.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

product_name_zh: 全彩色3D打印设备及配套材料
product_name_en: Full-Color Multi-Material 3D Printer and Compatible Materials
company_name: 珠海赛纳数字医疗技术有限公司
description_zh: 全彩色多材料3D打印机（自主研发掌握核心技术），支持透明材料、支持彩色材料、支持类橡胶材料、支持类ABS材料、支持水溶支撑材料，支持贴图打印、支持全彩色打印，成型尺寸：460*100*150mm/395*345*250mm/495*395*300mm，材料配置：5种成型材料+1种支撑材料数字混合。
description_en: A proprietary full-color multi-material 3D printer with core technologies independently developed and controlled. Supports transparent, full-color, rubber-like, ABS-like, and water-soluble support materials; enables texture mapping and true full-color printing. Build volumes: 460 × 100 × 150 mm, 395 × 345 × 250 mm, and 495 × 395 × 300 mm. Material configuration: five functional build materials plus one soluble support material, digitally blended.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

product_name_zh: 全彩色3D打印手术规划模型
company_name: 珠海赛纳数字医疗技术有限公司
description_zh: 采用丙烯酸酯类光敏树脂材料制成，通过患者医学影像二维数据，转换重建为三维数据并进行设计，利用3D打印机将重建设计后的三维立体图打印为实体模型，用以显示人体脏器解剖结构与病变间情况，包括动脉、静脉、气管、支气管及其分支、病变组织及其它组织等之间位置关系情况
description_en: Surgical planning models fabricated from acrylic photopolymer resin. Patient-specific anatomical models are generated by converting clinical 2D medical imaging data into 3D reconstructions, followed by digital design and physical 3D printing. These models accurately represent spatial relationships among anatomical structures—including arteries, veins, trachea, bronchi and their branches—as well as pathological tissues and surrounding anatomy—enabling enhanced preoperative visualization and procedural planning.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 隆祺欧洲有限公司
description_zh: TPU系列 TPU系列具备优异的柔软性与高韧性，兼顾出色的抗冲击、耐磨及耐油性能。材料层间粘合稳定，成型件回弹性好，非常适合打印需要耐跌落、抗碰撞及反复弯折的柔性功能部件。 其综合性能使其在工业与消费级应用中均具有良好适应性，能够满足多样化的柔性打印需求。 应用领域： 适用于鞋材配件、工业密封件、防护部件及各类柔性结构模型。 使用建议： 打印前建议对材料进行充分烘干；由于线材柔软，不建议搭配远程挤出（Bowden）系统使用。
description_en: TPU filament series offers outstanding flexibility and high toughness, combined with superior impact resistance, abrasion resistance, and oil resistance. Excellent interlayer adhesion ensures dimensional stability, while printed parts exhibit strong resilience—ideal for functional flexible components subject to repeated bending, impact, or drop stress. Its balanced mechanical and processing performance makes it suitable for both industrial and consumer applications. Applications include footwear components, industrial seals, protective gear, and flexible structural prototypes. Recommendation: Pre-dry filament before printing; due to its flexibility, not recommended for Bowden extrusion systems.
applications_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
applications_en: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 隆祺欧洲有限公司
description_zh: PETG系列 改性 PETG 线材针对传统 PETG 易脆的问题进行了系统优化，其韧性与抗冲击性能提升超过 50%，在保持良好耐候性与耐化学腐蚀性能的同时，大幅提升了结构可靠性。 材料表面自带釉面光泽，透明度高，色彩饱和度出色，在功能性与外观表现之间实现了良好平衡，适用于对强度、稳定性和视觉效果均有要求的应用场景。 应用领域： 适用于食品级容器（非直接高温接触）、户外标识、工业部件及家居用品等。 使用建议： 打印前建议进行烘干处理，以确保最佳成型质量与表面效果。
description_en: Modified PETG filament series addresses brittleness issues common in standard PETG—delivering over 50% improved toughness and impact resistance while retaining excellent weatherability and chemical corrosion resistance. The material features inherent glossy surface finish, high transparency, and vibrant color saturation—achieving an optimal balance between functional performance and aesthetic quality. Applications include food-grade containers (non-high-temperature direct contact), outdoor signage, industrial components, and household goods. Recommendation: Pre-dry filament before printing to ensure optimal surface quality and dimensional accuracy.
applications_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
applications_en: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 隆祺欧洲有限公司
description_zh: PLA-Silk 美学系列 PLA-Silk 丝滑系列是一款专为高端美学表现而设计的装饰型线材。其表面呈现出超越普通丝绸 PLA 的流光质感，无需后期抛光即可获得细腻、顺滑且富有金属光泽的打印效果，尤其在金属色系中表现尤为逼真。 在追求极致视觉效果的同时，该系列在层间粘合性能方面亦进行了优化，使薄壁结构更不易断裂，并支持常温冷平台打印工艺，兼顾美观性与可打印性。 -应用领域： 适用于饰品、艺术摆件、展示模型及各类以视觉表现为核心的创意设计作品。
description_en: PLA-Silk is a premium aesthetic filament series engineered for high-end visual presentation. Its surface delivers a lustrous, silk-like sheen surpassing conventional silk PLA—yielding smooth, refined, metallic-gloss finishes without post-processing polishing, especially realistic in metallic color variants. Interlayer adhesion has been optimized to enhance structural integrity of thin-walled geometries, and the filament supports ambient-temperature cold-platform printing—ensuring both exceptional aesthetics and reliable printability. Applications include jewelry, artistic figurines, display models, and all creative designs where visual fidelity is paramount.
applications_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
applications_en: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 隆祺欧洲有限公司
description_zh: PLA-Force 是一款高性能改性 PLA 线材，在保留易打印特性的同时，大幅提升韧性、抗冲击性与耐老化性能。相较普通 PLA，密度更低（约 380 米/kg），同等重量可实现更高打印产出，性价比更高。支持高速打印，兼容光面板与纹理板，可在常温冷平台打印，有效降低能耗与成本，特别适合打印农场长时间连续生产。适用于工业原型、功能性外壳、灯饰结构件及对强度和耐久性有要求的模型。建议在通风良好的环境中使用。
description_en: PLA-F (PLA-Force) is a high-performance modified PLA filament that retains easy printability while delivering significantly enhanced toughness, impact resistance, and aging resistance. With lower density (~380 m/kg) than standard PLA, it provides higher print yield per kilogram—improving cost efficiency. Supports high-speed printing and adheres reliably to both smooth and textured build plates, operating effectively on ambient-temperature cold platforms to reduce energy consumption and operational costs—ideal for continuous, high-volume print farm production. Applications include industrial prototypes, functional enclosures, lighting fixtures, and models requiring mechanical strength and long-term durability. Recommendation: Use in a well-ventilated environment.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

product_name_zh: FOV多视角融合视野扩张系统
product_name_en: FOV Multi-View Fusion Field-of-View Expansion System
company_name: 广州安特激光技术有限公司
description_zh: 基于液态镜头的多视角融合视野扩张系统：采用高速工业相机、自动变焦液态镜头、电控二维摆镜，结合人工智能算法，兼具高清与广角的新型智能监控系统，可应用于智能城市、军事、生态环保、家居等多个场景。
description_en: A novel intelligent surveillance system based on liquid lenses, integrating high-speed industrial cameras, auto-focus liquid lenses, and electronically controlled 2D galvanometric mirrors with AI-powered fusion algorithms. Delivers simultaneous high-resolution imaging and ultra-wide field-of-view coverage. Suitable for smart city infrastructure, defense, ecological monitoring, and residential security applications.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 用于金属3D打印的大幅面精密激光扫描系统
product_name_en: Large-Format Precision Laser Scanning System for Metal 3D Printing
company_name: 广州安特激光技术有限公司
description_zh: 用于金属3D打印的大幅面精密激光扫描系统：是金属3D打印装备SLM系统的核心部件，主要应用于航空航天领域的大型合金工件加工，如航空发动机排气组件、空间站节点球解刨件等。
description_en: A large-format precision laser scanning system designed as a core component for selective laser melting (SLM) metal 3D printing equipment. Primarily employed in aerospace manufacturing for large-scale alloy components—such as aircraft engine exhaust assemblies and space station node sphere sections.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 广州安特激光技术有限公司
description_zh: 超大加工幅面：​30mm入射激光下，单镜头成型幅面达到650x650mm ​高功率激光：可用功率超过6000W，温飘小，光束质量高，显著提升打印效率。 ​高良率与经济性：在米级设备中，配置该镜头的拼接打印设备，实现了高效能的同时降低了光路数量，大幅减少了拼接不良的几率。整体成本更具优势。
description_en: Ultra-large processing field: achieves a single-lens build area of 650 × 650 mm with a 30 mm input beam diameter. High-power capability: supports laser power exceeding 6000 W, with minimal thermal drift and high beam quality—significantly improving print throughput. High yield and cost efficiency: when integrated into meter-class SLM systems, this lens reduces the number of optical paths required for tiled scanning, minimizing seam defects and lowering total system cost.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 北京中孚悦达真空科技有限公司
description_zh: JVHB系列高温钎焊真空炉主要用于钛合金，高温合金，不锈钢等材料或产品的真空高温钎焊，也可适用于部分真空热处理工艺，如真空回火，真空退火等。
description_en: JVHB-series vacuum high-temperature brazing furnaces are primarily used for vacuum brazing of titanium alloys, superalloys, stainless steels, and related components. Also suitable for auxiliary vacuum heat treatment processes including vacuum tempering and vacuum annealing.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等
汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 北京中孚悦达真空科技有限公司
description_zh: JVGQ系列真空固溶，淬火炉主要用于不锈钢，钛合金，高温合金，模具钢，工具钢及其他合金钢的固溶，淬火处理，也可用于真空退火，真空钎焊和真空烧结处理。
description_en: JVGQ-series vacuum solution treatment and gas quenching furnaces are designed for solution heat treatment and quenching of stainless steels, titanium alloys, superalloys, mold steels, tool steels, and other alloy steels. Additional capabilities include vacuum annealing, vacuum brazing, and vacuum sintering.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

company_name: 北京中孚悦达真空科技有限公司
description_zh: 真空退火可以有效地解决处理过程中的氧化和脱碳问题，实现真空光亮退火，去应力退火处理等，可处理高速钢，不锈钢，钛合金，高温合金，锆材，大大提高材料的使用寿命。
description_en: Vacuum annealing effectively eliminates oxidation and decarburization during thermal processing, enabling bright annealing and stress-relief annealing. Suitable for high-speed steels, stainless steels, titanium alloys, superalloys, and zirconium alloys—significantly extending service life and enhancing material performance.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

product_name_zh: 高性价比焦点光斑分析仪 CinSpot AUT系列
product_name_en: CinSpot AUT Series High-Cost-Performance Focal Spot Analyzer
company_name: 上海昊量光电设备有限公司
description_zh: CinSpot AUT系列为一款紧凑型的设计产品，主要由高品质的 CinCam CMOS系列相机、PA 衰减器及散热系统等模块组成。该产品主要应用于客户售后场景，设备体积小重量轻，性价比极高。
description_en: The CinSpot AUT Series is a compact, integrated solution comprising a high-quality CinCam CMOS camera, a PA attenuator, and an active cooling system. Designed primarily for after-sales service applications, it features a small footprint and lightweight construction, delivering exceptional value for money.

product_name_zh: PowerCube系列-焦点功率与光斑分析仪
product_name_en: PowerCube Series – Focal Power and Spot Analyzer
company_name: 上海昊量光电设备有限公司
description_zh: PowerCube系列(简称"PC"系列)为昊量光电联合自研的C)INOGYINSIDE系列光束测量系统方案之一,是一款体积小,适用于实时测量分析聚焦后的焦点光束及功率等应用场景,且功能非常强大的焦点光束分析仪标准的PowerCube系列采用的是一体化紧凑型的设计,波段覆盖400nm-1150nm可选,可测的光斑直径min.10um,可测量功率upto 500W;通过RayCi软件控制,可实现非常高的测量准确度和精度。
description_en: The PowerCube (PC) Series is a proprietary beam measurement system developed by Hangzhou Haoliang Optoelectronics in collaboration with CINOGYINSIDE. This compact, real-time focal beam analyzer measures focused beam parameters—including spot size, power, and position—across a wavelength range of 400–1150 nm. It supports minimum spot diameters of 10 µm and power measurements up to 500 W. Controlled via RayCi software, the system delivers high measurement accuracy and repeatability.

product_name_zh: 聚焦光束分析仪 FBP系列
product_name_en: CinSpot FBP Series Focused Beam Profiler
company_name: 上海昊量光电设备有限公司
description_zh: CinSpot FBP系列为德国CINOGY公司为德国著名3D打印厂家SLM solution设计生产的一款小型化的高功率焦点光束分析仪，最大测量功率可大1KW ，主要用于测量焦点光斑尺寸、焦点位置、激光功率、M^2、瑞利长度等。由于其体积小，所以也比较适合测量空间有限的应用，易于系统集成。在金属3D打印应用中，客户可以利用CinSpot FBP-2KF准确的知道激光器的焦点位置、焦点光斑尺寸，在生产和研发中可以直接优化光路和产品，并且客户也可在产品交付时，提供直接有效的产品验收和后续的产品调试优化，可大大提供客户的售后服务。
description_en: The CinSpot FBP Series is a compact, high-power focused beam profiler developed by German company CINOGY specifically for SLM Solutions’ metal additive manufacturing systems. Capable of measuring laser power up to 1 kW, it quantifies focal spot size, focal position, laser power, M² factor, and Rayleigh length. Its compact form factor enables integration into space-constrained environments. In metal 3D printing, the FBP-2KF model allows users to precisely determine focal position and spot size—enabling direct optimization of optical paths and printed parts during R&D and production. It also streamlines final product acceptance, commissioning, and post-delivery system tuning—significantly enhancing after-sales support efficiency.

company_name: 沈阳众拓机器人设备有限公司
description_zh: 直线模组是组成3D打印机的运动部件。作为集成了直线导轨与高精度驱动技术于一体的模块化运动单元，直线模组通过精密的直线运动，可以高效地在立体空间中对物料进行移动打印。 众拓机器人致力于提供可定制、高性能的直线运动解决方案。我们的直线模组系列产品覆盖广泛，包括成熟的LSZ80HP同步带传动直线模组和动力强劲的齿轮齿条驱动直线模组。在3D打印行业的应用中可以满足从高速轻载到重载长行程的不同场景需求。（最大负载20吨，直线度0.05mm） 众拓机器人，不仅提供标准化的优质产品，更专注于与每一位客户携手，针对其独特的设备架构与工艺要求，量身打造最适配的直线运动解决方案。
description_en: Linear modules constitute the core motion components of 3D printers. As modular, integrated units combining precision linear guides and high-accuracy drive technologies, they enable efficient, precise material positioning and deposition within 3D space. Zhongtuo Robotics offers customizable, high-performance linear motion solutions. Our product portfolio includes the mature LSZ80HP timing-belt-driven linear module and high-torque rack-and-pinion modules. These satisfy diverse application requirements—from high-speed, light-load to heavy-duty, long-travel scenarios—supporting maximum loads of 20 tons and straightness accuracy of ±0.05 mm. Beyond standardized products, Zhongtuo Robotics partners closely with customers to deliver fully tailored linear motion solutions aligned with unique equipment architectures and process requirements.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_en: AX-3000CT-D Dual-Source Micro/Nano Industrial CT System
company_name: 奥影检测科技（上海）有限公司
description_zh: 这是一款大型高精度多用途双源微纳米工业CT系统，自带步入式屏蔽铅房，符合国家射线防护标准。设备采用双立柱型高精度机械运动平台，具备高放大倍率，可灵活配置多种射线源（支持双源组合）与探测器，从而实现更宽的穿透范围与更高的系统分辨率，满足高标准的检测质量要求。系统尤其适用于长条形工件的扫描检测，可广泛应用于增材制造、注塑铸造、电子电器、考古研究、航空航天、军工、新材料、新能源及生命科学研究等领域。
description_en: The AX-3000CT-D is a large-format, high-precision, multi-purpose dual-source micro/nano industrial CT system equipped with an integrated walk-in lead-shielded room compliant with national radiation safety standards. Featuring a dual-column, high-accuracy mechanical motion platform, it delivers high geometric magnification and flexible configuration options—including multiple X-ray sources (dual-source capable) and detectors—to extend penetration range and maximize system resolution. Optimized for scanning elongated workpieces, it serves demanding quality inspection requirements across additive manufacturing, injection molding/casting, electronics, archaeology, aerospace, defense, new materials, new energy, and life sciences.

product_name_zh: AX-3000CT 高精度微焦点工业CT系统
product_name_en: AX-3000CT High-Precision Micro-Focus Industrial CT System
company_name: 奥影检测科技（上海）有限公司
description_zh: 这是一款自带屏蔽铅房的通用型微焦点工业CT系统，符合国家射线屏蔽防护标准。设备结构紧凑、占地小、实用性强，扫描精度高，且可根据需要灵活选配多种微米级焦点射线源（透射靶/反射靶）与探测器组合。该系统广泛应用于增材制造、注塑铸造、电子电器、石油地质、航空航天、军工、新材料、新能源及生命科学研究等领域。
description_en: The AX-3000CT is a general-purpose, micro-focus industrial CT system with an integrated lead-shielded enclosure meeting national radiation shielding standards. Its compact footprint and high spatial efficiency make it ideal for lab or production-floor deployment. With high scanning accuracy and flexible configurability—including selectable micro-focus X-ray sources (transmission or reflection target) and detector combinations—it meets rigorous inspection demands across additive manufacturing, injection molding/casting, electronics, petroleum geology, aerospace, defense, new materials, new energy, and life sciences.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: AX-2000CT 高精度微焦点CT系统
company_name: 奥影检测科技（上海）有限公司
description_zh: 这是一款占地面积小巧、性价比突出的CT设备，可灵活部署于小型实验室或生产现场。设备具备高精度、高速度与高效检测的优势，可广泛应用于注塑铸造、电子电器、石油地质、新材料、先进制造、新能源及生命科学等研究领域。此外，系统支持根据不同应用场景的需求，配置多种射线源与探测器的组合方案。
description_en: The AX-2000CT is a compact, cost-effective CT system optimized for deployment in small laboratories or production environments. Delivering high precision, rapid scanning, and operational efficiency, it supports broad application across injection molding/casting, electronics, petroleum geology, new materials, advanced manufacturing, new energy, and life sciences. The system allows flexible configuration of X-ray source and detector combinations to match specific application requirements.

company_name: 奥影检测科技（上海）有限公司
description_zh: 这是一款桌面型Micro-CT，具有小巧可灵活摆放的特点。扫描精度高、性价比高、操作简便快捷等优势。其采用特有的一体式微焦点射线源，运用三代锥束扫描，结合计算机三维重建技术，能够提供样品内部复杂结构的高分辨率三维数字图像，对样品内部细节进行数字化三维表征分析。可广泛应用于增材铸造、电子、先进材料、生命科学研究等领域。
description_en: The AX-1000CT is a compact desktop micro-CT system designed for flexible placement and ease of use. Leveraging a proprietary integrated micro-focus X-ray source, third-generation cone-beam scanning, and advanced computerized 3D reconstruction, it generates high-resolution, quantitative 3D digital images of internal sample structures—enabling detailed digital volumetric characterization. Applications span additive manufacturing, electronics, advanced materials, and life sciences research.

company_name: 深圳市蓝德欧智能控制技术有限公司
description_zh: Micron+ R1是Voron V2.4的精致迷你化版本，专为180×180mm打印面积。本套件基于与原创设计者HartK的合作，并在社区成员支持下共同开发测试，具备精密运动系统、可靠供电架构，并全面兼容Klipper固件。其设计虽小巧紧凑，却能实现不妥协的完整规模性能，轻松驾驭各类高性能材料及高速打印需求。
description_en: The Micron+ R1 is an elegant, miniaturized variant of the Voron V2.4 printer, engineered for a 180 × 180 mm build area. Developed in close collaboration with original designer HartK and rigorously validated by the community, it features a precision motion system, robust power architecture, and full Klipper firmware compatibility. Despite its compact size, it delivers uncompromised performance—capable of reliably processing high-performance materials and sustaining high-speed printing.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

company_name: 深圳市蓝德欧智能控制技术有限公司
description_zh: BoxTurtle是一款专为Klipper系统3D打印机开发的开源自动换料系统，采用模块化AMS设计理念。该系统已在VORON系列及其他Klipper平台上完成全面测试，通过智能简化多材料打印流程，为用户带来流畅无阻的换料体验，让高端AMS功能的实现变得轻松易得。
description_en: BoxTurtle is an open-source, automatic material switching (AMS) system designed exclusively for Klipper-based 3D printers. Built upon a modular AMS architecture, it has been comprehensively tested on Voron-series and other Klipper platforms. By intelligently simplifying multi-material workflows, BoxTurtle delivers seamless, interruption-free filament changes—making premium AMS functionality accessible and effortless.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

company_name: 深圳市蓝德欧智能控制技术有限公司
description_zh: LDO V0.2 是一款面向DIY爱好者的 CoreXY 架构 FDM 3D 打印机套件，专为小空间和有限预算而优化。它拥有紧凑的 120×120×120mm 打印体积，并配备了高品质组件，如 E3D 热端以及Bondtech 挤出机部件。套件中包含预剪裁接线和 Picobilical PCB，方便快速组装，同时还集成了诸如 Kirigami 热床支架等实用改装模块。该打印机搭载 TMC2209 步进驱动，实现静音打印，专为高质量小型零件制造而设计。
description_en: The LDO V0.2 is a CoreXY-architecture FDM 3D printer kit tailored for DIY enthusiasts operating under space and budget constraints. With a compact 120 × 120 × 120 mm build volume, it integrates premium components—including an E3D hotend and Bondtech extruder—and ships with pre-cut wiring and a Picoboard PCB for rapid assembly. Practical upgrades such as the Kirigami heated bed mount are included. Equipped with TMC2209 stepper drivers for silent operation, the LDO V0.2 is optimized for high-fidelity small-part fabrication.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

company_name: 深圳市蓝德欧智能控制技术有限公司
description_zh: Positron V3.2 是 Kralyn 经典倒置可折叠微型 CoreXY 打印机的升级版，其小巧机身可轻松收纳于线材盒内！LDO 与 Positron 团队历时一年共同优化本套件，确保其易于组装且能输出卓越打印效果。套件采用高品质组件，包括原厂Gates皮带、内置树莓派驱动屏幕以及高透光 ITO 玻璃加热床。我们还将线材盒升级为硬质保护箱，让设备携带更安全便捷！
description_en: The Positron V3.2 is an upgraded iteration of Kralyn’s classic inverted, foldable micro CoreXY printer—so compact it fits entirely inside a standard spool box. Co-developed over one year by LDO and the Positron team, this kit prioritizes ease of assembly and outstanding print quality. Key features include genuine Gates timing belts, an integrated Raspberry Pi–driven touchscreen display, and a high-transparency ITO-glass heated bed. The spool box has been upgraded to a rigid protective case for enhanced portability and safe transport.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

product_name_zh: HD8K高功率光内送丝激光电弧复合加工头
product_name_en: HD8K High-Power In-Beam Wire-Feeding Laser-Arc Hybrid Processing Head
company_name: 上海盖泽激光科技有限公司
description_zh: HD8K 系列光内送丝激光电弧复合能量沉积加工头，专门针对从低功率到高功率的定向能量沉积（DED）、激光金属沉积（LMD）、熔覆以及复合焊接等应用而设计，适用于光纤传输的激光器。其先进的光学设计能够让金属丝材或金属粉末直接进入与光束同轴且恰好处于熔池中心的光束路径。使得增材制造或熔覆过程具备更加灵活的空间角度。 HD8K 是一款坚固耐用的加工头，配备有直接冷却的反射聚焦光学元件，可最大程度地减少焦点偏移。使得该激光头能够承受高达 8 KW的激光加工。
description_en: The HD8K series is a high-power, in-beam wire-feeding laser-arc hybrid processing head engineered for directed energy deposition (DED), laser metal deposition (LMD), cladding, and hybrid welding—compatible with fiber-delivered lasers across low-to-high power ranges. Its advanced coaxial optical design directs wire or powder feedstock directly into the laser beam path, precisely at the melt pool center, enabling greater flexibility in deposition angles and spatial orientation. Robustly constructed with actively cooled reflective focusing optics, the HD8K minimizes focal drift and withstands continuous laser power up to 8 kW.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

product_name_zh: 大型龙门式颗粒 3D 打印设备
company_name: 浙江超领智能科技有限公司
description_zh: Uni-Print 203012 旨在满足大尺寸、高效率和低成本的制造需求。该设备直接利用热塑性颗粒或纤维增强颗粒进行打印 ，有效规避了传统线材成本的限制。具备超大成 型空间：能够实现 2000×3000× 1200 mm 一体化成型。高动态性能：采用精密齿轮齿条传动与 大功率伺服驱动相结合 ，实现 200mm/s 的高速打印。工业级的可靠性：床身经过加厚焊接并进 行时效退火处理 ，抗变形能力显著增强 ，适应长时间连续作业。
description_en: The Uni-Print 203012 addresses large-scale, high-efficiency, and low-cost manufacturing needs by directly processing thermoplastic granules or fiber-reinforced granules—eliminating traditional filament cost constraints. It offers an ultra-large build envelope of 2000 × 3000 × 1200 mm for monolithic part fabrication. High dynamic performance is achieved via precision rack-and-pinion transmission coupled with high-power servo drives, enabling printing speeds up to 200 mm/s. Engineered for industrial reliability, its reinforced welded frame undergoes stress-relief annealing to minimize deformation and ensure stable, uninterrupted long-duration operation.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: TS-25 渐变彩虹色3D打印耗材挤出生产线
product_name_en: TS-25 Gradient Rainbow-Colored 3D Printing Filament Extrusion Line
company_name: 东莞拓森塑料机械有限公司
description_zh: 该设备主要用于大批量生产彩虹3D打印丝，每6-8米切换到不同的颜色。多色喂料器之间可随意变换调整，可生产出绚丽多彩的3D耗材，广泛应用于打印各种工艺品，摆件等。
description_en: The TS-25 is a high-throughput extrusion line specialized for mass-producing rainbow-colored 3D printing filaments, with automatic color transitions every 6–8 meters. Its modular multi-color feeder system allows flexible reconfiguration, enabling production of vivid, multi-hued filaments widely used for decorative prints, art objects, and display items.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: TS-30 双色3D打印耗材挤出生产线
product_name_en: TS-30 Dual-Color 3D Printing Filament Extrusion Line
company_name: 东莞拓森塑料机械有限公司
description_zh: 该设备主要用于生产双色或双层3D打印丝，根据客户的特殊材料及要求订做不同配置的生产线。
description_en: The TS-30 is a custom-configurable extrusion line designed for producing dual-color or dual-layer 3D printing filaments. Configurations are tailored to meet specific customer material specifications and functional requirements.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: TS-45单色3D打印耗材挤出生产线
product_name_en: TS-45 Single-Color 3D Printing Filament Extrusion Line
company_name: 东莞拓森塑料机械有限公司
description_zh: 该设备主要用于大批量生产各种材料的3D打印丝，可根据客户的特殊材料及要求订做不同配置的生产线。
description_en: The TS-45 is a high-volume extrusion line optimized for mass production of single-color 3D printing filaments across diverse polymer types. Fully customizable configurations accommodate specialized material formulations and customer-specific process requirements.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: TS-25 3D分体式实验型挤出机（带储线架）
product_name_en: TS-25 3D Modular Experimental Extruder (with Spool Stand)
company_name: 东莞拓森塑料机械有限公司
description_zh: 该设备广泛用于大学教学培训，工厂改性材料样品测试，以及小批量生产测试等。
description_en: The TS-25 modular experimental extruder—equipped with a spool stand—is widely deployed in university teaching labs, industrial polymer modification trials, and small-batch R&D validation.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: HBD P400金属增材制造设备：为效率与精度而生
product_name_en: HBD P400 Metal Additive Manufacturing System: Engineered for Efficiency and Precision
company_name: 上海汉邦联航激光科技有限公司
description_zh: 全新HBD P400金属3D打印机型，深度融合“光驰Ⅱ”智能光束整形技术与六激光多光路系统，重新定义工业增材制造中精度与效率的边界。可基于部件几何特征，实现精细光斑与高效环形光斑之间智能切换，从而在单一设备平台上，实现媲美传统加工的极致精度与满足批量生产的高速打印能力。在精密模具与高端医疗领域，HBD P400凭借其卓越的打印精度与表面质量，能将复杂内腔、个性化植入体等高附加值零件的后处理流程降至极简，大幅缩短研发与交付周期。面向消费电子、汽车零部件及高端运动器材的批量制造，HBD P400在保障产品性能一致性的前提下，显著提升生产效率，为规模化、高可靠性的工业量产提供可靠支撑。
description_en: The all-new HBD P400 metal 3D printer integrates the 'GuangChi II' intelligent beam shaping technology with a six-laser, multi-optical-path system—redefining the industrial AM frontier for both precision and throughput. It dynamically switches between fine focal spots and high-efficiency annular beams based on part geometry, achieving machining-grade dimensional accuracy and surface finish alongside production-ready print speeds on a single platform. In precision tooling and high-end medical applications, the HBD P400 drastically reduces post-processing for complex internal channels and patient-specific implants—accelerating R&D cycles and time-to-market. For high-volume manufacturing in consumer electronics, automotive components, and premium sports equipment, it ensures consistent part performance while substantially increasing productivity—delivering robust, scalable industrial production capability.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_en: ASTM Additive Manufacturing Intelligence and Advisory Services
company_name: ASTM国际
description_zh: 增材制造（AM）可以节省成本、加快产品开发，并缓解供应链问题。Wohlers Associates 的专业能力可以帮助您和您的公司评估如何推进增材制造的应用。我们拥有规模最大的增材制造专家团队之一，知识广泛且全面。 在其 40 年的发展历程中，这家独立咨询公司曾与行业内一些最具影响力的企业合作，提供有关增材制造趋势及未来增长的咨询建议。正在考虑是否进入某个特定市场？Wohlers Associates 可以为您提供建议。我们的咨询专家还可以就合作机会、产品定位、投资决策以及竞争格局等问题提供指导。
description_en: Additive manufacturing (AM) reduces costs, accelerates product development, and mitigates supply chain risks. Wohlers Associates—leveraging one of the world’s largest and most experienced AM consulting teams—helps organizations evaluate and implement AM strategies effectively. With over 40 years of independent expertise, the firm has advised leading global enterprises on AM trends, market opportunities, competitive landscapes, investment decisions, product positioning, and partnership strategies—providing actionable intelligence to guide strategic entry into targeted markets.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_en: ASTM Additive Manufacturing Quality Certification Program
company_name: ASTM国际
description_zh: ASTM增材制造质量认证项目旨在通过对制造商（服务商/合同制造商）的能力评估，证明其能够稳定生产高质量的增材制造零件，并在工艺流程、人员资质、材料管控及设施管理等方面持续保持质量水准。该项目基于已发布的ISO/ASTM增材制造标准制定，并吸纳了行业利益相关方的意见，可针对增材制造的特殊要求补充现有行业质量管理体系（QMS），从而在增材制造供应链中建立标准化的质量基准。
description_en: The ASTM Additive Manufacturing Quality Certification Program validates manufacturers’ (service providers/contract manufacturers’) capability to consistently produce high-quality additively manufactured parts. It assesses competence across process control, personnel qualifications, material management, and facility operations. Developed in alignment with published ISO/ASTM additive manufacturing standards and informed by industry stakeholders, the program supplements existing quality management systems (QMS) to address AM-specific requirements—establishing a standardized quality benchmark across the additive manufacturing supply chain.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: ASTM国际
description_zh: ASTM 增材制造卓越中心提供业内最全面的 增材制造培训体系，涵盖基础到高级专题课程，由来自产业界、学术界及政府的世界级专家授课。凭借 ASTM 在标准领域的权威领导地位，我们的课程项目为学员提供在实际增材制造应用中所需的实用技能。ASTM 证书课程符合 ASTM E2659 18 标准要求实践。所有 ASTM 培训计划可根据学员偏好在客户现场或在线提供。所有学员在完成培训后将获得 ASTM 证书。
description_en: Offered by the ASTM Center of Excellence for Additive Manufacturing, these courses constitute the industry’s most comprehensive AM training curriculum—from foundational to advanced topics—delivered by world-class experts from industry, academia, and government. Leveraging ASTM’s authoritative leadership in standards development, the program equips participants with practical, application-ready skills. All courses comply with ASTM E2659–18 standard requirements for practice. Training is available either on-site at client facilities or online, and all participants receive an official ASTM certificate upon successful completion.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: ASTM国际
description_zh: 《沃勒斯报告》是全球广受认可的年度出版物，提供AM行业的趋势、发展和预测的深入分析。它被政策制定者、研究人员、企业和政府视为可信赖的行业基准，用于应对不断演变的 AM 格局。《沃勒斯报告》涵盖产业、学术界、政府和初创企业等领域。这些专家的集体洞察力确保报告紧贴现实挑战与机遇，深入探讨新兴技术、投资趋势与供应链发展，具有高度实用性与全球视野。
description_en: The Wohlers Report is a globally recognized annual publication delivering in-depth analysis of trends, developments, and forecasts in the additive manufacturing (AM) industry. Trusted by policymakers, researchers, enterprises, and government agencies as an authoritative industry benchmark, it addresses the evolving AM landscape across industrial, academic, governmental, and startup sectors. Drawing on collective insights from global experts, the report provides actionable intelligence on emerging technologies, investment patterns, and supply chain evolution—with both pragmatic relevance and a truly global perspective.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 上海量维信息科技有限公司
description_zh: MVT-增材制造工艺仿真技术，主要用于聚合物增材制造工艺仿真及性能预测，结合材料建模和打印过程形成的缺陷进行多尺度渐进式失效分析，模拟打印零件全生命周期损伤演化，可准确预测打印零件的孔隙分布、温度分布、残余应力、裂纹扩展等情况，能够为增材制造工艺改进和零件结构优化提供技术支持。
description_en: MVT-Additive Manufacturing Process Simulation is a specialized software solution for polymer AM process simulation and performance prediction. Integrating advanced material modeling with defect formation mechanisms during printing, it enables multi-scale, progressive failure analysis to simulate full-lifecycle damage evolution in printed parts. The platform accurately predicts pore distribution, thermal profiles, residual stress fields, and crack propagation—providing critical technical support for AM process optimization and structural design improvement.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: MVT-DPAI 通用型自主人工智能数据分析平台
product_name_en: MVT-DPAI General-Purpose Autonomous AI Data Analytics Platform
company_name: 上海量维信息科技有限公司
description_zh: 上海量维自研的 DPAI平台，作为通用仿真流程与数据管理（SPDM）基础设施，深度融合 3D 打印工艺特性，致力于解决高端制造业研发中的计算耗时、设计空间探索难、异构数据孤岛等核心痛点。通过 AI 驱动的仿真迭代，我们可为 3D 打印的复杂结构设计提供精准的性能预测与拓扑优化，大幅减少打印试错成本；同时，平台可打通从仿真到 3D 打印的全流程数据链路，实现「设计 - 仿真 - 制造」的协同联动，推动工业软件国产化与智能化发展，助力企业充分释放 3D 打印的制造自由度。
description_en: Developed in-house by Shanghai Liangwei Information Technology Co., Ltd., the DPAI platform serves as a general-purpose Simulation Process and Data Management (SPDM) infrastructure, deeply integrated with 3D printing process characteristics. It addresses core challenges in high-end manufacturing R&D—including excessive computational time, difficulty in exploring large design spaces, and heterogeneous data silos—through AI-driven simulation iteration. DPAI delivers precise performance prediction and topology optimization for complex 3D-printed structures, significantly reducing trial-and-error costs. It unifies the end-to-end data chain from simulation to printing, enabling seamless ‘design–simulation–manufacturing’ collaboration—advancing domestic industrial software intelligence and empowering enterprises to fully harness the design freedom of additive manufacturing.
categories_zh: 汽���、交通运输与移动出行
categories_en: 汽���、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: nTop - 面向增材制造的先进设计仿真优化平台
product_name_en: nTop – Advanced Design, Simulation & Optimization Platform for Additive Manufacturing
company_name: 上海量维信息科技有限公司
description_zh: nTop是一款基于隐式建模技术的增材制造设计仿真优化平台，平台预置了大量增材制造常用的设计工具包，工程师可以通过调用若干个预置工具包、或自主开发定制的工具包，建立一个可复用的工作流，实现复杂几何结构的参数化设计。nTop集合了强大几何建模和仿真分析功能，并借助响应迅速且可靠的隐式几何工具集，能够实时迭代模型。此外nTop充分考虑增材制造的工艺特点，能够帮助工程师快速掌握面向增材制造的设计方法，充分发挥增材制造带来的广阔自由度，同时可重复使用的工作流使得设计流程自动化，大大提高设计效率。
description_en: nTop is an AM-focused design, simulation, and optimization platform built on implicit modeling technology. It includes extensive pre-built AM design toolkits; engineers can assemble reusable workflows by combining these toolkits—or custom-developing new ones—to achieve parametric design of complex geometries. nTop integrates powerful geometric modeling and simulation capabilities with a responsive, robust implicit geometry toolkit that enables real-time model iteration. Fully optimized for AM process constraints, nTop accelerates adoption of Design for Additive Manufacturing (DfAM) methodologies—unlocking maximum design freedom while automating repetitive tasks through reusable workflows to dramatically improve design efficiency.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 陕西鼎益科技有限公司
description_zh: 钛棒是钛及钛合金的圆柱形坯料，在增材制造与工业领域扮演着基础原料的核心角色。 在增材制造中，高品质钛棒是制备球形金属粉末的主要原材料，其纯净度与一致性直接决定了3D打印（如SLM、EBM）制件的性能。在传统工业领域，钛棒可通过锻造、车削等工艺直接加工成航空航天紧固件、船舶耐压部件、化工设备轴杆等高强度耐腐蚀关键结构件。 作为产业链上游产品，钛棒是实现高性能钛部件制造不可或缺的母材。
description_en: Titanium rods are cylindrical billets of titanium and titanium alloys, serving as fundamental raw materials in both additive manufacturing and conventional industrial applications. In AM, high-purity titanium rods are the primary feedstock for producing spherical metal powders; their chemical purity and microstructural homogeneity directly determine the mechanical performance and consistency of final SLM- or EBM-printed components. In traditional manufacturing, titanium rods are processed via forging, turning, and other methods into mission-critical structural components—including aerospace fasteners, marine pressure-resistant parts, and corrosion-resistant shafts for chemical processing equipment. As an upstream material, titanium rod is an indispensable master alloy for high-performance titanium component fabrication.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 陕西鼎益科技有限公司
description_zh: 钛丝是增材制造领域的关键材料，尤其以TC4（Ti-6Al-4V）合金丝材最为常用。它凭借优异的强度重量比、卓越的耐腐蚀性和良好的生物相容性，成为航空航天复杂构件、高性能汽车零件及骨科植入物等终端产品直接制造的主流选择。在工业领域，钛丝也广泛用于钨极惰性气体保护焊（TIG）、等离子弧增材（WAAM）等工艺，进行部件修复与表面强化。其应用显著推动了高端制造向轻量化、功能一体化方向发展。
description_en: Titanium wire is a critical AM feedstock, with TC4 (Ti-6Al-4V) alloy wire being the most widely adopted grade. Its exceptional strength-to-weight ratio, outstanding corrosion resistance, and excellent biocompatibility make it the preferred material for direct manufacturing of aerospace structural components, high-performance automotive parts, and orthopedic implants. In industrial applications, titanium wire is extensively used in tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding and wire arc additive manufacturing (WAAM) for part repair and surface hardening. Its deployment significantly advances high-end manufacturing toward lightweighting and functional integration.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

description_zh: CZL-600D系列是一款600W单路恒压输出的工业控制电源，电压输入范围90~132VAC/176~264VAC(可转换），输出电压有12V、24V、36V、48V等，可适用于工业控制系统、机械与电气设备、电子仪器仪表、工业自动化、家用电器等多种工业领域。本系列产品为超薄型设计，高度仅为30mm，产品具有超高的效率，紧凑的外壳设计，良好的散热，保障了本系列产品可长期稳定的工作
description_en: The CZL-600D series is a 600 W single-output constant-voltage industrial control power supply. It supports universal AC input voltage ranges (90–132 VAC / 176–264 VAC, switchable), with selectable DC output voltages including 12 V, 24 V, 36 V, and 48 V. Designed for broad applicability, it serves industrial control systems, mechanical and electrical equipment, electronic instrumentation, industrial automation, and home appliances. Featuring an ultra-slim profile (only 30 mm in height), high efficiency, compact housing, and superior thermal management, the series ensures long-term stable operation under demanding conditions.

product_name_zh: 独立双喷嘴3D打印机 UPS-250
company_name: 深圳升华三维科技有限公司
description_zh: 采用独立双喷嘴设计，可以同时打印或者各自轮流打印金属/陶瓷材料，实现复杂结构和产品的成形。具有操作简单、工业型、高精度、高质量、高性价比等优点。适用于科研教育、工业制造、航天航空、军事国防、生物医疗、汽车、模具制造、新能源等行业。
description_en: Featuring an independent dual-nozzle design, this printer enables simultaneous or alternating printing of metal and ceramic materials, facilitating the fabrication of complex geometries and functional parts. It offers user-friendly operation, industrial-grade robustness, high precision, superior print quality, and excellent cost-performance ratio. Ideal for research & education, industrial manufacturing, aerospace, defense, biomedical engineering, automotive, mold making, and new energy sectors.

description_en: Sample components fabricated in zirconia (ZrO₂), alumina (Al₂O₃), silicon carbide (SiC), and other advanced ceramics.

company_name: 深圳升华三维科技有限公司
description_zh: 颗粒打印材料涵盖钨及钨合金、硬质合金、纯铜、难熔金属等特种金属，以及碳化硅、氮化硅、氧化锆、氧化铝等先进陶瓷；同时提供不锈钢金属线材，满足多样化工业需求。
description_en: Powder feedstock portfolio includes refractory metals and alloys—such as tungsten and tungsten alloys, cemented carbides, pure copper—as well as advanced ceramics including silicon carbide (SiC), silicon nitride (Si₃N₄), zirconia (ZrO₂), and alumina (Al₂O₃). Also available are stainless steel metal wires, engineered to meet diverse industrial application requirements.
categories_zh: 陶瓷3D打印材料（氧化铝、氧化锆、陶瓷复合材料等）

company_name: 金发科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 金发科技碳纤尼龙3D打印耗材通过添加短切碳纤维进行增强改性，具备接近工程塑料的优异力学性能。材料刚性高、抗变形能力强，其强度和模量显著提升，适用于齿轮、无人机支架、工业部件等对结构强度要求严苛的领域。本产品通过改性技术有效克服了普通尼龙易收缩、易翘曲的缺点，具备出色的尺寸稳定性，确保打印精度与零件一致性。在打印过程中，耗材挤出稳定、层间结合牢固，成品表面细腻、结构扎实，是高强度、高稳定性3D打印应用的理想工程材料选择。
description_en: Kingfa’s carbon-fiber-reinforced nylon 3D printing material is enhanced with short carbon fibers to deliver mechanical performance approaching that of engineering thermoplastics. It exhibits high stiffness, exceptional resistance to deformation, and significantly improved tensile strength and modulus—ideal for demanding structural applications such as gears, UAV frames, and industrial components. Through proprietary modification, it overcomes common PLA/nylon drawbacks including shrinkage and warping, ensuring outstanding dimensional stability, high print accuracy, and part consistency. The material extrudes smoothly, achieves strong interlayer bonding, and yields finished parts with fine surface finish and robust structural integrity—making it a premier engineering-grade material for high-strength, high-stability additive manufacturing.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 金发科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 金发科技高速PLA是专为提升3D打印效率而开发的高性能改性材料。该产品支持高达500mm/s的极速打印，在确保快速成型的同时，具备卓越的层间粘结强度与尺寸稳定性，有效避免高速打印常见的分层、变形与精度下降问题。材料挤出流畅、回抽响应灵敏，配合低收缩特性，可实现复杂结构的高精度快速制造。在力学性能方面，其抗冲击性与韧性均衡，打印成品表面光洁、结构牢固，适用于原型快速验证、小批量定制及对打印效率有较高要求的应用场景，助力用户实现高效、稳定且高品质的打印生产。
description_en: Kingfa’s High-Speed PLA is a high-performance modified filament engineered specifically to maximize 3D printing throughput. Capable of ultra-fast printing speeds up to 500 mm/s, it maintains excellent interlayer adhesion and dimensional stability—effectively eliminating delamination, distortion, and loss of accuracy commonly associated with high-speed printing. With smooth extrusion, responsive retraction, and low shrinkage, it enables high-precision, rapid fabrication of complex geometries. Its balanced impact resistance and toughness yield parts with glossy surfaces and structural reliability—ideal for rapid prototyping, small-batch customization, and applications requiring high productivity without compromising quality.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 金发科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 金发科技超韧PLA是一款专为耐用性要求严苛的3D打印应用开发的高性能改性材料。本产品在保持PLA良好打印适性的基础上，通过高分子增韧技术实现力学性能全面升级：具备优异的抗冲击与耐反复弯折能力，其缺口冲击强度超越传统ABS材料，不易脆断，持久耐用。材料兼容性强，适配市面主流打印设备，确保出料稳定、打印流畅。同时，产品具备良好的抗老化性能，长期使用仍能保持强度与韧性稳定，避免脆化。适用于需要高韧性与可靠性的多应用领域，是兼顾打印体验与长效性能的理想选择。
description_en: Kingfa’s Ultra-Tough PLA is a high-performance modified material developed for applications demanding exceptional durability. While retaining PLA’s excellent printability, it leverages advanced polymer toughening technology to deliver comprehensive mechanical upgrades: outstanding impact resistance and fatigue resistance to repeated bending, with notched Izod impact strength exceeding conventional ABS—minimizing brittleness and enhancing long-term service life. Fully compatible with mainstream desktop and industrial printers, it ensures stable extrusion and reliable print performance. Additionally, it features superior anti-aging properties, maintaining consistent strength and toughness over extended use. An ideal solution for applications requiring both ease of printing and sustained mechanical performance across diverse industries.
applications_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
applications_en: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 金发科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 金发科技通用PLA是一款专为高品质3D打印设计的高性能线材。产品采用生物基改性原料，环保可降解，充分体现可持续发展理念。其线径控制精准，确保出料均匀稳定，打印过程顺滑流畅，有效避免拉丝与堵头问题。材料具备优异的层间结合力与低收缩特性，能显著防止打印件翘边变形，保证成品尺寸精准、表面光洁平整。在力学性能方面，本产品兼顾强度与韧性，打印成品结构稳固，适用于常规模型制作、创意设计等多种应用场景，是一款可靠且环保的通用型打印耗材。
description_en: Kingfa’s General-Purpose PLA is a high-performance, eco-conscious filament designed for premium-quality 3D printing. Produced from bio-based modified raw materials, it is fully biodegradable—aligning with sustainable development principles. Precise diameter control ensures uniform, stable extrusion and seamless printing, effectively preventing stringing and nozzle clogging. Excellent interlayer adhesion and low shrinkage minimize warping and edge lifting, guaranteeing accurate dimensions and smooth, flat surfaces. Balanced strength and toughness yield structurally sound parts—suitable for general modeling, creative design, educational projects, and other broad-spectrum applications. A dependable, environmentally responsible all-rounder for everyday additive manufacturing.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

description_en: Bolimai Ceramic 3D Printing Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in precision ceramic additive manufacturing, serving industrial, medical, and cultural & creative sectors.

company_name: 武汉维码科技有限公司
description_zh: 产品型号WATMAT-480，通过压力传感技术实时检测足底压力分布情况，6000+传感器数量及300+采样率能够支持最小20kg体重者测试，适用于足底分区压力检测、步态分析、 压力中心分析等，为行走姿态异常、糖尿病足患者、运动康复训练提供分析报告和参考数据。
description_en: Model WATMAT-480: A real-time plantar pressure mapping system utilizing high-density pressure sensor arrays. Featuring over 6,000 sensors and a sampling rate exceeding 300 Hz, it supports accurate measurement for subjects as light as 20 kg. Applications include regional plantar pressure analysis, gait assessment, center-of-pressure tracking, clinical evaluation of gait abnormalities, diabetic foot management, and sports rehabilitation—delivering actionable analytics and quantitative data for diagnosis and therapy planning.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术

company_name: 武汉维码科技有限公司
description_zh: 产品型号isoleCAD-X，全球畅销的定制鞋垫设计软件，导入3D足部激光扫描仪扫描的足部数据文件，即刻在计算机上进行尺寸、外形、功能在内的20多项细节设计，10分钟即可熟练掌握设计操作；输出文件格式能匹配市售所有3D打印机。
description_en: Model isoleCAD-X: A globally leading software platform for custom insole design. Seamlessly imports 3D foot scan data from laser scanners and enables comprehensive parametric design—including dimensional adjustments, contour shaping, and functional feature definition—across more than 20 customizable parameters. Intuitive interface allows users to become proficient within 10 minutes. Export formats are universally compatible with all commercially available 3D printers.

company_name: 武汉维码科技有限公司
description_zh: XPOD系列，型号为XPOD-HD350，通过三维激光扫描技术在数秒内完成单脚（至膝盖处）长、宽、高、围度、足弓高度、足弓指数、踇外翻角度、后跟角度等数据的采集，为定制鞋、矫形鞋垫、运动康复评估、指定足部手术后康复随访、临床科研等提供精准数据。
description_en: XPOD Series, Model XPOD-HD350: A high-resolution 3D laser scanner capturing comprehensive anatomical metrics—including length, width, height, circumference, arch height, arch index, hallux valgus angle, and rearfoot angle—in seconds for a single foot (extending proximally to the knee). Delivers metrologically precise data for custom footwear, orthotic insole fabrication, sports rehabilitation assessment, postoperative follow-up, and clinical research.

company_name: 武汉维码科技有限公司
description_zh: XSOL系列，型号为XSOL-DUO，通过三维激光扫描技术在数秒内完成双脚（足踝以下）长、宽、高、围度、足弓高度、足弓指数、踇外翻角度、后跟角度等数据的采集，为定制矫形鞋垫、运动康复评估、指定足部手术后康复随访、大规模足脊筛查提供精准数据。
description_en: XSOL Series, Model XSOL-DUO: A dual-foot 3D laser scanner acquiring full plantar metrics—including length, width, height, circumference, arch height, arch index, hallux valgus angle, and rearfoot angle—for both feet (ankle-distal) within seconds. Provides highly accurate, reproducible data for custom orthotic insole design, sports rehabilitation, postoperative recovery monitoring, and large-scale foot-and-spine screening programs.

description_zh: UVT万泰高品质PTFE覆膜塑烧板采用自研超高分子烧结基板，表面覆以纳米PTFE微孔膜，实现低排放和高过滤精度，适合超低排放需求和有粉尘回收需求的场合，适用于高湿、高浓度、高琢磨、粘性和微油性等场景。 核心优势包括： ·卓越的防水性能 ·极高的清灰效率 ·稳定的低运行阻力 ·更长的使用寿命 ·精准的过滤精度
description_en: UVT’s high-quality PTFE-membrane-coated sintered plate utilizes a proprietary ultra-high-molecular-weight sintered substrate laminated with a nanoscale PTFE microporous membrane. Engineered for ultra-low emissions and high filtration precision, it excels in humid, high-concentration, abrasive, sticky, and micro-oily environments—ideal for applications requiring stringent emission control and dust recovery. Key advantages include: exceptional water repellency, ultra-high dust cleaning efficiency, stable low-pressure drop during operation, extended service life, and precise particle retention down to sub-micron levels.

description_zh: 耐热性，其熔点为 285 度，能在 160 度下连续使用。 耐化学性。 耐酸：PH=1 耐碱：40%浓度的NaOH 阻燃 纤维非常细，只有0.9T
description_en: Polyphenylene sulfide (PPS) fiber with outstanding thermal stability—melting point at 285 °C and continuous service capability up to 160 °C. Exhibits excellent chemical resistance: withstands acidic conditions (pH = 1) and alkaline exposure (40% NaOH). UL94 V-0 flame-retardant certified. Ultrafine denier: 0.9 tex.

company_name: 苏州米果环保设备科技有限公司
description_zh: 可根据高效过滤材料的不同重量、阻力、过滤效率要求进行定制，最多可达到7层。 用于半导体制造、光伏制造、显示屏及光电面板制造、电子制造等除尘及气体环境治理。 过滤等级：H13-U15
description_en: Custom-engineered composite filter media tailored to specific requirements for weight, pressure drop, and filtration efficiency—configurable up to seven layers. Designed for critical cleanroom and gas-phase purification applications in semiconductor fabrication, photovoltaic manufacturing, display and optoelectronic panel production, and electronics assembly. Meets HEPA/ULPA filtration standards: H13–U15.

description_zh: 1.产品名称 瓦楞状阻燃防静电覆膜聚酯材料 2.特点一：防静电 表面阻抗值： ≤10 7Ω 3.特点��：阻燃 阻燃级别：UL94HBF 4.特点三：过滤效率高 达到H11 5.市场上无法复制 应用：米果开发的瓦楞状阻燃防静电覆膜聚酯材料应用在锂电除尘机中的滤筒过滤器，通过滤筒对粉尘进行过滤，经过反吹后粉尘被收集在灰桶里。
description_en: Corrugated antistatic, flame-retardant, PTFE-membrane-laminated polyester filter media. Key features: (1) Antistatic—surface resistivity ≤10⁷ Ω; (2) Flame-retardant—UL94 HBF rating; (3) High filtration efficiency—H11 grade; (4) Proprietary, non-replicable formulation. Deployed in lithium-ion battery dust collection systems as cylindrical filter elements: captures particulates during operation and enables efficient dust discharge into collection hoppers via pulse-jet cleaning.

product_name_zh: 环形激光同轴送丝/粉加工头
product_name_en: Annular Laser Coaxial Wire/Powder Processing Head
company_name: 苏州环聚激光科技有限公司
description_zh: CH-WPC60 加工头是由苏州环聚激光科技有限公司自主研发的一款具备多材料复合增材修复能力的激光熔化沉积加工头。该产品突破了传统单一送粉式或单一送丝式激加工头的技术局限，基于自主研发的分环形光内激光熔覆技术，实现环形激光内同轴送丝或送粉的激光熔化沉积增材修复工艺。 加工头采用高度集成的功能模块化设计，可根据应用需求灵活扩展多种功能模块，包括同轴测温模块（支持搭载测温闭环控制软件）、加工端快速循环水冷散热模块以及丝粉同步输送扩展模块。有效提升设备适应性与使用效率。在加工过程中具备更高的稳定性与可控性，可显著提升材料与能量利用率，广泛适用于高端制造、增材修复及科研应用领域。
description_en: CH-WPC60 Processing Head: A proprietary coaxial wire/powder laser deposition head developed by Suzhou Huanju Laser Technology Co., Ltd. Overcoming limitations of conventional single-mode powder- or wire-fed heads, it implements an innovative annular-beam internal laser cladding process enabling true coaxial wire or powder feeding within the laser ring. Features a highly integrated, modular architecture supporting flexible on-demand expansion—including coaxial pyrometry modules (with closed-loop temperature control software), end-effector-integrated recirculating water cooling, and synchronized wire-powder delivery modules. Enhances system adaptability, operational efficiency, process stability, and controllability—significantly improving material and energy utilization. Widely deployed in high-end manufacturing, additive repair, and advanced R&D applications.
applications_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置
applications_en: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

product_name_en: Wire-and-Powder Simultaneous Feeding Laser Processing Head
company_name: 苏州环聚激光科技有限公司
description_zh: 环形激光同轴同步送丝送粉加工头，搭载可适应变光斑熔覆丝粉同送扩展模块，切换模块配置仅需数分钟，循环水冷直达加工末端，加工过程更加稳定可控，大幅提升材料及能量利用率，支持多元材料同步输送，助力多组分材料及新型合金制备研究。
description_en: Annular laser coaxial wire-and-powder simultaneous feeding processing head equipped with a variable-spot-size cladding module for seamless wire-powder co-feeding. Module switching requires only minutes; direct end-effector recirculating water cooling ensures stable, controllable processing. Dramatically improves material and energy utilization efficiency while supporting synchronous multi-material feeding—enabling advanced research in multi-component material systems and novel alloy development.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

product_name_zh: 工业级SLA激光固化陶瓷3D打印设备MIRACLE 3D-C100
product_name_en: Industrial-Grade SLM Laser-Cured Ceramic 3D Printer MIRACLE 3D-C100
company_name: 江苏奇迹智能制造科技有限公司
description_zh: MIRACLE-C100 工业级下沉式 SLA 光固化陶瓷机，是我司匠心研发的标杆级装备，专为科研个性化探索与企业规模化生产量身打造。设备搭载全流程参数可调系统，激光功率、扫描速度等核心工艺参数均可精准调控，轻松适配氧化铝、氧化锆等多种陶瓷浆料，更支持第三方陶瓷耗材，为材料研发与工艺优化提供灵活多元的选择。整机采用模块化设计，拆装简单、维护便捷，大幅提升生产切换效率。此外，设备内置高性能工控机，兼具大打印幅面与超高成型精度，成品表面光洁度优异，运行稳定可靠，打印成功率始终保持高位，现已成为众多科研院所与生产企业的优选利器。
description_en: The MIRACLE 3D-C100 is an industrial-grade bottom-up SLA ceramic 3D printer developed as a benchmark system for both research-driven customization and high-volume production. It features a fully adjustable process parameter system—enabling precise control of laser power, scanning speed, and other critical parameters—to ensure optimal compatibility with diverse ceramic slurries including alumina and zirconia, as well as third-party ceramic materials. Its modular architecture simplifies assembly, disassembly, and maintenance, significantly improving production changeover efficiency. Integrated with a high-performance industrial PC, the system delivers a large build volume, exceptional dimensional accuracy, outstanding surface finish, robust operational stability, and consistently high print success rates—making it a preferred choice among leading research institutes and manufacturing enterprises.
categories_zh: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备

product_name_zh: 迷你型万元级SLA激光固化陶瓷3D打印设备MIRACLE 3D-C50
product_name_en: Compact Entry-Level SLM Laser-Cured Ceramic 3D Printer MIRACLE 3D-C50
company_name: 江苏奇迹智能制造科技有限公司
description_zh: MIRACLE C50陶瓷机是我司匠心研发的下沉式 SLA 光固化陶瓷机，专为满足科研个性化需求量身打造。它搭载全流程参数可调系统，激光功率、扫描速度等细节均可精准调控，能适配多种陶瓷浆料;整体采用模块化设计，拆装简单且维护便捷，配合快换式双规格标准料槽及定制化服务，50mL即可启动打印;整机小巧，重量轻至9kg;设备性能稳定可靠，打印成功率高，操作简单易上手，即使零基础用户也能快速掌握，打印成品精度高、表面质量好，成为众多科研人员和开发者的首选。
description_en: The MIRACLE 3D-C50 is a compact, entry-level bottom-up SLA ceramic 3D printer engineered specifically for research-oriented customization. It incorporates a fully tunable parameter system—allowing precise adjustment of laser power, scanning speed, and other fine parameters—for reliable compatibility with multiple ceramic slurries. Featuring a modular design for effortless installation and maintenance, it supports quick-swap dual-standard resin tanks and custom services, enabling printing with as little as 50 mL of material. Weighing only 9 kg, the unit is highly portable. With stable performance, high print success rate, intuitive operation, and zero-entry-barrier usability, it delivers high-precision parts with excellent surface quality—making it the top choice for researchers and developers.
categories_zh: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备

product_name_zh: 工业级下沉式SLA激光固化3D打印机MIRACLE 3D-SLA310
product_name_en: Industrial-Grade Bottom-Up SLA Laser 3D Printer MIRACLE 3D-SLA310
company_name: 江苏奇迹智能制造科技有限公司
description_zh: MIRACLE SLA310是我司开发的一款工业级高精度下沉式激光3D打印机，具有精度高、稳定性好、成本低、环境适应性强等优势，配备高精度工业激光发生器和精密数字振镜，采用高精度液位传感器和负压吸附涂层系统，可保证打印层均匀性和平整度，铺层厚度可精准到0.03mm;设备内置恒温恒湿装置，无需用户再单独准备恒温室;支持标准树脂、环保树脂、水洗树脂、防静电树脂、柔性树脂等种材料，可广泛应用于个人设计、工业研发，文创艺术品、教育培训等多个相关领域。
description_en: The MIRACLE 3D-SLA310 is an industrial-grade, high-precision bottom-up SLA 3D printer offering superior accuracy, exceptional stability, low total cost of ownership, and strong environmental adaptability. Equipped with a high-precision industrial laser source and a precision digital galvanometer, it integrates a high-accuracy liquid-level sensor and a vacuum-assisted coating system to ensure uniform and flat layer deposition—with layer thickness controllable down to 0.03 mm. An integrated constant-temperature and constant-humidity chamber eliminates the need for external environmental conditioning. Compatible with standard, eco-friendly, water-washable, antistatic, and flexible resins, it serves diverse applications across personal prototyping, industrial R&D, cultural & creative art production, and education & training.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 桌面级下沉式SLA激光固化3D打印机MIRACLE 3D-SLA150
product_name_en: Desktop-Grade Bottom-Up SLA Laser 3D Printer MIRACLE 3D-SLA150
company_name: 江苏奇迹智能制造科技有限公司
description_zh: MIRACLE SLA150是我司匠心研发的便携式下沉式激光固化3D打印机，凭借其卓越的高精度、出色的稳定性以及经济实惠的使用成本，在3D打印领域独树一帜。配备的高性能工业激光发生器，突破性地采用前沿尖端技术，其搭载的微米级精密光斑控制系统，能够以超高的精准度，将光斑精细调控至微米量级。真空吸附涂层系统，可保证打印层的均匀性和平整度，大幅提升打印稳定性，无论是复杂精密的模型，还是对细节要求严苛的产品，都能完美呈现。MIRACLE SLA150在新材料研发与工业制造领域堪称理想之选。
description_en: The MIRACLE 3D-SLA150 is a portable, bottom-up SLA 3D printer distinguished by its exceptional resolution, outstanding stability, and economical operating cost. Powered by a high-performance industrial laser source and featuring a breakthrough micron-level spot control system, it achieves ultra-precise laser spot modulation at the micron scale. Its vacuum-assisted coating system ensures consistent layer uniformity and flatness, greatly enhancing print stability—enabling flawless reproduction of complex, high-detail models and precision-critical components. The MIRACLE 3D-SLA150 is an ideal solution for advanced material development and industrial manufacturing applications.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

description_zh: 生产工艺：真空气雾化法 粉末优点：流动性好、高导热系数、可阳极氧化、机械强度适中、低裂纹敏感性
description_en: Manufactured via vacuum atomization, this aluminum alloy powder offers excellent flowability, high thermal conductivity, anodizability, balanced mechanical strength, and low crack sensitivity—making it well-suited for demanding additive manufacturing applications requiring thermal management and surface finishing capabilities.
