description_en: Produced via nitrogen atomization, this 316L stainless steel powder provides a more cost-effective alternative to vacuum-atomized powders while delivering superior sphericity and tighter oxygen content control compared to water-atomized counterparts—ensuring consistent printability and high-quality part performance.

company_name: 内蒙古旭阳新材料股份有限公司
description_zh: 生产工艺：真空气雾化 粉末优点：球形度高，较好流动性，产品性价比高，松装/振密度高
description_en: Manufactured via vacuum atomization, these aluminum-silicon alloy powders exhibit high sphericity, excellent flowability, high tap and vibrated density, and strong value-for-performance—ideal for high-yield, high-reliability aluminum AM applications.

product_name_zh: GT502食品级耐高温耗材专用料
company_name: 浙江播下环保科技有限公司
description_zh: 浙江播下研发出一款食品级耐高温耗材专用料-GT502，突破了普通耗材打印制品的耐高温上限，更有完整的食品接触安全认证，填补3D打印在食品级应用领域的空白。 播下的这款耗材原料符合全球多体系食品接触安全标准，可耐高温100度、抑菌率99.99%、环保可降解，可广泛用于打印家居用品、餐厨具、糕点模具等。
description_en: GT502 is a food-grade, high-temperature-resistant filament developed by Zhejiang Boshang Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. It extends the thermal resistance limit of conventional filaments and carries comprehensive food-contact safety certifications—filling a critical gap in food-grade 3D printing applications. Compliant with global multi-system food-contact regulations, GT502 withstands temperatures up to 100°C, exhibits >99.99% antibacterial efficacy, and is environmentally friendly and biodegradable. It is widely applicable for printing household goods, kitchenware, tableware, and confectionery molds.
applications_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
applications_en: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 深圳鑫博川材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 具备橡胶功能的打印耗材，专门为鞋材大底材料以及机器人皮肤以及机器手而开发。 PEBR，为每一步提供坚实抓地力。 以卓越防滑性能，即将广泛赋能鞋类大底与安全部件，守护出行与工业应用。 另外不同硬度的软橡打印软胶赋予柔和手感以及触感的首选；为脑机结合头盔、机器手、皮肤类、性用品打印等提供了更好的选择。 颜色可选：黑白灰橙红黄蓝（可定制）
description_en: PEBR is a rubber-functional filament specially engineered for shoe outsoles, robotic skins, and robotic grippers. Delivering exceptional traction and slip resistance, it is ideally suited for safety-critical footwear and industrial components. Available in multiple Shore A hardness grades, PEBR offers soft, skin-like tactile feedback—making it an optimal choice for brain–computer interface headsets, robotic hands, soft robotics, and intimate-care products. Standard colors: black, white, gray, orange, red, yellow, blue (custom colors available).
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 深圳鑫博川材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 分为PEBE-M 中弹系列， PEBE-H 高弹性系列以及对应的发泡耗材。 PEBE，为手办注入灵动活力。 告别PETG、PLA玩具硬料的生硬质感，将赋予玩具、手办、动漫打印柔韧触感与无限可能，开启手办创作的全新维度。 颜色可选：黑白灰橙红黄蓝（可定制）
description_en: PEBE comprises two series—PEBE-M (medium elasticity) and PEBE-H (high elasticity)—along with corresponding foamed variants. Designed to infuse action figures and collectibles with lifelike flexibility, PEBE replaces rigid PETG and PLA filaments, delivering soft, resilient touch and unprecedented creative freedom for figurines, anime models, and hobbyist prints—unlocking a new dimension in character modeling. Standard colors: black, white, gray, orange, red, yellow, blue (custom colors available).
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 深圳鑫博川材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 分为PEBU-M中弹系列, PEBU-H高弹性系列以及对应的发泡耗材。 兼具PEBA的强韧高弹与TPU的亲肤质感。 PEBU，让高性能3DFDM 打印，性能不打折，成本更友好。强烈推荐到品牌鞋材的使用； 颜色可选：黑白灰橙红黄蓝（可定制）
description_en: PEBU includes PEBU-M (medium elasticity) and PEBU-H (high elasticity) series, plus matching foamed variants. Combining the toughness and high elasticity of PEBA with the skin-friendly feel of TPU, PEBU enables high-performance FDM 3D printing without compromising mechanical properties—while maintaining cost efficiency. Strongly recommended for premium footwear applications. Standard colors: black, white, gray, orange, red, yellow, blue (custom colors available).
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 深圳鑫博川材料科技有限公司
description_zh: PEBA材料，全称为聚醚嵌段酰胺（Polyether Block Amide），是一种由刚性聚酰胺硬段与柔性聚醚软段通过嵌段共聚形成的热塑性弹性体（TPE）。其结构融合了尼龙的强度与聚醚的柔韧性，不仅性能均衡，还使其成为现有最轻的工程级TPE材料之一。作为一种轻质且高性能的材料，我们也期待它在3D打印领域实现更广泛的应用。 鑫博川已成功将PEBA开发为适用于FDM工艺的线材产品，并推出了包括PEBA 90A、85A、80A三个硬度。 PEBA相比于TPU具备“三大核心优势”：轻、弹、快。
description_en: PEBA (Polyether Block Amide) is a thermoplastic elastomer (TPE) formed via block copolymerization of rigid polyamide segments and flexible polyether segments. Its molecular architecture merges nylon’s strength with polyether’s resilience—resulting in a uniquely balanced, lightweight, engineering-grade TPE. As one of the lightest high-performance TPEs commercially available, PEBA holds significant promise for advanced 3D printing applications. Xinbochuan has successfully formulated PEBA into FDM-compatible filaments in three hardness grades: PEBA 90A, 85A, and 80A. Compared to TPU, PEBA offers three core advantages: lighter weight, higher elasticity, and faster print speeds.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 济宁祥润仪表有限公司
description_zh: 这款传感器在耐腐蚀性、抗挂料干扰能力、环境适应性、输出灵活性以及针对液体检测（特别是易挂料场景）的特殊功能方面表现突出，是一款适用于严苛工业环境且应用广泛的可靠解决方案
description_en: This capacitive proximity sensor excels in corrosion resistance, immunity to material buildup interference, broad environmental adaptability, flexible output options, and specialized functionality for liquid level detection—especially in challenging, high-buildup scenarios. It is a robust, versatile, and field-proven solution for demanding industrial environments.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术

company_name: 济宁祥润仪表有限公司
description_zh: 采用扩散硅芯体做为敏感元件，选用智能数字电路，整体性能稳定可靠，可进行远距离输出。安装方便，适用于气体、液体、蒸汽压力的测量与控制。
description_en: Featuring a diffusion silicon sensing element and intelligent digital circuitry, this pressure sensor delivers stable, reliable performance with long-distance signal transmission capability. Easy to install, it is suitable for accurate measurement and control of gas, liquid, and steam pressures across diverse industrial applications.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术

product_name_zh: 智能液位物位传感器-模拟量
company_name: 济宁祥润仪表有限公司
description_zh: 模拟量连续液位传感器测量原理基于电容技术，探杆采用空心铝管芯体外套PTFE或PEEK、PFA 等绝缘材料，探杆的金属内芯为一极，导电液体为另一极，随着液位的变化，探杆与液体之间电容值发生变化，传感器放大器根据电容公式的精确算法得出液体 高度与电容的关系。
description_en: This analog continuous-level sensor operates on capacitive measurement principles. Its probe consists of a hollow aluminum tube core coated with high-performance insulating materials such as PTFE, PEEK, or PFA. The metallic probe core acts as one electrode, while the conductive liquid serves as the second electrode. As liquid level changes, the capacitance between probe and liquid varies linearly; the integrated amplifier applies a precise algorithm based on the capacitance formula to accurately convert capacitance into liquid height.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术

company_name: 济宁祥润仪表有限公司
description_zh: 利用脉宽调制(PWM)技术，用户能够检测同一生产线或者加工罐内不同介质，以便分离出最终产品(例如各类调味酱油、啤酒等)。检测采用模拟时间信号，从而方便进行连续测量。另外可以根据介质的DK值(介电常数)更改时间信号。从而方便进行连续测量还可以根据介质的DK值(介电常数)更改不同输出信号。
description_en: Utilizing pulse-width modulation (PWM) technology, this sensor enables real-time differentiation of multiple media within the same production line or processing tank—facilitating precise separation of final products (e.g., soy sauce varieties, beer types). It outputs an analog time-based signal for continuous level monitoring. Signal timing can be dynamically adjusted according to the dielectric constant (DK value) of the measured medium, supporting accurate, adaptable, and continuous level measurement across heterogeneous liquids.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术

description_zh: 这种耗材由聚乳酸（PLA）、硬质树脂和色粉组成，具有较好的材料韧性。由于该PLA耗材含有其他复合成分，它与标准PLA一起打印时不兼容，无法直接粘接。因此，不建议进行混合材料打印。该耗材具有较好的抗老化性，并且可使用标准PLA打印参数直接进行打印。
description_en: This composite PLA filament consists of polylactic acid (PLA), rigid resin additives, and colorants, offering enhanced toughness and improved aging resistance. Due to its non-PLA constituents, it is incompatible with standard PLA—exhibiting no inter-material adhesion during co-printing. Therefore, mixed-material printing is not recommended. It can be printed using standard PLA parameters without modification.

Ideal for design applications emphasizing atmosphere and nuanced surface beauty.

product_name_zh: 定制增材制造用镁合金粉末
product_name_en: Custom Magnesium Alloy Powder for Additive Manufacturing
company_name: 唐山威豪镁粉有限公司
description_zh: 我们提供面向增材制造应用的定制化镁及镁合金粉末解决方案，基于自主雾化技术生产高纯度球形镁合金粉，专为 SLM/M-PBF、SLS 及相关金属增材制造工艺设计。粉末具有球形度高、粒度分布可控、流动性优异、氧含量低及批次一致性高等特点，可有效提升铺粉稳定性与成形致密度。 针对不同应用场景与设备条件，我们可根据需求定制合金体系与粉末规格，包括 Mg-Al、Mg-Zn、Mg-RE 等多种镁合金成分，并在粒径区间、表观密度及化学成分控制方面进行针对性优化，以匹配不同激光功率、扫描策略及成形环境要求。
description_en: A tailored magnesium and magnesium alloy powder solution for additive manufacturing, produced via proprietary gas atomization to yield high-purity, spherical powders optimized for SLM/M-PBF, SLS, and related metal AM processes. Features include exceptional sphericity, tightly controlled particle size distribution, superior flowability, low oxygen content, and outstanding batch-to-batch consistency—ensuring stable powder spreading and high-density part formation. Alloy systems (e.g., Mg-Al, Mg-Zn, Mg-RE) and powder specifications—including particle size ranges, apparent density, and chemical composition—are fully customizable to match specific laser power, scanning strategies, and build environment requirements.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 唐山威豪镁粉有限公司
description_zh: 我们专门为镁合金3D打印研发设计的打印机，采用SLM（选择性激光熔化）技术，针对镁合金活泼、易氧化特性进行安全与工艺优化设计。采用密闭惰性气体环境、高稳定激光系统及精确粉末铺设机构，实现高致密度、稳定成形与复杂结构制造。适用于轻量化结构件、功能样件及科研与工业级应用，兼顾安全性、工艺可靠性与材料适配性。
description_en: A purpose-built SLM (Selective Laser Melting) printer engineered specifically for reactive magnesium alloys. Incorporates a sealed inert-gas chamber, high-stability laser system, and precision powder delivery mechanism to ensure safe, reliable processing—enabling high-density, geometrically complex part fabrication with excellent process repeatability and material compatibility. Suitable for lightweight structural components, functional prototypes, and research/industrial applications.

company_name: 唐山威豪镁粉有限公司
description_zh: 唐山威豪镁粉生产的雾化球形镁合金粉具有纯度高、氧含量低、球形率高、流动性好等特点。 我们可以提供AZ91、ZK61、ZK60、AZ31、WE43、VW63K、GZ151K、AE44、GWZ630K等牌号镁合金粉末，粒度范围包括15-53μm、20-63μm、53-105μm、53-150μm等。也可根据客户需求加工定制各种型号镁合金粉体产品。 雾化球形镁合金粉适用于增材制造工艺及粉末冶金工艺，现广泛应用于航空航天、3C、汽车、无人机、智能机器人、电子封装、含镁可降解骨修复材料等领域，在国内外市场得到了广泛认可和应用。
description_en: High-purity, low-oxygen, highly spherical magnesium alloy powders manufactured by Tangshan Weihao Magnesium Powder Co., Ltd. Available in standard grades including AZ91, ZK61, ZK60, AZ31, WE43, VW63K, GZ151K, AE44, and GWZ630K, with particle size distributions such as 15–53 μm, 20–63 μm, 53–105 μm, and 53–150 μm. Custom formulations are available upon request. Widely deployed in additive manufacturing and powder metallurgy across aerospace, 3C electronics, automotive, UAVs, intelligent robotics, electronic packaging, and magnesium-based biodegradable bone repair materials—globally recognized for reliability and performance.

company_name: 杭州乐信新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: IMPEKK产品是一款专为医疗植入而设计的聚醚酮酮材料，具有多种应用优势。其独特设计使其适用于传统的注塑和挤出工艺，同时也可用于医疗器械的3D打印制造。IMPEKK材料融合了优异的生物相容性、卓越的力学性能和耐化学性，为医疗行业提供了高品质的解决方案。在传统制造过程中，IMPEKK可通过注塑和挤出工艺制造各种医疗植入物和器械，确保产品具有稳定的质量和性能。同时，其适用于医疗器械的3D打印特性使得定制化生产变得简单高效，为医疗领域带来更多创新可能。IMPEKK产品不仅保证了制品的可靠性和耐用性，还提供了高度个性化的解决方案，满足医疗行业对于精密、高质量产品的需求。
description_en: IMPEKK is a medical-grade polyetherketoneketone (PEKK) polymer engineered specifically for implantable devices. It offers exceptional biocompatibility, outstanding mechanical strength, and superior chemical resistance—enabling both conventional processing (injection molding, extrusion) and advanced 3D printing of customized medical implants and instruments. IMPEKK supports high-precision, patient-specific manufacturing while ensuring consistent quality, long-term durability, and regulatory compliance—making it ideal for demanding clinical applications requiring reliability, sterility, and functional performance.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 深圳市翔通光电技术有限公司
description_zh: 本产品镍纯度高达99.95%以上，产品气体与杂质含量极低，有效保障了产品卓越性能。精准控制粒径分布，可提供0-10μm、0-30μm、0-70μm、0-100μm等多种不同粒径规格，满足不同场景定制化需求。产品依托工艺优势，颗粒球形度高、流动性佳、堆积密度均匀，兼具优异的导电性、导热性与抗腐蚀、抗氧化能力，烧结活性强，成分均匀无偏析。广泛适配增材制造（3D打印）、粉末冶金、激光熔覆、热喷涂、电子导电浆料、催化剂等领域，可用于航空航天、汽车制造、电子元件、医疗器械等高端工业场景。产品生产工艺成熟稳定，批次品质一致性高，能为客户提供高效可靠的核心材料解决方案，助力终端产品实现性能升级与品质提升。
description_en: Ultra-high-purity nickel powder (≥99.95% Ni) with extremely low interstitial gas and impurity content. Engineered for superior performance in additive manufacturing (3D printing), powder metallurgy, laser cladding, thermal spraying, conductive pastes, and catalysts. Available in multiple particle size distributions—including 0–10 μm, 0–30 μm, 0–70 μm, and 0–100 μm—with high sphericity, excellent flowability, uniform tap density, strong sintering activity, homogeneous composition, and outstanding electrical/thermal conductivity plus corrosion/oxidation resistance. Widely used in aerospace, automotive, electronics, and medical device manufacturing. Delivers consistent, high-reliability performance across industrial batches.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 深圳市翔通光电技术有限公司
description_zh: 铜锡镍合金粉以铜为主成分，搭配适量锡、镍元素 ，经科学配比。产品呈球形或类球形。常规粒径有 15 - 53微米、50- 150微米等，可定制特殊粒径。粉末颗粒均匀，分散性好，物理性能稳定，成型效果佳。制成的实体产品，如机械齿轮、电子连接件等，具备良好的强度和硬度，耐磨性出众，同时拥有一定的导电性和耐腐蚀性，能适应多种复杂工作环境。广泛应用于机械制造行业，生产齿轮、轴承等耐磨零件；电子行业制作连接器、触点；五金制品领域，提升产品质量和耐用性 。
description_en: A spherical or near-spherical copper-based alloy powder with scientifically balanced additions of tin and nickel. Standard particle sizes include 15–53 μm and 50–150 μm, with custom sizing available. Exhibits uniform particle morphology, excellent dispersibility, stable physical properties, and high green strength. Components fabricated from this powder—including gears and electronic connectors—demonstrate superior hardness, wear resistance, moderate electrical conductivity, and corrosion resistance—making it well-suited for demanding mechanical, electronic, and hardware applications.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 深圳市翔通光电技术有限公司
description_zh: 我们的纯铜金属粉，铜纯度高达 99.95% 以上，几乎不含杂质 。粉末呈现为球形或类球形。粒径规格丰富，包括 0 - 30 微米、15 - 53 微米、50-100微米、50-150微米等，支持定制。粉末具有极佳的导电性和导热性，流动性出色，易于成型。制成实体后，如电子元器件中的导电部件，导电性能优异，散热速度快，且具备良好的延展性和可塑性，方便加工成各种复杂形状。主要应用于电子信息产业，如电路板的导电浆料、电子元件的电极；新能源领域的锂电池正极材料涂层；散热器件制造，如电脑 CPU 散热器、LED 灯具散热片等 。
description_en: High-purity copper powder (≥99.95% Cu) with minimal impurities, exhibiting spherical or near-spherical morphology. Available in multiple particle size ranges—including 0–30 μm, 15–53 μm, 50–100 μm, and 50–150 μm—with customization options. Offers exceptional electrical and thermal conductivity, outstanding flowability, and excellent formability. Ideal for fabricating high-performance conductive components such as electrodes, printed circuit board pastes, lithium-ion battery cathode coatings, and heat dissipation elements (e.g., CPU coolers, LED heat sinks).
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 深圳市翔通光电技术有限公司
description_zh: 我们的钴铬钼钨合金粉，以钴为基底，精准配比铬（26 - 30%）、钼（5 - 7%）、钨（4 - 6%）等元素，还含有少量碳、锰、硅、铁、镍等杂质元素 ，产品成球形或类球形。粒径规格有 15 - 45 微米、15-53微米等，也可定制。粉末流动性佳，松装密度较高，分散性良好，便于后续加工。由其制成的实体产品，如 3D 打印的零部件，具有超高的强度，金瓷结合强度大于25MPa，拥有出色的耐磨性、生物相容性，产品符合IS022674国际标准。在高温环境下性能稳定，广泛应用于医疗领域，如人工关节、金属义齿等。
description_en: A spherical or near-spherical cobalt-based alloy powder precisely formulated with 26–30% Cr, 5–7% Mo, 4–6% W, and trace levels of C, Mn, Si, Fe, and Ni. Standard particle sizes include 15–45 μm and 15–53 μm, with custom sizing available. Features excellent flowability, high apparent density, and uniform dispersion. Parts produced via 3D printing exhibit ultra-high strength, ceramic-metal bond strength >25 MPa, exceptional wear resistance, proven biocompatibility, and compliance with ISO 22674. Widely applied in medical devices, including orthopedic joint replacements and metallic dental prostheses.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

product_name_zh: 五轴金属增减材复合加工中心
product_name_en: Five-Axis Hybrid Additive and Subtractive Manufacturing Center
company_name: 广州智科自动化技术有限公司
description_zh: HM-M5H-100S 基于“模块化 + 高集成”理念，集成了DED增材与五轴减材功能。在同一精密平台下，它能实现粉末熔覆沉积和即刻的切削精加工，完成“打印-转序-加工”的全闭环流程。该设备可消除多次装夹误差，专为院校及科研机构在新材料工艺研发、复杂构件原型制造等领域的快速验证与创新提供高度一致、可复现的实验条件。
description_en: The HM-M5H-100S integrates Directed Energy Deposition (DED) additive manufacturing and five-axis CNC machining within a single modular, high-integration platform. It enables seamless, closed-loop workflows—depositing metal powder layers followed immediately by precision milling—to eliminate cumulative fixturing errors. Designed for universities and R&D institutions, it provides highly repeatable, experimentally consistent conditions for rapid prototyping, novel material process development, and complex component validation.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 三轴辊刀金属增材加工中心AM-M3R-830C
product_name_en: Three-Axis Roller-Die Metal Additive Manufacturing Center AM-M3R-830C
company_name: 广州智科自动化技术有限公司
description_zh: AM-M3R-830C是一款集成激光熔覆（DED）技术的专业辊刀加工中心，集高精度制造与高性能再制造于一体。它能从零加工全新工件，更能对磨损旧件进行修复。通过在同一系统中熔覆致密合金层，该设备可同步实现零件结构成形、表面强化与寿命重构，为用户提供降本增效、可持续的核心装备解决方案。
description_en: The AM-M3R-830C is a specialized roller-die machining center integrating high-precision laser cladding (DED) for both near-net-shape fabrication and high-fidelity remanufacturing. Capable of building new parts from scratch or restoring worn components, it simultaneously achieves dimensional accuracy, surface hardening, and functional life extension—delivering a sustainable, cost-effective, and high-performance manufacturing solution for critical industrial applications.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 北京皓盛科技发展有限公司

description_en: HERON AM is Caracol’s robotic large-format additive manufacturing platform—a modular, polymer and composite pellet-extrusion robotic 3D printer designed for large-scale industrial applications.

description_en: Breaking through the limitations of conventional machining, these components deliver an optimal balance of lightweight design, structural strength, and dimensional accuracy—enabling advanced equipment and precision instrumentation manufacturing. • Customizable Parameters: Dimensions, geometry, topology, and tolerance等级 are tailored to meet high-end assembly standards. • Customized Post-Processing: Surface finishes—including matte, sandblasting, and high-precision polishing—ensure both functional performance and premium aesthetics. • Scalable Production: Supports both low-volume prototyping and high-volume production with consistent quality and reliable lead times.

product_name_zh: 3D打印医疗器件骨板医疗连接器假牙齿
product_name_en: Medical Devices: Bone Plates, Medical Connectors, Dental Prostheses (3D Printed)
company_name: 开禾科技（宁波）有限公司
description_zh: 以高精度3D打印技术与医用级钛合金为核心，研发生产骨板、医疗连接器、机器人扫描杆、假牙等医疗器械，兼顾生物相容性与临床实用性。 - 生物安全：无致敏、无毒性，与人体组织亲和性佳，可长期植入。 - 强韧耐用：力学性能匹配人体组织，抗腐蚀、不易变形，使用寿命长。 - 定制服务：支持按临床需求、患者个体情况，定制器件尺寸、形态与结构。
description_en: Medical-grade titanium alloy-based 3D printed devices—including bone plates, medical connectors, robotic scanning bars, and dental prostheses—engineered for superior biocompatibility and clinical utility. • Biocompatibility & Safety: Non-allergenic, non-toxic, and highly tissue-compatible for long-term implantation. • Mechanical Robustness: Mechanical properties matched to human tissues; corrosion-resistant and dimensionally stable for extended service life. • Patient-Specific Customization: Geometry, dimensions, and internal structures are tailored to individual anatomical data and clinical requirements.

company_name: 开禾科技（宁波）有限公司
description_zh: 钛合金粉末凭借优异的粉体特性与稳定性能，广泛应用于精密制造、医疗、3C 等多个高端领域，为各类高性能金属制品提供可靠的原料支撑。 - 参数定制：可调整粉体粒度、球形度、氧含量等指标，适配特定打印工艺与产品要求。 - 批量定制：承接小批量试样与大批量订单，提供完善的质量检测报告，交付可控。
description_en: High-performance titanium alloy powder—exhibiting excellent flowability, sphericity, and consistency—is widely deployed across precision manufacturing, medical devices, and consumer electronics (3C) sectors, serving as a reliable raw material for high-end metal components. • Parameter Customization: Particle size distribution, sphericity, oxygen content, and other specifications are adjustable to match specific AM processes and application requirements. • Scalable Supply: Supports both small-batch qualification trials and mass production orders, backed by comprehensive QC reports and predictable delivery schedules.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

product_name_zh: 3D打印智能穿戴钛合金表壳表带戒指
product_name_en: Smart Wearables: Titanium Alloy Watch Cases, Watch Bands & Rings (3D Printed)
company_name: 开禾科技（宁波）有限公司
description_zh: 以先进3D打印技术与钛合金研发能力，打造智能穿戴钛合金表壳、表带及戒指，融合科技质感与人体工学。 - 可实现复杂纹路、镂空一体成型。 - 材料利用率超95%，环保且成本可控。 - 支持多类表面处理，抛光，喷砂阳极氧化等，质感高级多样。 - 尺寸定制：适配多种设备与人体。 - 外观定制：个性化设计纹路、LOGO，打造专属标识。 - 批量定制：承接试样与量产，品质稳、交期可控。
description_en: Advanced titanium alloy smart wearables—including watch cases, watch bands, and rings—leveraging precision 3D printing and ergonomic design for seamless integration of technological sophistication and human-centered comfort. • Complex Geometries: Enables monolithic fabrication of intricate textures, lattices, and镂空 structures. • Material Efficiency: >95% material utilization ensures environmental sustainability and cost control. • Surface Versatility: Offers multiple finishing options—including polishing, sandblasting, and anodizing—for diverse premium tactile and visual effects. • Dimensional Customization: Optimized for compatibility with various wearable platforms and anthropometric profiles. • Aesthetic Personalization: Supports custom textures, logos, and branding elements for unique product identity. • Scalable Production: Accommodates both prototype validation and volume manufacturing with consistent quality and on-time delivery.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 深圳市鹏扬三维科技有限公司
description_zh: PL2000 Plus蜡模打印机适用于珠宝批量生产，专注于珠宝领域，是高效率、高精度成型的蜡模打印机。 PL2000 Plus蜡模打印机采用多喷孔技术（MJP）， 可打印超精细蜡型工件， 打印界面大，每层厚度仅16µm。 打印工件表面质量卓越， 极精细的细节和精准度，能够实现快速工作流和大批量定制直接熔蜡铸造，提高铸造生产效率。
description_en: The PL2000 Plus investment pattern printer is a high-efficiency, high-precision wax model printer engineered specifically for jewelry mass production. Utilizing Multi-Jet Printing (MJP) technology, it delivers ultra-fine-detail wax patterns with a large build area and a minimum layer thickness of 16 µm. Exceptional surface finish, extreme detail fidelity, and dimensional accuracy enable rapid workflows and direct investment casting of customized wax patterns at scale—significantly enhancing foundry productivity.

company_name: 深圳市鹏扬三维科技有限公司
description_zh: 打印幅面更大，批量打印速度更快，是高效率、高精度成型的蜡模3D打印机，可满足珠宝大批量生产。PL3000 聚焦超精细的蜡模工件，单层厚度可达8um/16um。蜡模表面质量平滑、细节展现精细、 精准度高， 可实现快速工作流和大批量定制。 3D打印模型通过失蜡铸造， 大幅度提高铸造生产效率，极大缩短新品上市周期。
description_en: The PL3000 is a high-efficiency, high-precision wax model 3D printer featuring an expanded build volume and accelerated batch-printing speeds—optimized for high-volume jewelry manufacturing. It produces ultra-fine-resolution wax patterns with selectable layer thicknesses of 8 µm or 16 µm. Its smooth surface finish, exceptional detail resolution, and high geometric accuracy support streamlined workflows and scalable customization. Direct investment casting of 3D-printed patterns dramatically improves foundry throughput and shortens time-to-market for new designs.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

description_en: Comprehensive heat treatment development and specimen machining services for aluminum alloys, titanium alloys, stainless steels, and high-temperature alloys—including heat treatment process optimization, phase transformation temperature determination, standard and non-standard specimen preparation, and low-stress grinding.

description_en: Qualitative and quantitative chemical composition analysis of metallic materials—including aluminum alloys, titanium alloys, stainless steels, and high-temperature alloys—performed in accordance with international standards.

description_zh: TEJUFUSE PLA 采用进口原料制成，是一种适用于多种 FDM 3D 打印应用的通用型线材。通过对熔融指数与流动温度的优化平衡，材料在熔融状态下流动性良好，出丝顺畅，不易堵头，质量稳定；同时具备较快的冷却速率，有助于在高速打印过程中维持尺寸稳定性，减少大尺寸或复杂结构模型的翘曲与变形，成型后具有较高韧性。适用于教育、原型验证、文创手办及日常功能件等场景，易于打印，对新手友好。
description_en: TEJUFUSE PLA is a general-purpose FDM 3D printing filament manufactured from premium imported raw materials. Optimized melt flow index and crystallization kinetics ensure excellent melt fluidity, smooth extrusion, minimal nozzle clogging, and consistent print quality. Its rapid solidification rate enhances dimensional stability during high-speed printing—reducing warpage and distortion in large or complex parts—while delivering high post-print toughness. Ideal for education, functional prototyping, creative modeling, and everyday use; user-friendly and beginner-optimized.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 福州特聚新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: TEJUFUSE PPA-CF是专为FDM 3D���印工艺特别研发的丝材，以半结晶芳香族聚酰胺（PPA）为基体，复合10%短切碳纤维的工程复合材料。拉伸强度≥65MPa、弯曲强度≥110MPa、热变形温度≥75℃，密度1.11±0.02g/cm³，具备抗蠕变、抗疲劳、低吸湿、耐化学腐蚀及轻量化特性。适用于快速原型、工装夹具、小批量生产等场景。可以支持直接打印复杂结构替代部分金属部件，有助于缩短研发与制造周期。
description_en: TEJUFUSE PPA-CF is an engineering-grade FDM filament based on semi-crystalline aromatic polyphthalamide (PPA), reinforced with 10% chopped carbon fiber. It delivers ≥65 MPa tensile strength, ≥110 MPa flexural strength, ≥75 °C heat deflection temperature (HDT), and a density of 1.11 ± 0.02 g/cm³. Key attributes include creep resistance, fatigue resistance, low moisture absorption, chemical corrosion resistance, and lightweight performance. Suited for rapid prototyping, jigs & fixtures, and low-volume production—enabling direct replacement of select metal components and accelerating R&D and manufacturing cycles.

company_name: 普雷茨特激光技术（上海）有限公司
description_zh: 激光焊接监控器 LWM 用于全天候在线监控工业生产过程。在批量生产中，它可以记录和存档所有相关激光焊接工艺的激光焊缝的质量和生产率相关工艺数据。 传感器的高动态范围可监控从高性能焊接应用到微型焊接应用的整个过程。 激光焊接监控器 LWM 集全面质量控制、灵活性和精确性于一身，是现代激光焊接生产中实现最高质量和效率不可或缺的工具。
description_en: The Laser Welding Monitor (LWM) provides continuous, real-time in-process monitoring for industrial laser welding operations. During high-volume production, it records and archives weld quality metrics and productivity-related process parameters for every laser seam. Its high-dynamic-range sensor accommodates applications spanning high-power welding to micro-welding. Combining comprehensive quality assurance, operational flexibility, and micron-level precision, the LWM is an indispensable tool for achieving maximum quality and efficiency in modern laser welding systems.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术

description_en: The CoaxPrinter enables broad application in additive manufacturing—from fine wire lattice structures to complex, large-volume 3D geometries. It supports 3D printing, rapid prototyping, and wear-resistant cladding. Fully dense, pore-free layers can be deposited in any orientation.

company_name: 上海硕豪传感器有限公司
description_zh: 压力变送器是一种将压力转换成气动信号或电动信号进行控制和远传的设备。压力变送器主要由压电半导体所构成电桥压力感应器组成,压力施加在隔膜经硅油再传到半导体上，使电桥两端产生不平衡电压在经放大器放大后转变成4~20mA电流信号。可测量从微压到高压的广泛范围：支持模拟型号和数字型号(如HART、Modbus等)兼容多种控制系统；内置温度补偿机制,减少环境温度变化对测量精度的影响；具备防水、防尘、防爆、耐腐蚀等特性。
description_en: A pressure transmitter converts applied pressure into standardized pneumatic or electrical signals (e.g., 4–20 mA) for process control and remote monitoring. Built around a piezoresistive silicon diaphragm sensor—where pressure deforms the diaphragm, transmitting force via silicone oil to a semiconductor Wheatstone bridge—the device generates an unbalanced voltage proportional to pressure, amplified and conditioned into a precise analog output. Capable of measuring pressures ranging from vacuum to high-pressure ranges. Compatible with analog and digital protocols (e.g., HART, Modbus) for integration into diverse control systems. Features built-in temperature compensation to minimize thermal drift, and meets IP67-rated ingress protection, explosion-proof, and corrosion-resistant requirements.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术

company_name: 上海硕豪传感器有限公司
description_zh: 阻抗谱物位开关产品的探头、金属机壳与内部电子单元形成一个高频谐振电路。探头附近形成高频电场。探头被介质覆盖或介质的介电常数改变时,谐振频率将发生较大的变化,内部电子单元通过比较当前谐振频率及用户设定阈值开启或者关闭报警信号。该测量方法可有效的排除粘附性导电挂料的影响。可以检测多种介质，比如：1、液体介质：纯净水、自来水、燃油、食用油、酸类、碱类、溶剂、牛奶、果汁、啤酒等； 2、固体介质：面粉、奶粉、碳酸钙、滑石粉、石灰粉、铝粉、铁粉、塑料粉、碳粉、谷物、等； 3、浆料介质：矿浆、果酱、糖浆、蜂蜜、番茄酱、牙膏、胶水等； 4、其他介质:洗涤剂泡沫、啤酒泡沫、药液、医用凝胶、食品凝胶等。
description_en: The probe, metallic housing, and internal electronic unit of this impedance spectroscopy level switch form a high-frequency resonant circuit. A high-frequency electric field is generated around the probe. When the probe is coated by material or when the dielectric constant of the surrounding medium changes, the resonant frequency shifts significantly. The internal electronics detect this shift relative to a user-defined threshold to trigger or reset an alarm signal. This measurement principle effectively eliminates interference from conductive, adhesive build-up. It reliably detects diverse media including: (1) Liquids—deionized water, tap water, fuel oil, edible oils, acids, alkalis, solvents, milk, fruit juice, beer; (2) Solids—flour, milk powder, calcium carbonate, talc, lime powder, aluminum powder, iron powder, plastic powder, carbon powder, grains; (3) Slurries—mineral pulp, jam, syrup, honey, ketchup, toothpaste, adhesives; (4) Others—detergent foam, beer foam, pharmaceutical liquids, medical gels, food gels.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术

applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 上海硕豪传感器有限公司
description_zh: 电容物位计是利用电容量的变化,来测量容器内介质物位的测量仪表。在容器内，由电极和导电材料制造的容器壁构成了一个电容。对于一个给定的电极,被测介质的介电常数不变时,给电极加一个固定频率的测量电压,则流过电容的电流取决于电容电极间介质的高度,并与之成比例。可以检测多种介质，比如：纯净水、自来水、污水、酸类、碱类、盐溶液、泥浆、涂料等；奶粉、小麦、玉米、橡胶粉、水泥、铝粉、铁粉、铜粉、镁粉奶粉、糖粉、药粉、煤粉、矿粉等。
description_en: This capacitive level meter measures the level of material inside a container by detecting changes in capacitance. Within the container, the electrode and the conductive container wall constitute a capacitor. For a given electrode, when the dielectric constant of the measured medium remains constant, applying a fixed-frequency measurement voltage yields a current through the capacitor that is directly proportional to the height of the medium covering the electrode. It supports detection of diverse media including: deionized water, tap water, wastewater, acids, alkalis, salt solutions, slurry, paint; milk powder, wheat, corn, rubber powder, cement, aluminum powder, iron powder, copper powder, magnesium powder, sugar powder, pharmaceutical powders, coal powder, mineral powders.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术

company_name: 上海硕豪传感器有限公司
description_zh: 温度变送器将物理测量信号或普通电信号转换为标准电信号输出或能够以通讯协议方式输出的设备。温度变送器是将温度变量转换为可传送的标准化输出信号的仪表,主要用于工业过程温度参数的测量和控制。电流变送器是将被测主回路交流电流转换成恒流环标准信号,连续输送到接收装置。温度电流变送器是把温度传感器的信号转变为电流信号,连接到二次仪表上,从而显示出对应的温度。
description_en: A temperature transmitter converts physical measurement signals or general electrical signals into standardized output signals (e.g., 4–20 mA) or communication-protocol-based outputs. Specifically, it transforms temperature variables into transmissible, standardized electrical signals for industrial process temperature measurement and control. A current transmitter converts AC current from the primary circuit into a standardized loop current signal for continuous transmission to receiving devices. A temperature-current transmitter converts signals from temperature sensors into proportional current signals compatible with secondary instruments for accurate temperature display.

product_name_en: Arescan Series Digital Laser Scanning Galvanometer
company_name: 镭诺光电科技(深圳)有限公司
description_zh: Arescan 系列作为镭诺光电数字激光扫描振镜，采用先进控制算法和高效PWM输出实现超高动态响应，18bit有效位置采样实现高重复定位精度和超低位置噪声，高效热管理设计实现低温漂。可以按照应用需求选择矢量模式，划线模式和打孔模式；10mm,15mm,20mm,25mm多种通光孔径；硅，石英和碳化硅基材不同规格高性能镀膜镜片。适用于几乎所有典型激光器，满足各种中高端激光加工应用需求。
description_en: The Arescan series digital laser scanning galvanometer from Lano Photonics features advanced control algorithms and high-efficiency PWM output for ultra-high dynamic response. Its 18-bit effective position sampling ensures exceptional repeatability and ultra-low positional noise, while optimized thermal management delivers minimal thermal drift. Users may select operational modes—including vector scanning, line drawing, and drilling—based on application needs. Available clear apertures: 10 mm, 15 mm, 20 mm, and 25 mm. High-performance coated mirrors fabricated on silicon, fused silica, or silicon carbide substrates. Compatible with virtually all standard lasers, meeting demanding requirements across mid- to high-end laser processing applications.

company_name: 上海锦廷机电科技有限公司
description_zh: APIUM M220 是一款专为医疗产品与PEEK植入物制造设计的3D打印机，适用于个性化骨科植入物的临床与科研需求。 核心功能包括： •随形温控系统：智能调节加热功率，维持打印环境稳定。 •新型挤出系统：采用医用不锈钢，提供更强的挤出动力。 •生物打印材料：支持PEEK、复合材料PEEK等医用级材料。 •过程监控与校准：集成摄像与传感系统，实现过程监控与自动校准。 •集成软件与支持：提供简洁的操作界面、过程记录与专业技术支持。
description_en: The APIUM M220 is a medical-grade 3D printer purpose-built for manufacturing PEEK implants and other clinical medical devices, particularly tailored for personalized orthopedic implant development in both research and clinical settings. Key features include: • Conformal temperature control system: intelligently adjusts heating power to maintain stable, uniform build chamber conditions. • Advanced medical-grade extrusion system: constructed from biocompatible stainless steel, delivering enhanced extrusion force and reliability. • Biomedical material compatibility: certified for PEEK and PEEK composites compliant with medical standards. • Integrated process monitoring & calibration: real-time camera and sensor feedback enable in-situ monitoring and automatic nozzle calibration. • Unified software suite & technical support: intuitive user interface, comprehensive process logging, and dedicated engineering assistance.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 上海锦廷机电科技有限公司
description_zh: 3D打印PEEK颅颌面修补板，通过个性化设计实现与复杂颌面解剖结构的高度贴合，为功能与美学重建提供了可靠方案。 该技术在此类修复中展现显著优势： • 精准解剖匹配：基于患者CT数据三维重建，实现植入物与缺损区域的个性化适配。 • 生物力学适配：PEEK的弹性模量与骨组织相近，有助于降低应力屏蔽，促进长期稳定。 • 影像兼容性：在CT、MRI检查中无伪影，便于术后随访与评估。 • 功能与形态兼顾：在修复缺损的同时，可兼顾面部轮廓的自然美学重建。
description_en: 3D printed PEEK cranio-maxillofacial reconstruction plates are individually designed to achieve precise anatomical conformity with complex facial and skull structures—delivering robust functional and aesthetic restoration. Key advantages include: • Anatomical precision: Patient-specific design derived from CT data via 3D reconstruction ensures optimal fit to defect geometry. • Biomechanical compatibility: PEEK’s elastic modulus closely matches that of cortical bone, minimizing stress shielding and promoting long-term osseointegration and stability. • Imaging compatibility: Radiolucent with zero artifacts in CT and MRI, enabling unobstructed postoperative follow-up and evaluation. • Functional-aesthetic integration: Simultaneously restores structural integrity and natural facial contour.

company_name: 上海锦廷机电科技有限公司
description_zh: 3D打印椎间融合器通过仿生多孔结构促进骨整合，其个性化外形与椎体终板高度适配，有助于实现更好的初始稳定性和长期融合效果，为脊柱融合手术提供了具备临床优势的个性化解决方案。 增材制造技术为医疗植入物带来了显著的设计与制造优势，主要体现在： • 精准匹配：基于患者CT数据，可实现与缺损部位的高精度匹配。 • 多孔结构：可控的孔隙结构有利于血管及骨组织长入，支持生物固定。 • 高效生产：从扫描到植入物成型，周期较传统工艺显著缩短。
description_en: This 3D printed interbody fusion cage utilizes biomimetic porous architecture to enhance osteointegration. Its patient-specific geometry achieves optimal conformity with vertebral endplate anatomy—improving initial mechanical stability and long-term fusion success. Additive manufacturing enables distinct clinical advantages: • Precision matching: Directly derived from patient CT scans for sub-millimeter anatomical fidelity. • Controlled porosity: Engineered pore size, distribution, and interconnectivity promote vascular ingrowth and bony ongrowth for biological fixation. • Accelerated workflow: End-to-end production—from imaging to final implant—significantly reduces lead time versus conventional manufacturing.

product_name_zh: APIUM P400双喷头多材料3D打印机
company_name: 上海锦廷机电科技有限公司
description_zh: 一款满足医疗级制造要求的高精度3D打印设备，通过多项创新确保从数字模型到植入物的可靠转化： •自适应温控系统，为PEEK等材料提供理想结晶环境，提升产品力学性能。 •独立双挤出系统，支持多种医用高分子材料打印。 •集成干燥与智能校准系统，保障打印过程稳定与精度。 该设备与赢创医用PEEK材料的组合，已成功助力获得国内首张3D打印PEEK椎间融合器注册证。
description_en: A high-precision, medical-grade 3D printing platform engineered to ensure reliable, repeatable conversion of digital models into certified implants. Key innovations include: • Adaptive temperature control system: optimizes crystallization kinetics for PEEK and other high-performance polymers, maximizing mechanical performance. • Independent dual-extrusion system: supports simultaneous or sequential printing of multiple biomedical-grade thermoplastics. • Integrated drying and intelligent calibration: maintains material dryness and ensures dimensional accuracy throughout extended print cycles. Validated in combination with Evonik medical-grade PEEK, this system contributed to securing China’s first regulatory approval (NMPA registration certificate) for a 3D printed PEEK interbody fusion cage.

company_name: 北京普伟龙祥科技发展有限公司
description_zh: 本款3D打印机具备高精度与高效能，层分辨率可达0.05mm，4轴自动调平精度达0.0075mm，确保打印件细节清晰、表面平整。普通打印速度为600mm/s，最大加速度20000mm/s²，兼顾速度与稳定性。支持尼龙、碳纤维、PLA、PETG等多种高性能耗材，满足多样化应用需求。配备大功率加热床和快速流量挤出套件，1分钟内即可达到预设温度，提升打印效率。操作便捷，支持U盘直打、局域网打印及PET磁吸平台，实现快速拆卸与更换。搭载自研联机软件，智能优化打印代码与材料参数，提升打印成功率。内置8500转速快速降温成型模型、箱体恒温过滤系统及电路散热设计，保障设备稳定运行。
description_en: A high-precision, high-performance 3D printer featuring 0.05 mm layer resolution and 0.0075 mm four-axis auto-leveling accuracy—ensuring sharp detail definition and superior surface flatness. Standard print speed reaches 600 mm/s with peak acceleration up to 20,000 mm/s², balancing speed and stability. Compatible with high-performance filaments including nylon, carbon-fiber-reinforced composites, PLA, and PETG. Equipped with a high-power heated bed and rapid-flow extrusion kit—reaching target temperatures within 60 seconds. User-friendly operation supports USB direct printing, LAN connectivity, and magnetic PET build plate for quick release and replacement. Proprietary slicing software intelligently optimizes G-code and material parameters to maximize print success rate. Integrated features include an 8500-RPM active cooling fan, chamber temperature stabilization with air filtration, and optimized circuit thermal management for sustained reliability.

description_zh: 本款3D打印机具备高精度与高效能，层分辨率可达0.05mm，4轴自动调平精度达0.0075mm，确保打印件表面平整、细节清晰。普通打印速度高达800mm/s，最大加速度20000mm/s²，大幅提升工作效率。支持尼龙、碳纤维、PLA、PETG等多种高性能耗材，材料兼容性强。采用高强度合金钢喷嘴，耐用且打印效果优异。配备摄像头监控系统，支持灯光补偿与共振补偿，有效避免层纹问题，提升打印稳定性。兼容国产化麒麟系统及Windows、Linux、macOS，适应多平台操作需求。创新采用5mm高精度Z轴丝杆和独立4Z结构，增强机械稳定性。随机配备耗材干燥设备、交换机、UPS等实用配件。
description_en: A high-precision, high-throughput 3D printer delivering 0.05 mm layer resolution and 0.0075 mm four-axis auto-leveling accuracy—ensuring exceptional surface quality and fine feature fidelity. Standard print speed reaches 800 mm/s with peak acceleration of 20,000 mm/s²—dramatically increasing productivity. Broad material compatibility includes nylon, carbon-fiber composites, PLA, and PETG. Features a high-strength alloy steel nozzle for extended service life and superior print quality. Integrated HD camera monitoring with adaptive lighting compensation and resonance suppression eliminates banding and enhances print consistency. Cross-platform compatibility with Kylin OS, Windows, Linux, and macOS. Mechanical enhancements include a 5 mm pitch, high-precision Z-axis leadscrew and independent quad-Z drive system for improved rigidity and stability. Includes bundled accessories: filament dryer, network switch, and UPS.

description_zh: SmartCT Desktop 桌面型微焦点CT 机采用微焦点射线源，利用不同角度的射线透视图像，结合计算机断层扫描与三维数字重建技术，提供样品内部复杂结构的高分辨率数字图像，对样品内部结构进行数字化三维表征，实现样品内部结构的 3D/CT 扫描与DR 数字成像。可广泛应用于注塑、铸造、电子、石油地质、先进材料、先进制造、新能源电池、生命科学和考古等领域的低密度、小尺寸样品的3D/CT 扫描与DR 成像。
description_en: The SmartCT Desktop micro-focus computed tomography (CT) scanner employs a micro-focus X-ray source and multi-angle projection imaging, combined with advanced CT reconstruction algorithms, to generate high-resolution 3D digital representations of internal sample structures. It provides non-destructive, quantitative 3D/CT volumetric analysis and digital radiography (DR) imaging. Ideal for low-density, small-size specimens across diverse fields including injection molding, investment casting, electronics, petroleum geology, advanced materials, additive manufacturing, new-energy batteries, life sciences, and archaeology.

company_name: 中科布拉菲材料技术(东莞)有限公司
description_zh: 公司粉末产品包括高温合金粉末、高强钢粉末、钛合金粉末。金属粉末球形度高，氧/氮含量低(氧增50ppm)、无空心粉和卫星粉；粉末粒径15-53μm，53-106 μm，53-150μm收得率60%以上；粉末材料夹杂物少、塑性好、服役寿命高。主要应用于激光粉末床及激光熔覆、电子束粉床、HIP近净成型等航空航天、医疗模具和3C消费电子等领域。
description_en: PREP powder products include high-temperature alloy powders, high-strength steel powders, and titanium alloy powders. The metal powders exhibit high sphericity, low oxygen/nitrogen content (oxygen pickup ≤50 ppm), and are free of hollow and satellite particles. Particle size distributions include 15–53 μm, 53–106 μm, and 53–150 μm, with yield rates exceeding 60%. The powders feature low inclusion content, excellent ductility, and extended service life. Primary applications include laser powder bed fusion (LPBF), laser cladding, electron beam powder bed fusion (EB-PBF), and hot isostatic pressing (HIP) near-net-shape manufacturing for aerospace, medical molds, and 3C consumer electronics.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 中科布拉菲材料技术(东莞)有限公司
description_zh: 装备特点：双电机双轮高速驱动系统、高功率非转移弧等离子加热系统（200kW）、连续进料智能化生产系统 (1.6吨)；产品优势：非转移弧PREP设备经验15年以上、掌握先进大直径棒料-高功率-细粉制粉技术、粉末球形度高、空心粉少、氧氮含量低。
description_en: Equipment features: dual-motor, dual-wheel high-speed drive system; high-power non-transferred arc plasma heating system (200 kW); intelligent continuous feeding production system (1.6 tons). Key advantages: over 15 years of experience with non-transferred arc PREP systems; mastery of advanced large-diameter feedstock–high-power–fine-powder production technology; high powder sphericity; minimal hollow particles; and low oxygen/nitrogen content.

company_name: 三维网格处理与检测软件
description_zh: MeshLib SDK 使增材制造、CNC、3D 扫描和计量领域的公司能够使用高级算法处理、修复和优化 3D 数据，从而大幅缩短开发时间和成本。 开源。检查、定制和适配。 无缝兼容。C++ 核心，支持 C、C# 和 Python API。 速度与性能。顶尖布尔运算和简化算法。 高效设计。GPU 加速的 CUDA 算法和优化的多线程 CPU 处理。 完全跨平台。Windows、macOS、Linux、WebAssembly。 https://meshlib.io/
description_en: MeshLib SDK empowers companies in additive manufacturing, CNC, 3D scanning, and metrology to process, repair, and optimize 3D data using advanced algorithms—significantly reducing development time and cost. Open-source. Inspectable, customizable, and adaptable. Seamless interoperability. C++ core with APIs for C, C#, and Python. High speed and performance. State-of-the-art Boolean operations and mesh simplification algorithms. Efficient design powered by GPU-accelerated CUDA algorithms and optimized multithreaded CPU processing. Fully cross-platform: Windows, macOS, Linux, and WebAssembly. https://meshlib.io/

company_name: 三维网格处理与检测软件
description_zh: 扫描转网格。网格转生产。 快速。可靠。精确。 使用无缝修复、偏差目标和厚度/最小间隙检查，准备大型三角网格用于打印、检测和仿真。通过应用内 Python 自动化重复步骤。 专为大规模和稳定性打造： - 处理大型网格而不崩溃 - 可靠修复防止打印失败和返工 - QA 报告提供可衡量精度 - 将原始 3D 扫描转换为来自点云和 CT 数据的精确网格 - 跨平台：Web、Windows、macOS、Linux - 专注工具集，避免全套软件的成本和复杂性 在 https://meshinspector.com/ 免费试用 MeshInspector。
description_en: Scan-to-mesh. Mesh-to-production. Fast. Reliable. Precise. Prepares large triangular meshes for printing, inspection, and simulation using seamless repair, deviation-targeting, and thickness/min-gap analysis. Automates repetitive tasks via in-app Python scripting. Engineered for scale and stability: handles large meshes without crashes; robust repair prevents print failures and rework; QA reports deliver quantifiable accuracy; converts raw 3D scans—including point clouds and CT data—into precise meshes; cross-platform: Web, Windows, macOS, Linux; purpose-built toolset—avoiding the cost and complexity of full-suite software. Free trial available at https://meshinspector.com/

company_name: 佛山市光垒智能制造有限公司
description_zh: 工业级生产型机型，专门针对陶瓷制品的中试和量产需求设计。它的成型尺寸能达到550×450×200mm，大尺寸陶瓷件可以一体化打印，搭载4K DLP激光液冷光机*6矩阵模组，采用Matrix DLP重叠拼接/图像融合技术，幅面均一性优异，最大光功率密度35mW/cm²，满足常见陶瓷材料（氧化铝、氧化锆、二氧化硅、氮化硅、碳化硅、钛酸钡、羟基磷灰石、粘土等）的打印需求。配备气动独立升降双刀刮及电动微分调节功能，可调节刮刀高度和倾斜角；配备成型平台电动微分调节功能，可调节成型平台综合平面度。可选增配自动化校准和集群控制功能，满足自动化量产需求。
description_en: An industrial-grade production system engineered specifically for pilot-scale and mass production of ceramic components. Build volume: 550 × 450 × 200 mm—enabling monolithic printing of large ceramic parts. Equipped with six 4K DLP liquid-cooled laser projector modules operating in Matrix DLP overlapping tiling/image fusion mode, delivering exceptional build-area uniformity. Maximum optical power density: 35 mW/cm². Compatible with common ceramic materials including alumina, zirconia, silica, silicon nitride, silicon carbide, barium titanate, hydroxyapatite, and clay. Features pneumatically actuated independent dual-blade recoater with motorized micrometer adjustment for blade height and tilt angle; motorized micrometer adjustment of build platform flatness. Optional automation: auto-calibration and cluster control for scalable, automated production.

description_zh: 产品中试阶段推荐的中尺寸陶瓷3D打印机主力型号，具备优异的打印能力与工业级应用表现。成型尺寸达310*288*200mm，能满足中尺寸陶瓷制品的成型需求，X/Y分辨率为75μm，Z轴打印层厚10-200μm可调，步长10μm，曝光均匀性≥90%，可适配陶瓷零部件的精细成型要求。搭载4K DLP液冷激光光机，国标辐照计测最大光功率密度达35mW/cm²，能满足常见陶瓷材料的打印需求。机械与操作性能上，配备气动独立升降双刀刮及电动微分调节功能，可调节刮刀高度和倾斜角；配备成型平台电动微分调节功能，可调节成型平台综合平面度；同时支持打印参数全开放可调、历史记录、选区消除等功能，操作灵活便捷。
description_en: A flagship medium-format ceramic 3D printer recommended for product pilot-stage development, offering outstanding print capability and industrial-grade performance. Build volume: 310 × 288 × 200 mm—satisfying mid-size ceramic component requirements. XY resolution: 75 μm; Z-layer thickness adjustable from 10–200 μm in 10 μm increments; exposure uniformity ≥90%—meeting fine-feature ceramic part specifications. Powered by a 4K DLP liquid-cooled laser projector; maximum optical power density measured per national standard irradiance meter: 35 mW/cm²—compatible with common ceramic materials. Mechanical and operational features include pneumatically actuated independent dual-blade recoater with motorized micrometer adjustment for blade height and tilt angle; motorized micrometer adjustment of build platform flatness; fully open, user-adjustable print parameters; print history logging; and region elimination functionality—ensuring flexible, intuitive operation.

company_name: 佛山市光垒智能制造有限公司
description_zh: 这是一款针对精密陶瓷件的专业光固化3D打印机，适合陶瓷材料研发、小批量精密部件生产等场景。这款设备支持最大136*76*90mm的陶瓷件成型，配备4K DLP液冷激光光机，最大光功率密度180mW/cm²，曝光均匀性超过90%，能保证打印件的一致性与细节还原度，同时兼顾高固化效率。在精度方面，X/Y轴分辨率为36μm，Z轴打印层厚在5-200μm可调，步长1μm，实现精密陶瓷部件的实际尺寸控制。使用配置上，它配备气动独立升降双刮刀，刮刀速度1-200mm/s可调，能适配不同粘度的陶瓷浆料；同时支持打印参数全开放可调、历史记录功能、选取消除功能等，操作灵活度高。
description_en: A precision-oriented stereolithography (SLA) 3D printer dedicated to advanced ceramic component fabrication—ideal for ceramic material R&D and small-batch precision part production. Maximum build volume: 136 × 76 × 90 mm. Equipped with a 4K DLP liquid-cooled laser projector delivering up to 180 mW/cm² optical power density and >90% exposure uniformity—ensuring consistent part quality and high-fidelity detail reproduction while maintaining high cure efficiency. Precision: XY resolution 36 μm; Z-layer thickness adjustable from 5–200 μm in 1 μm increments—enabling tight dimensional control for precision ceramics. Features pneumatically actuated independent dual-blade recoater with adjustable blade speed (1–200 mm/s) for compatibility with diverse ceramic slurry viscosities. Also supports fully open, user-adjustable print parameters; print history logging; and region elimination—providing high operational flexibility.

description_en: 1. High-speed printing with full-bed efficiency and uniform accuracy across the entire build platform. 2. Open-material architecture supporting broad compatibility with commercially available photopolymer resins. 3. User-centric design—intuitive operation and thoughtful ergonomics backed by responsive, high-quality technical support. 4. Exceptional reliability—optical engine lifetime exceeds 45,000 hours, ensuring stable, consistent performance. 5. company_name: 川禾金相检测设备（上海）有限公司
description_zh: PreciseCut-100 是一款高精度，极易定位的一台多功能精密切磨一体机，广泛用于矿物、骨、牙齿、半导体、PCB、焊球等。它的X方向移动臂可实现5~100微米的移动增量，确保了切割的高精度。对于管状和圆形试样的旋转切割和硬材料的振荡切割，可以缩短切割时间的同时，避免过热现象发生。另外它的磨削功能能在X方向的移动中实现精确控制去除量的同时带来上佳的平整度，轻松易用。
description_en: The PreciseCut-100 is a high-precision, easily positionable multifunctional cutting and grinding machine widely used for minerals, bone, teeth, semiconductors, PCBs, solder balls, and similar materials. Its X-axis translation arm enables incremental movement from 5–100 µm, ensuring exceptional cutting accuracy. Rotational cutting for tubular/cylindrical specimens and oscillatory cutting for hard materials significantly reduce cutting time while preventing thermal damage. Its integrated grinding function provides precise, controllable material removal and superior surface flatness during X-axis motion—delivering ease of use and repeatable results.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: Penetration-60全自动双工位热镶嵌机
product_name_en: Penetration-60 Fully Automatic Dual-Station Hot Mounting Press
company_name: 川禾金相检测设备（上海）有限公司
description_zh: Penetration-60 （简称"P-60"）是一款适应性强大的热镶样机。拥有快速的镶样速度和优越的样品浸润保护，镶样质量和产能翻番。设备的高适应性可以满足不同直径、不同树脂粉料、不同冷却方式的需求。设备具有强力加热、澎湃加压、极速冷却三项绝技，能把镶嵌工序的时长压缩在难以置信的5分钟以内。由设计大师亲手操刀的外形，棱角分明，刚硬而不失圆润。方圆相济，低调却彰显大气。
description_en: The Penetration-60 (P-60) is a highly adaptable hot mounting press delivering rapid sample encapsulation and superior specimen impregnation protection—doubling both mounting quality and throughput. Its broad adaptability accommodates varied specimen diameters, resin types, and cooling methods. Three core capabilities—powerful heating, high-pressure compaction, and ultra-fast cooling—reduce the entire mounting cycle to under five minutes. Featuring an expertly crafted industrial design—sharp-edged yet smoothly contoured—its balanced geometry conveys understated elegance and functional authority.

Built on a rugged dual-column frame, it integrates a unified specimen motion head and fully automated process control. Coupled with an intuitive, human-centered interface, the Smoothneer-6 ensures exceptional reliability and repeatability in grinding and polishing operations.

product_name_zh: 砂型微滴喷射打印设备VDP2500
product_name_en: Sand Mold Micro-Drop Jetting Printer VDP2500
company_name: 湖南云箭集团有限公司
description_zh: 微滴喷射设备(砂型VDP2500智能产线)面向精密铸造领域砂型的批量化制造，通过高端装备+产线化、自动化的生产方式，推动铸造行业的转型升级和绿色制造。适合复杂结构砂型、中小批量定制化砂型的规模化生产应用。 产品特点： 1.核心技术：采用跟随式打印技术和全自动供料系统，搭载自研切片与控制软件，智能化贯穿全程； 2.生产效能：拥有2500mm×1500mm×1000mm的大容量工作箱，通过多工作箱无缝切换与快速清砂实现流程零间断，实现高效安全规模化生产。 3.运行经济性：支持树脂与清洁液回收再利用；余砂在线循环系统，有效减少物料浪费。
description_en: The VDP2500 sand mold micro-drop jetting printer (integrated into the VDP2500 intelligent production line) targets high-volume manufacturing of investment casting molds. Combining advanced equipment with automated, line-integrated production, it accelerates foundry industry transformation toward intelligent and green manufacturing—ideal for complex-geometry molds and small-to-medium batch customized molds. Key features: 1. Core technologies: follower-style printing and fully automated material feeding, powered by proprietary slicing and control software enabling end-to-end intelligence. 2. Production efficiency: 2500 × 1500 × 1000 mm build chamber; seamless multi-chamber switching and rapid sand cleaning ensure uninterrupted, high-efficiency, safe, and scalable production. 3. Operational economy: resin and cleaning fluid recovery/reuse; on-line sand recycling system—minimizing material waste.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 湖南云箭集团有限公司
description_zh: 面向大型整体构件批量化生产的超大尺寸工业级金属3D打印系统，提供高达1500mm的立方体成型空间。它重新定义了制造边界，能够一次性成型大型、整体、复杂的金属部件，主要服务于对尺寸、结构一体化有极致要求的重型工业领域。 产品特点： 超大成型：可直接制造传统工艺难以加工的大型一体式结构件，减少组装需求。 提升效能：极大扩展单次作业能力，适合航空航天大型框架/舱体、能源装备核心部件、重型机械关键结构等的大批量或大尺寸生产。 简化工艺：实现关键部件从“设计-组装”到“整体打印”的跨越，显著提升产品性能可靠性并简化后续供应链。 智能生产：配备先进的流程监控、粉末管理与数据追溯系统。
description_en: An ultra-large-format industrial metal 3D printing system designed for high-volume production of large monolithic components, featuring a cubic build volume up to 1500 mm. It redefines manufacturing boundaries by enabling single-step fabrication of large, integrated, and geometrically complex metal parts—primarily serving heavy industries demanding extreme dimensional scale and structural integration. Key features: Ultra-large build capability eliminates traditional multi-part assembly for structures otherwise impractical to machine; Enhanced productivity expands per-job capacity for high-volume or large-scale production of aerospace frames/capsules, energy equipment core components, and critical heavy machinery structures; Process simplification transitions key components from 'design-and-assembly' to 'monolithic printing', significantly improving product performance, reliability, and supply chain efficiency; Intelligent production with advanced process monitoring, powder management, and full data traceability.

company_name: L3AD
description_zh: 我们的模特采用先进的3D打印技术制造，具备高精度、耐用性强且可规模化生产的特性，能满足不同行业的多样化需求。 通过FDM技术，我们使用自主研发的聚丙烯（PP）和热塑性聚氨酯（TPU）材料制作模特。这些专属材料确保了结构的完整性、柔韧性和批量生产时的质量稳定性。 对于高精度的表面处理，我们采用SLA技术搭配多种专业树脂，打造光滑表面和精细外观，完美贴合每位客户的个性化需求。
description_en: Our mannequins are manufactured using advanced 3D printing technologies, delivering high precision, exceptional durability, and scalability for diverse industry applications. Fused Deposition Modeling (FDM) is employed with proprietary polypropylene (PP) and thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU) materials, ensuring structural integrity, flexibility, and consistent quality across mass production. For high-fidelity surface finish, Stereolithography (SLA) is utilized with multiple professional-grade resins to achieve smooth surfaces and fine aesthetic details—fully customizable to meet individual client specifications.
categories_zh: 其他（如后处理工艺服务）

company_name: 苏州通锦精密工业股份有限公司
description_zh: 苏州通锦多节伺服电动缸，采用多级嵌套式精密结构，将伺服电机旋转运动高效转化为长行程直线推力，以小安装尺寸实现大伸出行程，完美适配空间受限、长行程需求的高精度工况。产品集成伺服闭环控制，精准把控位置、速度与推力，具备定位精度高、响应快、刚性强、低噪音、免维护等优势，可替代传统液压与气动执行机构，更节能、更清洁、更稳定。广泛应用于自动化产线、特种装备、工程机械、模拟仿真、升降机构等场景，为工业智能执行提供可靠、紧凑、长寿命的运动解决方案。
description_en: The Suzhou Tongjin multi-stage servo electric actuator features a precision nested telescopic structure that efficiently converts servo motor rotary motion into long-stroke linear force. Its compact footprint enables extended extension travel—ideal for high-precision applications with spatial constraints and demanding stroke requirements. Integrated servo closed-loop control delivers precise regulation of position, velocity, and thrust. Advantages include high positioning accuracy, rapid response, superior rigidity, low noise, and maintenance-free operation. It serves as an energy-efficient, clean, and stable alternative to conventional hydraulic and pneumatic actuators, widely deployed in automated production lines, special-purpose equipment, construction machinery, motion simulation systems, and lifting mechanisms—providing reliable, compact, and long-life motion solutions for industrial intelligent actuation.

description_zh: 苏州通锦精密工业股份有限公司，一家专注于伺服电动缸及伺服控制系统研发、组装、销售和生产的企业，提供全面定制化服务，满足客户多样化需求。产品系列齐全，定制范围广泛，从5KG到500T，满足航空航天、新能源、电机、汽车零部件、工程机械、3D打印、医疗、家电、纺织机械、工业装备等应用场景。 公司拥有15000平方米自建生产厂房，全流程标准化作业，确保产品质量和生产效率。具备短生产周期和迅速出货能力，提供专业售后服务和免费三维选型软件。
description_en: Suzhou Tongjin Precision Industry Co., Ltd.—a company specializing in the R&D, assembly, sales, and manufacturing of servo electric actuators and servo control systems—offers comprehensive customization services to meet diverse customer requirements. Its product portfolio spans a broad load range from 5 kg to 500 tons, supporting applications across aerospace, new energy, motors, automotive components, construction machinery, 3D printing, medical devices, home appliances, textile machinery, and general industrial equipment. With a 15,000 m² self-built production facility and fully standardized end-to-end processes, the company ensures consistent product quality and high manufacturing efficiency. It guarantees short lead times and rapid order fulfillment, backed by professional after-sales support and free 3D selection software.

description_zh: 苏州通锦拇指伺服电动缸是一种小型一体化伺服控制系统，外形尺寸小，占用空间少，能够适应各种狭小的安装环境，如机器人关节部位、小型自动化设备、精密仪器、医疗器械等，为空间有限的应用场景提供了理想的解决方案。
description_en: The Suzhou Tongjin Thumb Servo Electric Actuator is a compact, fully integrated servo control system with minimal footprint—designed for installation in confined spaces such as robotic joints, small-scale automation equipment, precision instruments, and medical devices. It delivers an ideal motion solution for space-constrained applications.

company_name: 广东用心者日用品有限公司
description_zh: 3D打印农场是集销售、规模化生产、定制化服务为一体的综合型加工生产企业。 现配备300余台拓竹FDM的3D打印机，形成日均海量件的生产能力，可高效承接从单件定制到批量量产的全场景需求，大幅缩短交付周期、降低客户综合成本。 核心材料包括： PLA：环保可降解、成型精度高，适用于文创产品、教育教具、民用消费品； PETG：韧性优异、耐候性强，适配家电外壳、医疗配件、汽车内饰件； ABS：强度高、耐热性好，广泛应用于工业零件、模具开发、机械结构件； TPU：弹性佳、耐磨抗冲击，专为柔性产品、防护配件、运动器材
description_en: The 3D Printing Farm is an integrated manufacturing enterprise offering sales, scalable production, and customized services. Equipped with over 300 Bambu Lab FDM 3D printers, it achieves massive daily output capacity—efficiently fulfilling requirements ranging from one-off custom parts to high-volume production, significantly reducing delivery lead times and lowering total customer cost of ownership. Core material offerings include: PLA—eco-friendly, biodegradable, and high-accuracy, ideal for cultural & creative products, educational tools, and consumer goods; PETG—excellent toughness and weather resistance, suitable for appliance housings, medical accessories, and automotive interior parts; ABS—high strength and thermal stability, widely used in industrial components, mold development, and mechanical structural parts; TPU—superior elasticity, wear resistance, and impact absorption, optimized for flexible products, protective accessories, and sports equipment.

company_name: 杭州稻田增材技术有限公司
description_zh: 黑格 Reflex2 Pro 是面向工业量产的旗舰级光固化 3D 打印机，专为稳定、高效、高精度批量生产打造。搭载1032 分区驭光系统，1032 颗独立控光 Mini-LED 搭配微透镜阵列，曝光均匀、细节锐利、大幅降低残渣。配备高透光琥珀屏 Pro，透过率与光强显著提升，兼容更多高性能材料。成型幅面大幅升级，可打印大尺寸工件，适配护具、鞋履、齿科、文创等多场景量产。C5 级高精度 Z 轴、闭环电机与智能控制系统，保障长期连续稳定运行。加热刮刀、自动调平、智能补偿等功能齐全，降低操作门槛，提升打印成功率，是工作室与小型工厂的高效生产利器。
description_en: The HEGERLS Reflex2 Pro is a flagship industrial-production-grade stereolithography (SLA) 3D printer engineered for stable, efficient, and high-precision mass production. Its patented 1032-Zone Light Control System employs 1032 individually addressable Mini-LEDs coupled with a microlens array for uniform exposure, sharp detail resolution, and significantly reduced resin residue. The upgraded High-Transmittance Amber Screen Pro enhances light transmission and intensity, expanding compatibility with high-performance resins. The enlarged build area supports large-format parts for mass production in orthopedics, footwear, dental, and cultural & creative applications. A C5-grade high-precision Z-axis, closed-loop stepper motors, and an intelligent control system ensure long-term continuous stability. Features including heated wiper blade, auto-bed leveling, and intelligent compensation reduce operator dependency and maximize print success rate—making it an efficient production tool for studios and small factories.

product_name_zh: 鸿影 310 FDM 集群生产系统
company_name: 翼视(江苏)科创发展有限公司
description_zh: 鸿影310 3D打印集群生产系统采用 “一柜两机” 设计，在一个集群管理柜中集成两台独立的高性能工业级3D打印机。该系统专为连续批量生产场景打造，通过集中控制、高效任务分配和智能环境管理，实现生产效率最大化。集成废气集中处理系统和新风循环系统，维持舱内恒温恒湿环境，有效保障打印质量稳定性；配备独立温控模块，精准调控热床与喷嘴温度。产品采用6063高强度铝合金框架与龙门式结构设计，搭载高精度运动控制系统，兼容多种工程材料，是中小批量定制化生产、教育科研及专业服务领域的革命性解决方案，为用户提供稳定、高效、精准的3D打印生产体验。
description_en: The HONGYING 310 3D printing cluster production system adopts a 'one-cabinet, two-printer' architecture, integrating two independent high-performance industrial FDM printers within a centralized management cabinet. Purpose-built for continuous batch production, it maximizes throughput via centralized control, intelligent task scheduling, and smart environmental management. An integrated exhaust treatment system and fresh-air circulation system maintain constant temperature and humidity inside the chamber—ensuring consistent print quality. Independent thermal control modules precisely regulate heated bed and nozzle temperatures. Constructed with a rigid 6063 aluminum alloy frame and gantry-style structure, and driven by a high-precision motion control system, the system supports multiple engineering-grade filaments. It represents a revolutionary solution for medium- and small-batch customization, education & research, and professional service sectors—delivering stable, efficient, and accurate 3D printing production experiences.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

company_name: 山东世商焊材有限公司
description_zh: 7075 是一种含锌5.5％、含铜量1.4%、含镁2.5%的超高强铝合金焊丝。该焊接材料在高温处理+人工时效后（T6）超过580Mpa以上的抗拉强度。 用途：用于军工、航天等要求高抗拉强度行业相关铝合金的焊接。
description_en: 7075 is an ultra-high-strength aluminum alloy welding wire containing 5.5% zinc, 1.4% copper, and 2.5% magnesium. After heat treatment and artificial aging (T6 temper), it achieves tensile strength exceeding 580 MPa. Application: Designed for welding high-strength aluminum alloys in defense, aerospace, and other industries requiring exceptional tensile performance.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 翼视(江苏)科创发展有限公司
description_zh: 鸿影 310 UNIT 为鸿影 310 FDM 集群生产系统的作业单元，采用全直线导轨、高扭矩定制电机，提供的最大打印速度可达 600mm/s，加速度 200,000mm/s²，定位精度 ±0.01mm，层厚分辨率 0.05-0.3mm，确保高效生产与优质打印效果。模块化结构设计，核心部件（如挤出头、传感器）可快速拆卸更换，平均维修时间小于 30 分钟；设备布局合理，便于日常检修与保养。6063高强度铝合金全铝框架，CXY动热床架构，运动稳定性强，有效降低打印过程中的振动干扰。
description_en: The HONGYING 310 UNIT is the operational module of the HONGYING 310 FDM Cluster Production System. It features full linear rail guidance and high-torque custom motors, achieving a maximum print speed of 600 mm/s, acceleration of 200,000 mm/s², positioning accuracy of ±0.01 mm, and layer resolution of 0.05–0.3 mm—ensuring both high productivity and superior print quality. Its modular design allows rapid replacement of core components—including extruders and sensors—with average repair time under 30 minutes. Ergonomic layout facilitates routine inspection and maintenance. The all-aluminum frame uses high-strength 6063 aluminum alloy, and the CXY moving heated bed architecture enhances motion stability and minimizes vibration interference during printing.

company_name: 上海交通大学-模具CAD国家工程研究中心
description_zh: 增材制造数智工业平台，平台集成了完全自主知识产权的切片软件CAD、路径规划软件CAM、工艺仿真软件CAE、晶格性能预测仿真软件CAE、全生命周期管理系统PLM等全流程数字化工具，为增材制造行业提供了设计、制造、仿真、服役、数据管理等整体解决方案，将使您能够在实际生产开始之前在数字环境中进行仿真测试和优化工作，实现了降本增效的功能。
description_en: The Additive Manufacturing Digital-Intelligent Industrial Platform integrates a full suite of independently developed digital tools: CAD slicing software, CAM path planning software, CAE process simulation software, CAE lattice performance prediction software, and PLM lifecycle management software. It delivers an end-to-end solution covering design, manufacturing, simulation, in-service performance evaluation, and data management for the additive manufacturing industry. Users can perform virtual prototyping, simulation, and optimization prior to physical production—enabling cost reduction, productivity enhancement, and accelerated time-to-market.

company_name: 芜湖古戈尔自动化科技有限公司
description_zh: 工业级光固化3D打印机，专为汽车、机器人及科研等领域提供高精密成型与柔性生产解决方案。搭载工业级16K分辨率，Z轴物理精度达0.002mm，最高成型精度0.012mm，支持0.1mm薄壁与120μm微孔结构。兼容405nm液态树脂、铸造蜡、软胶及多种工业级材料，支持弹性体等特种材料。最大打印速度领先，成型平台尺寸302×161×500mm，支持多模型并行打印。内置智能恒温系统与云端监控，支持远程管理与故障预警。采用安川电机、菲涅尔透镜等工业级核心部件，双系统兼容与一键式操作。适用于汽车零部件、机器人关节、航空航天模型、医疗器械、运动装备及人体工学产品等领域的快速制造与科研验证。
description_en: An industrial-grade stereolithography (SLA) 3D printer engineered for high-precision fabrication and flexible production in automotive, robotics, and research applications. Features industrial-grade 16K resolution, Z-axis physical accuracy of 0.002 mm, and maximum part accuracy of 0.012 mm—capable of producing 0.1 mm thin walls and 120 μm micro-features. Compatible with 405 nm liquid resins, investment casting wax, soft elastomers, and diverse industrial-grade materials—including specialty elastomers. Delivers industry-leading print speed with a build volume of 302 × 161 × 500 mm and multi-part parallel printing capability. Integrated intelligent thermostatic control and cloud-based remote monitoring enable predictive maintenance and real-time oversight. Built with Yaskawa motors and Fresnel lenses for robust industrial performance. Dual-system compatibility and one-click operation streamline workflow. Ideal for rapid manufacturing and R&D validation of automotive components, robotic joints, aerospace models, medical devices, sports equipment, and ergonomic products.

company_name: 力姆泰克（廊坊）传动设备有限公司
description_zh: 伺服电缸（Servo Electric Cylinder）是一种将伺服电机与丝杠一体化设计的模块化直线运动装置，推力范围10kg至100T，行程1~2500mm，速度可达0.1~2m/s。该设备采用闭环伺服控制，轴向间隙0.01mm，推力控制精度1%，防护等级IP65，支持前/后/侧法兰及尾部铰接等多种安装方式，具有成本低、配置灵活的特性，是液压缸和气缸的最佳替代品。 其核心功能是通过旋转运动转换实现精确速度、位置及推力控制，应用于军事设备操控、娱乐设施关节驱动、汽车测试仪器及工业机械自动化领域。
description_en: A modular linear motion device integrating a servo motor and precision lead screw. Offers thrust range from 10 kg to 100 tons, stroke length from 1 to 2500 mm, and speed up to 0.1–2 m/s. Utilizes closed-loop servo control with axial backlash ≤0.01 mm, thrust control accuracy of ±1%, and IP65 ingress protection. Supports versatile mounting configurations—including front/rear/side flanges and rear clevis. Cost-effective and highly configurable, it serves as the optimal replacement for hydraulic and pneumatic cylinders. Its core function is precise, programmable control of velocity, position, and thrust through rotary-to-linear motion conversion—deployed in military equipment actuation, entertainment ride joint drives, automotive test instrumentation, and industrial automation systems.

company_name: 上海橙语智能科技有限公司
description_zh: QUICKSURFACE 是一款专业的逆向工程软件，专为将原始3D扫描数据转化为精准、可编辑的CAD模型而打造。 它专为工程师和设计师设计，将强大的工具集与完全可控的操作体验相结合——无需面对传统CAD软件的复杂性，即可快速生成可直接投入生产的高质量结果。
description_en: QUICKSURFACE is a professional reverse engineering software purpose-built to transform raw 3D scan data into accurate, editable CAD models. Designed specifically for engineers and designers, it combines powerful toolsets with intuitive, fully controllable workflows—eliminating the complexity of traditional CAD systems while enabling rapid generation of production-ready, high-quality results.

company_name: 上海橙语智能科技有限公司
description_zh: Robotmaster是全球领先的机器人编程软件。其内置了焊接、切割、增材制造、打磨抛光等各种工艺模块，现金的运动学算法可自动优化机器人姿态，避开问题区域。现在，机器人编程不再需要繁琐和重复的过程，也无需掌握机器人或编程专业知识。无论用户的经验水平如何，均可利用 Robotmaster 离线编程 (OLP) 软件轻松快速地对最复杂的作业进行编程。
description_en: Robotmaster is a globally leading robotic programming software. Its built-in application modules cover welding, cutting, additive manufacturing, grinding, and polishing. Advanced kinematic algorithms automatically optimize robot pose trajectories and avoid singularity or collision zones. Robot programming is no longer labor-intensive or repetitive—and requires no specialized robotics or coding expertise. Regardless of user experience level, Robotmaster’s offline programming (OLP) platform enables fast, easy, and reliable programming of even the most complex robotic tasks.

company_name: 江门市兴晟精密制造有限公司
description_zh: 兴晟精密采用微纳3D打印技术，为医疗内窥镜领域提供高精度、高性能的端座制造方案。支持来图加工，方案定制服务。 1.该内窥镜具备优异的光学性能，端面能实现镜面效果，透光率超过90%，确保成像清晰、光传输高效； 2.最小公差±10~20μm，最小壁厚50μm，适用于微创手术内窥镜等医疗场景，支持一体成型，小批量定制与研发验证 3.支持2μm、15μm、35μm等多个打印精度可选
description_en: Xingsheng Precision employs micro-nano 3D printing technology to deliver high-precision, high-performance endoscope tip housing solutions for medical applications. Custom design and drawing-based manufacturing services are available. 1. The endoscope exhibits exceptional optical performance: the tip surface achieves mirror finish with >90% light transmittance, ensuring clear imaging and highly efficient light transmission; 2. Tolerances as tight as ±10–20 μm and minimum wall thickness of 50 μm enable use in minimally invasive surgical endoscopes; parts are produced via monolithic fabrication, supporting small-batch customization and R&D validation; 3. Multiple printing resolutions available: 2 μm, 15 μm, and 35 μm.

product_name_en: Micro P102 – 2 μm High-Precision Micro-Nano 3D Printer
company_name: 江门市兴晟精密制造有限公司
description_zh: 1.采用特有的微尺度面扫描技术，大幅度提升打印速度，且具备良好的稳定性，实现宏观微观尺度一体化加工 2.光学精度2μm，可打印几十微米的三维结构，实现更精细的几何形状；在保证打印精度的同事，最大打印尺寸60×60×50（mm）； 3.材料适用范围涵盖光敏树脂、水凝胶、氧化铝、氧化锆陶瓷材料；高粘度树脂材料等，可广泛辐射多个应用行业 4.可广泛应用于医疗器械、科研、精密电子、仿生机器灵巧手、汽车配件等领域，满足产品研发与定制化服务，提供高精密制造业的小批量快速生产
description_en: 1. Features proprietary micro-scale area-scanning technology, significantly enhancing print speed while maintaining excellent system stability—enabling seamless integration of macro- and micro-scale fabrication; 2. Optical resolution of 2 μm supports printing of intricate 3D structures down to tens of micrometers; maximum build volume is 60 × 60 × 50 mm while preserving dimensional accuracy; 3. Compatible with a broad range of materials including photosensitive resins, hydrogels, alumina, zirconia ceramics, and high-viscosity resins—suitable for diverse industrial applications; 4. Widely applied in medical devices, scientific research, precision electronics, bionic dexterous hands, and automotive components—supporting rapid prototyping, product development, and low-volume high-precision manufacturing.

company_name: 江门市兴晟精密制造有限公司
description_zh: 1.这款微流控芯片采用生物相容性材料经微纳3D打印技术一体成型，由2μm超高精度设备打印制作，结构精密； 2.最小流道20μm，最小公差±10μm，满足细胞操控、药物筛选等对精度与生物安全性要求严苛的生命科学实验与应用场景 3.2μm、15μm、35μm等打印精度可选，支持微流控、PDMS倒模等来图定制加工服务
description_en: 1. This microfluidic chip is fabricated as a monolithic structure using biocompatible materials and micro-nano 3D printing technology on a 2 μm ultra-high-resolution system, delivering exceptional structural fidelity; 2. Minimum channel width of 20 μm and dimensional tolerances of ±10 μm meet stringent requirements for cell manipulation, drug screening, and other life science applications demanding both precision and biological safety; 3. Printing resolutions of 2 μm, 15 μm, and 35 μm are available; custom manufacturing services—including microfluidic device printing and PDMS mold replication—are offered based on customer-provided designs.

company_name: 江门市兴晟精密制造有限公司
description_zh: 支持来图加工，方案定制服务。 1.这款连接器端座外形尺寸16×6.5×4.5mm，结构精密，具备两排各50个pin针孔，支持小批量快速验证； 2.最小公差±5~10μm，最小壁厚达10μm，最小缝隙20μm； 3.适用汽配电子连接器、传感器接口及高精度电子设备接插件等领域的研发与定制化生产。
description_en: Custom design and drawing-based manufacturing services are available. 1. This connector housing measures 16 × 6.5 × 4.5 mm and features a high-precision geometry with two rows of 50 pin holes each—ideal for rapid small-batch functional validation; 2. Achieves tight tolerances of ±5–10 μm, minimum wall thickness of 10 μm, and minimum gap clearance of 20 μm; 3. Designed for R&D and customized production in automotive electronic connectors, sensor interfaces, and high-precision electronic interconnects.

company_name: 惠州市科锐智能科技有限公司
description_zh: H1 粉末回收站是 SLS 3D 打印机专属配套设备，适配 K-100机型，尺寸 1000×450×370mm，体积紧凑，适配桌面及工作室使用场景。设备核心实现清理 - 筛分 - 回收一体化作业，可快速清理打印机成型仓内未烧结粉末，内置筛网自动筛除结块颗粒与杂质，保障粉末纯度，筛分后的合格粉末可直接回收到打印机供粉仓，全程无需手动中转。封闭式设计防尘防漏，操作便捷，大幅提升粉末回收效率与利用率，减少材料损耗，有效控制打印成本，完美匹配创客、设计工作室、高校等高频打印的粉末循环需求。
description_en: The H1 Powder Recovery Station is a dedicated auxiliary system for SLS 3D printers, specifically designed for compatibility with the K-100 printer model. With compact dimensions of 1000 × 450 × 370 mm, it fits seamlessly into desktop and studio environments. Its integrated workflow enables automated cleaning, sieving, and powder recovery—rapidly removing unsintered powder from the printer’s build chamber. An internal mesh sieve automatically filters out agglomerates and contaminants to preserve powder purity; recovered qualified powder is directly transferred to the printer’s feed hopper without manual handling. Its sealed design prevents dust leakage and contamination, significantly improving powder recycling efficiency and utilization—reducing material waste and lowering overall printing costs. Ideal for makerspaces, design studios, and universities requiring frequent, reliable powder recirculation.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

company_name: 惠州市科锐智能科技有限公司
description_zh: F-100SE 是轻量化桌面级 SLS 3D 打印机，也是全球最小款桌面级 SLS 设备，突破性将工业级选择性激光烧结技术亲民化，无需后续回炉烧结。设备仅重 23kg、体积小巧，pa12成型体积 120×120×130mm，搭载 5W 450nm 可变功率激光源，打印精度0.1~0.3mm，高效又精准。打印无需支撑，兼容 PA12、TPU 等材料，成型件强度媲美工业级；封闭式结构控粉防尘，自主研发系统操作简便，余粉可循环控成本，完美适配创客、设计工作室、高校科研等 SLS 3D 打印入门需求。
description_en: The F-100SE is an ultra-lightweight, desktop-class SLS 3D printer—and the world’s smallest desktop SLS system—democratizing industrial-grade selective laser sintering technology. It eliminates the need for post-processing sintering furnaces. Weighing only 23 kg with a compact footprint, it offers a PA12 build volume of 120 × 120 × 130 mm and features a 5 W, 450 nm variable-power laser source delivering layer resolution of 0.1–0.3 mm—ensuring both speed and precision. Support-free printing is enabled for PA12, TPU, and other compatible materials; printed parts exhibit mechanical strength comparable to industrial-grade components. Its enclosed architecture controls powder dispersion and prevents dust ingress; its proprietary software ensures intuitive operation. Unspent powder can be fully recycled—optimizing material cost. Perfectly suited for makers, design studios, and university labs seeking accessible entry into SLS 3D printing.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 惠州市科锐智能科技有限公司
description_zh: Loopzizo K-100 是桌面级SLS 3D 打印机，突破性将工业级选择性激光烧结技术小型化、低成本化，无需后续回炉烧结，精度达到0.1mm~0.3mm 。设备采用封闭式结构，激光防护、控粉防尘，无需专业工业环境即可使用，适配全球电压。打印无需支撑，兼容 PA11/PA12/TPU 等材料，成型件强度高，余粉可循环利用控成本。完美匹配创客、设计工作室、高校及中小制造企业的研发与生产需求。
description_en: The Loopzizo K-100 is a desktop-class SLS 3D printer that miniaturizes and cost-optimizes industrial selective laser sintering technology—eliminating the need for post-process sintering furnaces and achieving layer resolution of 0.1–0.3 mm. Its fully enclosed structure provides laser safety, powder containment, and dust protection, enabling safe operation outside dedicated industrial facilities and supporting global voltage standards. Support-free printing is compatible with PA11, PA12, TPU, and other advanced polymers; printed parts exhibit high mechanical strength, and unspent powder is fully recyclable—reducing material costs. Ideal for makers, design studios, universities, and SMEs requiring agile R&D and low-volume production capabilities.

product_name_zh: 合金镍粉，纳米合金镍粉
product_name_en: Nickel Alloy Powder, Nano Nickel Alloy Powder
company_name: 杭州新川新材料有限公司
description_zh: 合金镍粉是以镍为主成分的球形金属粉末，具有耐腐蚀、抗氧化、耐热及耐磨特性。主要应用于电子、磁性材料和催化剂领域，因其高比表面积和良好的散散性，性能优异。随着增材制造（3D打印）等先进技术的发展，镍基合金粉末被广泛应用于航空航天、燃气轮机等领域。
description_en: Nickel alloy powder is a spherical metallic powder with nickel as the primary constituent, offering outstanding corrosion resistance, oxidation resistance, heat resistance, and wear resistance. Widely used in electronics, magnetic materials, and catalysis due to its high specific surface area and excellent dispersibility. With the advancement of additive manufacturing (3D printing), nickel-based alloy powders are increasingly deployed in aerospace components and gas turbine systems.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 杭州新川新材料有限公司
description_zh: 铜粉是一种具有 极高导电性与导热性 的功能金属粉末，广泛应用于 导电浆料、电极、电镀、电机部件、催化剂与粉末冶金 等领域。其优异的可塑性与导电性，使其成为电子制造与新材料研发中不可替代的重要原料。
description_en: Copper powder is a functional metallic powder exhibiting exceptionally high electrical and thermal conductivity. It is widely employed in conductive pastes, electrodes, electroplating, motor components, catalysts, and powder metallurgy. Its superior ductility and conductivity make it an irreplaceable raw material in electronic manufacturing and advanced materials R&D.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 杭州新川新材料有限公司
description_zh: 不锈钢粉末是以含铬、镍、钼等元素的不锈钢合金制成的金属粉末，呈规则球形。该粉末具有耐腐蚀、耐氧化特性，熔点1298-1420℃，其球形颗粒可平行排列于涂膜表面形成屏蔽层，有效阻隔湿气。在工业领域用于注射成型、烧结多孔金属过滤材料，以及制备航天涡轮叶片、汽车配件和核能设备部件。在医疗器械行业用于制造植入物、医疗工具等。
description_en: Stainless steel powder is a spherical metallic powder manufactured from stainless steel alloys containing chromium, nickel, molybdenum, and other elements. It exhibits excellent corrosion and oxidation resistance, with a melting point range of 1298–1420 °C. Its spherical morphology enables uniform particle packing and formation of effective moisture-barrier layers in coatings. Industrial applications include metal injection molding (MIM), sintered porous metal filters, and fabrication of aerospace turbine blades, automotive components, and nuclear equipment parts. In medical devices, it is used for implants and surgical instruments.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 杭州新川新材料有限公司
description_zh: 镍铁合金粉末是一种具有优异磁性能、导电性与化学稳定性的功能金属粉末。 它结合了镍的耐腐蚀性与铁的高磁导率，是一类典型的 软磁合金粉末材料，广泛应用于 磁性元件、电磁屏蔽、传感器、电子器件、粉末冶金与科研实验等领域。
description_en: Nickel-iron alloy powder is a functional metallic powder combining superior magnetic properties, electrical conductivity, and chemical stability. Leveraging nickel’s corrosion resistance and iron’s high magnetic permeability, it is a representative soft magnetic alloy powder. Key applications include magnetic components, electromagnetic shielding, sensors, electronic devices, powder metallurgy, and scientific research.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

Capable of printing dark ceramics and compatible with light-colored ceramics, it is engineered for industrial-scale batch manufacturing—solving critical challenges such as high-precision fabrication, thin-walled variable-section geometries, and controlled shrinkage.

Its submersible architecture delivers advantages in large-area capability, industrial batch production, part quality, and cost-effectiveness.

Offers selectable XY resolutions of 35 μm or 50 μm. Compatible with ceramic and metal slurries and pastes, making it ideal for complex, high-precision ceramic components. description_zh: 采用同轴光路设计，光机在数字曝光图像时，相机实时采集；在曝光打印时，通过相机监控图像的清晰度，亮度；精密制造、生物医疗、先进电子 等领域具有颠覆性潜力，尤其适合 小批量、高复杂度、多材料的微纳器件需求。
description_en: Features coaxial optical path design: during digital image exposure, a built-in camera captures real-time images; during printing exposure, the same camera continuously monitors image sharpness and brightness. This technology holds transformative potential in precision manufacturing, biomedical engineering, and advanced electronics—especially for low-volume, highly complex, multi-material micro-nano device fabrication.

description_en: This integrated system combines image fusion, model slicing, motion control, resin level feedback, and real-time image monitoring to execute 3D printing. Through synchronized exposure and modular hardware design, it resolves the traditional trade-off between large build volume and high resolution—representing a key industrial breakthrough in high-performance 3D printing.

description_zh: 高温合金打印件采用激光选区熔化技术（SLM）成形，材料如GH4169、GH3625、Hastelloy X。热处理包含：应力退火、固溶处理、时效处理、热等静压等。致其组织致密，兼具优异的高温强度、抗蠕变与抗氧化性能。经热处理后，可满足航空发动机叶片、燃油喷嘴等关键热端部件在极端环境下的使用要求，实现复杂结构一体化制造。
description_en: Fabricated via Selective Laser Melting (SLM) using nickel-based superalloys such as GH4169, GH3625, and Hastelloy X. Post-processing includes stress-relief annealing, solution treatment, aging, and hot isostatic pressing (HIP), resulting in fully dense microstructures with exceptional high-temperature strength, creep resistance, and oxidation resistance. After thermal treatment, components meet stringent service requirements for critical hot-section aerospace applications—including turbine blades and fuel nozzles—enabling monolithic fabrication of complex geometries.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）
