description_en: Spherical nickel-based superalloy powder engineered for additive manufacturing (3D printing) and powder metallurgy (PM/HIP). Key material for manufacturing high-performance, complex aerospace components—including turbine blades, fuel nozzles, and integrally bladed rotors. Features include high sphericity, tightly controlled impurity levels, and ultra-low combined oxygen, nitrogen, and hydrogen content.

description_zh: 制粉棒/铸造级镍基母合金 巍舜新材可以独立生产制粉棒，这是用于增材制造3D打印行业的一种高温合金，它们具有高的合金化学组成范围和高服务温度范围。制粉棒是航空发动机和燃气涡轮机热段的关键部件，包括大型复杂薄壁结构部件，如涡轮后框架、涡轮旋转和导向叶片、圆盘、定子、扩散器等。等级：等级:GH3625、GH4169等，表面:黑皮棒/光亮/抛光/CNC/两头可钻孔和螺纹,尺寸:直径:30~130毫米，长度:120~700毫米(或者根据客户需求，来图定制)技术工艺:铸造级镍基母合金
description_en: Pre-alloyed nickel-based master alloy rod manufactured in-house for powder production in additive manufacturing. Designed for demanding high-temperature applications, it features precise compositional control and elevated service temperature capability. Critical for hot-section components in aircraft engines and gas turbines—including turbine rear frames, rotating and stationary turbine blades, disks, stators, and diffusers. Available grades: GH3625, GH4169, etc.; surface finishes: as-cast (black skin), bright, polished, CNC-machined, or with drilled/tapped ends; dimensions: diameter 30–130 mm, length 120–700 mm (custom sizes available per drawing). Produced via casting-grade nickel-based master alloy process.

description_zh: 最高 64 m³/min 和 15250 Pa。 没有腐蚀，直接通过阶梯式（FU）或组合（FUK）变频器驱动。 转速最高可以提升至 105 Hz（约 6200 U/min）。 由钢或不锈钢制成的外壳，由不锈钢或铝制成的、主要向后弯曲的转子。 对于不锈钢规格： Niro 轴和最高的耐腐蚀性。 可变的接口可能性。

company_name: 常熟市通闰电子技术有限公司
description_zh: 产品基础特点： 1. 全视窗钢化玻璃，手套口开于玻璃，无观察死角。 2. 机加工视窗法兰，承压能力强，高真空下不变形，气密性好。 3. 净化系统水氧值可≤0.1ppm，保持超低环境。 4. 过渡舱采用气弹簧平衡设计，开启轻便。 5. 集成抽真空与充气管路，操作便捷。 下料手套箱定制特点： 可对接称量下料设备：支持材料直接下料入箱，自带称量，便于包装。 定制报警灯：实时监测水氧浓度，支持报警设置，保障箱内气氛稳定。 双面多工位结构：支持多人同时操作或灵活换位，提高操作效率。
description_en: Key standard features: (1) Full-view tempered glass viewport with glove ports integrated into the glass surface—eliminating blind spots; (2) Precision-machined viewport flange with high pressure resistance and zero deformation under high vacuum, ensuring superior hermeticity; (3) Purification system achieving ≤0.1 ppm H₂O & O₂ levels for ultra-low-contamination environments; (4) Air-spring balanced transfer chamber for effortless opening; (5) Integrated vacuum pumping and gas purging manifolds for streamlined operation. Customization options for powder dispensing: direct integration with weighing/dosing equipment for in-box material dispensing and real-time mass measurement; configurable visual/audible alarms for real-time H₂O/O₂ monitoring; dual-sided multi-station configuration enabling concurrent or flexible operator positioning to maximize workflow efficiency.

description_zh: 全面的防爆措施以确保安全 防爆箱体：采用 304 不锈钢材质，内壁涂有防静电涂层，以消除火花和静电带来的风险。 安全视窗：多层防爆钢化玻璃，具有出色的抗冲击性和透光性，能提供清晰的视野。 LED 照明：无火花且低热量的设计，在昏暗照明环境中也能确保安全。 防爆排放：特殊结构设计，可防止在物料传输过程中发生粉尘爆炸。 智能控制，操作简便 触摸控制系统：防爆触摸屏，能够实时监测温度、湿度、压力和气体浓度等关键参数，并具备数据记录和报警功能。 氧气含量报警：高精度监测，支持三级声光报警。
description_en: Comprehensive explosion protection engineered for maximum safety: (1) Explosion-proof enclosure constructed from 304 stainless steel with internal anti-static coating to eliminate spark and electrostatic discharge risks; (2) Multi-layer explosion-resistant tempered glass viewport offering outstanding impact resistance and optical clarity; (3) Spark-free, low-heat LED lighting ensuring safe operation in low-light conditions; (4) Explosion-mitigating discharge structure preventing dust explosions during material transfer. Intelligent control for simplified operation: intrinsically safe touch-screen interface enabling real-time monitoring of temperature, humidity, pressure, and gas concentration—with data logging and alarm capabilities; high-precision oxygen monitoring with three-tier audible/visual alarm thresholds.
categories_zh: 手套箱，除尘防爆及禁烟设备

description_en: The 2GBS Glovebox is a high-performance, fully automated closed-loop purification system designed to continuously absorb H₂O and O₂ molecules, delivering an inert atmosphere with H₂O & O₂ < 0.1 ppm—tailored to meet demanding experimental requirements. This cost-effective, recirculating purification system was developed specifically for R&D applications.

company_name: 苏州华英光电仪器有限公司
description_zh: （1）集成高效水冷设计，确保QBH模组在连续高功率激光运行时核心温度恒定，从根本上抑制热透镜效应，保障长期输出的光斑质量与功率稳定性。 （2）独特的可调焦设计，允许用户在现场快速、精准地微调输出光束的焦点位置，无需更换光学部件即可灵活适配不同的加工材料与工艺需求，大幅提升设备应用灵活性。 （3）核心光学元件采用进口高纯度石英材料，并结合特殊设计的低吸收增透镀膜工艺。这种组合实现了极高的激光损伤阈值和超过99%的透射率，最大限度提升能量利用率并保护激光光源。 （4）采用全金属密封结构和防尘设计，确保模组在充满粉尘、油雾的恶劣工业环境中依然能可靠工作。
description_en: (1) Integrated high-efficiency water-cooling ensures stable core temperature of the QBH module during continuous high-power laser operation—fundamentally suppressing thermal lensing and guaranteeing long-term beam quality and power stability; (2) Unique adjustable focus mechanism enables rapid, precise on-site fine-tuning of beam focal position without optical component replacement—enhancing adaptability to diverse materials and processes; (3) Core optics fabricated from imported high-purity fused silica, combined with specialized low-absorption anti-reflection coatings, deliver an exceptionally high laser-induced damage threshold (LIDT) and >99% transmission—maximizing energy efficiency and protecting the laser source; (4) Fully metal-sealed construction with dust-resistant design ensures reliable operation in harsh industrial environments laden with dust and oil mist.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

description_zh: （1）产品线覆盖从紫外（UV）到近红外（NIR）的主流激光波段，提供固定倍率、手动连续变倍及电动变倍等多种扩束镜型号。采用优质光学材料与精密光学设计，确保与各品牌光纤激光器、超快激光器完美兼容，轻松集成入现有系统。 （2）光斑质量好、长期稳定性强。扩束镜与场镜组件联合优化，致力于实现极小的场曲和出色的焦平面能量均匀性。 （3）采用石英镜片，确保在高功率激光长期照射下的波前稳定性和超低热漂移。 （4）我们强大的工程团队可根据您的特定需求，提供在倍率、波长、通光孔径、机械接口等深度定制服务。

description_en: The ANTINKSY Smooth Cold Build Plate eliminates the need for heated beds and odor emissions in FDM 3D printing. Compatible with Bambu Lab P1P, P1S, X1C, X1E, and A1 printers, it provides strong adhesion for PLA and PETG filaments. Parts release effortlessly—even with cooling fans active—and the plate self-levels after each removal. Its self-recovering coating maintains consistent adhesion performance over extended use, enabling energy-efficient low-temperature printing while effectively resolving warping and uneven adhesion issues.

description_en: ANTINKSY ACF Release Film resolves excessive separation force associated with conventional FEP films—increasing print speed and reducing resin print failure rates. With >92% transmittance (ACF) and >94% (HDF), it delivers up to 3× faster processing in rapid print modes and is compatible with all mainstream LCD 3D printers.

company_name: 新乡市戴克机械制造有限公司
description_zh: DK-4X 型超声波筛粉机是超声波系统与振动筛粉机的有机结合，通过声波传导系统把声波能量传递给筛网丝，破坏网丝表面张力，避免细微粉末的吸附，降低筛网孔的堵塞几率，促使细粉过网，从而达到筛分细粉或易吸附粉末的目。细微金属粉末或特别的合金粉末，暴露在空气中更易于氧化，尤其是高端金属粉末，含氧量有更高的要求，在分离粉末颗粒时不能接触空气。因此在筛分过程中加入了惰性气体保护系统，严格控制系统含氧量，并安装有氧含量检测装置，防止金属粉末接触氧气，保证粉末的纯度进而提高金属3D打印件的品质。本产品通过第三方权威机构认证，确保产品防爆要求符合相关规定。
description_en: The DK-4X ultrasonic sieving machine integrates ultrasonic technology with vibratory screening—transferring acoustic energy directly to the mesh wires to disrupt surface tension and prevent fine powder adhesion, thereby minimizing screen blinding and enhancing throughput of ultrafine or cohesive powders. For oxidation-sensitive metallic and specialty alloy powders—especially high-end grades requiring strict oxygen control—an inert gas protection system is integrated to maintain ultra-low O₂ levels throughout sieving, supported by real-time oxygen monitoring to preserve powder purity and ensure optimal metal 3D printed part quality. Certified by third-party authoritative agencies for compliance with explosion-protection standards.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: Panda Cyborg-拓竹P系列打印机升级改装方案
product_name_en: Panda Cyborg – Bambu Lab P-Series Printer Upgrade Kit
company_name: 必趣创新科技(深圳)有限公司
description_zh: Panda Cyborg 是一套面向高阶玩家与工程师的 P1S 全硬件级改造方案，可将整机完整转换为 开源 Klipper 架构。它并非单一控制板升级，而是对核心系统进行全面重构，带来前所未有的速度与性能释放。 您只需这几步即可获得一个全新的P1S： ①将新电路板移植到您的 P1P 或 P1S 中，即可将其变成一台混合动力强劲的设备。 ②使用 24V 或 48V 驱动电机，速度可达 1 米/秒。 ③利用涡流探测技术，只需几秒即可扫描整个工作台。 ④享受高帧率 1080p 摄像头直播、腔室环境传感器以及更多精彩功能！ 别犹豫！现在就来享受panda cyborg的魅力吧！
description_en: Panda Cyborg is a full-hardware, open-source Klipper firmware conversion kit designed for advanced users and engineers—transforming the Bambu Lab P1S into a high-performance hybrid platform. Unlike simple control board upgrades, Panda Cyborg performs a complete system-level rearchitecture to unlock unprecedented speed and capability. Key benefits include: (1) Direct installation onto P1P or P1S platforms for immediate performance enhancement; (2) Support for 24 V or 48 V motor drivers enabling print speeds up to 1 m/s; (3) Eddy-current bed leveling—scanning the entire build surface in seconds; (4) High-frame-rate 1080p live camera feed, chamber environmental sensors, and additional advanced features. Experience the Panda Cyborg advantage today!

product_name_zh: Panda Treat-跨界可食用打印平台升级方案
product_name_en: Panda Treat – Cross-Industry Edible Printing Platform Upgrade
company_name: 必趣创新科技(深圳)有限公司
description_zh: Panda Treat 作为一款极具话题性的创新型打印改造方案，必趣通过将传统 3D 打印机转变为可食用内容定制平台，为大家带来“好看也好喝”的跨界打印体验。 拥有panda treat，您即可获得以下超值体验： ①食用级打印应用：可轻松在咖啡、啤酒、蛋糕等多种食品表面进行图案与文字打印，实现高度个性化定制 ②真实场景验证：仅用一台设备，即可在 4 天内完成 800 多杯定制咖啡，具备优秀的稳定与实用性 ③单 PCB 即插式设计：通过巧妙的单板适配结构，您的定制化操作将变得简单、易上手 ④兼容广泛：兼容拓竹 A / P / X / H 系列打印机，并可通过通过通用支架适配其他机型
description_en: Panda Treat is an innovative, conversation-starting upgrade that transforms standard 3D printers into customizable edible content platforms—delivering a truly 'deliciously visual' cross-industry experience. Key advantages: (1) Food-grade printing capability—enabling high-fidelity pattern and text printing on coffee, beer foam, cakes, and other consumables; (2) Real-world validation—proven to reliably produce >800 custom coffee prints within 4 days using a single unit; (3) Single-PCB plug-and-play architecture—simplifying setup and operation through elegant, unified hardware integration; (4) Broad compatibility—with native support for Bambu Lab A/P/X/H-series printers and universal mounting brackets for third-party systems.

product_name_zh: 融速科技-桌面级金属3D打印机Laser Mini
product_name_en: Rensu Tech Laser Mini – Desktop Metal 3D Printer
company_name: 苏州融速智造科技有限公司
description_zh: Laser Mini是融速科技自主研发的桌面级多激光送丝金属3D打印机，五路一体集成设计，整机十分紧凑，外形尺寸为520*550*820mm，占地面积不足0.3㎡，支持220V电压，可灵活部署在办公桌面、实验室操作台、教研教室等小空间场所。操作简单，无需专业门槛也可快速学习上手操作，独立自主完成打印全流程。采用自研VEAM激光送丝增材技术，标配AMtwin工艺监控软件及熔池监控相机，小体积拥有工业级打印精度和性能。搭载900W激光打印头，全局气密保护系统，支持打印碳钢、不锈钢、钛合金等多种金属材料打印，可打印范围是150*150*170mm，满足科教用户基本打印需求。
description_en: The Laser Mini is Rensu Tech’s proprietary desktop metal 3D printer based on multi-laser wire-fed additive manufacturing (VEAM). Its compact five-in-one integrated design measures only 520 × 550 × 820 mm (footprint < 0.3 m²) and operates on standard 220 V power—ideal for deployment on office desks, lab benches, or classroom workstations. Intuitive operation requires no specialized expertise, enabling users to independently master the full print workflow. Equipped with proprietary VEAM technology, AMtwin process monitoring software, and a melt pool monitoring camera, it delivers industrial-grade precision and performance in a desktop form factor. Featuring a 900 W laser head and global inert-gas sealing, it supports carbon steel, stainless steel, titanium alloys, and other metals—within a build volume of 150 × 150 × 170 mm—meeting core educational and research prototyping needs.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 德国施坦巴赫股份公司
description_zh: 4. 氧化铝增韧氧化锆（ATZ）工业陶瓷部件 施坦巴赫股份公司可打印氧化铝增韧氧化锆（ATZ） 材质的高性能陶瓷部件，既能承接单件定制，也可实现批量生产，即便是面向严苛工业应用领域的复杂几何结构，也能精准打印。 ATZ 材料兼具氧化铝与氧化锆的各项优异特性，因而具备高强度、高硬度与高断裂韧性，同时还拥有出色的生物相容性与耐磨性。这类陶瓷零部件是承受高机械载荷与强磨损工况应用的理想之选。
description_en: High-performance industrial ceramic components made from alumina-toughened zirconia (ATZ) are manufactured by Steinsbach AG using additive manufacturing. Capable of both single-piece prototyping and serial production, the process achieves precise replication of complex geometries required for demanding industrial applications. ATZ combines the superior properties of alumina and zirconia—exhibiting high strength, hardness, fracture toughness, excellent biocompatibility, and outstanding wear resistance—making it ideal for components subjected to high mechanical loads and severe abrasive conditions.

company_name: 德国施坦巴赫股份公司
description_zh: 3. 氮化铝工业陶瓷部件 施坦巴赫股份公司可生产氮化铝（AlN）材质的高性能陶瓷部件，即能承接单件定制，也可实现批量生产，即便是面向严苛工业应用领域的复杂几何结构，也能精准打印。 氮化铝凭借其优异的热稳定性、高导热性及机械强度而广受认可。氮化铝陶瓷部件的热膨胀系数与硅材料相近，这一特性使其成为需要高效散热与尺寸稳定性应用场景的理想选材。该类零部件的典型应用领域包括热管理解决方案、工业制造及半导体行业。
description_en: High-performance industrial ceramic components made from aluminum nitride (AlN) are manufactured by Steinsbach AG using additive manufacturing. Capable of both single-piece prototyping and serial production, the process achieves precise replication of complex geometries required for demanding industrial applications. AlN is widely recognized for its exceptional thermal stability, high thermal conductivity, and mechanical strength. Its coefficient of thermal expansion closely matches that of silicon, making AlN components ideal for applications requiring efficient heat dissipation and dimensional stability—particularly in thermal management solutions, industrial manufacturing, and the semiconductor industry.

company_name: 德国施坦巴赫股份公司
description_zh: 2. 氧化锆技术陶瓷部件 施坦巴赫股份公司可打印氧化锆（ZrO₂ ）材质高性能陶瓷部件。既能承接单件定制，也可实现批量生产，即便是面向严苛工业应用领域的复杂几何结构，也能精准打印。 在各类工业陶瓷材料中，氧化锆的机械强度位居榜首，性能可与钢材相媲美，同时还兼具极低的热导率。
description_en: High-performance technical ceramic components made from zirconia (ZrO₂) are manufactured by Steinsbach AG using additive manufacturing. Capable of both single-piece prototyping and serial production, the process achieves precise replication of complex geometries required for demanding industrial applications. Among industrial ceramics, zirconia exhibits the highest mechanical strength—comparable to steel—while maintaining an exceptionally low thermal conductivity.

company_name: 德国施坦巴赫股份公司
description_zh: 1. 氧化铝技术陶瓷打印部件 施坦巴赫股份公司可打印氧化铝（Al₂O₃）材质的高性能陶瓷部件，既能承接单件定制，也可实现批量生产，即便是严苛工业应用领域的复杂几何结构也可以打印。 氧化铝因具备超高硬度、耐腐蚀性与耐高温稳定性，成为承受机械载荷、侵蚀性介质及热应力作用零部件的理想选材。其卓越的介电强度与机械韧性，可确保零部件长期稳定运行、性能可靠。该类零部件的典型应用领域包括电气绝缘、机械工程、化工工程以及电子行业。
description_en: High-performance technical ceramic components made from alumina (Al₂O₃) are manufactured by Steinsbach AG using additive manufacturing. Capable of both single-piece prototyping and serial production, the process achieves precise replication of complex geometries required for demanding industrial applications. Alumina’s ultra-high hardness, corrosion resistance, and high-temperature stability make it ideal for components exposed to mechanical loading, aggressive media, and thermal stress. Its excellent dielectric strength and mechanical toughness ensure long-term operational reliability and consistent performance. Typical application areas include electrical insulation, mechanical engineering, chemical engineering, and electronics.

company_name: 俐陶智（上海）科技有限公司
description_zh: 氮化铝是用于热管理应用的理想高性能陶瓷材料。增材制造的氮化铝部件的密度和导热性能与传统生产的部件相当，而包括与硅相似的热膨胀系数以及高机械和热稳定性等特性使其成为工业应用和半导体的理想材料。
description_en: Aluminum nitride (AlN) is a high-performance ceramic material ideally suited for thermal management applications. Additively manufactured AlN components achieve density and thermal conductivity comparable to conventionally produced parts. Its coefficient of thermal expansion closely matches that of silicon, combined with high mechanical and thermal stability—making it an ideal material for industrial applications and semiconductor devices.
categories_zh: 陶瓷3D打印材料（氧化铝、氧化锆、陶瓷复合材料等）

company_name: 俐陶智（上海）科技有限公司
description_zh: LithaBite AO250 含 99.99% 高纯度氧化铝，可确保正畸托槽具有生物相容性且耐用，能以极低的成本满足正畸领域的高标准。该材料与俐陶智 LCM 3D 打印技术及特定的热后处理配合使用时，可生产出半透明的陶瓷托槽。LithaBite AO 250 专为与天然牙齿无缝融合而设计，融合了卓越的强度和优异的摩擦特性，使其成为兼具美观和功能的正畸产品理想材料。
description_en: LithaBite AO250 is a 99.99% high-purity alumina-based material engineered specifically for orthodontic applications. It ensures full biocompatibility and exceptional durability while meeting stringent clinical requirements at minimal cost. When used with LithaTech’s proprietary LCM 3D printing technology and optimized thermal post-processing, it enables production of semi-transparent ceramic brackets. Designed for seamless aesthetic integration with natural teeth, LithaBite AO250 delivers outstanding mechanical strength and superior frictional properties—making it the ideal material for functional and aesthetically advanced orthodontic appliances.
categories_zh: 陶瓷3D打印材料（氧化铝、氧化锆、陶瓷复合材料等）

company_name: 俐陶智（上海）科技有限公司
description_zh: 俐陶智 CeraFab Multi 2M30 是多材料 3D 打印全新领域的技术基石。该设备采用开放系统，用户能够组合处理不同材料（如陶 瓷、金属和聚合物）及其单个组件的多种特性，进而开发出新一代的多功能零部件。
description_en: The LithaTech CeraFab Multi 2M30 represents a foundational platform for next-generation multi-material 3D printing. Its open-system architecture enables users to combine and process diverse material classes—including ceramics, metals, and polymers—and leverage their distinct functional properties to develop innovative, multifunctional components.

company_name: 俐陶智（上海）科技有限公司
description_zh: S320 拥有 CeraFab System LCM 系列 3D 打印机中最大的构建平台，比 S65 大五倍的生产能力。凭借其 4K 投影系统，可在 246 x 130 mm 的构建平台上实现高达 60 μm 的分辨率，是批量生产高度复杂的中型陶瓷零件的理想选择。
description_en: The S320 features the largest build platform in the CeraFab System LCM series of 3D printers—delivering five times the production capacity of the S65. Equipped with a 4K projection system, it achieves up to 60 μm resolution across a 246 × 130 mm build area, making it the ideal solution for high-volume production of highly complex, medium-sized ceramic parts.
categories_zh: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备

company_name: 无锡优倍特新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 高性价比PLA树脂 UBP-825是我公司基于聚乳酸树脂研发生产的高性能聚乳酸复合材料。它绿色环保，安全无害。该材料专为挤出成型产品设计，具有优异的性能、良好的加工稳定性和成型稳定性。 UBP-825的主要特点是高性价比、100%线材整齐、韧性好、具有一定的哑光效果，可适应30-500mm/s的高速3D打印，主要应用于挤出式高速3D打印产品。
description_en: UBP-825 is a high-value-performing polylactic acid (PLA) composite resin developed and manufactured by Wuxi UBT New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. Environmentally friendly and non-toxic, this material is specially formulated for extrusion-based applications, offering excellent performance, superior processing stability, and reliable shape retention. Key features include exceptional cost-effectiveness, 100% uniform filament winding, high toughness, and a subtle matte finish. Compatible with high-speed 3D printing at feed rates from 30 to 500 mm/s, UBP-825 is optimized for high-throughput extrusion-based 3D printing systems.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 北京翌锋电子科技有限公司
description_zh: 针对台式扫描电镜（Desktop SEM）对空间紧凑性与成像高性能的极致要求，翌锋电子提供由Wehnelt栅极、微孔阳极与微尖La/CeB6阴极组合而成的预对中式电子枪组件。模块化电子枪的设计在出厂前就实现了精密同轴对准，用户无需进行复杂的对中校准即可获得理想的同轴束斑，真正做到了“即插即用”，大幅降低了设备停机时间与售后维护成本。
description_en: Designed to meet the extreme demands of desktop scanning electron microscopes (Desktop SEMs) for compact footprint and high-resolution imaging, Yifeng Electronics provides a pre-aligned electron gun module comprising a Wehnelt electrode, micro-aperture anode, and micro-tip La/CeB6 cathode. The modular electron gun undergoes precision coaxial alignment during factory assembly—eliminating the need for complex user alignment procedures. This true plug-and-play design delivers optimal coaxial beam spots immediately upon installation, significantly reducing instrument downtime and after-sales maintenance costs.

product_name_en: Microfocus CT Single-Crystal LaB6 Electron Source
company_name: 北京翌锋电子科技有限公司
description_zh: 精准几何设计，赋能微焦成像：微尖锥面单晶LaB6方案 翌锋电子深谙微焦斑X射线设备对焦点质量的苛刻要求。通过超精密研磨工艺，翌锋电子提供Φ50至100μm×∠60°的微尖锥面单晶LaB6电子源。微尖锥面结构在保证高亮度发射的同时，实现了焦斑质量与结构热稳定性的完美平衡，不仅能显著提升X射线成像的空间分辨率，更能承受长时间高功率运行带来的热损耗，确保焦点位置与能量输出始终如一。无论是精密工业检测还是前沿生物成像，翌锋电子都能为您提供最稳定的“微米级”核心光源。
description_en: Precision geometric design enabling microfocus X-ray imaging: micro-tip conical single-crystal LaB6 solution. Yifeng Electronics addresses the stringent focal quality requirements of microfocus X-ray systems through ultra-precision grinding to deliver single-crystal LaB6 electron sources with micro-tip diameters of Φ50–100 μm and cone angles of 60°. This micro-tip conical geometry achieves an optimal balance between high-brightness emission, focal spot quality, and thermal structural stability—significantly enhancing spatial resolution in X-ray imaging while sustaining prolonged high-power operation without thermal drift. The result is consistently stable focal position and energy output, supporting both precision industrial inspection and cutting-edge biological imaging.

product_name_en: Additive Manufacturing Single-Crystal LaB6 Electron Source
company_name: 北京翌锋电子科技有限公司
description_zh: 随着金属3D打印向高精度与工业化量产迈进，电子束熔化（EBM）技术对能量源的稳定性提出了严苛要求。作为系统的“心脏”，单晶LaB6电子源正成为提升成型质量的标配。相比传统钨（Tungsten）灯丝，单晶LaB6具备更高的电流密度与亮度，能产生更细致且能量集中的电子束斑，显著增强复杂薄壁结构的成型精度。其优异的抗毒化能力与超长使用寿命，大幅减少了打印中途更换灯丝的风险，确保了大型零件连续生长的一致性。选择翌锋电子的LaB6方案，意味着更低的维护成本、更高的生产效率以及更完美的工艺品质，助力您的增材制造跨越性能边界。
description_en: As metal additive manufacturing advances toward higher precision and industrial-scale production, electron beam melting (EBM) systems demand increasingly stable energy sources. As the ‘heart’ of the system, single-crystal LaB6 electron sources have become a standard for improved part quality. Compared to conventional tungsten filaments, single-crystal LaB6 offers higher current density and brightness—enabling finer, more energy-concentrated electron beam spots that significantly improve forming accuracy for complex thin-walled structures. Its superior resistance to poisoning and extended service life drastically reduce the risk of filament replacement mid-print, ensuring consistent growth of large-scale components. Choosing Yifeng Electronics’ LaB6 solution translates into lower maintenance costs, higher production efficiency, and superior process quality—empowering your AM systems to surpass performance boundaries.

product_name_zh: 异质多材料智能光固化3D打印机高精度MD3
product_name_en: Heterogeneous Multi-Material Intelligent DLP 3D Printer High-Precision MD3
company_name: 宁波迈科绰智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 当微米决定成败，M3是您最优选择。M3是目前全球精度最高的多材料DLP打印机之一，7.6μm光学分辨率，适配微流控、MEMS、仿生4D打印等极致精密场景。大理石基座保证纳米级长期稳定性，全自动上料、自动换液、延时摄影，真正实现无人值守的高通量科研。面向对精度有终极追求的顶尖实验室与工业研发中心，已开放预定。
description_en: When microns define success, the MD3 is your optimal choice. Among the world’s highest-resolution multi-material DLP printers, the MD3 delivers an optical resolution of 7.6 μm—optimized for ultra-precise applications including microfluidics, MEMS, and biomimetic 4D printing. Its granite base ensures nanometer-level long-term stability. Fully automated material feeding, resin swapping, and time-lapse imaging enable truly unattended, high-throughput research operations. Engineered for elite laboratories and industrial R&D centers with uncompromising precision requirements—pre-orders now open.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

product_name_zh: 异质多材料智能光固化3D打印机通用MD0
product_name_en: Heterogeneous Multi-Material Intelligent DLP 3D Printer Universal MD0
company_name: 宁波迈科绰智能科技有限公司
description_zh: 多材料层内/层间同步一体化打印，我们以“材料自由”为核心理念，打破传统单材料打印局限，为科研和工业创新提供“全新赋能”！MD1以14.9万元的突破性定价，将多材料DLP打印技术带入每一间材料/机械/生物实验室及企业研发部。支持软/硬、导电/绝缘等多种材料一体化成型，50μm精度满足绝大多数微结构器件制备需求。紧凑设计，自动换料，操作门槛低，助您快速研发！
description_en: Intra-layer and inter-layer synchronized multi-material printing—driven by our core philosophy of ‘material freedom’. The MD0 breaks traditional single-material limitations to deliver transformative capability for scientific research and industrial innovation. Priced at RMB 149,000, it brings multi-material DLP printing within reach of every materials science, mechanical engineering, and biomedical laboratory—and corporate R&D department. Supports integrated fabrication of soft/hard, conductive/insulating, and other material combinations. With 50 μm resolution, it meets the requirements of most micro-structured device fabrication tasks. Compact design, automatic material switching, and intuitive operation accelerate R&D cycles.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

product_name_zh: 瀚海常青HH-9800高温颗粒3D打印机
product_name_en: Haihai Changqing HH-9800 High-Temperature Pellet 3D Printer
company_name: 青岛瀚海常青科技有限公司
description_zh: 瀚海常青HH-9800高温颗粒3D打印机，基于自主RMEM技术打造，是一款面向工业直接制造的高端增材制造装备。该设备突破了传统FDM/FFF技术的局限，可直接使用工业级塑料颗粒进行打印，在显著降低材料成本的同时，能够保持原材料95%以上的优异性能。其打印成品具备卓越的环境耐受性，可在-40℃至120℃的宽温域内稳定工作，并支持ABS、PC、PET及各类特种复合材料的高精度成型。凭借高稳定性和广泛的材料适应性，HH-9800已广泛应用于航空航天、汽车制造、医疗器械等领域，满足复杂部件生产、快速原型试制及功能集成等严苛需求，为企业的降本增效与智能制造升级提供可靠支撑。
description_en: The Haihai Changqing HH-9800 is an industrial-grade additive manufacturing system engineered for direct part production, built upon proprietary RMEM technology. It overcomes inherent limitations of conventional FDM/FFF processes by enabling direct printing from industrial plastic pellets—reducing material costs significantly while retaining >95% of the raw material’s original mechanical performance. Printed parts exhibit exceptional environmental resistance, operating stably across a wide temperature range of −40 °C to 120 °C, and support high-precision fabrication of ABS, PC, PET, and specialized composite materials. With outstanding process stability and broad material compatibility, the HH-9800 is widely deployed in aerospace, automotive, and medical device manufacturing for complex component production, rapid functional prototyping, and integrated part consolidation—delivering reliable support for cost reduction, efficiency gains, and smart manufacturing transformation.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

Designed for industrial metal components up to 1500 mm × 1500 mm × 1700 mm (including build plate thickness) and weighing up to 4000 kg (including build plate), it features optional gas filtration/recirculation and inert gas protection capabilities.

company_name: 烟台富利新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: PETG是一种热塑性聚酯，具有显着的耐化学性、耐用性和出色的制造成型性。它被广泛应用于3D打印，因为醇改性结构能防止PET在加热时出现结晶和脆化问题。PETG材料层间附着力强，打印过程中变形小，在低温环境下耐受性好，耐酸碱腐蚀，打印时气味较轻，正逐渐成为3D打印的热门材料。
description_en: PETG is a thermoplastic polyester offering exceptional chemical resistance, durability, and excellent processability in 3D printing. Its alcohol-modified molecular structure prevents crystallization and embrittlement during thermal processing. PETG exhibits strong interlayer adhesion, minimal warping, excellent low-temperature toughness, resistance to acids and alkalis, and low odor emission—making it an increasingly popular choice for professional and industrial 3D printing applications.

product_name_zh: 云杉增材A1000工业级3D打印机
company_name: 杭州云杉增材科技有限公司
description_zh: 云杉增材A1000是专为工业级量产设计的大尺寸3D打印机，以1立方米超大成型空间和12-14公斤日产能重新定义制造效率。设备采用高刚性一体化框架与独创结构级4Z主动调平技术，确保高速打印下的极致稳定与精度。 支持多材料打印，兼容工程塑料与低成本颗粒原料，配备智能续打与检测系统，可实现24小时连续生产。已广泛应用于大型艺术创作、建筑装饰、汽车模具及工业制造领域，为客户提供高效、可靠、低成本的数字化制造解决方案。 用速度重塑制造，以稳定赢得信任——云杉A1000，您的工业制造新引擎。
description_en: The Yunshan Additive A1000 is a large-format, production-oriented 3D printer engineered for industrial-scale manufacturing. Featuring a 1 m³ ultra-large build volume and a daily output capacity of 12–14 kg, it redefines productivity benchmarks. Its high-rigidity monocoque frame and proprietary structural-level 4Z active leveling technology ensure exceptional dimensional accuracy and stability—even at high print speeds. The system supports multi-material printing, including engineering thermoplastics and low-cost pellet feedstocks, and incorporates intelligent resume printing and real-time monitoring for uninterrupted 24/7 operation. Widely adopted in large-scale art fabrication, architectural decoration, automotive tooling, and industrial component manufacturing, the A1000 delivers efficient, reliable, and cost-effective digital manufacturing solutions. Redefining manufacturing with speed. Earning trust through stability—the Yunshan A1000 is your new industrial manufacturing engine.

Fabricated via high-temperature co-firing, it features high density and complete encapsulation of the heating element within the alumina matrix—ensuring long-term reliability, rapid thermal response, and uniform temperature distribution.

description_en: Customizable high-thermal-conductivity ceramic atomizer core enabling rapid heating, uniform temperature distribution, and instantaneous vaporization without carbon buildup. Utilizes porous ceramic fiber structure for efficient wicking and oil retention, minimizing cold-end condensation.

description_zh: 可定制 电阻温度变化率小，发热速度快，消耗电工能小。 高温共烧陶瓷发热体，致密性好，发热完全被包裹在陶瓷中。长期使用可靠性高，升温速度快，均匀性好。焊点采用1000度钎焊工艺，焊点稳定，长期可耐350度高温。
description_en: Customizable ceramic heating plate featuring low resistance-temperature coefficient, fast thermal response, and low electrical power consumption. Fabricated via high-temperature co-firing for high density and full encapsulation of the heating element within the alumina matrix—ensuring long-term reliability, rapid thermal response, and uniform heating. Brazed joints employ 1000 °C high-temperature brazing, ensuring joint stability and sustained operation at up to 350 °C.

company_name: 绍兴镭斯特光学仪器有限公司
description_zh: 产品优势： 高速无刷电机扫描; 多面高精标准棱镜; 极速双组DSP处理芯片; 优异的信号质量,高精度,高分辨率; 拥有测量直径,位置,跳动,多根能力; 常规体,微细体, 透明体,异形体测量; RS485,TCP/IP,PROFINET多种通讯选择; 应用领域： 设备类：各类塑料挤出机组，电线电缆挤出机组，包带机组，塑料管和医疗管挤出机组等。 产品类： 电线电缆，光纤光缆，塑料管材，医疗管材，玻璃管，3D耗材，金属线材， 丝材等圆形产品测量。
description_en: Key advantages: high-speed brushless motor scanning; precision multi-faceted reference prism; dual DSP processors for ultra-fast signal processing; exceptional signal fidelity, high accuracy, and high resolution. Capable of measuring diameter, position, runout, and multiple objects simultaneously. Supports measurement of standard, fine-diameter, transparent, and irregular cross-sections. Communication interfaces include RS485, TCP/IP, and PROFINET. Applications: Equipment—plastic extruders, wire & cable extrusion lines, tape-wrapping machines, plastic & medical tubing extrusion systems; Products—wires, cables, optical fibers, plastic tubes, medical tubing, glass tubes, 3D printing filaments, metal wires, and other round-profile products.

company_name: 绍兴镭斯特光学仪器有限公司
description_zh: 本款激光计米器是专为线缆、管材、板材等长材加工场景打造的专业长度测量设备。它采用非接触式激光检测技术，可避免传统滚轮计米器的打滑、磨损问题，在高速生产线上也能稳定输出可靠的测量数据。 设备配备高清触控显示屏，支持实时读数、长度预设、数据清零等功能，操作直观便捷。工业级铝合金框架与密封式设计，使其能耐受车间粉尘、油污等复杂环境，长期运行稳定性强。 它不仅可单机独立使用，还支持数据通信接口，能无缝对接产线控制系统，实现自动化生产闭环，是电线电缆、塑胶挤出、管材制造等行业提升生产效率与品质管控的理想选择。
description_en: This laser meter is a professional non-contact length measurement device specifically designed for continuous-length materials such as cables, tubes, and sheets. It eliminates slippage and wear issues associated with traditional roller-based meters, delivering stable and accurate measurements even on high-speed production lines. Equipped with a high-resolution touch display, it supports real-time readout, preset length setting, and zero-reset functions for intuitive operation. Its industrial-grade aluminum alloy frame and sealed enclosure ensure robust performance in demanding workshop environments—including exposure to dust and oil. Fully compatible with factory automation systems, it supports seamless integration into production control networks via standard communication interfaces—making it an ideal solution for enhancing productivity and quality control in wire & cable, plastic extrusion, and tube manufacturing industries.

product_name_zh: 金属球化-微波等离子火炬
company_name: 成都奋羽电子科技有限公司
description_zh: 1.采用波导结构的大气常压射流微波等离子体源 2.中心温度最高可达3000 K以上，耐高温的特殊垃圾或废气可以在等离子体中轻易分解，并且可以保证无污染物排放 3.可用于铁，铜，铍，氧化铝，氧化锡，富锂锰等材料的球化。 输出功率 3000W可调（功率可定制） 输出频率 2450MHz ±15MHz 进气量：10-100L/min 微波泄露：≤2mW/cm2 供电电压：AC380V±10%，50Hz±2Hz 火焰核心温度＞3000K 启动模式：标准ON/OFF 激发方式：压缩波导BJ22 工作模式：连续波CW 功率稳定度： 1% 微波能量利用率：＞80%（空气）
description_en: 1. Atmospheric-pressure jet-type microwave plasma source based on waveguide architecture. 2. Central plasma temperature exceeds 3000 K—enabling efficient decomposition of refractory waste or exhaust gases with zero pollutant emissions. 3. Suitable for spheroidization of iron, copper, beryllium, alumina, tin oxide, lithium-rich manganese, and other materials. Output power: adjustable up to 3000 W (customizable). Operating frequency: 2450 MHz ±15 MHz. Gas flow rate: 10–100 L/min. Microwave leakage: ≤2 mW/cm². Input power: AC 380 V ±10%, 50 Hz ±2 Hz. Plasma core temperature: >3000 K. Start mode: standard ON/OFF. Ignition method: compressed waveguide BJ22. Operating mode: continuous wave (CW). Power stability: ±1%. Microwave energy utilization efficiency: >80% (in air).
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_en: Microwave Drying System for 3D Sand Molds
company_name: 成都奋羽电子科技有限公司
description_zh: 这款3D砂型微波表干干燥设备的创新技术特性使其在铸造行业的多个关键场景中具有显著优势: 一.大型复杂砂型快速表干 深部穿透：30kW@915MHz单元直接加热砂型核心，配合2450MHz单元同步处理表层，将1.5米厚砂型干燥时间压缩至45分钟. 二、精密铸造砂型均质化处理 毫米级控温：通过12路2450MHz单元0.1kW级精确调节，保持型壳各区域温差＜3℃. 三、自动化造型线集成 在线式处理：设备直接对接造型机出口，微波干燥段长度仅需2米（对比燃气窑8-10米），节拍提升至90秒/箱 四、绿色铸造改造 零燃烧排放:纯电驱动符合环保要求，配套余热回收系统可降低综合电耗30%.
description_en: This innovative microwave surface-drying system for 3D-printed sand molds delivers distinct advantages across critical foundry applications: I. Rapid Surface Drying of Large, Complex Molds: Deep-penetration heating—using a 30 kW @ 915 MHz unit targeting the mold core, synchronized with 2450 MHz units treating the surface—reduces drying time for 1.5 m-thick molds to just 45 minutes. II. Homogenized Processing for Precision Casting: Millimeter-level temperature control—achieved via 12 independently regulated 2450 MHz units (0.1 kW resolution)—maintains temperature uniformity across the mold shell with <3 °C variation. III. Seamless Integration into Automated Molding Lines: Inline configuration—directly interfaced with molding machine output—requires only a 2 m microwave drying zone (vs. 8–10 m for gas-fired kilns), enabling cycle times of 90 seconds per mold. IV. Green Foundry Transformation: Zero combustion emissions—fully electric operation meets stringent environmental standards; optional waste-heat recovery reduces total energy consumption by up to 30%.
categories_zh: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备

company_name: 成都奋羽电子科技有限公司
description_zh: 1.加热质量与效率提升 均匀性：915MHz微波穿透性强，直接作用于砂型内部水分子，避免传统热传导导致的表面硬化、内部潮湿问题，干燥均匀性显著提高。 速度：微波加热无需预热，能量直接转化为热能，干燥时间可缩短至传统天然气设备的1/3~1/5。 可控性：5路微波辐射系统可分区调控功率，适配不同砂型尺寸和含水量，避免过热或干燥不足。 2.经济成本降低 能耗成本：微波能量利用率达70%以上 维护成本：无易损件，易维护。 应用场景 适用对象：大批量中小型砂型（如汽车铸件、泵阀模具）的快速表干。 环保适配：零碳，适用于环保严控区；天然气设备需处理NOx/SOx排放。
description_en: 1. Enhanced Heating Quality and Efficiency: Uniformity—915 MHz microwaves exhibit strong penetration, directly exciting water molecules within sand molds and eliminating surface hardening and internal dampness caused by conventional thermal conduction, thereby significantly improving drying uniformity. Speed—Microwave heating requires no preheating; energy is directly converted to thermal energy, reducing drying time to 1/3–1/5 that of conventional natural gas systems. Controllability—A five-zone microwave radiation system enables independent power regulation per zone, accommodating varying mold dimensions and moisture content to prevent overheating or under-drying. 2. Reduced Economic Cost: Energy Consumption—Microwave energy utilization exceeds 70%. Maintenance—No wear-prone components; simple and low-maintenance design. Application Scope: Target Users—Rapid surface drying of medium- and small-sized sand molds in high-volume production (e.g., automotive castings, pump/valve tooling). Environmental Compliance—Zero-carbon operation, suitable for regions with stringent environmental regulations; natural gas systems require NOx/SOx emission control.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

Capabilities include diameter, position, runout, and multi-axis measurements. Supports measurement of standard, fine, transparent, and irregular cylindrical objects. Communication interfaces: RS485, TCP/IP, PROFINET. Applications: Equipment—Plastic extrusion lines, wire & cable extrusion lines, tape-wrapping machines, plastic and medical tubing extrusion lines. Products—Wires and cables, optical fibers, plastic pipes, medical tubing, glass tubes, 3D printing filaments, metal wires, and monofilaments.

product_name_zh: 烯碳陶瓷复合镍钴高温合金粉末
company_name: 中锐增材制造(山东)有限公司
description_zh: 烯碳陶瓷复合镍钴高温合金粉末是一种专为先进增材制造与热喷涂技术设计的新型高性能复合材料粉末。 其体系以镍钴基高温合金为基体，核心创新在于将纳米或微米尺度的烯碳材料（如石墨烯、碳纳米管）与陶瓷相（如碳化钛TiC、碳化钨WC）通过特殊工艺均匀复合至金属粉末表面或内部。使得粉末在继承镍钴合金优异高温强度、抗氧化和耐腐蚀性的基础上，获得了来自烯碳材料的出色导热、减摩及强韧化特性，以及陶瓷相带来的超高硬度和耐磨性。 该粉末主要用于激光/电子束选区熔化3D打印和超音速火焰喷涂。所制备的部件或涂层在极端高温、高应力及强磨损环境下表现出更卓越的综合性能，是实现下一代超高温、长寿命关键部件的重要前沿材料。
description_en: A novel high-performance composite powder engineered specifically for advanced additive manufacturing (AM) and thermal spray technologies. Based on a Ni-Co superalloy matrix, its core innovation lies in the uniform integration—via proprietary processes—of nano- or micron-scale graphene-based carbon materials (e.g., graphene, carbon nanotubes) and ceramic phases (e.g., TiC, WC) onto or within the metal powder particles. This architecture preserves the Ni-Co alloy’s outstanding high-temperature strength, oxidation resistance, and corrosion resistance while imparting superior thermal conductivity, friction reduction, and toughening from the graphene component, and exceptional hardness and wear resistance from the ceramic phase. Primarily used in laser/electron beam powder bed fusion (SLM/EBM) 3D printing and high-velocity oxy-fuel (HVOF) thermal spraying. Components or coatings fabricated with this powder deliver superior comprehensive performance under extreme conditions—including ultra-high temperature, high mechanical stress, and severe abrasion—making it a frontier material for next-generation ultra-high-temperature, long-life critical components.

product_name_zh: 等离子热喷涂烯碳陶瓷装备及工艺
product_name_en: Supersonic Plasma Thermal Spraying Equipment and Process for Graphene-Ceramic Composites
company_name: 中锐增材制造(山东)有限公司
description_zh: 超音速等离子热喷涂是一种材料表面强化和表面改性的技术，采用由直流电驱动的等离子电弧作为热源，将陶瓷、合金、金属等材料加热到熔融或半熔融状态，并以超音速6马赫速度喷向经过预处理的工件表面而形成附着牢固的表面层的方法，可以使基体表面具有耐磨、耐腐蚀、耐高温氧化、电绝缘、隔热、防辐射、减磨和密封等性能。超音速等离子热喷涂使用的材料主要有球形氧化铝、碳化硅、氮化硼和烯碳陶瓷粉末等。 超音速等离子热喷涂设备主要包括：①喷枪②电源③送粉器④热交换器⑤供气系统⑥控制框。
description_en: Supersonic plasma thermal spraying is a surface engineering technology for enhancing and modifying material surfaces. It employs a DC-driven plasma arc as the heat source to melt or semi-melt feedstock materials—including ceramics, alloys, and metals—and propel them at supersonic speeds (~Mach 6) onto pre-treated substrates, forming strongly adherent functional coatings. These coatings confer properties such as wear resistance, corrosion resistance, high-temperature oxidation resistance, electrical insulation, thermal barrier performance, radiation shielding, friction reduction, and sealing. Common feedstocks include spherical alumina, silicon carbide, boron nitride, and graphene-ceramic composite powders. The core equipment comprises: (1) spray torch, (2) power supply, (3) powder feeder, (4) heat exchanger, (5) gas supply system, and (6) control cabinet.

product_name_zh: 超音速火焰热喷涂的装备及工艺
product_name_en: Supersonic Flame Thermal Spraying Equipment and Process
company_name: 中锐增材制造(山东)有限公司
description_zh: 超音速火焰热喷涂是一种先进的表面涂层技术。核心工艺是利用高压燃烧室将燃料与氧气混合燃烧，产生高温高压燃气流，随后通过特制的拉瓦尔喷嘴加速至超音速。金属或陶瓷粉末从枪体轴向或径向注入高速射流中，被瞬间加热至熔融或半熔融状态，并以极高的速度撞击基体表面，形成致密、结合强度高的优质涂层。 核心装备是超音速喷涂枪系统，包括： -燃烧室与喷嘴：产生并加速超音速射流的关键部件； -粉末送料系统：精确控制粉末输送速率与注入位置； -燃料与气体控制单元：精确调节燃料、氧气及送粉载气的流量与压力； -冷却系统：通常采用水冷，防止喷枪过热； -机器人或运动机构：实现喷枪相对于工件的精确、稳定运动。
description_en: Supersonic flame thermal spraying (HVOF) is an advanced surface coating technology. Its core process involves combusting fuel and oxygen under high pressure in a combustion chamber to generate high-temperature, high-pressure gas, which is then accelerated to supersonic velocities through a specialized Laval nozzle. Metal or ceramic powders are injected axially or radially into this high-velocity jet, rapidly heated to molten or semi-molten states, and propelled onto the substrate surface at extremely high impact velocities, forming dense, high-bond-strength coatings. Core equipment includes: (1) combustion chamber and Laval nozzle—the critical components for generating and accelerating the supersonic jet; (2) precision powder feed system—for accurate control of powder feed rate and injection location; (3) fuel and gas control unit—for precise regulation of fuel, oxygen, and carrier gas flow rates and pressures; (4) cooling system—typically water-cooled—to prevent torch overheating; (5) robotic or motion system—for precise, stable relative positioning between torch and workpiece.

description_zh: 高速激光熔覆是以高能密度的激光为热源在基材表面熔覆一层合金材料，使之与基材实现冶金结合的表面改性方法。激光熔覆设备以数控机床与集成机器人为核心，集成激光发生器、精密送粉系统及智能控制系统，构成一体化加工装备。 数控机床负责轴类、盘类等规则工件的高精度定位与运动控制，保障熔覆轨迹精准；7轴机器人手臂自动热喷涂，5米长轴数控车床，数控磨床，适配异形件、复杂曲面的柔性加工，可灵活调整姿态完成多角度熔覆。 通过这种工艺可以显著提高工件表面的硬度和耐磨性，大幅延长工件的服役寿命。高速激光熔覆使用的材料主要有金属粉末、合金粉末、钴基碳化钨粉末、镍基碳化钨粉末和烯碳陶瓷粉末等。
description_en: High-speed laser cladding is a surface modification technique utilizing a high-energy-density laser beam to melt a layer of alloy material onto a substrate surface, forming a metallurgically bonded clad layer. The integrated laser cladding system centers on CNC machine tools and collaborative robots, incorporating a laser source, precision powder delivery system, and intelligent control unit. CNC machines ensure high-precision positioning and motion control for regular-shaped parts (e.g., shafts, discs), guaranteeing accurate cladding trajectories. A 7-axis robotic arm enables automated thermal spraying, complemented by a 5-meter-long CNC lathe and CNC grinder to support flexible processing of complex geometries and freeform surfaces, allowing multi-angle cladding via adaptive posture adjustment. This process significantly enhances surface hardness and wear resistance, substantially extending component service life. Compatible feedstock materials include metal powders, alloy powders, cobalt-based tungsten carbide powders, nickel-based tungsten carbide powders, and graphene-ceramic composite powders.

Fully compatible with common 3D printing filaments including PLA, TPU, and PETG. Backed by comprehensive regulatory documentation, including FDA and EPA compliance reports, and complete antimicrobial efficacy and toxicological safety data.

product_name_en: 5000 W Quad-Function Intelligent Laser Power Supply
company_name: 深圳市金威源科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 此型号适用于半导体激光退火、切割及中等尺寸工业3D打印。恒流恒压精密控制为精细加工提供稳定能量输入，保障加工质量；全面的保护机制与智能诊断功能，大幅提升了设备在长时间连续打印或复杂工艺步骤中的可靠性与维护便捷性。 选择金威源成套采购降低了中型系统的总拥有成本与复杂度。开箱即用的成熟子系统，使您能跳过底层验证，加速产品上市，抢占先机。同时，其高可靠性设计和全面保护机制，为设备稳定运行提供保障，让您更专注于核心工艺优化。
description_en: Designed for semiconductor laser annealing, cutting, and mid-size industrial 3D printing systems. Precision constant-current/constant-voltage control ensures stable energy delivery for high-fidelity processing. Comprehensive protection mechanisms and intelligent diagnostics significantly enhance reliability and ease of maintenance during extended continuous operation or complex multi-step processes. Integrated procurement from Jinweiyuan reduces total cost of ownership (TCO) and system complexity. Pre-validated, plug-and-play subsystems eliminate low-level verification, accelerating time-to-market and competitive advantage. Robust reliability design and full protection suite ensure stable operation, enabling users to focus on core process optimization.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

product_name_en: 2000 W Quad-Function Intelligent Laser Power Supply
company_name: 深圳市金威源科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 本产品专为半导体精密标记、微加工及桌面级3D打印设计。它集恒压恒流输出、CAN通信与智能控制于一体，高精度控制确保激光能量稳定，满足半导体工艺的严苛要求。智能CAN通信便于集成到自动化产线，实现实时监控与数据追溯。紧凑设计节省设备宝贵空间，尤其适合桌面级金属3D打印机及精密加工系统。 选择金威源一体化方案能显著降本，以单一模块替代多供应商采购，降低管理与对接风险。全集成设计开箱即用，省去电源、驱动、通信系统的搭建调试，让您的团队能聚焦光学核心，加速研发。严格的预集成测试保障了高可靠性与一致性，降低您的量产与现场应用风险，助您快速将产品推向市场。
description_en: Engineered for semiconductor precision marking, microfabrication, and desktop-grade metal 3D printing. Integrates constant-voltage/constant-current output, CAN bus communication, and intelligent control in a single compact module. Ultra-precise laser energy regulation meets stringent semiconductor process requirements. Smart CAN communication enables seamless integration into automated production lines for real-time monitoring and traceability. Space-saving form factor optimizes footprint—ideal for desktop metal printers and precision micro-processing systems. Jinweiyuan’s integrated solution significantly lowers costs by replacing multi-vendor procurement, reducing management overhead and interface risks. Fully pre-integrated and tested, it eliminates setup and commissioning of separate power supplies, drivers, and communication modules—freeing engineering teams to concentrate on optical and process development. Rigorous pre-integration validation ensures high reliability and consistency, minimizing production ramp-up and field deployment risks for faster commercialization.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: 智维新材(西安)科技有限公司
description_zh: 产品规格：Φ1.2mm、Φ1.6mm、Φ2.4mm 牌号：TC4、TC11、TA15、TA18 3D打印专用钛及钛合金丝材具备超低氢含量（H≤0.0020%），并通过定制成分、室温拉拔与专用润滑剂协同从根源保障长期可靠性。其采用连续冷拉配合在线退火的紧凑工艺，替代传统高成本、多工序流程，实现高效率低成本生产。在线退火技术有效消除内应力，使丝材具有较高的直线度，从而保证钛及钛合金丝材在后续打印过程中送丝的顺畅性。
description_en: Titanium and titanium alloy filaments specifically engineered for FFF 3D printing. Available in diameters of Φ1.2 mm, Φ1.6 mm, and Φ2.4 mm; grades include TC4, TC11, TA15, and TA18. Features ultra-low hydrogen content (H ≤ 0.0020 wt%) and guaranteed long-term reliability achieved through customized alloy composition, room-temperature wire drawing, and proprietary lubrication. Produced via continuous cold-drawing with in-line annealing—a compact, high-efficiency process replacing traditional multi-step, high-cost methods. In-line annealing effectively relieves internal stresses, ensuring superior straightness and smooth, reliable feeding during printing.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

product_name_en: Wire for Plasma Atomization (PA) Powder Production
company_name: 智维新材(西安)科技有限公司
description_zh: 产品规格：Φ4.0、Φ5.0、Φ6.0 牌号：TC4、TC11、TA15、TA18 本产品为等离子旋转电极法（PA法）制粉专用钛及钛合金丝材，提供TC4、TC11、TA15及TA18四种牌号，直径涵盖Φ4.0mm、Φ5.0mm、Φ6.0mm规格。采用先进工艺确保丝材化学成分高度均匀、纯净，具有优异的冶金质量与稳定的雾化特性。产品直线度高、表面光洁，能有效保障PA法制粉过程中电极进给的连续性和稳定性，从而提升粉末的球形度、流动性及批次一致性，是生产高品质钛合金粉末的理想电极材料。
description_en: Specialized titanium and titanium alloy wire for plasma rotating electrode (PA) powder production. Available in grades TC4, TC11, TA15, and TA18, with diameters of Φ4.0 mm, Φ5.0 mm, and Φ6.0 mm. Engineered using advanced manufacturing techniques to ensure exceptional chemical homogeneity, purity, and metallurgical quality, along with stable atomization behavior. Features high straightness and superior surface finish—critical for continuous, stable electrode feeding during PA processing. Enables production of high-sphericity, high-flowability, and batch-consistent titanium alloy powders, making it the ideal electrode material for premium-grade AM powder manufacturing.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 北京敏速智造生物科技有限公司
description_zh: 适合于多种材料，包括生物材料、高分子材料、热熔性材料等 多种喷头可供选择，气动挤出（温控、高温、光固化、同轴双组分、静电直写）和机械挤出等喷头 操作系统极简高效易用，一小时即可掌握 体积小巧可放置桌面或生物安全柜内
description_en: A versatile, compact bioprinting platform compatible with diverse materials—including biomaterials, polymers, and thermoplastics. Offers multiple interchangeable printheads: pneumatic extrusion (with temperature control, high-temp capability, photopolymerization, coaxial dual-material, and electrospinning) and mechanical extrusion. Intuitive, minimalist operating system—fully operational within one hour. Compact footprint enables desktop placement or integration into biosafety cabinets.

company_name: 北京敏速智造生物科技有限公司
description_zh: 单一喷头可通过软件独立运动实现FDM及MEW的3D打印过程 软件自动实现Gcode和Slicer之间高效自动切换 高清摄像头，通过软件进行实时监控射流，并具备录像和拍照功能 静电打印时最小出丝线径为1μm 可进行转轴打印，最小转轴直径可达1mm 可打印材料：PGA，PGLA，PGDLLA，PLLA，PDLA，PDLLA，LCL
description_en: A single-nozzle system enabling both FDM and MEW 3D printing via software-controlled independent nozzle motion. Features automatic, high-efficiency switching between G-code and slicer workflows. Integrated high-definition camera enables real-time jet monitoring, video recording, and image capture. Achieves minimum fiber diameter of 1 μm under electrostatic printing conditions. Supports rotational-axis printing with minimum axis diameter down to 1 mm. Compatible with PGA, PGLA, PGDLLA, PLLA, PDLA, PDLLA, and LCL.

company_name: 北京敏速智造生物科技有限公司
description_zh: 支持4种材料同时打印，实现复杂结构的多材料复合构建，兼容水凝胶，细胞悬液，高分子材料等多种打印耗材。 高精度控制，温度/压力智能调节，适用于构建多层级组织结构。
description_en: Supports simultaneous printing of up to four distinct materials for complex, multi-material composite fabrication. Fully compatible with hydrogels, cell-laden bioinks, and synthetic polymers. Delivers high-precision control with intelligent temperature and pressure regulation—ideal for constructing hierarchical tissue architectures.

company_name: 北京敏速智造生物科技有限公司
description_zh: 双独立通道设计，支持“细胞+基质”或“刚性+柔性材料”协同打印，平衡打印速度与结构精度。 快速制备中小型组织工程支架，药物筛选模型，满足基础科研与高通量实验需求。
description_en: Dual independent-channel architecture enables synergistic co-printing of 'cells + matrix' or 'rigid + flexible materials', optimizing the balance between print speed and structural fidelity. Designed for rapid fabrication of small-to-medium-scale tissue engineering scaffolds and drug screening models—meeting both fundamental research and high-throughput experimental requirements.

company_name: 苏州唐伟德飞象金属材料有限公司
description_zh: 适用于数控车床排刀机、刀塔机自动送料模式 1. 公差稳定，弹簧夹头可以更好的夹紧材料，保障产品品质的稳定性;产品合格率可控制性，节省加工成本; 2.直线度好，主轴 5000 转以上料机不震动;直线度好送料时弹簧夹头易通过，不卡料，无震动，机床生产稳定性高，生产效率高，良品率高; 3.精车铝棒取铝棒优质的芯部棒材无粗晶环，阳极氧化效果更稳定
description_en: Optimized for CNC lathe bar feeders and turret lathes operating in automated feeding mode. Features: (1) Tight, stable dimensional tolerances enabling superior chuck gripping and consistent part quality; improved yield and reduced machining cost; (2) Excellent straightness—ensures vibration-free operation even at spindle speeds exceeding 5000 rpm; facilitates smooth feeding through spring collets without jamming or vibration, enhancing machine stability, productivity, and part yield; (3) Machined from premium core aluminum billet free of coarse grain rings, ensuring uniform anodizing results.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

description_zh: 适用于数控车床走心机导套生产模式 1.公差小，材料一致性好，生产稳定性越高，加工出的产品误差小，成品率高; 2.直线度好，能使主轴保持高速(8000 转以上)运转，有效提高生产效率;可降低生产过程中对机械设备的损伤，延长设备使用寿命，保持设备生产的精密度; 3.材料双头倒角自动送料工作顺畅不卡料。
description_en: Designed for Swiss-type CNC lathes operating in guide-bushing mode. Features: (1) Minimal dimensional tolerance and exceptional material consistency—ensuring high process stability, low part variation, and elevated first-pass yield; (2) Superior straightness enabling sustained high-speed spindle operation (>8000 rpm), significantly boosting productivity while minimizing mechanical wear, extending equipment service life, and preserving long-term precision; (3) Double-end chamfered geometry ensures seamless, jam-free automated feeding.

company_name: 德马克(武汉)科技有限公司
description_zh: 金属 3D 打印机（也称金属增材制造设备）是基于离散 - 堆积原理，通过逐层添加金属材料直接制造复杂金属零件的先进制造装备，无需传统模具与复杂加工流程，彻底改变了金属零部件的生产方式。轻松制造传统工艺无法实现的镂空结构、晶格结构、内部流道等复杂部件。
description_en: An advanced metal additive manufacturing system based on the discrete-layer deposition principle, directly fabricating complex metal components by sequentially adding metal powder layer-by-layer—eliminating the need for conventional tooling and multi-step machining. Enables effortless production of geometrically unmanufacturable features such as internal lattices, hollow structures, and intricate flow channels.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 德马克(武汉)科技有限公司
description_zh: 光固化陶瓷打印机是一种基于光固化成型原理，专门用于制造高精度、复杂结构陶瓷零件的增材制造设备。它通过将陶瓷粉末与光敏树脂均匀混合成陶瓷浆料，利用紫外光（激光或 DLP）逐层固化，再经过脱脂和烧结，最终获得致密、高强度的陶瓷部件。能够实现传统方法难以加工的内部流道、薄壁结构、晶格结构和复杂型腔，是航空航天、电子、医疗、能源等高端领域的关键制造装备。
description_en: An SLA-based additive manufacturing system specifically engineered for high-precision ceramic part fabrication. It processes a homogeneous slurry of ceramic powder and photosensitive resin, selectively curing each layer using UV light (laser or DLP), followed by debinding and sintering to yield dense, high-strength ceramic components. Capable of producing internal flow channels, ultra-thin walls, lattice structures, and complex cavities—unachievable via conventional methods—making it indispensable for aerospace, electronics, medical devices, and energy applications.
categories_zh: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备

company_name: 无锡达芬奇新材料有限公司
description_zh: 通过在金属钨绳上将金刚石颗粒或 CBN 颗粒均匀固结在高强度钨丝基体上制成的高强度复合电镀金属细绳，专为 3D 金属打印基板分离设计。 核心优势 1.性能更优：相比传统电火花钼丝，破断拉力值更高、切割性能更强、使用寿命更长； 2.效率更高：切割速度比传统电火花工艺快 8-10 倍； 3.成本更低：降低耗材更换频率，配合环切设备实现综���成本降低 50%； 4.无损伤切割：3C 行业应用中不会造成被切割物体变色，无需后处理打磨。
description_en: A high-strength composite electroplated wire fabricated by uniformly embedding diamond or CBN abrasive particles onto a high-tensile-strength tungsten wire substrate—specifically designed for separating 3D-printed metal parts from build plates. Key advantages: (1) Superior performance—higher breaking tensile strength, enhanced cutting efficiency, and extended service life versus conventional EDM molybdenum wire; (2) Higher throughput—cutting speed increased 8–10× over traditional EDM; (3) Lower total cost of ownership—reduced consumable replacement frequency and integrated ring-cut systems cut overall costs by 50%; (4) Non-damaging cutting—no discoloration or post-processing required, ideal for precision 3C component applications.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 江阴菲美塑业有限公司
description_zh: 我们的PLA切片（颗粒）由可再生植物资源生产，并针对PLA打印耗材进行了优化。该材料具有出色的可打印性、尺寸精度和表面质量，使其成为全球FDM/FFF 3D打印耗材最受欢迎的原材料之一。 由我们的切片制成的PLA打印耗材非常适合快速原型制作、教育用途、消费品和装饰应用，将易用性与可持续性相结合。
description_en: Our PLA pellets are derived from renewable plant-based resources and optimized specifically for PLA filament production. They deliver outstanding printability, dimensional accuracy, and surface finish—making them one of the world’s most widely adopted raw materials for FDM/FFF 3D printing filaments. PLA filaments produced from these pellets are ideally suited for rapid prototyping, educational use, consumer goods, and decorative applications—combining ease of use with environmental sustainability.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 江阴菲美塑业有限公司
description_zh: 我们的PETG切片（PETG颗粒）是一种高质量的热塑性聚酯，具有优异的透明度、韧性和加工稳定性。它是专门为3D打印长丝挤出而开发的，在强度、清晰度、灵活性和易打印性之间实现了极好的平衡。
description_en: Our PETG pellets are high-purity thermoplastic polyester granules engineered for optimal 3D filament extrusion. They offer exceptional clarity, toughness, and thermal processing stability—striking an ideal balance among mechanical strength, optical transparency, flexibility, and print reliability.

description_zh: 核心特点： 1.超大型基板加工专用，承载重量达 5T，满足大型航空航天零件需求； 2.加工行程长达 1600mm，适配长 1600mm× 宽 1600mm 超大基板； 3.高功率配置，切割稳定性强，适配批量生产场景。
description_en: Key features: (1) Engineered for ultra-large build plate processing—supports payloads up to 5 metric tons, meeting demanding aerospace component requirements; (2) Extended working travel of 1600 mm, compatible with oversized 1600 mm × 1600 mm build plates; (3) High-power configuration ensures robust cutting stability—optimized for high-volume production environments.

company_name: 北京航宇星箭检测科技有限公司
description_zh: 工业 CT 检测凭借无损、三维可视化、高精度定量的核心优势，可适配多种复杂工件与场景，覆盖航空航天、汽车制造、电子半导体、增材制作（3D打印）、材料与失效分析、医疗器械等多个核心领域。针对高可靠性要求的关键部件；针对研发验证与生产线质控；针对微型、高精度器件的内部结构分析；工业CT检测是 3D 打印件质量控制的标配技术，解决传统检测手段的盲区问题；用于科研与故障溯源，支撑材料研发与产品改进；针对植入式医疗器件的高安全性要求。
description_en: Leveraging non-destructive, fully 3D volumetric visualization and high-precision quantitative analysis, industrial CT inspection serves diverse high-complexity applications across aerospace, automotive, semiconductor electronics, additive manufacturing (3D printing), materials & failure analysis, and medical devices. It is the de facto standard for quality assurance of 3D-printed parts—addressing blind spots inherent in conventional NDT methods. Critical applications include: verification of mission-critical component integrity; R&D validation and inline production QC; internal structural analysis of miniaturized, high-precision components; scientific root-cause investigation and materials development support; and stringent safety compliance for implantable medical devices.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 北京航宇星箭检测科技有限公司
product_name_en: Beijing Hangyu Xingjian Testing Technology Co., Ltd.
company_name: 北京航宇星箭检测科技有限公司
description_zh: 北京航宇星箭检测科技有限公司成立于2022年02月25日，注册地位于北京市房山区德润南路9号院4号楼1层101。公司拥有射线检测、数字射线成像系统、工业CT检测、加速器检测、常规超声波检测、超声C扫描检测、超声相控阵检测、渗透检测、磁粉检测、激光散斑检测、涡流检测、理化试验等各种类检测设备60余台。经CMA、CNAS认可的无损检测能力覆盖金属材料及制品、非金属材料及制品的超声、射线、磁粉、渗透检测。公司主要服务于：航空、航天，核电、兵器、轨道交通、汽车、矿产、医疗、3D打印等高精尖领域。
description_en: Founded on February 25, 2022, and headquartered at Unit 101, Floor 1, Building 4, No. 9 Derun South Road, Fangshan District, Beijing, the company operates over 60 state-of-the-art inspection systems—including radiographic testing (RT), digital radiography (DR), industrial CT, accelerator-based inspection, conventional ultrasonic testing (UT), ultrasonic C-scan, phased-array UT, liquid penetrant testing (PT), magnetic particle testing (MT), laser speckle interferometry, eddy current testing (ET), and physical/chemical laboratory testing. Accredited by CMA and CNAS, its certified NDT capabilities cover ultrasonic, radiographic, magnetic particle, and penetrant testing for both metallic and non-metallic materials and components. Core customer sectors include aviation, aerospace, nuclear power, defense, rail transportation, automotive, mining, healthcare, and additive manufacturing.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 苏州精丝新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: PLA+丝绸(PLA+ Silk)打印出的模型具有丝绸光泽质感，表面光滑不易显层纹;支撑相比其他材料，更容易从模型表面剥离，接触面表面光滑感强;该产品基于PLA材料改性而来，具有PLA易打印性的特点。
description_en: A modified PLA filament delivering a distinctive silk-like luster and exceptionally smooth surface finish with minimal visible layer lines. Offers superior support removal—clean separation from printed parts with notably smooth contact surfaces—while retaining the excellent printability inherent to standard PLA.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 苏州精丝新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: PETG是一款性价比高的具有防水性、耐化性、高韧性的透明材料;打印成品具有一定透明度，表面光滑;像PLA一样易打印，无需恒温腔，不会发生翘边开裂。
description_en: A cost-effective, transparent thermoplastic polyester offering outstanding water resistance, chemical resistance, and impact toughness. Printed parts exhibit high clarity and smooth surface quality. Combines PLA-level ease of printing—requiring no heated chamber and exhibiting zero warping or cracking.

description_zh: SG2820-Pro型振镜，采用全铝一体化设计，密封等级高，对环境适应性强。同时采用水冷循环系统，有效控制振镜的工作温度，确保了整机长时间连续无故障运行。

company_name: 德国PRIMES公司∣武汉东隆科技有限公司
description_zh: Cube作为一款紧凑的便携移动型功率探测器，Cube能够测定激光加工头正下方加工区域的激光功率。Cube适用于全天候激光功率监测。由于设计紧凑，即使在狭小的空间里，Cube也能够进行激光功率的测量。Cube采用可靠的封装，具有很好的防震、防尘能力。Cube带有LCD显示屏和锂电池供电，可通过micro-USB接口充电。Cube内置数据缓存，可存储最近14次的测量结果，最后一次的测量结果可直接在LCD上显示。通过蓝牙连接手机app或电脑软件显示测量结果。
description_en: The Cube is a compact, portable laser power detector designed to measure laser power directly beneath the laser processing head. Suitable for continuous, all-weather laser power monitoring, its compact design enables reliable measurements even in confined spaces. The Cube features robust, shock-resistant, and dustproof packaging. It includes an LCD display and rechargeable lithium-ion battery, charged via micro-USB. Internal data buffering stores the last 14 measurement results, with the most recent value displayed directly on the LCD. Measurement data can be transmitted wirelessly via Bluetooth to a smartphone app or PC software.

company_name: 德国PRIMES公司∣武汉东隆科技有限公司
description_zh: ScanFieldMonitor SFM是专业为振镜加工领域设计的一款光束品质测试仪器，结构紧凑，特别适合于3D打印行业的狭小空间。SFM可以测量光束质量因子M2、焦点位置、光斑大小、振镜扫描速度、扫描矢量属性（方向、长度和绝对位置）等。
description_en: The ScanFieldMonitor (SFM) is a specialized beam quality measurement instrument engineered for galvanometer-based laser processing. Its compact design makes it especially suitable for space-constrained environments in additive manufacturing. SFM measures key parameters including beam quality factor (M²), focal position, spot size, galvo scan speed, and scan vector attributes (direction, length, and absolute position).

product_name_zh: 激光扫描场焦点分析仪
product_name_en: Laser Scan Field Focus Analyzer SFM 2D
company_name: 德国PRIMES公司∣武汉东隆科技有限公司
description_zh: SFM 2D是一款基于成熟散射测量原理的高效测量工具，能在不到1分钟内完成整个激光扫描场的全面分析。它通过特制的二维测量结构阵列，近乎同步地采集全场数据，不仅可精确测定光束位置，还能生成多种激光参数热力图，直观呈现光斑形态、扫描偏差、能量分布及时序误差等关键信息。该系统显著提升了校正效率，将传统耗时数小时的扫描区域校准过程大幅缩短，同时可记录打标速度、光斑尺寸、功率分布及激光焦散线等参数，实现快速、精准的扫描场性能评估与实时校正。
description_en: The SFM 2D is a high-efficiency measurement tool based on proven scattering metrology, capable of comprehensive analysis of an entire laser scan field in under one minute. Utilizing a custom-designed 2D sensor array, it captures full-field data nearly synchronously—enabling precise beam positioning and generating intuitive thermal maps of critical parameters including spot morphology, scan deviation, energy distribution, and timing errors. This system dramatically improves calibration efficiency, reducing traditional scan-field alignment from hours to minutes. It also records marking speed, spot size, power distribution, and laser caustic lines for rapid, accurate scan-field performance evaluation and real-time correction.

description_zh: 3D打印陶瓷砂 产品特点与优势：1.热膨胀率低，减少铸件变形，改善表面质量；2.耐火度高，热化学稳定性好，挥发物少，抗粘砂和脉纹缺陷；3.颗粒圆整坚实，角形系数低，表面光洁，流动性好，使用树脂少，发气量低，易填充，透气性好，能减少铸件的气孔等缺陷；4.强度适宜且均匀，高温残余强度低，后续易清理；5.烧结点温度高，耐高温持久性好，不易沾砂；6.抗热冲击，破杂率低，循环回收再生率高；7.铸件缺陷少，废品率低，降低了加工成本以及铸件的综合成本。
description_en: Ceramic sand for 3D printing. Key features and advantages: 1. Low thermal expansion coefficient minimizes casting distortion and improves surface finish; 2. High refractoriness and excellent thermochemical stability with low volatile emissions, effectively preventing burn-on and veining defects; 3. Spherical, dense grains with low sphericity coefficient, smooth surface, and superior flowability—reducing resin demand, gas evolution, and porosity while enhancing mold permeability and fillability; 4. Uniform, appropriate strength with low high-temperature residual strength for easy post-casting cleaning; 5. High sintering temperature and exceptional high-temperature durability, minimizing burn-on; 6. Excellent thermal shock resistance, low breakage rate, and high recyclability; 7. Reduced casting defects and scrap rate, lowering both machining and total casting costs.

description_zh: 分散在PETG基体中的石墨烯片层网络，与聚合物分子链形成强物理相互作用。该网络在剪切流动中可沿流动方向取向，而当剪切停止时，能显著限制分子链的自由回缩与松弛
description_en: Graphene nanosheets dispersed within a PETG matrix form an interconnected network that strongly interacts physically with polymer chains. Under shear flow, this network aligns along the flow direction; upon cessation of shear, it effectively restricts chain recoil and relaxation, thereby enhancing toughness.

product_name_zh: 石墨烯抗静电3D打印线材
company_name: 南通强生石墨烯科技有限公司
description_zh: 石墨烯具有本质高导电性。通过表面改性与分散技术，可在绝缘的聚合物基体内构建三维导电渗流网络。该网络为静电荷提供了连续的耗散路径，从而实现快速、平稳的放电，有效防止静电放电（ESD）现象。导电率范围：10⁰-10⁴ Ω·m
description_en: Graphene possesses intrinsic high electrical conductivity. Through surface modification and advanced dispersion techniques, a three-dimensional conductive percolation network is established within insulating polymer matrices. This network provides continuous pathways for rapid and stable electrostatic charge dissipation, effectively preventing electrostatic discharge (ESD). Electrical resistivity range: 10⁰–10⁴ Ω·m.

company_name: 苏州航宇星瑞科技有限公司
description_zh: 超纯净熔炼技术，明确杂质元素危害机制。建立热力学、动力学高温合金熔体杂质去除的冶金规律。独创新型坩埚制备技术。航标重熔浮渣达到零级。更少的夹杂物、更少的冶金缺陷、更优异的持久寿命、更高的铸造良品率。杂质控制可达美国最优级。持久寿命提升211%，显微疏松减少90%。铸造良率从59%提升至85%。
description_en: Produced via ultra-high-purity melting technology with clarified mechanisms of impurity element harm. Establishes metallurgical principles—thermodynamic and kinetic—for impurity removal in high-temperature alloy melts. Features proprietary crucible fabrication technology. Achieves ASTM Class 0 remelting slag. Results in fewer inclusions, reduced metallurgical defects, extended creep life, and higher casting yield. Impurity control meets the highest U.S. standards. Creep life increased by 211%; microporosity reduced by 90%. Casting yield improved from 59% to 85%.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 上海昱峰科技有限公司
description_zh: 微铸锻打印头是一款面向高性能金属增材制造系统的尖端核心部件，创新性地将金属增材与局部锻造功能集成于单一打印单元，兼具两种工艺的技术优势。 针对传统金属 3D 打印存在的致密度低、层间结合力弱、力学性能不佳等痛点，该打印头采用模块化设计，由电弧熔丝焊枪、实时动态锻造模块及智能温控系统组成。工作过程中，其先通过高能场将金属丝材熔化为熔池，再对凝固过程中的熔覆层施加精准局部锻压力，可有效消除内部孔隙与微裂纹，细化晶粒组织，显著提升打印件的致密度与抗疲劳性能。
description_en: An advanced core component for high-performance metal additive manufacturing systems, uniquely integrating metal additive deposition and localized forging into a single print unit—combining the advantages of both processes. Addressing key limitations of conventional metal 3D printing—including low density, weak interlayer bonding, and suboptimal mechanical properties—the print head employs a modular architecture comprising an arc wire-feed welding torch, a real-time dynamic forging module, and an intelligent thermal control system. During operation, it first melts wire feedstock into a molten pool using a high-energy source, then applies precise, localized forging force to the solidifying deposit—effectively eliminating internal porosity and microcracks while refining grain structure, thereby significantly enhancing part density and fatigue resistance.

description_zh: 于为企业提供快速、专业的砂型打印和铸件设计研发生产以及设备销售及售后培训等服务，拥有专业的3D砂型打印研发团队，可提供从零件图、浇铸工艺设计、3D砂型模拟验证、砂型产品打印到成品铸件的全程服务。

description_zh: Neumat TPU UE358 专为严苛工业应用设计，核心优势在于其卓越的力学性能： 高强度：XY 向拉伸强度达 28 MPa，Z 向压缩强度高达 48 MPa，承载与抗变形能力强。 刚柔并济：85A 邵氏硬度提供良好刚性，同时保持 200% 断裂伸长率，兼具韧性与抗冲击性。 典型应用：功能性工程结构件、高强度连接件、耐磨工业部件。 选择 Neumat TPU UE358，为您的工业产品提供可靠的材料保障。
description_en: Neumat TPU UE385 — a high-performance thermoplastic polyurethane engineered for demanding industrial applications. Key attributes include: high strength (28 MPa tensile strength in XY direction; 48 MPa compressive strength in Z direction), balanced stiffness-toughness (Shore A 85 hardness with 200% elongation at break), and excellent impact resistance. Ideal for functional engineering structures, high-strength connectors, and wear-resistant industrial components. Neumat TPU UE385 delivers reliable, application-critical material performance.

description_zh: Neumat PS286 PP 粉末 —— 为 SLS 3D 打印量身打造的高性能粉末。更精细粒径（D50 45-55μm，99% 颗粒≤80μm）带来卓越打印精度，细腻呈现复杂结构；56℃热变形温度与优异熔融流动性，兼顾零件耐热性与成型效率；适配 PP 材质天生的耐化学性与韧性，让每一次打印都兼具精度、强度与稳定性，赋能你的工程创新。
description_en: Neumat PS286 — a high-performance polypropylene (PP) powder specifically formulated for Selective Laser Sintering (SLS) 3D printing. Features fine particle size distribution (D50: 45–55 μm; 99% ≤ 80 μm) for exceptional dimensional accuracy and resolution of complex geometries. Offers a heat deflection temperature of 56 °C and outstanding melt flow characteristics, enabling robust part thermal stability and efficient processing. Leverages inherent PP advantages — chemical resistance, toughness, and fatigue performance — to deliver consistent precision, mechanical integrity, and process reliability for engineering innovation.

company_name: 苏州锐璞科技有限公司
description_zh: Smooth-20X 是锐璞科技针对高分子 3D 打印后处理行业痛点自主研发的突破性产品，也是首款面向中小批量生产的后处理熏抛设备。依托自研常温熏抛技术，从根本上解决高温蒸汽导致的处理不均、变形及性能衰减问题，处理后表面粗糙度稳定至 Ra 2.0 μm 以下，并显著增强零件机械性能。 该技术已获两项国家发明专利并完成国际专利布局，凭借突出的技术创新与产业价值，作为唯一后处理设备获评工信部 2025 中国增材制造优质产品。Smooth-20X 以原创技术与完备认证体系，展现锐璞科技全面出海、直面全球市场的信心与实力。
description_en: Smooth-20X is RuiPu Technology’s breakthrough, proprietary vapor polishing system developed to address critical pain points in post-processing of polymer 3D-printed parts. As the industry’s first vapor polishing solution designed for small-to-medium batch production, it employs an innovative ambient-temperature vapor polishing technique that eliminates thermal non-uniformity, part deformation, and mechanical property degradation associated with conventional high-temperature steam methods. Post-processing yields stable surface roughness of Ra < 2.0 μm and significantly enhances mechanical performance. The technology holds two Chinese invention patents and international patent coverage, and has been recognized as a 2025 China Additive Manufacturing Premium Product by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT). Smooth-20X demonstrates RuiPu’s global market readiness through original technology and comprehensive certification.

description_zh: 应用：耐高温矽胶风管LKE426-CU适合用于热或冷空气引导管，高温废气排放，机动车尾气排放，高温焊气排放，塑料工业的颗粒干燥机，印刷机械，吹风机和压缩机; 引擎结构，引擎加热，航空设备和军事设备。 属性：双层，良好的耐热性能，密封保护，内部平滑，防漏，质量超轻，弯曲灵活，可压缩，有较好的伸缩弯曲性。可伸缩纤维加强，弯曲半径小，不易纽结，符合RoHS 规定; 结构：管壁中间有包覆弹性钢丝，管表面有带状纤维加强，绳索加强。 材质：螺旋丝：弹性钢丝，管壁材料：硅表面玻璃纤维涂层; 温度范围：约-70 °C 至 +300 °C .短时可达350°C 。
description_en: High-temperature silicone air duct LKE426-CU is designed for conveying hot or cold air, exhausting high-temperature exhaust gases (e.g., automotive exhaust, welding fumes), drying granular materials in plastics processing, printing machinery, blowers, compressors, engine compartments, engine heating systems, aerospace equipment, and military applications. Constructed with double-layer silicone-coated glass fiber, reinforced with embedded elastic steel wire and external braid reinforcement. Features smooth internal bore, leak-proof sealing, ultra-lightweight construction, high flexibility, low bending radius, kink resistance, and compliance with RoHS. Operating temperature range: −70 °C to +300 °C (short-term up to 350 °C).

company_name: 深圳市莱克斯软管有限公司
description_zh: 应用：PU耐磨钢丝管LKE00531作为重质物料耐磨输送软管.普遍用于抽吸场合。特别适合有磨损的固体.如灰尘.粉末.纤维和碎屑.活性的介质如油蒸汽和焊烟.工业除尘和抽吸。主要用于木工机械、陶瓷机械、水泥车间等粉尘较大的生产环境的通风吸尘。 属性：耐磨损保护.高抗张强度.耐强撕裂;抗微生物和水解.耐矿物油性能和化学性优越.抗紫外和臭氧性能.耐低温伸缩性.弯曲半径小.不易纽结.不含柔软剂和卤素.气体和液体不泄漏.符合RoHS 规定.通过螺旋丝接地可排静电。符合EN45545防火标准，阻燃等级V0,符合DIN 53516 和GB 9867标准。
description_en: PU abrasion-resistant antistatic hose LKE00531 is engineered for heavy-duty conveying of abrasive solids—including dust, powders, fibers, and debris—as well as active media such as oil vapors and welding fumes. Widely deployed in industrial vacuum and dust extraction systems, especially in woodworking, ceramics, cement plants, and other high-dust environments. Key features: exceptional abrasion resistance, high tensile and tear strength, resistance to hydrolysis and microorganisms, superior resistance to mineral oils and chemicals, UV/ozone resistance, low-temperature flexibility, small bending radius, kink resistance, halogen- and plasticizer-free composition, leak-tight gas/liquid containment, RoHS compliance, static-dissipative grounding via helical wire, EN 45545 fire safety certification, UL 94 V-0 flame rating, and compliance with DIN 53516 and GB 9867 standards.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 轴流式3D打印机散热风扇
company_name: 深圳市风恒科技有限公司
description_zh: 2010/2510/3010 / 4010 / 4015/4020 / 5015 等，是目前3D打印机中最常见的散热核心组件之一，广泛应用于： 热端散热系统、主板散热、机箱循环散热、电源散热系统 其主要作用是保证打印机关键电子与热端结构在稳定温度范围运行，从而提升打印稳定性与成品质量。 其特点是：风量大、风道阻力要求低、能耗低、噪音较小 功能：用于冷却热端散热片，防止热量向上蔓延。 作用价值：防止热爬升（Heat Creep）、避免堵头、保证熔融区稳定、提高挤出连续性
description_en: The axial cooling fan series (2010/2510/3010/4010/4015/4020/5015) represents one of the most widely adopted thermal management components in modern 3D printers. Deployed across hotend heatsink cooling, motherboard thermal regulation, chassis air circulation, and power supply cooling systems, these fans ensure critical electronic and thermal components operate within optimal temperature ranges—thereby enhancing print reliability and part quality. Key attributes include high airflow output, low airflow resistance requirements, low power consumption, and low acoustic noise. Specifically designed to cool hotend heatsinks and prevent upward heat migration (heat creep), thus mitigating nozzle clogging and ensuring stable melt zone conditions and continuous extrusion performance.
categories_zh: 挤出机、热端与喷嘴等打印组件与运动系统

description_en: Certified three-phase explosion-proof industrial vacuum cleaner, approved for use in nearly all hazardous classified zones where flammable gases, vapors, mists, or combustible dusts may be present. Equipped with full grounding, conductive filtration system, explosion-proof motor, and explosion-proof electrical control cabinet. Available in multiple configurations with varying capacities, power ratings, and feature sets to suit diverse industrial applications.

description_zh: 压缩空⽓通��⽂丘⾥装置使吸尘器产⽣吸⼒，可以⽤于抽吸灰尘和颗粒。由于⽆需电源，过滤和机⾝都做导电处理，因此不会引起静电导致爆炸，并且它是完全免维护的，安全可靠。

Requires no electrical power, contains no moving parts subject to wear, and is completely maintenance-free—ensuring intrinsic safety and operational reliability.

company_name: 佛山市谱丽美新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 焕新灵感，点亮视界——【玉纹 PETG 3D打印耗材】 当现代3D打印技术遇见千年东方玉韵，一场关于质感与光影的美学革命，由此开启。 我们全新推出玉石系列 PETG 3D打印耗材，精选优质PETG基材，融合独特玉石质感配方，将温润如玉的视觉效果与3D打印的无限创意完美结合。告别普通塑料的廉价感，为您的每一件作品赋予如羊脂、似翡翠的东方雅韵。 ✦ 色卡：一窥东方色谱，十色入魂 每一种色彩，皆是对中国传统玉文化的现代演绎： · 暖玉生烟 · 玉石鸡油黄：色泽明艳纯正，如极品黄玉，温润尊贵。 · 玉石鸡血红：色彩浓郁热烈，纹理如血沁，极具视觉冲击力。
description_en: PETG Jade Series 3D Printing Filament — redefining aesthetics through the fusion of advanced additive manufacturing and millennia-old East Asian jade craftsmanship. Formulated from premium PETG resin infused with proprietary jade-effect additives, this filament delivers a lustrous, translucent, stone-like surface finish—replacing the visual and tactile limitations of standard plastics with the refined elegance of nephrite and jadeite. Available in ten meticulously curated colors inspired by classical Chinese jade culture, including 'Warm Jade Mist', 'Chicken-Oil Yellow Jade' (vibrant, rich yellow with warm luster), and 'Cinnabar Red Jade' (intense red with natural blood-vein texture).

company_name: 深圳仙库智能有限公司
description_zh: 仙库通过数据驱动，提供个性化3D打印定制解决方案，实现3D打印定制鞋、3D打印鞋垫、3D打印矫形支具、3D打印护脊枕等产品的个性化设计与生产，打通了从精准三维扫描、AI健康评估到数字化定制设计的全链路，为3D打印健康产品提供了贯穿始终的数据基石，真正推动行业从“千人一底”迈向 “一人一模型，一鞋一方案” 的精准定制新阶段。
description_en: Xianku’s data-driven end-to-end customization solution enables personalized manufacturing of health-focused 3D-printed products—including custom-fit footwear, orthopedic insoles, corrective orthoses, and spine-supporting pillows. Seamlessly integrating precision 3D scanning, AI-powered health analytics, and digital parametric design, this solution establishes a robust, traceable data foundation across the entire value chain—advancing the industry from mass-standardized ('one-size-fits-all') to truly individualized ('one-person, one-model; one-shoe, one-solution') precision healthcare manufacturing.

company_name: 深圳仙库智能有限公司
description_zh: 仙库3D智能足脊扫描仪XK-CH005，是全国首款足脊一体扫描仪。采用安全无辐射的纯红外3D结构光技术，可在1分钟内完成人体与足部的毫米级三维建模，精准获取足部尺寸、身体围度、脊柱曲度、体态角度等超过100项量化数据。结合自研AI算法，智能评估扁平足、足外翻、脊柱侧弯等健康问题，为后续的精准制造与健康管理提供坚实的数据基石。 仙库3D智能足脊扫描仪通过毫米级三维数据与健康评估结果，可直接驱动3D打印定制鞋、3D打印鞋垫、3D打印矫形支具、3D打印护脊枕等产品的个性化设计与生产，打通了从精准三维扫描、AI健康评估到数字化定制设计的全链路，为3D打印健康产品提供了贯穿始终的数据基石。
description_en: XK-CH005 is China’s first integrated foot-and-spine 3D scanner. Utilizing safe, radiation-free infrared structured-light 3D imaging, it captures sub-millimeter-accurate 3D models of both feet and full-body posture in under 60 seconds—quantifying over 100 anatomical parameters, including foot dimensions, body circumferences, spinal curvature angles, and postural alignment metrics. Powered by proprietary AI algorithms, it performs automated clinical-grade assessments for flatfoot, pronation, scoliosis, and related musculoskeletal conditions. The resulting high-fidelity 3D datasets directly drive downstream personalized manufacturing of 3D-printed footwear, insoles, orthoses, and spine-supporting pillows—completing a fully traceable, data-integrated workflow from scanning to AI diagnostics to digital design.

company_name: 深圳仙库智能有限公司
description_zh: 仙库3D智能体测镜是一款集3D结构光扫描、三维人体重建及AI人体数字化等前沿技术的三维人体扫描仪。用户仅需站立20秒，设备即可在零接触、无辐射的情况下，自动旋转完成全身高达百万点云的毫米级三维数据捕捉，20秒内快速构建1:1的3D人体模型，1分钟即可生成包含体型围度、身体成分、体态健康、脊柱健康等数百项数据的3D可视化体测报告，实现智能、直观、全面的3D人体数字化健康评估。可广泛应用于足脊健康、体重管理、睡眠健康、运动康复、家居时尚等领域。
description_en: XK-H003 is an advanced 3D body scanner integrating infrared structured-light imaging, real-time full-body 3D reconstruction, and AI-powered human digitalization. In just 20 seconds—without contact or ionizing radiation—the rotating system captures over one million point-cloud data points at sub-millimeter resolution, generating a precise 1:1 3D human avatar. Within 60 seconds, it produces a comprehensive, interactive 3D visualization report containing hundreds of metrics: anthropometric measurements, body composition analysis, postural assessment, spinal health evaluation, and more. Designed for broad deployment across podiatry, weight management, sleep science, sports rehabilitation, and lifestyle applications.

company_name: 深圳仙库智能有限公司
description_zh: 仙库3D智能足测仪是一款集足部尺寸测量、足部健康评估于一体的3D智能足部扫描仪。采用先进的深度相机、红外结构光技术、高精度3D足部扫描重建等技术，5秒钟即可快速实现毫米级的足部测量，评估扁平足、高足弓、足外翻、拇外翻等足部健康风险，生成专业足部健康报告。广泛应用于足脊矫正、运动康复、健康医疗、鞋业、运动体育等场景。
description_en: XK-B002S is an intelligent 3D foot scanner combining high-resolution depth sensing, infrared structured-light acquisition, and advanced 3D foot modeling algorithms. It completes millimeter-accurate foot measurement and biomechanical assessment in five seconds—automatically detecting and quantifying common pathologies including flatfoot, cavus foot, forefoot varus, and hallux valgus. Delivers professional-grade foot health reports for clinical decision support. Optimized for applications in orthopedic correction, sports rehabilitation, medical diagnostics, footwear design, and athletic performance optimization.

product_name_zh: SuperSEM桌面式多功能实时能谱扫描电镜
product_name_en: SuperSEM Desktop Multi-Functional Real-Time EDS-Integrated SEM
company_name: 苏州浪声科学仪器有限公司
description_zh: SuperSEM搭载先进的电子光学系统，集SEM与EDS技术于一身，凭借其卓越的分析性能、实时能谱伪彩成像技术以及用户友好的操作体验，可轻松实现样品表面结构与化学元素的深度分析。此外，还配备三轴样品台、光学导航等高端硬件，确保了仪器卓越的性能。
description_en: SuperSEM integrates state-of-the-art electron optics with simultaneous scanning electron microscopy (SEM) and energy-dispersive X-ray spectroscopy (EDS) capabilities. Its advanced analytical performance, real-time elemental mapping with pseudo-color EDS imaging, and intuitive user interface enable rapid, in-depth characterization of sample surface morphology and elemental composition. Equipped with a high-precision three-axis motorized stage and optical navigation system, SuperSEM ensures exceptional positional accuracy, reproducibility, and ease of operation for routine and research-grade analysis.

company_name: 深圳市众景优品科技有限公司
description_zh: PLA仿木多色打印耗材 （1）仿木，多色效果 （2）易打印，易成型，没有臭味，安全健康 （3）不易吸湿，不翘边，可以高速打印
description_en: PLA wood-effect multicolor filament featuring: (1) realistic wood grain appearance with seamless multicolor transitions; (2) excellent printability, easy shaping, odorless operation, and safe, non-toxic composition; (3) low moisture absorption, minimal warping, and compatibility with high-speed printing.

categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

description_zh: 具有如下一些特点： （1）可以快速变色； （2）可以在X，Y，Z3个方向上同时变色； （3）会依据所打印的模型不同部分自动变色； （4）适合打印建筑模型或者��缩实体模型。
