applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: MMJ BYOP 多材料开发与应用方案
product_name_en: MMJ BYOP Multi-Material Development and Application Solution
company_name: 安美瑞亚科技
description_zh: BYOP（Bring Your Own Powder，自带粉末） 是 AMAREA Technology 针对 MMJ ProX 系列 提供的开放式材料方案，使客户能够使用自有金属、陶瓷或复合材料粉末进行多材料增材制造。通过热塑性粘结体系，客户专有粉末可转化为适用于 MMJ 工艺的打印材料。 MMJ 采用成熟的粉末基工业工艺路线，包括脱脂与共烧结过程，不依赖光学原理，支持多种粒径与粉末形貌，实现高材料自由度与应用导向的材料开发。
description_en: BYOP (Bring Your Own Powder) is AMAREA Technology’s open-material platform for the MMJ ProX series, enabling customers to utilize proprietary metal, ceramic, or composite powders in multi-material additive manufacturing. Leveraging a thermoplastic binder system, customer-specific powders are formulated into MMJ-process-compatible feedstocks. MMJ employs a mature powder-based industrial pathway—including debinding and co-sintering—without optical dependencies, supporting broad particle size and morphology ranges to maximize material freedom and application-driven development.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 成都鸿瑞韬科技有限公司
description_zh: 320×240 图形点阵彩色 LCD 显示，显示细腻、清晰； 采用进口氧化锆传感器，具有不通电不消耗寿命、测量精度高、响应速度快、零点 漂移量小等特点； 可在空气中长期工作，不会影响传感器的使用寿命； 仪表支持多点分段线性标定，满足全量程范围的氧含量准确测量； 响应速度快，最低可测量 0.1PPm； 自动温度补偿，减小温度变化对测量精度的影响； 4 万条历史数据自动存储功能，用户可以随时本地查看历史数据； 根据用户需要，可选配 RS232（默认）或 RS485 数据通讯接口，可与计算机或其 他数字通讯设备直接进行单向或双向通讯。
description_en: Oxygen analyzer featuring a 320×240-dot matrix full-color LCD display for crisp, high-fidelity visualization. Equipped with imported zirconia sensors offering zero-power-consumption standby life, high measurement accuracy, fast response time, and minimal zero drift. Capable of continuous long-term operation in ambient air without sensor degradation. Supports multi-point segmented linear calibration for precise oxygen measurement across the full range. Detects down to 0.1 ppm O₂ with rapid response, automatic temperature compensation, and 40,000-entry local data logging. Optional RS232 (default) or RS485 digital interface for bidirectional communication with PCs or other digital systems.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 成都鸿瑞韬科技有限公司
description_zh:  测量原理：氧化锆  显示方式：64×48点阵OLED  测量范围：0.1PPm~25.00% O2  测量精度：0~1000PPm/1.00%/25.00%≤±1%FS 0~100PPm≤±2%FS 0~10PPm≤±5%FS  分 辨 率：0.1PPm（微量） 0.01%（常量）  重 复 性：≤±1.0%FS  响应时间：T90≤30S 金属3D打印专用，从精氧到粗氧全过程监控
description_en: Zirconia-based oxygen transmitter with 64×48-dot matrix OLED display. Measurement range: 0.1 ppm–25.00% O₂. Accuracy: ≤±1% FS (0–1000 ppm / 1.00% / 25.00%), ≤±2% FS (0–100 ppm), ≤±5% FS (0–10 ppm). Resolution: 0.1 ppm (trace), 0.01% (bulk). Repeatability: ≤±1.0% FS. Response time: T90 ≤ 30 s. Purpose-built for end-to-end oxygen monitoring—from trace to bulk levels—in metal 3D printing processes.
categories_zh: 监视器和传感器，其他测量和传感器技术

product_name_zh: 高速高帧频 红外热像仪
company_name: 武汉华景康光电科技有限公司
description_zh: 华景康高速高帧频红外热像仪采用进口17µm非制冷红外焦平面探测器，支持全像素100Hz全码流温度数据输出（开窗模式下可实现200Hz超高帧频）可自动记录高速运动目标在极短时间内发生的温度变化并输出清晰无拖影的红外热图像。测温范围覆盖-20到2000℃，测温精度高达±2℃（或±2%），可以满足科研以及快速温度变化的目标温度测量需求。
description_en: HJK high-speed, high-frame-rate infrared thermal imager incorporating an imported 17 µm uncooled focal-plane detector. Delivers full-resolution 100 Hz thermal data streaming; achieves up to 200 Hz in windowed mode. Captures rapid temperature transients of high-speed moving targets with crisp, motion-artifact-free thermal imagery. Temperature range: −20 °C to 2000 °C; accuracy: ±2 °C or ±2%. Ideal for scientific research and dynamic thermal analysis applications.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 武汉华景康光电科技有限公司
description_zh: 华景康短波高温红外热像仪支持600-3000°C(分档可定制)的高温测量，精度可达±1%，帧频高达125Hz，尤其适用于激光焊接、金属增材、3D打印、激光熔覆等领域。短波热像仪分辨率从384x288、640x480到1280x1024高清成像，并且能定制滤波功能避免激光波段的干扰，搭载SenSWIR技术图像传感器，通过短波红外实现精准温度测量。
description_en: HJK short-wave high-temperature infrared thermal imager designed for precision measurement in the 600–3000 °C range (customizable in sub-ranges). Achieves ±1% measurement accuracy and up to 125 Hz frame rate. Optimized for laser welding, metal additive manufacturing (including 3D printing), and laser cladding. Available in resolutions from 384×288 to 1280×1024. Features customizable spectral filtering to suppress laser interference and integrates SenSWIR image sensor technology for accurate short-wave infrared thermometry.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 微距/显微 红外热像仪
company_name: 武汉华景康光电科技有限公司
description_zh: 华景康微距/显微红外热像仪专为微米/毫米级光纤、半导体、微电子、生物材料等目标测温，从384x288、640x480到1280x1024多种分辨率实现不同检测范围，最小可分辨6µm尺寸。自研测温算法实现测温范围从-20-1600℃，测温精度可达±2℃（或±2%），配备独立微距镜头，可根据需求选配不同放大倍率微距镜头。
description_en: HJK macro/micro infrared thermal imager engineered for micron- to millimeter-scale targets—including optical fibers, semiconductors, microelectronics, and biomaterials. Offers resolution options from 384×288 to 1280×1024, resolving features as small as 6 µm. Proprietary temperature algorithms support a wide range of −20 °C to 1600 °C with ±2 °C (or ±2%) accuracy. Equipped with dedicated macro lenses; optional variable-magnification macro lens configurations available.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

product_name_zh: 在线式红外 热成像测温仪
company_name: 武汉华景康光电科技有限公司
description_zh: 华景康在线式红外热成像测温仪采用进口17µm非制冷红外焦平面探测器，测温范围从-20到3000℃，测温精度可达±2℃（或±2%），软件应用程序可灵活进行热特性相关的分析和原始数据收集，是优化激光焊接、3D打印等热源过程控制的首选设备。
description_en: HJK online infrared thermal imaging pyrometer integrating an imported 17 µm uncooled focal-plane detector. Temperature range: −20 °C to 3000 °C; accuracy: ±2 °C or ±2%. Software suite enables flexible thermal behavior analysis and raw data acquisition—making it the preferred solution for optimizing thermal process control in laser welding, 3D printing, and other heat-source-critical applications.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

company_name: 思锐增材（深圳）科技有限责任公司
description_zh: 3D 打印钛合金窝喷以优质钛合金为基材，融合增材制造核心技术，实现一体成型突破传统加工限制。兼具轻质坚韧、耐高温、抗腐蚀的卓越特性，完美适配复杂流道与精密结构设计，大幅优化装配流程与结构合理性。适配航空航天、高端装备动力系统，能从容应对极端工况考验，运行稳定可靠，持续释放强劲动力，同时延长装备使用寿命，为高端动力领域提供定制化、高品质的核心部件解决方案。
description_en: Additively manufactured titanium alloy injector nozzle fabricated from premium-grade titanium. Enables monolithic, net-shape production—overcoming geometric constraints of conventional machining. Combines exceptional specific strength, high-temperature resistance, and outstanding corrosion resistance. Optimized for complex internal flow paths and precision structural features, streamlining assembly and enhancing structural integrity. Designed for aerospace and high-end powertrain systems, delivering stable, reliable performance under extreme operational conditions while extending service life—providing customized, high-performance core components for advanced propulsion applications.

description_zh: 海洋人工珊瑚连接件 钛合金海底连接件是海洋工程中的重要组件，利用钛合金轻质、高强度、耐腐蚀的特性，适用于深海环境中的设备连接。这些连接件能有效降低结构重量，提高耐海水腐蚀能力，确保海洋工程装备的稳定性和可靠性。
description_en: Titanium marine artificial coral connector—a critical component for offshore engineering applications. Leverages titanium’s lightweight, high-strength, and seawater-corrosion-resistant properties for deep-sea equipment interconnection. Reduces structural mass while significantly enhancing corrosion resistance, ensuring long-term stability and reliability of marine infrastructure.

company_name: 思锐增材（深圳）科技有限责任公司
description_zh: 思锐增材采用冷整形技术开发出的再生 Ti-6AI-4V 钛合金粉体材料，具有综合性能优异、流动性较好、纯度高、极低空心粉率等特点，其再生比例及氧含量均可定制，可直接应用于选区激光熔化（SLM）3D 打印、金属注射成型（MIM）、粉末冶金（FM）、热喷涂等加工工艺。
description_en: SIRUI recycled Ti-6Al-4V powder produced via proprietary cold reconditioning technology. Exhibits outstanding overall performance, excellent flowability, high purity, and extremely low hollow-particle content. Oxygen content and recycling ratio are fully customizable. Directly compatible with Selective Laser Melting (SLM), Metal Injection Molding (MIM), Powder Metallurgy (PM), and thermal spray processes.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

product_name_en: SIRUI SR-T1 High-Strength Pure Titanium TA1 Powder
company_name: 思锐增材（深圳）科技有限责任公司
description_zh: 思锐增材采用独有的钛金属粉末性能调控技术，可实现对钛金属粉强度、延伸率和硬度性能的大幅度定制化调控，该技术已被应用于军工、航空航天、3C电子器件等领域。通过调配成分、增强粉末原料和配套特殊的加工及后处理工艺，目前SR-T1高强纯钛TA1粉末最高可达850MPa的极限强度(保持18-25%断裂延伸率)，其性能为目前的最高世界纪录。
description_en: SIRUI SR-T1 high-strength pure titanium TA1 powder developed using exclusive titanium powder property modulation technology. Enables extensive customization of tensile strength, elongation, and hardness—already deployed in defense, aerospace, and consumer electronics sectors. Through tailored alloy composition, enhanced raw powder quality, and specialized processing and post-treatment, SR-T1 achieves a record-breaking ultimate tensile strength of up to 850 MPa while retaining 18–25% elongation at break—the highest performance benchmark globally.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 上海巨哥科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 1、MAG91在线式热像仪采用1280x1024非制冷焦平面探测器，输出优质的红外图像。 2、采用1000M以太网输出50Hz温度数据，可在局域网内使用，组网方便、灵活、经济。 3、兼容海康威视、大华等常见NVR，可通过NVR播放视频、控制云台和对焦。 4、提供纯温度码流、纯视频码流、混合码流三种模式，适应不同用途和网络条件。 5、可录制温度数据流并回放，完美重现历史场景，可输出超分辨率图像。 6、提供专业版应用程序、SDK、图像离线分析软件。 7、SDK导出100多个函数，可完全实现热像仪控制、图像处理和温度测量，让开发者得心应手。 8、接口丰富，易于集成。
description_en: MAG91 online thermal imager featuring a 1280×1024 uncooled focal-plane detector for high-fidelity infrared imaging. Outputs 50 Hz temperature data via Gigabit Ethernet for flexible, cost-effective LAN deployment. Fully compatible with mainstream NVR platforms (e.g., Hikvision, Dahua) for video playback, PTZ control, and autofocus. Supports three streaming modes: pure temperature data, pure video, and hybrid streams—adapting seamlessly to diverse applications and network environments. Enables full-temperature-stream recording and playback for forensic thermal scene reconstruction, including super-resolution image export. Bundled with professional software, comprehensive SDK (100+ APIs), and offline image analysis tools. Rich I/O interfaces simplify system integration.
categories_zh: 其他（如后处理工艺服务）

description_zh: 高速扫描模组、飞行应用 高性能摆动电机、打造优异品质 适合对速度、精度有要求的行业应用
description_en: High-speed galvanometer scanning module optimized for flying-optics applications. Features high-performance oscillating motors delivering exceptional beam positioning accuracy and repeatability—ideal for industries demanding high throughput and precision.

description_en: Ultra-stable galvanometer scanner with ultra-low thermal drift and high linearity. Delivers outstanding dynamic response and metrological-grade performance—engineered for the most demanding high-speed, high-precision industrial applications.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: 北京金橙子科技股份有限公司
description_zh: 3D打印控制系统涵盖SLA/SLM/SLS，包括控制软件、轴控制卡、激光振镜控制卡。其中控制软件2.0版本经过团队多年打磨，拥有多个独家算法，得到市场高度认可。在激光振镜&轴控硬件上，专门开发出针对SLA/SLM的硬件解决方案。3D打印控制系统为用户提供了全套的解决方案服务，简化用户装机和使用门槛，降低总体设备成本，大幅提高装机效率和稳定性。
description_en: This 3D printing control system supports SLA, SLM, and SLS technologies and comprises control software, motion axis controller cards, and galvanometer scanner controller cards. The control software version 2.0—refined over years by the development team—incorporates multiple proprietary algorithms and has gained strong market recognition. Dedicated hardware solutions for SLA/SLM applications have been developed for both galvanometer scanners and axis controllers. The system delivers a complete turnkey solution, simplifying machine integration and operation, reducing overall equipment cost, and significantly improving installation efficiency and system stability.

company_name: 鞍山精准光学扫描技术有限公司
description_zh: 支持多种类型的激光器 FPK首脉冲抑制 多种Wobble功能 飞行打标功能 外触发信号支持 2D大幅面加工 3D曲面加工 振镜状态反馈（温度，报警等）
description_en: The RMC2 galvanometer controller supports multiple laser types, features FPK first-pulse suppression, multiple wobble functions, flying marking capability, external trigger signal input, 2D large-area processing, 3D curved-surface processing, and real-time galvanometer status feedback (including temperature and alarm monitoring).
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: 鞍山精准光学扫描技术有限公司
description_zh: 高精度数字编码器 ●接口协议：XY2-100/ RL2-100 ●更高的分辨率，更高的线性度 ●提供实时位置反馈功能(可选) ●通光孔径：14mm,20mm,30mm ●波长：1064nm,10.6μm,355nm.532nm ●更低的抖动，更低的零点和增益漂移 ●更稳定的控制系统 ●适用于高精度的焊接、切割、蚀刻等领域
description_en: The LingTeng high-precision digital galvanometer scanner features XY2-100/RL2-100 interface protocols, enhanced resolution and linearity, optional real-time position feedback, clear apertures of 14 mm, 20 mm, or 30 mm, and wavelength compatibility with 1064 nm, 10.6 µm, 355 nm, and 532 nm. It delivers lower jitter, reduced zero-point and gain drift, and superior control system stability—ideal for high-precision welding, cutting, and etching applications.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: 鞍山精准光学扫描技术有限公司
description_zh: 高功率激光焊接系统 包含全数字凌腾系列振镜 可选的照明和气刀吹拂系统，最高功率可承受连续6KW，包含水冷和风冷通道。
description_en: A high-power laser welding system incorporating the fully digital LingTeng series galvanometer scanners. Optional illumination and air-knife blow-off systems are available. Rated for continuous operation up to 6 kW, the system integrates both water-cooling and air-cooling channels.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

product_name_zh: PS103 3D打印PLA专用高速增韧母粒
product_name_en: PS103 High-Speed Toughening Masterbatch for PLA 3D Printing
company_name: 上海英华辰睿新材料有限公司
description_zh: EnaBio® PS103是3D打印PLA专用增韧功能母粒，可与PLA颗粒按一定比例直接混合挤出生成高品质的3D打印线材。该母粒与PLA颗粒的完美结合，提升了线材的韧性和打印顺畅度，使线材具有优异的打印性能。 客户可以根据不同打印流动性的需求，采用本产品的功能母粒与不同流动性的PLA颗粒直接混合挤出生成不同流动性的3D打印线材，以满足不同打印件的打印需求，为客户的线材生产提供了更多的自主设计灵活性。
description_en: EnaBio® PS103 is a specialized toughening masterbatch formulated exclusively for PLA-based 3D printing filaments. It can be directly blended with PLA pellets at defined ratios for extrusion into high-quality 3D printing filament. Its optimized compatibility with PLA significantly enhances filament toughness and extrusion smoothness, delivering exceptional printability. Users can tailor filament melt flow behavior by blending this masterbatch with PLA pellets of varying melt flow indices—enabling flexible, in-house filament formulation to meet diverse part-specific printing requirements.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

product_name_zh: PR702-PETG/CF 3D高强高模打印碳纤增强改性料
product_name_en: PR702-PETG/CF High-Strength, High-Modulus Carbon-Fiber-Reinforced 3D Printing Material
company_name: 上海英华辰睿新材料有限公司
description_zh: EnaBio® PR702颗粒是以PETG为主相的3D打印级改性料。通过采用高碳纤维(CF)含量增强改性技术赋予打印制品更高的强度和模量，专为满足对打印制件具有更高力学强度和更高模量的应用要求而设计；打印制品无明显的打印层纹、外观呈现出高级磨砂质感。改性料拉制线材时表现出出色的线径稳定性，线材打印不易拉丝、尺寸稳定性好，打印速度高达250mm/s。
description_en: EnaBio® PR702 is a PETG-based, carbon-fiber (CF)-reinforced 3D printing compound engineered to deliver superior mechanical strength and modulus. It produces printed parts with minimal layer visibility and an elegant matte surface finish. When extruded into filament, it exhibits outstanding diameter consistency; prints with minimal stringing and excellent dimensional stability, supporting print speeds up to 250 mm/s.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

product_name_zh: PR102 PLA/CF 3D高速打印碳纤增强改性料
product_name_en: PR102 PLA/CF High-Speed Carbon-Fiber-Reinforced 3D Printing Material
company_name: 上海英华辰睿新材料有限公司
description_zh: EnaBio® PR102颗粒是以碳纤维(CF)增强PLA为主相的3D打印级改性料。通过采用碳纤维增强技术赋予打印制品更高的强度和模量，打印制品无明显的打印层纹、外观呈现出高级磨砂质感。在保持高力学强度的同时，线材具有较好的韧性，长期打印过程中无断线风险、适用于AMS打印。改性料拉制线材时表现出出色的线径稳定性，线材打印不易拉丝、尺寸稳定性好，打印速度高达250mm/s。
description_en: EnaBio® PR102 is a carbon-fiber (CF)-reinforced PLA-based 3D printing compound designed for high-speed printing. It delivers enhanced strength and modulus while maintaining excellent toughness—ensuring reliable, uninterrupted printing even during extended runs and full compatibility with Automated Material Systems (AMS). Printed parts exhibit minimal layer lines and a premium matte appearance. Filament extrusion yields exceptional diameter stability; prints with low stringing, high dimensional accuracy, and speeds up to 250 mm/s.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

product_name_zh: PR701 PETG/CF 3D高速打印碳纤增强改性料
product_name_en: PR701 PETG/CF High-Speed Carbon-Fiber-Reinforced 3D Printing Material
company_name: 上海英华辰睿新材料有限公司
description_zh: EnaBio® PR701颗粒是以PETG为主相的3D打印级改性料。通过采用碳纤维(CF)增强技术赋予打印制品更高的强度和模量，打印制品无明显的打印层纹、外观呈现出高级磨砂质感。在保持高力学强度的同时，线材具有较好的柔韧性，长期打印过程中无断线风险；线材打印不易粘喷嘴，避免了打印制件表面料疙瘩的产生而影响打印质量的问题，打印速度高达300mm/s。
description_en: EnaBio® PR701 is a PETG-based, carbon-fiber (CF)-reinforced 3D printing compound offering high strength, modulus, and enhanced flexibility. Printed parts show minimal layer lines and a refined matte surface. The filament demonstrates excellent nozzle release properties—preventing nozzle clogging and surface ‘blobbing’ defects—while ensuring robust long-term printing reliability. It enables high-speed printing up to 300 mm/s with consistent quality.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

description_zh: 唐纳森（BOFA）为3D打印提供专业的烟尘净化解决方案。旗下3D PrintPRO系列覆盖开放式到大型封闭式打印环境，核心优势：1.集成高效HEPA过滤与深床活性炭技术；2.高度智能化控制。同时，产品全面满足UL、CAS、CE等多国认证要求，为企业3D打印设备顺利出海提供强有力的合规支持与产品保障，是全球市场信赖的健康安全伙伴。
description_en: Donaldson (BOFA) provides professional fume and particulate filtration solutions tailored for 3D printing applications. The PrintPRO series comprehensively covers open-frame to large enclosed printing environments. Key advantages include: (1) integrated high-efficiency HEPA filtration and deep-bed activated carbon technology; and (2) highly intelligent, adaptive control. Fully certified to UL, CSA, and CE standards, PrintPRO ensures global regulatory compliance—facilitating seamless international deployment of 3D printing equipment and serving as a trusted partner for workplace health and safety worldwide.

description_zh: 1、使用PSA变压吸附制氮方式，便捷快速。 2、产出97%~99.999%稳定高纯氮气，有效隔绝氧气，从源头减少金属粉末氧化，提升零件致密性与性能。 3、一体式设计，内涵一条完整的生产线路，无需另配。 4、体积小巧，方便移动。 5、尺寸（L*W*H）：600*860*760（mm）
description_en: The NPI35 is a compact, integrated nitrogen generator utilizing Pressure Swing Adsorption (PSA) technology for rapid, convenient on-site nitrogen production. It delivers stable, high-purity nitrogen (97–99.999%) to effectively exclude oxygen—minimizing metal powder oxidation at the source and enhancing part density and performance. Its all-in-one design incorporates a complete production line with no auxiliary equipment required. With dimensions of 600 × 860 × 760 mm (L×W×H), it offers exceptional portability.

description_en: The NPM06 is a modular nitrogen generator employing Pressure Swing Adsorption (PSA) technology for fast, efficient on-site nitrogen generation. It produces stable, ultra-high-purity nitrogen (99–99.999%) to suppress oxygen and mitigate metal powder oxidation—thereby improving sintered part density and mechanical performance. Its modular architecture allows scalable, parallel expansion to match growing production capacity, enabling flexible initial investment. Dimensions: 470 × 940 × 1690 mm (L×W×H).

product_name_zh: 高纯度、整形系列3D打印专用碳化硅微粉
product_name_en: High-Purity, Spheroidized Silicon Carbide Micropowder for 3D Printing
company_name: 潍坊凯华碳化硅微粉有限公司
description_zh: 碳化硅具有强度高、硬度高、耐磨性好、导热系数高、热膨胀系数小、化学性能稳定等优异性能，目前被应用于各种先进陶瓷制造领域，而碳化硅3D打印又可以有效减少制作周期及生产成本，所以目前已成为复杂结构件碳化硅陶瓷制备工艺的最佳成型方式。 我司针对碳化硅3D打印深耕多年，研发的高纯度、整形系列3D打印专用碳化硅微粉已通过客户验证，该产品具有纯度高、颗粒形状好、流动性强、堆积密度高等优点，可以有效提高制品固含量和坯体密度，从而提高制品质量。
description_en: Silicon carbide (SiC) offers exceptional properties—including high strength, hardness, wear resistance, thermal conductivity, low thermal expansion, and chemical stability—making it ideal for advanced ceramic manufacturing. SiC 3D printing significantly reduces lead time and production cost, establishing itself as the optimal forming method for complex SiC ceramic components. After extensive R&D focused on SiC additive manufacturing, our high-purity, spheroidized SiC micropowder has been validated by customers. It delivers superior purity, excellent particle sphericity, high flowability, and high packing density—enabling increased green body solid content and green density, thereby enhancing final part quality.
categories_zh: 陶瓷3D打印材料（氧化铝、氧化锆、陶瓷复合材料等）

product_name_zh: 高功率激光专用空间光调制器（可承受200W功率）
product_name_en: High-Power Laser-Compatible Spatial Light Modulator (SLM) – 200 W Rating
company_name: 圣德科（上海）光通信有限公司
description_zh: SLM-300是LCOS型空间光调制器，支持最高200W级的高功率激光器。它具有WUXGA (1920×1200) 的高分辨率和0.003π (代表值) 以下的相位稳定性，可实现10位 (1024灰阶) 的精细相位控制。通过水冷式冷却，即使长时间也能实现稳定的运行。支持的波长为532 nm、800 nm、1064 nm，适用于各种高功率用途，如激光加工、3D打印机、IC激光裁切、金属加工、生物和光学研究等。 备有机器组装专用的SLM-30款式 (小型、低成本) 。
description_en: The SLM-300 is an LCOS-based spatial light modulator rated for continuous-wave lasers up to 200 W. It features WUXGA resolution (1920 × 1200), phase stability of <0.003π (typical), and precise 10-bit (1024-level) phase modulation. Equipped with an integrated water-cooling system, it ensures stable, long-duration operation. Compatible with wavelengths of 532 nm, 800 nm, and 1064 nm, it serves high-power applications including laser material processing, 3D printing, IC laser scribing, metalworking, and optical/biomedical research. A compact, cost-optimized OEM version—SLM-30—is also available.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

product_name_zh: 1kW 级 LCOS 空间光调制器 SLM-310
product_name_en: 1 kW-Class LCOS Spatial Light Modulator SLM-310
company_name: 圣德科（上海）光通信有限公司
description_zh: SLM-310是LCOS型空间光调制器，具有高耐光性能，适用于1064 nm近红外1 kW激光。具有WUXGA (1920×1200) 的高分辨率和相位稳定性0.003π以下 (代表值) 的高再现性，可实现10位 (1024灰阶) 的精细光束控制。它具有坚固的水冷系统，可用于焊接、钻孔、切割和金属3D打印等，以提高加工精度、最小化热影响、有效的光束成形和转向校正以及多光束控制。
description_en: The SLM-310 is an LCOS-based spatial light modulator engineered for high-power near-infrared lasers at 1064 nm, with a maximum power handling capacity of 1 kW. It delivers WUXGA resolution (1920 × 1200) and exceptional phase stability (<0.003π, typical), enabling precise 10-bit (1024-level) beam shaping and steering. Its robust water-cooling system supports demanding industrial processes—including welding, drilling, cutting, and metal 3D printing—enhancing processing accuracy, minimizing heat-affected zones, enabling advanced multi-beam control, and improving beam-forming fidelity.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

With a measurement range of 0.1–10 mm and accuracy of ±0.001 mm, it combines practicality, reliability, and durability—earning widespread customer adoption.

company_name: 泰索迡克超声波设备（上海）有限公司
description_zh: 筛分电箱 SG4L twin 包含在 SONOSCREENeasy 产品线中。使用此设备可独立操作两个筛分板。每个筛分板都可进行不同的设置（如不同的强度）。两个系统相互独立。 跟其他 Easy 产品线的机箱一样，它可均匀地将声波分配在共振器和筛网上，持续清洗可提高筛分效果。 优势一览 • 一台设备，两个实时独立的机箱 • 多种筛分任务的经济型解决方案 • 流程安全性高
description_en: The SG4L twin sieving enclosure belongs to the SONOSCREENeasy product line. It enables independent operation of two sieving plates, each configurable with distinct parameters—such as amplitude—while maintaining full operational autonomy between systems. Like other Easy-series enclosures, it ensures uniform acoustic energy distribution across resonators and sieves, enabling continuous cleaning to enhance sieving efficiency. Key advantages: dual real-time independent enclosures in a single unit; cost-effective solution for diverse sieving tasks; high process reliability.
categories_zh: 其他（如后处理工艺服务）

company_name: 深圳市晶格子光学科技有限公司
description_zh: 光纤激光器又称YAG激光器，波长为1064nm。YAG f-theta透镜主要用于标记普通金属材料、塑料材料以及陶瓷、玻璃、木材、织物、皮革等非金属材料，也可用于金属材料的切割或焊接。 我们生产各种焦距、扫描区域和尺寸的1064nm f-theta透镜，种类齐全，库存充足。除了标准产品外，我们还可以根据您的需求定制ODM f-theta透镜，确保其与您的设备完美匹配。
description_en: Fiber lasers (also known as YAG lasers) operate at a wavelength of 1064 nm. Our YAG f-theta lenses are widely used for marking metals, plastics, ceramics, glass, wood, textiles, and leather, as well as for cutting and welding metals. We manufacture a comprehensive range of 1064 nm f-theta lenses with various focal lengths, scan fields, and dimensions—all readily available from stock. In addition to standard offerings, we provide ODM-customized f-theta lenses engineered to ensure seamless compatibility with your specific equipment.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

company_name: 深圳市晶格子光学科技有限公司
description_zh: 在激光加工和科学研究中，光束质量至关重要。作为关键组件，QBH准直器能够可靠地确保精确的光束整形。它有可调式和固定式两种版本。可调式准直器可以对光束参数进行微调，而固定式准直器结构简单、性能稳定、易于安装且即插即用，从而缩短了调试时间。 总之，QBH准直器的多样化设计可以满足科学研究和工业生产的不同需求。
description_en: Beam quality is critical in laser processing and scientific research. As a key optical component, the QBH collimator reliably delivers precise beam shaping. It is available in both adjustable and fixed versions: the adjustable variant enables fine-tuning of beam parameters, while the fixed version offers structural simplicity, stable performance, easy installation, and plug-and-play operation—significantly reducing setup time. Overall, the QBH collimator’s versatile design meets diverse requirements across scientific research and industrial manufacturing.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

company_name: 无锡优倍特新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 碳纤维PETG树脂 碳纤维PLA树脂
description_en: Carbon fiber-reinforced PETG resin and carbon fiber-reinforced PLA resin.
categories_zh: 复合材料（碳纤维增强复合材料等）

company_name: 无锡优倍特新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 我司可定制生产低熔点PET树脂，其熔点可控制在110~240℃之间。我们可根据客户需求提供该熔点范围内的产品。低熔点PET可应用于纺织、建材、涂料、鞋材、热熔胶、色母粒等领域。目前，我们已开发出专为色母粒、纺丝、薄膜拉伸和涂料应用而研发的产品。1. 用于色母粒的低熔点聚酯切片具有熔化迅速、流动性好、分散性佳、染色均匀等优点，是聚酯染料的理想载体，尤其适用于POY、FDY等高速纺丝染色工艺，具有良好的色牢度、饱和度和鲜艳的色彩。
description_en: We offer custom-manufactured low-melting-point PET resins with precisely controlled melting points ranging from 110 °C to 240 °C. These resins are suitable for applications in textiles, construction materials, coatings, footwear, hot-melt adhesives, and color masterbatches. Specific formulations have been developed for color masterbatches, melt spinning, film stretching, and coatings. For example, our low-melting-point PET chips for color masterbatches feature rapid melting, excellent flowability and dispersion, uniform dyeing, and outstanding color fastness, saturation, and vibrancy—making them ideal carriers for polyester dyes, especially in high-speed POY and FDY spinning processes.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 无锡优倍特新材料科技有限公司
description_zh: PETG 是一种流行的 3D 打印耗材原材料。这种耗材更加透明、不易碎裂，且更易于使用。PETG 是 ABS 和 PLA 之间的理想选择，它比 PLA 更柔韧耐用，比 ABS 更容易打印。 华宏 PETG 树脂性能卓越。使用我们的 PETG 树脂制成的耗材在 3D 打印过程中不会出现拉丝现象，并且强度高。 我们还可以提供特殊的包装方式，以减少 PETG 树脂在运输过程中的吸水率，从而降低除湿和干燥的成本。 通过对 PETG 树脂进行改性，我们可以生产高速打印 PETG 树脂或具有哑光效果的 PETG 树脂。
description_en: PETG is a popular raw material for 3D printing filaments. It offers superior transparency, impact resistance, and ease of use compared to conventional alternatives. Positioned between ABS and PLA, PETG combines the toughness and durability of PLA with the printability advantages of ABS. Huahong PETG resin delivers exceptional performance: filaments produced from our resin exhibit zero stringing during printing and high mechanical strength. We also offer specialized packaging to minimize moisture absorption during transit—reducing drying and dehumidification costs. Through proprietary resin modification, we supply high-speed printing PETG and matte-finish PETG variants.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

company_name: 苏州云火材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 云火材料的 Nb521 铌合金粉末品质卓越且性价比高。它被应用于航空航天发动机、武器螺旋桨、火箭和导弹的液态双组分发动机、核反应堆、潜艇、燃气轮机、汽车发动机、柴油发动机、高温炉加热带、高温模具、高温夹具以及高温部件的制造。
description_en: Yunhuo Materials’ Nb521 niobium alloy powder delivers outstanding quality and exceptional value. It is widely employed in the manufacturing of aerospace engines, weapon propellers, liquid bipropellant rocket and missile engines, nuclear reactors, submarines, gas turbines, automotive and diesel engines, high-temperature furnace heating elements, high-temperature molds and fixtures, and other high-temperature components.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 苏州云火材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 云火球形钽粉球形度高，流动性好，无空心粉和卫星粉，生物相容性高，具有优良的耐腐蚀性和高熔点，可用于3D打印骨移植、溅射靶材、钽电容器等
description_en: Yunhuo spherical tantalum powder exhibits high sphericity, excellent flowability, absence of hollow or satellite particles, high biocompatibility, outstanding corrosion resistance, and a high melting point. It is suitable for 3D-printed bone grafts, sputtering targets, and tantalum capacitors.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 苏州云火材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 云火球形铌粉具有良好的导电性和耐腐蚀性，化学性质稳定，具有较高的熔点和强度，球形度高、流动性好、无空心粉，卫星粉; 球形铌粉 云火球形铌粉具有良好的导电性和耐腐蚀性，化学性质稳定，具有较高的熔点和强度，球形度高、流动性好、无空心粉，卫星粉
description_en: Yunhuo spherical niobium powder offers excellent electrical conductivity and corrosion resistance, chemical stability, high melting point and strength, high sphericity, superior flowability, and absence of hollow or satellite particles.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 苏州云火材料科技有限公司
description_zh: 云火球形钨粉性价比高，规格齐全1-150μm，在医疗、航空航天、核电领域已得到了大量应用，尤其是最新推出的超细球形钨粉系列，SW5 ( 0-5μm）、SW10 (0-10μm)、SW15（5-15μm）具备球形度高（≥95%），纯度高（≥99.9%），流动性好，无空心粉和卫星粉，依据不同规格可广泛应用于半导体封装、国防军工、医疗等领域。
description_en: Yunhuo spherical tungsten powder provides high cost-performance ratio and broad particle size coverage (1–150 μm), with extensive adoption in medical, aerospace, and nuclear power sectors. Our newly launched ultrafine spherical tungsten powder series—SW5 (0–5 μm), SW10 (0–10 μm), and SW15 (5–15 μm)—features ≥95% sphericity, ≥99.9% purity, excellent flowability, and no hollow or satellite particles. These grades are widely applied in semiconductor packaging, defense and military systems, and medical devices.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）

company_name: 漫格科技
description_zh: VoxelDance Additive是一款从拓扑优化、晶格设计、工艺仿真到路径规划的全流程数字化解决方案，实现3D打印过程的高效、精准与智能化。 设计端：提供面向增材制造的创新设计工具。基于隐式建模和场驱动设计，支持复杂晶格结构、轻量化设计与定制化建模 仿真端：凭借其基于GPU的架构，内置工艺过程仿真引擎，可精准预测打印缺陷、变形与应力分布。仿真速度比传统CAE解决方案快5至10倍 制造端：一键支撑，强大的摆放功能，以及智能路径规划与工艺参数优化系统，显著提升打印成功率与效率
description_en: VoxelDance Additive is an end-to-end digital solution spanning topology optimization, lattice design, process simulation, and toolpath planning—enabling efficient, precise, and intelligent 3D printing. Design: Innovative AM-specific tools based on implicit modeling and field-driven design support complex lattice structures, lightweighting, and customization. Simulation: GPU-accelerated built-in process simulation engine accurately predicts defects, distortion, and stress distribution—5–10× faster than conventional CAE solutions. Manufacturing: One-click support generation, advanced part orientation, intelligent toolpath planning, and process parameter optimization significantly improve print success rate and productivity.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 杭州聚丰新材料有限公司
description_zh: COCOON PPS-Birch(GF) 是一款适用于FDM 3D打印技术的高性能改性PPS材料，具有高机械强度、高耐热、耐候耐腐蚀、阻燃、绝缘、耐磨等特性，综合性能优异，打印成品收缩率低、尺寸稳定性佳，尤其在高温、高湿、变频的环境下也能有优异的强度保持率，产品阻燃性能达到V0阻燃等级（UL94，2.0mm），适用于汽车、电子电气、机械、化工、运动器械等领域。
description_en: COCOON PPS-Birch(GF) is a high-performance modified PPS filament engineered for FDM 3D printing. It delivers exceptional mechanical strength, thermal stability, weather and corrosion resistance, flame retardancy (UL94 V0 rating at 2.0 mm), electrical insulation, and wear resistance. Printed parts exhibit low shrinkage and excellent dimensional stability—even under high-temperature, high-humidity, or variable-frequency conditions—while retaining superior strength. Ideal for automotive, electronics, machinery, chemical, and sports equipment applications.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 北京普伟龙祥科技发展有限公司
description_zh: Spark-S1是专为学生量身打造的桌面级3D打印创意伙伴！自研APP内置海量模型，一键启动即享打印乐趣，无需复杂调试。搭载500mm/s高速打印引擎，最快26分钟就能让孩子的奇思妙想落地为实体。AI智能设计辅助加持，新手也能轻松解锁3D创作。3.5英寸全彩触控屏操作直观便捷，WIFI+U盘双传输模式搭配离线打印功能，学习场景随心适配，全方位守护每一份创意灵感。
description_en: The Spark-S1 is a desktop 3D printer purpose-built for students. Its proprietary app includes a vast library of ready-to-print models—enabling instant printing without complex calibration. Powered by a 500 mm/s high-speed print engine, it transforms children’s creative ideas into physical objects in as little as 26 minutes. AI-assisted design simplifies 3D creation for beginners. The intuitive 3.5-inch full-color touchscreen, combined with Wi-Fi and USB flash drive connectivity plus offline printing capability, ensures flexible adaptation to diverse learning environments—fully safeguarding every spark of inspiration.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)

product_name_zh: 基于GD32 MCU的多轴步进电机解决方案
product_name_en: Multi-Axis Stepper Motor Solution Based on GD32 MCU
company_name: 兆易创新科技集团股份有限公司
description_zh: 采用Cortex®-M7内核GD32H737 100pin主控芯片 主频600MHz，1MB Flash，512KB SRAM，512KB TCMRAM 3个ADC（20ch），2个高级定时器，14个通用定时器，8个串口，82个GPIO等 普通低成本H桥驱动实现4轴步进微步细分控制 凭借GD32H7系列高算力和丰富资源，替代4路高成本步进细分控制芯片，成本降低 自研XYZE四轴步进同步细分控制算法，最高2^14细分(插值)，带来平滑的正弦电流和优异的静音效果 自研堵转检测算法，实现无限位开关归零 自研自适应降电流算法 最高打印速度600mm/s，最大加速度2000mm/s^2
description_en: This solution employs the GD32H737 microcontroller (Cortex®-M7 core, 600 MHz, 1 MB Flash, 512 KB SRAM, 512 KB TCMRAM) in a 100-pin package, featuring three 20-channel ADCs, two advanced timers, fourteen general-purpose timers, eight UARTs, and 82 GPIOs. A cost-effective H-bridge driver implements four-axis microstepping control. Leveraging the high computational power and rich peripheral resources of the GD32H7 series, it replaces four expensive dedicated stepper motor drivers—reducing system cost. Proprietary XYZE four-axis synchronized microstepping algorithm achieves up to 2^14 interpolation steps, delivering smooth sinusoidal current and superior noise reduction. Self-developed stall detection enables homing without limit switches. Adaptive current reduction algorithm further optimizes performance. Maximum print speed: 600 mm/s; maximum acceleration: 2000 mm/s².

company_name: 翼视(江苏)科创发展有限公司
description_zh: ANYRAID 鸿影 是一款拥有大尺寸闭环温控恒温舱的高速 3D 打印机。机身采用铝材与钢材打造，兼顾刚性与轻量化，800×740×823mm 的机身尺寸与 500×500×500mm 的打印尺寸，可满足大尺寸高性能材料成型需求。 工具头挤出齿轮与喷嘴均为硬化钢材质，支持 300℃高温打印，适配多种喷嘴口径，搭配耐高温电机，实现流畅稳定的挤出。热床支持纹理与光面两种打印板，最高温度可达 120℃，确保模型牢固粘附。 设备配备闭环控温的PTC加热与多风扇冷却系统、活性炭内循环过滤与主动外排的空气净化系统，为打印环境提供保障。 支持多端操控，切片软件兼容多系统。支持官方多色系统和多种开源多
description_en: The ANYRAID Hongying 500 PRO is a high-speed 3D printer equipped with a large-format, closed-loop temperature-controlled build chamber. Its rigid yet lightweight frame combines aluminum and steel, measuring 800 × 740 × 823 mm with a 500 × 500 × 500 mm build volume—ideal for large-scale, high-performance material processing. Both extruder gear and nozzle are hardened steel, supporting 300 °C high-temperature printing and compatible with multiple nozzle orifice sizes. A high-temp motor ensures consistent extrusion. The heated bed accommodates both textured and smooth build plates, reaching up to 120 °C for optimal part adhesion. Integrated closed-loop PTC heating and multi-fan cooling, plus activated carbon recirculation and active exhaust air purification, ensure a safe, clean printing environment. Supports multi-platform control and cross-platform slicing software, and is compatible with official multi-color systems and open-source multi-material platforms.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(个人/桌面级)
汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: 宁��海天增材科技有限公司
description_zh: 海天增材自主研发的集中供应粉站集粉末输送、筛分、回收功能于一体，粉仓容量200L，送粉效率300L/h，回收效率300L/h，筛分效率90L/h，最多可同时满足8台主机（以C400M设备为例）的粉末需求，满足批量化、长周期的规模化生产需求。使用惰性气体输送，全闭环全流程自动流转，无粉末扬尘，最大程度提升粉末利用率，降低环境风险，保障车间整洁及人员健康安全。数量上，一台粉站可自由搭配1至8台设备。从布局上，粉站占地面积仅1.8㎡，可根据客户厂房/场地条件，灵活适配多种排布方案，实现厂房高坪效。集中供应粉站，通过智能控制系统、高度的兼容性和稳定的运行能力，为工业化大生产提供产能与质量的双重保障。
description_en: Developed in-house by Haitian Additive, this centralized powder supply station integrates powder conveying, sieving, and recycling functions. With a 200 L powder hopper capacity, conveying and recycling rates of 300 L/h, and sieving capacity of 90 L/h, it can simultaneously serve up to eight host machines (e.g., C400M). Designed for high-volume, long-duration industrial production, it uses inert gas for dust-free, fully closed-loop automated powder handling—maximizing powder utilization and minimizing environmental hazards while ensuring workshop cleanliness and operator safety. Configurable for 1–8 connected printers, it occupies only 1.8 m² of floor space and supports flexible layout adaptations to optimize facility efficiency. Intelligent control, broad compatibility, and robust reliability deliver dual assurance of production capacity and part quality for large-scale additive manufacturing.

description_zh: 专为半导体极端应用及超大型多激光器3D打印系统开发。其强大的功率输出与极高的控制精度，为极端加工条件提供了稳定的能量基础。集成的智能主控与通信能力，可高效管理多激光头协同工作，是实现高效率、批量化增材制造的关键动力模块。 对于超大型装备，选择金威源的一体化总成方案是保障可靠性与降低总成本的核心。它极大简化了系统架构，让您能跳过最艰难的底层集成阶段，直接进入系统调试，从而极大加速产品上市进程。我们将作为您的技术合作伙伴，支持您攻克尖端工艺难题。
description_en: Engineered for extreme semiconductor applications and ultra-large multi-laser 3D printing systems, this power supply delivers exceptional output power and ultra-high control precision—providing a stable energy foundation for demanding processing conditions. Its integrated intelligent controller and communication capabilities enable efficient coordination of multiple laser heads, serving as the critical power module for high-efficiency, mass-production additive manufacturing. For ultra-large-scale equipment, Jingweiyuan’s integrated turnkey solution ensures reliability while reducing total cost of ownership. It dramatically simplifies system architecture, allowing you to bypass complex low-level integration and proceed directly to system commissioning—accelerating time-to-market. As your technical partner, we support you in mastering cutting-edge process challenges.

description_zh: 针对半导体材料处理及大型工业3D打印系统设计。其高功率密度与稳定输出能力，能满足高强度、长时间连续作业需求。智能通信接口支持与制造执行系统（MES）集成，为数字化智能制造车间提供可靠的能源控制核心。 选择金威源，面对高端装备开发，深度集成的一体化方案是简化系统架构、降低集成风险的最佳选择。它让您的团队从复杂的电子开发中解脱，全力聚焦于设备整体性能突破。基于成熟平台的开发，能显著缩短验证周期，帮助您快速响应市场需求。
description_en: Designed for semiconductor material processing and large-scale industrial 3D printing systems, this power supply delivers high power density and stable output—meeting stringent requirements for high-intensity, extended-duration continuous operation. Its intelligent communication interface enables seamless integration with Manufacturing Execution Systems (MES), providing a reliable energy control core for digitally enabled smart factories. Choosing Jingweiyuan’s deeply integrated, turnkey solution simplifies system architecture and minimizes integration risk—the optimal choice for high-end equipment development. It frees your engineering team from intricate electronics development, enabling full focus on overall system performance breakthroughs. Leveraging a mature platform significantly shortens validation cycles, helping you respond rapidly to evolving market demands.
categories_zh: 高精密振镜、激光器等配套装置

company_name: 苏州锐璞科技有限公司
description_zh: SMOOTH-SE 是锐璞科技 REPOLY 全球首发的桌面级高分子增材制造后处理熏抛设备，通过 TÜV 莱茵 CE 认证。基于自研常温熏抛技术，彻底解决了高温蒸汽带来的缺陷和失效问题，无需加热即可实现稳定、均一的表面处理，显著降低零件表面粗糙度至 Ra ≤2 μm，并同步提升机械性能。 12L 高效处理腔体，小体积却具备超强材料与工艺适配性，全面适用于各类 FDM 及 PBF 成型零件。操作简单、交互直观、高度集成，SMOOTH-SE 让专业级后处理真正进入桌面时代。
description_en: The SMOOTH-SE is RuiPu Technology’s globally debuted desktop vapor polishing system for polymer AM post-processing, certified to TÜV Rheinland CE standards. Based on RuiPu’s proprietary ambient-temperature vapor polishing technology, it eliminates defects and failures associated with high-temperature steam treatments. Surface finishing is achieved without heating—ensuring stable, uniform results and reducing surface roughness to Ra ≤ 2 μm while concurrently enhancing mechanical properties. Its compact 12 L processing chamber delivers exceptional material and process compatibility, supporting all FDM- and PBF-produced parts. Intuitive operation, user-friendly interface, and high integration make professional-grade post-processing truly accessible at the desktop level.
categories_zh: 热处理，表面处理，抛光镀膜，后处理工艺设备等

company_name: 北京世佳博科技集团有限公司
description_zh: 世佳博搅拌摩擦增材制造设备，全程固相沉积，无需熔池，显著提升成形质量与组织一致性，是一台兼顾科研探索性与工程实用性的“硬核”装备。其模块化设计与开放式接口，极大适配各类材料工艺研究、焊接过程机制分析及微观组织控制实验，是高校实验室、科研机构、以及高端制造研发平台不可或缺的“一站式”固态增材研究平台。
description_en: Shijiaobo's friction stir additive manufacturing equipment performs fully solid-state deposition without a molten pool, significantly enhancing part quality and microstructural consistency. Designed for both scientific research and engineering applications, this robust system features modular architecture and open interfaces, making it highly adaptable for materials process development, welding mechanism analysis, and microstructure control experiments. It serves as an indispensable, all-in-one solid-state additive research platform for university laboratories, research institutes, and advanced manufacturing R&D centers.

product_name_zh: EinScan Medixa 双光源无线一体式人体3D扫描仪
product_name_en: EinScan Medixa Dual-Source Wireless All-in-One Human 3D Scanner
company_name: 先临三维科技股份有限公司
description_zh: EinScan Medixa是一款专为人体高精度三维数据采集的无线一体式扫描设备。 它创新融合白光LED与红外VCSEL双光源，适应多元扫描场景，并基于人体结构学实现了智能分区扫描，大幅简化操作流程，降低使用门槛，高效完成从局部到全身的人体高精度三维采集。
description_en: The EinScan Medixa is a wireless, all-in-one 3D scanning system engineered specifically for high-precision human body data acquisition. Its innovative dual-source illumination—combining white LED and infrared VCSEL—enables versatile performance across diverse scanning scenarios. Leveraging human anatomical intelligence, the system delivers automated, intelligent region-based scanning that dramatically simplifies operation, lowers user barriers, and enables efficient, high-fidelity 3D capture from localized anatomy to full-body geometry.

company_name: CoreTechnologie
description_zh: 4D_Additive: The CAD standard for professional additive manufacturing The 4D_Additive software suite sets new standards by directly processing precise B-Rep geometries from 24 CAD formats. Instead of imprecise STL data, you can use models that comply with engineering standards, including PMI. Powerful healing functions, wall thickness analyses and automatic part orientation ensure error-free production with optimum surface quality. Maximise your efficiency with intelligent 2D/3D nesting and the automated generation of support structures and lattice cells to save material. Enhance components with over 5,000 textures directly on the CAD model. An integrated machine database and ultra-fast multiprocessor slicing (G-code, 3mf, STL) fully automate the workflow. 4D_Additive offers the complete solution for industrial 3D printing at the highest level.
description_en: 4D_Additive: The CAD standard for professional additive manufacturing. This software suite sets new benchmarks by directly processing precise B-Rep geometries from 24 native CAD formats—eliminating reliance on imprecise STL data. Models comply with engineering standards including PMI. Advanced healing functions, wall thickness analysis, and automatic part orientation ensure error-free production with optimal surface quality. Intelligent 2D/3D nesting and automated support structure and lattice cell generation maximize material efficiency. Over 5,000 textures can be applied directly to CAD models. An integrated machine database and ultra-fast multiprocessor slicing (G-code, 3MF, STL) fully automate the end-to-end workflow. 4D_Additive delivers a complete, industrial-grade solution for high-performance 3D printing.
categories_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行
applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: CoreTechnologie
description_zh: The 3D_Evolution Interoperability Software Suite is a powerful all-in-one solution for fast, licence-independent conversion, analysis and optimisation of CAD data. The CAD converter supports 24 common formats without a CAD licence and guarantees the highest VDA and SASIG quality thanks to certified healing. Feature-based conversion transfers fully parametric and editable models for CATIA, NX, CREO, SolidWorks and Inventor, among others. The JT converter enables certified 3D data exchange in the Mercedes-Benz environment, even for very large assemblies. Additional modules offer drastic data reduction and geometry simplification for IP protection, FEM tools for CAE-optimised models, advanced analyses, quality checks according to LOTAR standards, as well as a scalable Enterprise Data Manager and a fast DMU Inspector.
description_en: The 3D_Evolution Interoperability Software Suite is a powerful, license-independent all-in-one solution for rapid conversion, analysis, and optimization of CAD data. Its CAD converter supports 24 common formats without requiring a CAD license and guarantees top-tier VDA and SASIG compliance via certified healing. Feature-based conversion preserves full parametric editability for CATIA, NX, CREO, SolidWorks, and Inventor models. The JT converter enables certified 3D data exchange within the Mercedes-Benz ecosystem—even for extremely large assemblies. Optional modules provide drastic data reduction and geometry simplification for IP protection; FEM-ready CAE optimization tools; advanced quality checks per LOTAR standards; scalable Enterprise Data Manager; and high-speed DMU Inspector.

applications_zh: 汽车、交通运输与移动出行

company_name: CoreTechnologie
description_zh: 3D_Kernel_IO is a powerful software development kit (SDK) for universal CAD data interoperability. The easy-to-integrate C++ API enables reading and writing of 42 native and neutral 3D formats – without a CAD licence. Thanks to its modern, high-performance geometry kernel, 3D_Kernel_IO offers maximum precision, maximum speed and reliable quality. Supported formats include CATIA, NX, SolidWorks, Creo, Inventor, JT and STEP AP242, including assembly structures, B-REP, tessellation, features with history, PMI and metadata. Intelligent healing functions automatically correct model errors, while smart simplification reduces data by up to 95% – ideal for VR/AR and simulation. Cross-platform (Windows, Linux, macOS, ARM), flexibly licensable and ideal for CAD, CAM, CAE, VR and metrology software
description_en: 3D_Kernel_IO is a high-performance software development kit (SDK) enabling universal CAD data interoperability. Its easy-to-integrate C++ API supports reading and writing of 42 native and neutral 3D formats—without any CAD license. Powered by a modern, high-precision geometry kernel, it delivers maximum accuracy, speed, and reliability. Supported formats include CATIA, NX, SolidWorks, Creo, Inventor, JT, and STEP AP242—with full support for assemblies, B-Rep, tessellation, history-enabled features, PMI, and metadata. Intelligent healing automatically corrects model errors, while smart simplification reduces file size by up to 95%—ideal for VR/AR and simulation workflows. Cross-platform (Windows, Linux, macOS, ARM), flexibly licensable, and optimized for CAD, CAM, CAE, VR, and metrology applications.

company_name: CoreTechnologie
description_zh: 3D_Analyzer is a powerful professional CAD viewer with extensive analysis functions for all common native and neutral 3D formats. The software enables convenient viewing, checking and analysis of CAD models, including assembly structure, B-REP, tessellation, features, parameters, metadata, PMI and annotations. Precise B-REP-based measurement, sectioning and annotation functions, as well as the rapid creation of exploded views, provide efficient support for reviews. For project management tasks, 3D_Analyzer offers advanced 3D analyses such as geometry, PMI and structural comparisons, collision and distance checks, as well as wall thickness, draft angle and undercut analyses. The integrated 3D PDF converter allows models and analysis results to be easily exported as 3D PDFs and shared securely with partners.
description_en: 3D_Analyzer is a professional-grade CAD viewer equipped with comprehensive analysis capabilities for all major native and neutral 3D formats. It enables intuitive viewing, validation, and in-depth analysis of CAD models—including assembly structures, B-Rep, tessellation, features, parameters, metadata, PMI, and annotations. Precision B-Rep–based measurement, sectioning, and annotation tools—as well as rapid exploded view generation—streamline design reviews. For project management, it provides advanced 3D analyses: geometry, PMI, and structural comparisons; collision and distance detection; wall thickness, draft angle, and undercut analysis. Integrated 3D PDF export enables secure sharing of models and analysis results with partners.

description_zh: 无锡商测检测技术有限公司拥有先进、齐全的仪器设备，现有200余台，其中包括:电感耦合等离子体光谱仪、氮氢氧分析仪、直读光谱仪、��硫分析仪、金相显微镜、扫描电子显微镜、X射线荧光分析仪、基恩士3D数码显微镜VHX-X1F、电子万能试验机、高温拉力机、全自动冲击机、通用液压疲劳试验机、微机控制电子万能材料试验机、盐雾及循环腐蚀试验箱、冷凝水试验箱等主要设备。

Key equipment includes inductively coupled plasma optical emission spectrometers (ICP-OES), nitrogen/hydrogen/oxygen analyzers, direct-reading spectrometers, carbon/sulfur analyzers, metallographic microscopes, scanning electron microscopes (SEM), X-ray fluorescence (XRF) analyzers, KEYENCE 3D digital microscope VHX-X1F, universal electronic tensile testers, high-temperature tensile testers, fully automatic impact testers, servo-hydraulic fatigue testing machines, computer-controlled universal material testing machines, salt spray and cyclic corrosion test chambers, and condensation test chambers.

description_zh: 激光振镜，由X-Y光学扫描头，电子驱动放大器和光学反射镜片组成 电脑控制器提供的信号通过驱动放大电路驱动光学扫描头，从而在X-Y平面控制激光光束的偏转 振镜片的主要作用是改变光线偏转角度 具有99.5%以上的反射率
description_en: A laser galvo system comprises an X-Y optical scanning head, electronic driver amplifier, and optical reflective mirror. Signals from the host computer controller drive the scanning head via the amplifier circuit, enabling precise laser beam deflection in the X-Y plane. The galvo mirror’s primary function is to accurately steer and modulate the incident laser beam. It achieves >99.5% reflectivity across its operational wavelength range.

description_en: This laser protective window safeguards internal components of the laser head from contamination. It features precision anti-reflection coatings optimized for specific laser wavelengths to maximize transmission. Manufactured using advanced coating equipment, the substrate exhibits excellent scratch resistance and soiling resistance. With a high laser-induced damage threshold (LIDT), stable optical performance, and extended service life, it serves reliably as a durable laser output window.

description_zh: 光纤准直镜使光纤出射激光达到平行光传输的作用;光纤聚焦镜聚焦激光光束，产生高能量密度的焦点对工作物质进行加工。 有从可见光到近红外用的石英材料的透镜，和可用于350nm以下紫外光的高激光损伤阈值的合成石英透镜这两种类型。 石英材料的透镜中，备有可见光·近红外·红外三种类型的防反射膜的透镜。 可以从丰富细化的外径尺寸和焦距的系列产品中，选择符合您的技术要求的产品。
description_en: Fiber collimating lenses produce parallel laser beams from fiber-coupled sources; fiber focusing lenses concentrate laser energy into high-intensity focal spots for precision material processing. Two lens types are available: fused silica lenses for visible to near-infrared (NIR) wavelengths, and synthetic fused silica lenses with high laser damage thresholds for deep-ultraviolet (DUV) applications down to 350 nm. Visible, NIR, and IR anti-reflection coatings are offered for fused silica variants. A broad selection of outer diameters and focal lengths enables precise matching to application-specific requirements.

It ensures uniform spot size and intensity across the entire scan field. Ideal for both micro-machining and large-area processing, each unit undergoes comprehensive acceptance testing to guarantee peak optical quality and production repeatability.

company_name: 深圳市鹏扬三维科技有限公司
description_zh: 鹏扬三维新一代自主研发的PL6100 3D 打印机， 分辨率全面升级，轻松应对各种珠宝款式。批量打印速度更快；是高效率、高精度的蜡模3D打印机，可满足珠宝大批量生产。PL6100 聚焦超精细的蜡模工件，让复杂结构与独特造型从图纸轻松落地，蜡模表面质量平滑、细节展现精细、 精准度高，可满足大批量标准化生产与个性化定制需求。 3D打印模型通过失蜡铸造， 能大幅提升铸造环节效率，缩短生产周期，提升企业竞争力。
description_en: The PL6100 is Pengyang 3D’s latest-generation, independently developed jewelry wax 3D printer. Featuring upgraded resolution, it effortlessly handles intricate jewelry designs. Its accelerated batch-printing speed delivers exceptional throughput, making it a high-efficiency, high-precision solution for mass-production wax patterns. The PL6100 excels at producing ultra-fine wax models—capturing complex geometries and unique aesthetics with smooth surfaces, exquisite detail fidelity, and outstanding dimensional accuracy. These high-quality patterns enable faster investment casting cycles, reduced lead times, and enhanced competitiveness in jewelry manufacturing.

company_name: 深圳市鹏扬三维科技有限公司
description_zh: 鹏扬三维新一代自主研发的PL6300 3D打印机，以三喷头协同打印技术引领蜡模制造进入高效量产新纪元。PL6300聚焦超高性能蜡模制造，批量打印速度大幅提升，满足蜡模型大批量、高标准的生产需求。蜡模表面质量光滑细腻，细节表现力极强，尺寸精度稳定可靠，既可支持规模化标准生产，也能灵活应对个性化定制订单。依托三喷头并行作业优势，可显著缩短产品从图纸到成品的全周期时间，助力企业全面提升生产效率与市场竞争力，轻松应对多样化、高节奏的生产挑战。
description_en: The PL6300 is Pengyang 3D’s next-generation, self-developed wax 3D printer leveraging triple-nozzle synchronized printing technology—ushering in a new era of high-efficiency, high-volume wax pattern production. Engineered for ultra-high-performance wax modeling, it achieves significantly faster batch-printing speeds to meet demanding volume and precision requirements. Its wax patterns exhibit exceptional surface smoothness, extraordinary fine-detail reproduction, and stable dimensional accuracy—supporting both standardized mass production and agile, high-fidelity customization. The parallel tri-nozzle architecture shortens the overall time-to-part, empowering manufacturers to elevate productivity, accelerate time-to-market, and confidently respond to dynamic, high-velocity production demands.

product_name_zh: MMJ ProX Series 多材料 3D 打印系统
product_name_en: MMJ ProX Series Multi-Material 3D Printing System
company_name: 安美瑞亚科技
description_zh: MMJ ProX Series 是一款模块化多材料 3D 打印系统，适用于金属、陶瓷及多种先进材料组合的高功能零部件一体化制造。基于多材料喷射（Multi Material Jetting，MMJ）技术，系统最多可配置 6 个打印头，可在一次打印过程中实现真正的多材料制造、功能梯度材料（FGC）以及多种材料性能在同一零件中的集成。系统采用开放式材料平台，覆盖多种跨材料类别的高性能材料，并通过 AMAREA 的 BYOP（自带粉末）方案支持定制化材料开发。 MMJ ProX Series 具备前瞻性的可扩展架构，可选配在线激光模块，实现增材与减材相结合的混合。MMJ ProX 融合多种材料性能
description_en: The MMJ ProX Series is a modular multi-material 3D printing system designed for integrated manufacturing of high-functionality components using metals, ceramics, and advanced material combinations. Leveraging Multi-Material Jetting (MMJ) technology, the system supports up to six printheads, enabling true multi-material fabrication, functionally graded materials (FGM), and seamless integration of diverse material properties within a single part. Its open-material platform accommodates a broad range of high-performance materials across multiple material classes, and is compatible with AMAREA’s Bring-Your-Own-Powder (BYOP) program for customized material development. The MMJ ProX Series features a forward-looking, scalable architecture with optional in-situ laser modules to support hybrid additive–subtractive manufacturing. It unifies multiple material properties within a single platform.
categories_zh: 陶瓷、石膏与玻璃3D打印设备
